author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota GR Yaris incane nesisindo esiphansi okuyenza ikwazi ukusheshe inyuse ijubane Image: Fanelesibonge Bengu IMOTO: TOYOTA GR YARIS NGIZITHOLE ngihleka ngedwa, hhayi ngoba bengingenelwa yimali yini, kodwa ngijatshuliswa wubumnandi beToyota GR Yaris ebengihamba ngayo. Uyazi kunezimoto okuba sengathi zikhuluma nawe uma uzishayela zikwenze uyizwe into ofuna iyenze ngaleso sikhathi. I-GR Yaris ingenye yazo futhi ikwenza ingishiye ngimangele ukuthi kwaToyota benza kanjani ukuthi bakwazi ukuthola amandla angaka enjini eyi-three cylinder. Ngesikhathi ifika okokuqala eNingizimu Afrika le njini engu-1.6 litre turbo kaphethroli yayinamandla angu-198kW akwazi ukuyisusa ku-0 iye ku-100km/h ngemizuzwana engu-5.5. Kulokhu sebewanyusile asengu-210kW ne-torque engu-400Nm. Nesikhathi esithathayo ufika ku-100km/h sesinciphile sesingu-5.2 yize isisindo sayo sinyuke kancane saba ngu-1 300kg. Phela u-gearbox ofakwe lapha uyi-8 speed GAZOO Racing Direct Automatic Transmission oyaziyo into yayo ngoba ushintsha kamnandi ngesikhathi esifanele. Uma ngifuna ukuzibambela koodwa bengishintsha ngama-pedal shifters noma kulona igiya. Ngiyazi igenge eningi ithanda ukuzibambela ekushintsheni amagiya ezimotweni zalolu hlobo kodwa angikhali ngalo

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ISITOBHA seBafana Bafana, uMbekezeli Mbokazi, siphenduka phambi kukaMo Salah emdlalweni we-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) e-Ardar Stadium, eMorocco. ngoLwesihlanu Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUGCINE kuphelile ngerekhodi leBafana Bafana lokungehlulwa leminyaka emibili ngesikhathi ikhala ngaphansi kwi-Egypt emdlalweni wesibili wesigaba samaqoqo kwi-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) eMorocco ngoLwesihlanu ntambama. IBafana ingene enkundleni, i-Adrar Stadium, e-Agadir, ibheke ukuqoqa amaphuzu amathathu abezoyibeka esicongweni sikaGroup B kwazise ibilingana ngamathathu ne-Egypt. Nokho igcine ikhale ngaphansi ngo 1-0 wephenathi kaMo Salah ayishaye esiwombeni sokuqala. Le phenathi idaleke ngokudlaliswa kabi kukaSalah nguKhuluso Mudau obeke isandla ebusweni balo mgadli weLiverpool besebhokisini. Amapuhuzu amathathu atholwe yi-Egypt ayibeke esicongweni kuGroup B ngayisithupha. Ilandelwe yiBafana ngamathathu ewathole yehlula i-Angola emdlalweni wokuqala. IZimbabwe ne-Angola banephuzu iqembu ngalinye kulandela ukudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 emdlalweni odlale ngaphambi koweBafana ne-Egypt. Ukwehlulwa kweBafana yi-Egypt kusho ukunqamuka komgqigqo wemidlalo engu-26 ingahlulwa. Leli qembu laseNingizimu Afrika belilokhu lagcina ukuthola isibhaxu kwiMali emdlalweni wokuvula we-Afcon ka-2023 e-Ivory Coast. Enkundleni, iBafana iqale kahle

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IQHAWE le-Orlando Pirates, uRelebohile Mofokeng, lijabula nozakwabo emuva kokushaya elinye lamagoli amathathu ngesikhathi bexebula iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, izolo Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-ORLANDO Pirates yesule izinyembeni umqeqeshi, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ibhubhudla iTS Galaxy emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto. Amagoli eZimnyama ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng (amathathu), Tshepang Moremi, Kamohelo Sebelebele noMlungisi Mbunjana okube wumkhonto ogwaze ekhaya. Ngalokhu, iPirates yehlise iMamelodi Sundowns ezicongweni se-log yePremiership, yavula igebe lephuzu. Ukunqoba kwePirates nokushaya kwayo amagoli ayisithupha kuyinselelo kumaBrazilians abedlala oweCaf Champions League. ISundowns sekufanele ikhokhe isikweletu ngokuqoqa amaphuzu, enyuse nesibalo samagoli. Akubuzwa ukuthi ukuwina ngale ndlela kweZimnyama kwesula izinyembezi u-Ouaddou ubekhihla esikaNandi ngokuyeka amathuba kwabadlali bakhe kwazise kungenzeka kugcine sekubalwa amagoli ekugcineni. "Lena yimpendulo ebheke kubantu abangabaza ukuzinikela kwabadlali. Ngihlala ngisho ukuthi akekho eqenjini lami ongena enkundleni efuna ukuhlulwa noma adlale ngokulingana. Sithumela umyalezo oshubile wokuthi akukapheli ngathi futhi sizolwa kuze kube sekugcineni," kusho u-Ouaddou emuva komdlalo. Kulo mdlalo, iPirates ihlasele

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI kamaskandi uNtencane usematheni kulezi zinsuku nge-albhamu yakhe yesithupha esihloko sithi Awuyiphumuze UMCULI kamaskandi wodumo lwengoma ethi Wawuthembeni, uNtencane usedalule ukuthi ukugalela ngendlela ehlukile emculweni wakhe ngokuthi adidiyele imiyalezo ehlukene, futhi eminye yayo egxile ezindikimbeni angajwayele ukukhuluma ngazo - ngenye yezinto abona ukuthi imsize kakhulu ukuthi kusabalale i-albhamu yakhe entsha ethi Awuyiphumuze. UNtencane usematheni kulezi zinsuku ngale albhamu yakhe yesithupha enezingoma eziwu-16, ephume phakathi noFebhuwari, okubukeka abantu beyithakasela kakhulu njengoba izingoma eziwu-13 kuyo sezidlalwe amahlandla angaphezu kuka-100 000, nezimbili ezithi Ukhethe Mina nethi Engalobolile - ezidlalwe ngaphezu kuka-1 million. “Lokhu kungenxa yokuthi ngathi sengicwaninga umsebenzi wami wangonyaka odlule ngabona ukuthi awuhambanga neze ngendlela ebengifisa ngayo, lokho kwangikhuthaza ukuthi ngizinike isikhathi esanele sokupheka lona ngendlela efanele nezogculisa, engibona sekuqalile ukuthela izithelo njengoba banda abantu abathakasela le albhamu,” usho kanje. UMCULI kamaskandi uNtencane usematheni kulezi zinsuku nge-albhamu yakhe yesithupha esihloko sithi Awuyiphumuze Eqhuba, uthe kumthathe cishe izinyanga ezinhlanu ukupheka le albhamu, wase

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umonakalo odaleke eTehran. AMAZWE alwayo, iMelika ne-Iran avumelane ngokubeka phansi izikhali okwesikhashana. La mazwe avumelene ngokumisa impi amasonto amabili ukuze kuqhubeke izingxoxo zokuqeda impi eyaqala ngenyanga edlule. Ukumiswa kwempi kumenyezelwe uMengameli waseMelika, uMnuz Donald Trump, ngoLwesibili ebusuku. UTrump unqume ukumisa impi ngenxa yokuthi i-Iran, ivume ukuvula umzila wemikhumbi, iStrait of Hormuz. I-Iran ibivimbile eStrait of Hormuz obekwenza ukuthi imikhumbi ethwele u-oyela oqhamuka emazweni aseMiddle East, ingakwazi ukudlula. UTrump ubesabise ngokuthi uzoqotha imbokodo nesisekelo e-Iran, uma iqhubeka nokuvimba eStrait of Hormuz. Ubenikeze i-Iran umnqamulajuqu wangoLwesibili ukuba ivulele imikhumbi. UTrump uveze ukuthi unxuswe abaholi basePakistan ukuba angangqongqisi ingqalasizinda kagesi i-Iran. "Ngilimisile ibutho ebese lilungele ukuphuma uma i-Iran ingavumi ukuvula eStrait of Hormuz." UTrump uthe i-Iran imnikeze amaphuzu ayishumi efuna kuvunyelwane ngawo ngaphambi kokuthi ivume ukuqeda impi. "Ngiwabukile la maphuzu, sizoxoxa ngawo." Womabili amazwe akuchaze njengokunqoba ukumiswa kwempi. Ukumiswa kwempi kwenze ukuthi kwehle inani lika-oyela izolo. Amanani ka-oyela anyuka kakhulu ngemuva kokuqubuka kwempi

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULungelo KM osejoyine uhlelo iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1 Image: Instagram/Lungelo KM UZONCELISA amawele uLungelo KM Mdletshe, odume nge-podcast yakhe yakwi-YouTube njengoba esejoyine uhlelo, iDaily Thetha kwiSABC 1. ULungelo KM uzakhele udumo nge-podcast yakhe i-Engineer Your Life lapho kufika khona abantu abahlukene bexoxa ngempilo yabo. Ngesikhathi kuqala isizini yesikhombisa yeDaily Thetha edlala ngo-11 ekuseni, umenyezelwe njengomunye wabethuli bayo. Ujoyine umsakazi woKhozi FM uNeliswa Cele, Ursula Mariani noGcina Mdikane. ULungelo KM uthe uletha izisombululo ohlelweni okuyinto ayenza emsebenzini wakhe wansuku zonke njengoba engunjiniyela kagesi. Ukuncelisa kwakhe amawele kuqinisekiswe ekhasini le-podcast yakhe kwi-X. UNeliswa uthe ukuba wumsakazi kumlungiselele ukuthi angene kwithelevishini. Uthe kuhluke ngokuthi abantu akhuluma nabo uyababona bukhoma nendlela abazizwa ngayo kwazise kusuke kunezethameli e-studio. “Yonke into yenzeka bukhoma, kumele ucabange ngokushesha. Kuyajabulisa, kumnandi futhi ngiyakuthanda." Kulolu hlelo oluqoshwa bukhoma, kukhulunywa ngezihloko ezihlukene ezithinta abantu. Ababukeli balo abase-studio, emgwaqweni nasemakhaya bayakwazi ukuphawula. Kuphinde kulandwe nongoti abazonaba kabanzi ngezihloko okusuke kukhulunywa ngazo. Phambilini

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI wasemuva, uLiam De Kock, uyabuqonda ubungozi beSiwelele FC abazobhekana nayo emdlalweni weBetway Premiership eChatsworth Stadum namuhla ebusuku Image: Isithombe:FACEBOOK/DURBAN CITY ISITOBHA seDurban City, uLiam De Kock, siyachazeka ngokubukelwa phansi kwabo kwiligi yeBetway Premiership. ICity engomakoti kwiPremiership, imangaze abaningi iqala isizini ngegiya eliphezulu kule ligi ethathwa njengenye yanzima ebholeni lase-Afrika. Emidlalweni eyisihlanu, iwine emibili, yadlala ngokulingana kwemibili, yahlulwa kowodwa. Leli qembu eliphekwa ngumqeqeshi, uGavin Hunt, lithola le miphumela nje, lisathungatha abadlali elizoqinisa ngabo njengoba lilwela ukungabuyeli kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship. Nokho selivele linaso isisekelo esiqinile kwazise lishaya ngabadlali abanamava okubalwa kubona unozinti uDarren Keet noThabo Nodada abagawulwe yizembe neCape Town City ekupheleni kwesizini edlule. UDe Kock, owayedlalela iStellenbosch FC kwiDStv Diski Challenge, ubona ukuthathwa kancane kwabo kubasebenzela. "Kusuka emdlalweni odlule (abahlulwe kuwona yiSekhukhune United ngo 2-0) besisebenza kanzima, sizama ukulungisa amaphutha esiwenzile. Okungijabulisa kakhulu wukuthi abantu basithatha kancane, abalazi izinga eliphezulu kubadlali esinabo. Iyangithokozisa futhi nendlela esizwana ngayo singabadlali. Ngakho enkundleni

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala ngokuthi isihlobo ebesihlala nabafi sikhuluma izinto ezingafani ngesigameko. Ngakolunye uhlangothi kuthiwa lesi sihlobo satshela umndeni ukuthi isigebengu sigasele naso sikhona. Nokho kuthiwa emaphoyiseni sathi safika umonakalo usuvele wenzekile, isigebengu saphuma siqhasha, sesibona sona. Izihlobo ziphinde zaveza ukuthi okunye okwenza zishaye amakhala wukuthi kukhona izinsolo zokuhlukumeza amanye amalungu omndeni abazi ngazo, kodwa uNkk Khumalo ebengakaze abhoboke ngazo. Isihlobo sabafi, Isolezwe elalikhulume naso ngeledlule, sithe sesicela ukungaphawuli ngoba bayesaba. “Umndeni ubufuna lolu lwazi lube yimfihlo. Asazi ukuthi luphume kanjani,” kusho isihlobo. Owomndeni uqhube wathi okwenza umndeni ube namanzi emadolweni wukuthi akukaboshwa muntu namanje. “Kungangcono uma (umsolwa) esebanjiwe, esengaphakathi,” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLt Col Paul Magwaza, ngesikhathi eqinisekisa isigameko wathi amaphoyisa aseMpangeni aphenya amacala amabili okubulala kanjalo nelokugqekeza kulandela isigameko esenzeke

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: yi-6 speed automatic. Ngishayele ewumshini ozishintshayo i-SX eGoli ngesikhathi yethulwa kuleli sonto ngayizwa ikhombisa ukuba namandla enele. Uma ufuna ukudlula ezinye izimoto kumele uzinike isikhathi esincane idonse kahle amandla bese uyadlula kodwa mhlawumbe kuzoba ngcono uma injini isivuleke kahle ngoba ibiseyintsha. Amabhampu ibikufihla ukuzwakala kwawo ngaphakathi. Kuyasiza ukuthi igabade ilishiye ngo-195mm nokwenza umgwaqo uwubone kahle. Ebesihamba ngayo ibisahambe amakhilomitha angaphansi kuka-200 futhi kudizili ibiveza ukuthi idla 6.3l/100km. Kubo kwayo bathi iphuza 5.3l/100km (5.0l/100km kwi-manual). Ngethangi bathi uhamba 850km. Uma uyibuka ngaphambili iCarens ungazitshela ukuthi yimoto kagesi ngenxa yendlela i-grille eyakhiwa ngayo phezulu sengathi ivalekile. Inama-LED headlights nama-daytime running lights anolayini owahlanganisayo. I-LS inamasondo anamakhava, amalambu azikhanyisayo uma kumnyama, ikhamera eveza ingemuva uma uhlehla ne-screen se-infotainment esingu-8 inch. Uma unyukela kwi-LX ufica amarimu angu-17 inch, izibuko ezivaleka ngogesi, ama-roof rails, izihlalo ezifakwe isikhumba sokuzakhela, cruise control, indawo yokushaja ngaphandle kwentambo nokunye. Kwi-EX kwengezwe amaLED daytime running lights, idunyiswa ngebhathini, i-screen se-infotainment

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: leyo nkinga. UPHUME enjena emilenzeni esibhedlela iDundee Provincial, uNkk Martha Mlangeni ekhala ngomiyane okuthiwa bagcwele esibhedlela, nokugcine kumenela eselulamela ekhaya “Leso simo siphoqe ukuthi umama aze acele ukudedelwa izinsukwana ayolulamela ekhaya ngoFebhuwari 13 ngoba engasakwazi ukubekezela, kanti kuzothi esesekhaya ashone. Bekumele abuyele esibhedlela ngoLwesibili, usho kanje. Eqhuba, uthe ukholwa wukuthi ukube isimo sesibhedlela besigculisa ngabe mhlawumbe unina akafanga, ngoba ubengeke acele ukuthi adedelwe ayolulamela ekhaya izinsukwana ukuba konke bekuhamba kahle esibhedlela. “Okunye okungiphatha kabi kakhulu wukuthi ngenkathi umama esalulamela ekhaya ngizamile kaningi ukuxhumana nabesibhedlela. Bengizama ukuthola ukuthi kungani isimo esinjena bengasisukumeli ngoba phela sibeka engcupheni impilo yeziguli - kepha bavika ngokuthi abanayo imali yokulungisa izinto ezonakele esibhedlela. Lokho kukhombe ngokusobala ukuthi abayikhathalele impilo yeziguli,” kusho uDube. Uthe kuyadumaza ukuthi isibhedlela esikhulu nesidala kangaka futhi esiwusizo emphakathini waseDundee, Glencoe, Newcastle nakwezinye izindawo ezakhele iDundee - kubukeka singenandaba nenhlalonhle, ukuphepha nokuhlanzeka okubalulekile ezigulini ezelashelwa khona. “Ngifisa ukuthi kube nezinyathelo ezithathwayo ngalesi simo

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: nasezitheni hhayi kwiChiefs kuphela: Kunesikhathi eside kule sizini lapho iChiefs ebihluleka khona ukushaya amagoli amabili noma ngaphezulu emdlalweni kodwa muva nje kubukeka sengathi usuvulekile umpompi. IChiefs izofika kwiPirates isikwazi ukuthola amagoli ngezindlela eziningi ezahlukene zokudlala. Ngaphandle kukaFlavio Silva waseGuinea-Bissau, aseyaqala ukuvela amagoli nakubadlali abahlanganisa uGlody Lilepo waseDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC) noMduzuzi Shabalala. USilva uzihola phambili ngamagoli eligi ayisikhombisa bese kuba nguShabalala odabuka eMzansi osendaweni yesibili ngamane. UNOZINTI weKaizer Chiefs obuya ekulimaleni uBrendon Petersen Ukululama kukanozinti ongukaputeni: Ubuthaka beChiefs ezintini ikakhulukazi kuBruce Bvuma buhlale obala njengoba uPetersen ebelulama kusukela ehlinziwe ngenxa yokugula. Njengoba esebuyile (uPetersen) nodonga lwasemuva lweChiefs lukhombisa izimpawu zokuphaphama. Ukungabibikho kukaPetersen kwahlala obala kowabakhaya odlule kwaze kwaba nezingxenye zabalandeli beChiefs ezaphuma noBvuma iqhubu zimgxeka ngokuzenzela phansi. Ububanzi besikwati seChiefs: IChiefs iya emdlalweni wabakhaya bekhululekile ebhentshini uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef ngoba akusebona abadlali abambalwa abaphakamisa isandla uma kukhona okungahambi kahle kepha nalaba abasuka ebhentshini bafika enkundleni kucace. IChiefs

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kukhona umdlali wasemuva okufanele eqiwe yijezi cishe masonto onke ngenxa yezigwebo zamakhadi. Sizama ngakho konke okusemandleni ukusigwema lesi simo esisihlupha ezitobheni kodwa silokhu sisilandele njalo. “Isifiso sethu wukuba nesikimu esiqondile ikakhulukazi ezitobheni ngoba lokhu kuyasiza kodwa kasinawo uphawini wokukwenza lokhu ngoba isifo samakhadi nokulimala njalo kwezitobha kulokhu kusihlasele.” Amakhosi azodlala olandelayo weligi neTS Galaxy eFB Stadium ngoMgqibelo ngo-3 ntambama.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: IZIDUMBU zabazalwane ababulawelwe ukuba ngamaKhrestu e-Afrika IMIBIKO eshaqisayo idalula ukuthi bangaphezu kuka-200 000 abantu base-Afrika ababulawe ngesihluku, noma badlwengulwa, bathunjwa noma baphoqwa ukuba bashiye amakhaya namabhizinisi abo nyakenye ngenxa yokuba ngamaKhrestu. Lezi zibalo ezithusayo zivezwe esitatimendeni esithunyelelwe abezindaba ngumkhulumeli kazwelonke wenhlangano ezwelana nabantu bakwa-Israel, iSouth African Friends of Israel (SAFI), uMnuz Bafana Modise. Kulesi sitatimende kubhalwe ukuthi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 1 nyakenye nomhla ka-31 Mashi kulo nyaka, imibiko iveze ukuthi luyanda udlame olubhekiswe kubantu abangamaKhrestu emazweni ase-Afrika. Embikweni wekota yokuqala weSAFI mayelana nokuqothwa nokuhlukunyezwa kwamaKhrestu e-Afrika, le nhlamgano iyakuqinisekisa ukuthi angaphezu kuka-200 000 amaKhrestu adabuka e-Afrika avelelwe yilo mshophi phakathi kuka-Ephreli 2025 noMashi 2026. UModise uthe ukusebenzela izinkampani ezinjengeReuters, Africa Centre for Strategic Studies, Open Doors, Vatican News ne-US State Department kukhathule enkulu indima ekuhlanganiseni ucwaningo. Eqhuba uModise uthe kulolu cwaningo kubalwa namaKhrestu angu-180 abulawe yiBarnabas Aid eMiddle Belt eNigeria ngo-Ephreli 2025, angu-200 abulawe eYelwata eBenue State ngoJuni 2025, abazalwane abangu-38

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMELISIZWE Xulu osezakhele ugazi ngokuphatha izinhlelo zemicimbi kamaskandi UMLINGISI osezakhele ugazi ngokulingisa emidlalweni ye-TV ekhonjiswa kwiYouTube, uMC Melisizwe Mnomiya (Xulu), usekhonya ekuphatheni izinhlelo emicimbini kamaskandi. UMelisizwe useke washiya izethameli ziphethwe yizisu ngenxa yamancoko kwiMbadada Maskandi Festival, Nisishiyelani Maskandi Festival, Impumelelo Maskandi Festival, Ingoma Yasemazimeleni eShowe, Kissbefore Maskandi Experience, Bhinca Day, Isintu Sethu neminye. "Kumanje ngithole ithuba lokusebenza emcimbini Umzumbe Maskandi Festival ezinkundleni zemidlalo eSibanini, eMthwalume ngoJuni 16. Lokho kusho ukukhula kwami ezingeni lokuba wumphathi wezinhlelo," kusho leli jongo. UMelisizwe ubonge kakhulu kubahleli bemicimbi ngokukholelwa ekhonweni lakhe. Uthe ungene kulo mkhakha emuva kokuhlangana nomsakazi ongumphathi wezinhlelo, uNkosikhona Mthalane. "Le nsizwa yangihlanganisa noSgwili Mhlongo ocula umaskandi abuye ahlele imicimbi ngakubo eBhamshela eNgcongangconga lapho engabamba khona umbhobho okokuqala njengomphathi wezinhlelo." Uthe ikhono lakhe lahlonzwa wuMhlongo ngaphambi kokutuswa nokugqugquzelwa wuKing Zoso noSphalaphala. "Bawuthanda umsebenzi wami, kwathi ngo-Okthoba 2021 ezitolo KwaMashu, uSphalaphala wangimema. Ngafika lapho ngaphatha uhlelo noZama 'Zulu Glamour' Mthalane ongasekho emhlabeni. Ngathi uma

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YINTOKAZI esolwa ngokuqola nokwebela izintombi zayo eThekwini INTOKAZI okuthiwa ibaqedile abesifazane ebijola nabo ngokubaqola nokubantshontshela ZIMKHALELE owesifazane waseThekwini obesebaqedile abesifazane athandana nabo ngokubaqola nokubantshontshela. Le ntokazi (32), esiligodlile igama layo ize ivele eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini namhlanje, ikhalelwe ngamasongo kaSigonyela eThekwini izolo. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uSergeant Thenjiswa Ngcobo, ukuqinisekisile ukuboshwa komsolwa amaphoyisa aseDurban Central. Uthe owesifazane ophila impilo yokuthandana nabanye besifazane usolwa ngecala lenkohlakalo nelokweba. "Uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini ngoMashi 3, 2026," kuphetha uSergeant Ngcobo. Udaba ngokukhohlakala kukamsolwa luqale ukudalulwa kwiTikTok intokazi eyaziwa ngoNksz Alabaster "Cijimpi" Zwane. Wachaza umsolwa njengomuntu wesifazane obefike akhohlise abantu besifazane ngokuthi uyabathanda bese ebagila uma esefike ezindlini zabo. U-Alabaster uze wafaka i-video ebiveza umsolwa ekhipha umbhede emqashweni wentombi yakhe eHomii, eThekwini ngolunye usuku. "Amaqola lawa aseThekwini. U.... (emgagula ngegama), akadlali. Ngisho umbhede uyawuqukula. KwakuseHomii lana, enentombi athandana nayo. Wakwazi ukungena kanti amakhamera azomdividiya. Ngisho umbhede uyaphuma," kusho u-Alabaster eveza umsolwa eqiqinga umbhede nomatilasi. "Indoda yomgunyathi. Ufike

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kwakukade kuphume umyalelo wokuthi ayohlolwa ingqondo kulandela ukuvela kolwazi lokuthi wake wathikamezeka eminyakeni eminingi edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi lo mbiko noma umphumela wokuhlolwa kwakhe awukaze ubuye ukuzokwethulwa enkantolo ukuthi udokotela wamhlola maqede wathola umphumela othini. Imantshi, uNkk Wendolyn Robinson, ibe isilihlehlisela uLwesithathu oluzayo icala. Abasolwa bathamele icala ngohlelo lwe-video bengaphakathi ejele laseWestville, abezanga siqu sabo eNkantolo yeMantshi yasePinetown. Umndeni kamufi nakuba ukhombise ukumangala ngendida yokuthi idokodo liphi, uthe awukabi nazo izikhalazo ngecala, usazoqhubeka nokulokhu uza enkantolo ukuzolethamela. Umufi njengoba ayeduke ebuya emsebenzini ngo-Okthoba nyakenye, kuphele izinyanga ezintathu ethathwa njengomuntu odukile. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lwagcina luvundulule ukuthi umakhelwane wakhe, uMbhele, wuye onesandla ekudukeni kwakhe. Kuthiwa wagonyuluka, washo nokuthi bambulala bayomphonsa emfuleni. Emva kwengonyuluka yakhe, umndeni namaphoyisa wabe usuya endaweni yesigameko lapho wafike wathola khona isidumbu sikamufi, sase zingcwatshwa ngesizotha. Waveza ukushaqeka ngokuthi uMbhele wuye ongumsolwa wokuqala ecaleni, wathi babejwayelene kakhulu nomufi, ehlale efika ekhaya labo ukuzomvakashela. Nokho baveza ukuthi emva kokunyamalala kwakhe,

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: iSundowns ishaye igoli eTunisia ukuzibeka ethubeni elingcono lokuqedela umsebenzi emdlalweni womlenze wesibili ekhaya. "Ngikholwa wukuthi uma iSundowns ingakwazi ukushaya i-Esperance ingaba nethuba elikhulu lokuyinqoba le ndebe yeChampions ngoba lawa amanye amaqembu asele, iBerkane ne-FAR Rabat akuwona amaqembu angayithwalisa kanzima kangako." UKekana ugcizelele ubumqoka bamava abadlali okubalwa kubo uTeboho Mokoena noThemba “Mshishi” Zwane kulo mdlalo. “Yisikhathi sokuthi abadlali abanjengoTeboho Mokoena bakhombise amava abo kulo mqhudelwano, ikakhulukazi uMshishi, okuwuyena no-Onyango (Denis) abasasele eqenjini lika-2016 elawina le ndebe.” Imidlalo yowandulela owamanqamu weCaf Champions League: FAR Rabat v RS Berkane (Prince Moulay Abdellah Stadium) Esperance Tunis v Mamelodi Sundowns (Hammadi Agrebi Stadium)

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, ufisa baqhubeke nokujabula kanje noma sebekwiCaf Champions League UKUNGAXOLELI okukhonjiswa yiMamelodi Sundowns emidlalweni yakamuva yeBetway Premiership yikhona okungaba yisikhali saleli qembu laseChloorkop, esifihlekile njengoba selingena kuvuthondaba kwiCAF Champions League. Lona ngumbono kaMiguel Cardoso oyinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiSundowns eyagcina ukuqukula iChampions League eminyakeni engu-10 edlule, kusekhona uPitso “Jingles” Mosimane. ISundowns ezama ukuwina isicoco seligi yaseNingizimu Afrika okwehlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana, isiwine kwiligi kwaze kwaba kawu-10 ngaphandle kokuphazanyiswa wukudlala ngokulingana. Ngenxa yale fomu, iSundowns isibuyele esicongweni kwi-log futhi iyona esithishwa ngabaningi ukuthi igoduke nesicoco yize kuke kwaba nomuzwa wokuthi i-Orlando Pirates ikhombisa izimpawu zokuqina ngokwanele ukuyigudluza. Kule mpelasonto, iSundowns izoma kwiligi ibhekane nomdlalo womlenze wokuqala wowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League ne-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisisa, ngeSonto ngo-9 ebusuku, eHammadi Agrebi Stadium, eRades. Lo mdlalo unzima ngezindlela eziningi kwiSundowns kodwa okuseqhulwini ngukuthi uCardoso uyobhekana neqembu lakhe lakudala. Kuzobe kungokwesithathu amasizini elandelana la maqembu ehlangana esigabeni somkhumulajezi kulo mqhudelwano kwazise i-Esperance kaCardoso

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane. Ngokwesitatimende somndeni, imininingwane ngezinhlelo zomngcwabo isazomenyezelwa. U-CYNTHIA Shange ewina isicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngeminyaka yo-1970s UNDABA Mhlongo ephethe into enesithombe sikaCynthia Shange kuSivumelwano U-CYNTHIA Shange emele iNingizimu Afrika ngo-1972 U-CYNTHIA Shange elingisa noSindi Dlathu kuMuvhango U-CYNTHIA Shange mhlazane ehlonishwa ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement U-CYNTHIA SHANGE noNONHLE THEMA

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Usomabhizinisi ochithwe yinkantolo uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli UKHOMISHANA wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uGeneral Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, usishayele ihlombe isinqumo senkantolo ISICHITHE nezindleko iNkantolo eNkulu yaseThekwini, izolo, isicelo sikasomabhizini osematheni, uMnuz Calvin Mathibeli, sokudlulisela phambili icala. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uMathibeli ubefake isicelo sokuphikisa isinqumo esakhishwa yinkantolo ngoFebhuwari 26 nonyaka. Ngalelo langa, inkantolo yayimyalele ukuthi asuse zonke izinkulumo zakhe ayeziphanyeke ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, ezazidicilela phansi igama likaKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. “Inkantolo yayimnike amahora angu-24 ukuba enze lokho. Yayithe kufanele azikhiphe nakuma-website kanjalo nabakwezindaba ezi-online,” kusho uNetshiunda. Wabe eseyalelwa nokuthi angaphinde asole uMkhwanazi ngezinsolo ezingamampunge, wase eyalelwa ukuthi akhokhele zonke izindleko zabameli. UNetshiunda uthe izinsolo ezehlisa isithunzi ezenziwe uMathibeli, bezingasingcolisa isithunzi sikaMkhwanazi kanjalo nombutho wamaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal. Uthe uMkhwanazi uyasamukela isinqumo sakamumva senkantolo, wathi siyisifundo esibalulekile kulabo abavele badicilele phansi isithunzi sabantu ngaphandle kobufakazi. “Lokhu kunqoba okwezakhamuzi zaseNingizimu Afrika eziwugcinayo umthetho, ezingayingeni eyobugebengu futhi eziphupha ngezwe elingenabugebengu. Nanoma ubani angasolwa kodwa ukwehlisa

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: jump ngo-2010, edla umhlanganiso kwi-World Junior Championships, eCanada. Wenza esifanayo nango-2011, edla umhlanganiso kwi-All Africa Games eMozambique, walandela ngokuba yingqwele kwi-World Championships ngo-2017, e-England. Waphinda wahlabana kuma-Commonwealth Games, e-Australia, ngo-2018. Kanti ngaphambi kwalokho, wayebuye nendondo yesiliva kuma-Olympic Games eBrazil, ngo-2016. “Lokhu kusho lukhulu kimi. Kuwubufakazi bokuthi ngeke uliqede iphupho uma esaphila umnikazi walo, iphupho liyaqhubeka. "Ngonyaka odlule ngilale isithupha (kwi-ASA Championships) kowamanqamu. Kodwa manje ngigxumela ukunika abantu ithemba nokukhombisa ukuthi noma nini uma unikwa ithuba lisebenzise,” kusho uManyonga, osebheke amaCommonwealth Games ka-2026, azoba seGlasgow, eScotland, ngoJulayi. “Ngiyakulangazelela ukuyobamba iqhaza emiqhudelwaneni yomhlaba kodwa ngithatha umqhudelwano ngamunye ngaphandle kokuzifakela ingcindezi.” Abanye abenze kahle kuma-ASA Championships; nguTshepi Tshite odle umhlanganiso ku-1500m kwabagijimayo, uSinesipho Dembile wanqoba ku-200m, uLythe Pillay wavikela isicoco ku-400m. Kwabesifazane kugiye uTayla Kavanagh ku-5000m, kwathi uPrudence Sekgodiso wavikela ngempumelelo isicoco sakhe ku-800m.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UBaby Cele ongomunye wabalingisi abebelingisa indawo ephambili emdlalweni, iGenesis ophelayo kusasa kuMzansi Magic SEKUSELE kancane ziphothulwe izinhlelo zomdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis, efinyelela emaphethelweni kusasa. Lo mdlalo obukhonjiswa ngo-7.30, phakathi nesonto nogxile kwezenkolo, ukwengavuselelwanga emidlalweni ekhona kulesi siteshi, iningi layo eqale ngonyaka odlule. NgoFebhuwari umdlalo Ithonga ufinyelele emaphethelweni, okuze kube manje awukho umdlalo ovale isikhala sawo. Kunalokho uMzansi Magic uthathe umdlalo Inimba obukhonjiswa ngo-9 ebusuku, wawehlisela ku-8.30. Umthombo weSolezwe ongaphakathi kulo mdlalo, uveze ukuthi kusuka ngoJulayi, kuzoqala umdlalo ozovala isikhala seGenesis, kodwa umdlalo Inimba wona usazoqhubeka nokuba kulesi sikhathi okuso manje njengoba zingekho izindaba ezithinta ukumenyezelwa kwemidlalo emibili. "Ngenyanga ezayo sizomemezela umdlalo omusha ozovala isikhala seGenesis njengoba iphela manje. Okwamanje umdlalo basematasa nawo, uzoqala ukuqoshwa ngenyanga ezayo bese kuthi ngoJuni maphakathi nawo kumenyezelwe konke ngawo. Yebo iMultichoice ibhekene nobunzima bokubeka isenti phezu kwelinye kodwa kulesi sikhala ngeke kungabi khona mdlalo oba khona. Ngibona sengathi wumdlalo wesithathu ongeke usaba khona," kusho

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: kwamanye amawadi uma kunokhetho lokuchibiyela. Ihlale iyindaba egudwini emaqenjini ezombusazwe indaba yokuthuthwa kwabantu abangahlali kuleyo ndawo, bayovota kwenye indawo uma kunalolu khetho. Isikhulu sekhomishini yezokhetho esifundazweni, uDkt Khulekani Zulu, sithe ngaphambi kokhetho badedela uhlu lwabavoti kuleyo ndawo ukuze amaqembu akwazi ukukhalaza uma kukhona angakuboni kahle. "Amaqembu analo ilungelo lokufaka isikhalazo ukuze sisibheke siyikhomishini uma kukhona abantu abangahlali kuleyo wadi. Kumele alethe nobufakazi balokhu ukuze sikwazi ukuphenya," kusho uZulu. Kuvele ukuthi ngo-Agasti, amaqembu kumele aqale uhlelo lokuqoka azofolosa ngabo okhethweni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: livulekile futhi kunezindawo eziningi zokubeka izinto njengeselula, iziphuzo nokunye. Ebhuthini isikhala singu-405 litres. Emgwaqweni ihamba ngenjini engu-1.0 litre engenayo i-turbo. Inamandla angu-52kW ne-torque engu-96Nm njengakwiTriber. Nokho ngiyizwe ikhombisa ukuba nempilo kuneTriber. Kunemiqansa ibitabalasa iya phambili yize kodwa isikhathi esiningi bengihamba ngedwa ngingalayishe nampahla. U-gearbox uyi-5 speed manual. Bengixukuzeka uma ngishintsha amagiya, ngokuhamba kwesikhathi ngayibamba ukuthi i-clutch ithanda ukuba yinde ngakho kumele ngiyidedele kahle ngaphambi kokunyathela amafutha. Kuphethroli ibidla amalitha angu-7.6 ngo-100km. KwaRenault nokho bazoyilamanisa ngenenjini ene-turbo emasontweni ambalwa azayo. Kwezokuphepha nezinsiza zomshayeli bafake amabhreki i-ABS, EBD, iyasho ukuthi ungakanani umoya osemathayini, inendawo yokufasa isihlalo sengane ne-Eletronic Stability Program, Traction Control System nama-airbag ayisithupha. Renault KIGER MT Techno - R244 999 Ifika ne-warranty yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-150 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka emibili noma u-30 000km.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo uLusanda Beja oza eThekwini emcimbini iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs ezoba ngenyanga ezayo KULINDELEKE ukuthi kuze kucishe kuse ekuseni kudunyiswa emcimbini wokudumisa ozobe uhanjelwe yizinkakha zabaculi, iSilent Worship Experience: A Night of Songs, ongowokuqala nozoba seDCC Jesus Dome eThekwini ngoMeyi 22. Kulo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi kuqopheke umlando njengoba izethameli zizodumisa zifake ama-earphone ezindlebeni. Ngeke kugcine lapho ngoba kwabazohambela umcimbi akekho ozobe ekhethekile njengoba amathikithi eVIP engekho. UKwezi Ndlovu-Mbambo, osethimbeni labahleli bomcimbi, uveze ukuthi bahlele into engakaze ibonakale nezoqala ukwenzeka kulo mcimbi njengoba abazobe bekhona bonke bezonikwa ama-earphone ukuze ulalele lonke uhlelo lomcimbi nokuyindlela abafuna umuntu asondelane ngayo noThixo njengoba kuzobe kugcwele umculo nomkhuleko. "Sihlele ukuthi umcimbi siwenze ngendlela engakaze ibonakale kuleli. Siyazi ukuthi abanye bazoba nokudideka kodwa njengoba sisho nje, ama-earphone azotholwa yiwona wonke umuntu ukuze azwe konke okuzokwenzeka, uma ungenawo ngeke uzwe lutho. Kanjalo akekho ozoba yiVIP ngenxa yokuthi sihlele ukuthi abantu babe ndawonye

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ngakho akuzukuba ngumjaho olula. Kodwa ngizimisele ukwenza kahle.” Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kulo mjaho we-ZDM uzokhala emuke no-R100 000, isibili kube wu-R50 000, isithathu kube wu-R25 000. Izinombolo zizolandwa ngoMgqibelo, ePrince Mangosuthu Regional Airport, kusuka ngo-10 ekuseni. Abafuna ukungenala, bangangena kwi-website ethi: www.webtickets.co.za

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: bonke abafundi. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi lapho besuka khona nokuthi kwenzekani ezweni labo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele kwi:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: zokuxhumana ukuzwakalisa ilaka nokukhathazeka kwabo ngalokhu. UNokufa Bhungane uthe: “Kunzima ngoba asisebenzi, ngakho ukunyuka kukaphethroli kuzosilimaza kakhulu nathi ngoba kuzodala ukuthi kwenyuke nemali yokugibela izithuthi zomphakathi.” U-Excellent Simiso ukhale wathi: “Kuyacaca ukuthi maduze nje ilitha likaphethroli lizobe selibiza u-R50. Kuyacaca ukuthi sekuyisikhathi sokuthi sibheke ukusebenzisa icebo lezimoto ezihamba ngogesi.” USizwe Skara Shabalala Jr ubeke wathi: “Mina ngibona kungcono ukuthi kukhuphuke nemiholo kwabasebenzayo, bese kufakwa nochatha ezibonelelweni zohulumeni ukuze wonke umuntu akwazi ukumela izindleko abhekene nazo.” “Ayikho into ethusayo lapha ngoba lokhu okwenzeka manje kwakumele ukuthi kwenzeke ngenyanga edlule kodwa uhulumeni wamisa i-fuel levy ka-R3. Ukube uhulumeni ubakhathalele abantu baseNingizimu Afrika ubezoqhubeka amise i-fuel levy kuze kuxazululeke isio sale mpi yase-Iran. Amanye amazwe enze njalo,” kusho uLindelani Nhlabathi.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: labo. UMnuz Terence Khala oyibamba lomkhulumeli woMnyango, uthe bese kunesikhathi bebheka izindlela zokubuyekeza ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo ezikoleni. Uthe kwaqokwa nethimba elalibheka ukubuyekezwa kwalesi sifundo eMnyangweni. "Leli thimba lalibheka indaba yokuthi kubuyekezwe uhlelo lokufundisa lesi sifundo, ukubheka ukuthi izincwadi zalesi sifundo zihambisana nokuphakanyisiwe ngokufundiswa kwalesi sifundo kanjalo nezinhlelo zokucija othisha abafundisa lesi sifundo. Umbiko wethimba wathulwa ePhalamende, esigungwini soNgqongqoshe bezemfundo, kanjalo naku-Umalusi." Uthe bazwile ngokuphawula okukhona okuthinta ukufundiswa komlando ngelakuleli, njengoba kunabakhathazekile ngokuthi kungenzeka kushiywe ngaphandle ezinye zezinto. Uveze ukuthi kuvalwa ngeSonto, ngo-Ephreli 19, 2026, ukuphawula komphakathi ngemigomo. Abafuna ukuphawula bangabhalela ku: Director-General, baqondise ku: Florence Modipa, oyiChief Education Specialist: Curriculum Policy, Department of Basic Education, 222 Struben Street, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele ku:Department of Basic Education, Private Bag X895, Pretoria, 0001; noma bathumele nge-email ku:[email protected].

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Kutholakale inkinga ethinta i-transmission kwi-Lexus LX 500d Overtrail ne-LX 500d F Sport Image: Lexus South Africa I-National Consumer Commission (NCC) isihlabe ikhwelo kubashayeli bama-Lexus LX emuva kokutholakala kwenkinga engaholela ekutheni iphelelwe ngamandla kokunye ibe sengcupheni yokugqamuka ilangabi. Izimoto ezithintekayo ngama-LX 500d F Sport nama-LX 500d Overtrail alinganiselwa ku-110 adayise phakathi kuka-13 Mashi nyakenye no-16 Januwari nyakenye. Ngokwesitatimende se-NCC, lezi zimoto zine-10 speed automatic transmission esebenzisa i-linear solenoids ukushintsha. Uma i-solenoid ifa, i-Transmission Electronic Control Unit ne-Engine Control Unit edume nge-computer box kuyahluleka ukuveza inkinga nokungaholela ekutheni imoto i-reve mawala kwamanye amagiya. "Lokhu kungadala umonakalo kwi-transmission futhi kulahleke amandla uma uhamba ngesivinini esiphezulu." Kuthiwa uma kulimala kwi-transmission kungaba namathuba okuthi kuvuze uketshezi nokungadala ukuthi imoto ishayise noma kugqamuke ilangabi uma kunokungavuthisa. Abahamba ngalezi zimoto banxuswa ukuthi bahambise izimoto emagaraji akwa-Lexus ukuze ziyolungiswa mahhala.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: esinayo ingabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Akufanele kube nokudideka kule nto. Umuntu wangaphandle ofuna ukuba kuleli kufanele abe namaphepha amgunyaza ukuba abe kuleli. Abangenawo amaphepha kufanele babuyele emazweni abo." UMkhwanazi yena uthe usazoba nomhlangano nabaholi bezinhlangano ezihlela imibhikisho. UMkhwanazi uthe ababhikishi abakuqeqeshelwe ukubona ukuthi abantu bokufika banamaphepha aqondile yini. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabeNewzroom Afrika. "Uma ababhikishi benolwazi ngabantu bokufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho kufanele babikele amaphoyisa kube yiwona aphenyayo. Bazogcina sebephambanisa nabantu balana eNingizimu Afrika bebadidanisa nabokufika."

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: USihlalo we-IEC uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, uhlangane nomholi weMKP uMnuz Jacob Zuma eNkandla IKHOHLISANE ihlomile izolo phakathi kwezikhulu zeKhomishini yoKhetho kuleli, kanjalo nobuholi beqembu iMKP njengoba ngenyanga ezayo kulindeleke ukuthi kungene icala elithinta ukungenami kwaleli qembu ngemiphumela yokhetho lwango-2024. Abaholi beKhomishini basemkhankasweni wokuhlangana nezinhlaka ezihlukene okubalwa namaqembu ezepolitiki, njengoba kuzoba nokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngoNovemba 4, nonyaka. Izikhulu zeKhomishini zikhuza ibuya KwaZulu-Natal njengoba muva nje bezihlangene neSilo samaZulu, kanjalo nezinye izinhlaka. Izikhulu zekhomishini ebeziholwa wuSihlalo uMnuz Mosotho Moepya, zihlangane nabaholi beMKP okubalwa nomengameli wayo uMnuz Jacob Zuma, emzini wakhe KwaDakudunuse eNkandla. Esitatimendeni seKhomishini ngaphambi kokuhambela eNkandla, kuvele ukuthi inhloso wukubhunga nezinhlaka ezehlukene okubalwa noNdunankulu wesifundazwe uMnuz Thami Ntuli. Sithe kule mihlangano kubhungwa ngezinto ezihlukene ezithinta intando yabantu, ukugqugquzela abantu ukuthi bavote nezinye ezithinta ukhetho. "Sihlangana neMKP nje, kusenecala mayelana nokhetho lwango-2024. I-MKP ikhala ngezinto eziningi kanti lolu daba luzolalelwa enkantolo ngoJuni. UZuma usanda kuphakamisa ukuthi ukhetho luhlehliswe ngenxa yokuthi basanezikhalo," kusho iKhomishini

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: abazozethula kulo nyaka yi-SUV encane iTekton ezongena ngaphezu kweMagnite. Izoba yimbangi yeHyundai Creta neKia Seltos. Uthe futhi kulo nyakamali wabo oqale ngoMashi kuya kuMashi ngonyaka ozayo bahlela ukwethula iPatrol entsha. Uqhube wathi bazothuthukisa nezinye izimoto abazidayisayo njengamanje. Ebuzwa ukuthi bake bakucabanga yini ukubuyisa inkampani yabo i-Infiniti eyayidayisa kuleli eminyakeni edlule, uthe akafuni ukuphawula okwamanje ngaphandle kokuthi babheka izimoto eziningi. URamy ubekhuluma naleli phephandaba ngesikhathi eseMhlanga ngoMsombuluko lapho bebethula khona abadlali bamaSharks njengamanxusa abo. Uthe lokho kuwubufakazi bokuthi abayi ndawo. Baqoke u-Aphelele Fassi noJordan Hendrikse abazotetemuka ngamaNavara Pro 4X. U-Aphelele, odlalela naMaBhokobhoko, uthe le moto izokwenza kube lula uma ehamba ngisho nasobhuqwini. “Ngiyaliqala iveni kodwa lapha empilweni kuthiwa yonke into inesiqalo. Ngiyajabula futhi ngiyabonga ukuthi bangiqoke njengenxusa labo.” Lo mdlali odabuka eQonce, e-Eastern Cape, uthe izomsiza uma eya emakhaya ngoba imigwaqo ayimihle. “Iyadingeka imoto enjena. Ngiyakhumbula kushadelwa umngani wami ngase ngiyabhajwa. Izinto ezifana nalezo ngeke zenzeke uma uhamba ngesilwane esinje,” kusho

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: igebe lamaphuzu ayisishiyagalombili esicongweni se-log futhi isidingo amaphuzu ayisithupha emidlalweni emithathu esele ukudla isicoco seMotsepe Championship. “Ekuqaleni kwesizini imiphumela ibisiphika phezu kokudlala kwethu kahle, kodwa ngiyajabula ukuthi manje sesiyakwazi ukugwema ukungenelwa ngamagoli angenasidingo nanokuthi-ke futhi asikehlulwa ekhaya kusukela kuqale umzuliswano wesibili, okuyirekhodi elihle. Abadlali bethu sebeyajwayela kulesi sigaba, baya ngokuya beqina ukhakhayi njengoba bebengenawo amava okudlala kulesi sigaba,” kusho uMyeni. “Iqembu lethu lisha kulesi sigaba, siyalakha silakhela ikusasa. Ngakho ukuthola kwethu imiphumela emidlalweni yakamuva kuyasiqinisa idolo ukuthi esikhathini esingengakanani sizobe sesisukile unomphela ezembeni. Asifuni ukutatazela, sizoqhubeka sidlale ibhola lethu esaziwa ngalo ukuthola imiphumela. Okumqoka manje wukuthi abafana bagweme ukuthatha izinto kalula ngenxa yokwenza kahle kwethu emidlalweni yethu yakamuva, ngoba isizini ayikapheli, kusasele imidlalo emine okufanele siyidlale silwele ukuthola amaphuzu.” Abafana Bebatha abasalelwe yimidlalo emine ukusonga isizini, babuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekuhambeni neHighbury eNelson Mandela Stadium, eGqeberha, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UMUFI uNksz Zinhle Simphiwe Mchunu KUVUKE umunyu emndenini wowesifazane okuthiwa wabulawa yisoka, lamgqiba ngepotimende ngoNovemba nyakenye, ngesikhathi iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal yedlulisela iziqu zakhe emndenini emcimbini wokwethweswa kweziqu wezitshudeni obungoLwesihlanu, eThekwini. Isidumbu sikaZinhle Simphiwe Mchunu (23) waseRoosboom, eMnambithi, owayenza unyaka wokugcina ezifundweni zobuthishela kule nyuvesi, satholwa sigqitshwe ngepotimende ethuneni eduze kweflethi elalihlala isoka lakhe kwa-C, eMlaza, ngoDisemba 20, 2025. Ngesikhathi kutholwa isidumbu kwase kuphele inyanga edukile, njengoba kuthiwa wagcina ukubonwa ephila ngoNovemba 23, 2025. IKHADI elinomyalezo kanjalo nezimbali iNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal ebilibhalele unina kamufi, kwanikwa umndeni ngosuku lweminyezane Udadewabo, uNksz Nolwazi Mchunu, utshele Isolezwe ukuthi siqale phansi sabhibha isilonda sokubulawa ngesihluku kukamufi. “Ngizwe usizi ngesikhathi kubizwa isitshudeni ebesiphambi kwegama lakhe ohlwini lwezitshudeni ebezithweswa iziqu, sasukuma, sayithweswa iziqu zaso. Kwathi uma sekubizwa elakhe, kwangasukuma muntu, kwaze kwazosukuma esinye ezimenyezwe emva kwakhe,” kusho uNksz Mchunu. Uthe yilapho ubuye khona ngamandla umuzwa wokuthi konje udadewabo akasekho emhlabeni futhi wabashiya ngendlela enesihluku. Uthe emva komcimbi, babizelwe eceleni

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNKSZ Happy Mthethwa obulawe yisoka ephuma ePhasikeni KUSENZIMA ukwamukela isimo emndenini wowesifazane waseSakhamkhanya, eDoringkop, KwaDukuza, okuthiwa ugwazwe wabulawa yisoka lakhe eqeda kubuya ePhasikeni ngeSonto. Kulesi sigameko kufe ngesihluku uNksz Happy Mthethwa (35), okuthiwa ubulawe umsolwa, ethi uyolanda izimpahla zakhe emzini abehlala kuwo, ukumkhombisa ukuthi akadlali uma ethi ucu alusahlangani. Ngokusho kukadadewabo kamufi, uNksz Kholeka Mthethwa, isigameko senzeke besanda kubuya enkonzweni yePhasika ababeye kuyo ngoLwesihlanu. “Sithe sibuya wahlala cishe imizuzu engu-30, wase ethi usaya kulo muzi umsolwa abehlala kuwo ngoba ewugada khona endaweni. Ngisale ngalala, ngamangala ukuthi akakabuyi ngesikhathi ngivuka kodwa ngangazitshela ukuthi kukhona osekumehlele,” kusho uNksz Mthethwa. Uthe bekuyizithuba zasemini ngesikhathi kufika umyalezo wokuthi abaphuthume kwamakhelwane walo muzi ngoba umufi ulimele. “Ngithukile ukuthi ingabe uselinyazwa yini. Ngithe uma ngifika khona, besekugcwele nabantu, ngambona edindilizile kuveranda walo makhelwane othumele umyalezo. Bekukhombisa ukuthi akasekho kodwa ngendlela ebengiphanjanelwe ngayo yikhanda, ngiqhubekile ngafonela i-ambulensi,” kuchaza uNksz Mthethwa othe ngesikhathi efike ngaso i-ambulensi, ivele yaqinisekisa

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa UMENGAMELI Cyril Ramaphosa usencome umbutho wokuvikela kuleli, ngokuvikela izwe ezimeni ezinzima. URamaphosa obekhuluma kugujwa usuku lwenkululeko eFree State, uthe umsebenzi wamasosha ukuvikela izwe kodwa agcina esenza neminye imisebenzi ethinta izwe. "Ayasiza uma kunezinhlekelele, akhe amabhuloho aphinde enze neminye imisebenzi. Muva nje asiza empini yokulwa nobugebengu bamagenge kanjalo nokulwa noZamaZama," kusho uRamaphosa. URamaphosa uncome nomsebenzi omuhle owenziwa yiKhomishini kaMadlanga. "Siyalwa nenkohlakalo nabaphula umthetho njengoba sizobabopha bonke abenza okubi. Yenza umsebenzi omuhle iKhomishini kaMadlanga." UNgqongqoshe wezemiDlalo nezobuCiko uMnuz Gayton McKenzie, uthe ngesikhathi uRamaphosa ejuba ikhomishini kaMadlanga, baningi abashaya amakhala. "Manje wonke umuntu iso lakhe lithe njo kwiKhomishini kaMadlanga. Mengameli ngesikhathi umemezela ikhomishini, abanye bathi nakho-ke, ubuyile namakhomishini kodwa manje wonke umuntu uncoma umsebenzi wayo," usho kanje. Uthe uRamaphosa uzoliphothula ihlandla lakhe ekuholeni uhulumeni wamaqembu abambisene kuhulumeni, iGNU.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: imibuzo eminingi ebenginayo ekhanda,” kusho uBroos esithangamini nabezindaba. Lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ubuzwe ngegoli likaMbokazi nendlela adlale ngayo kwazise wayemshiye ngaphandle kowokuqala owadlalelwa eMoses Mbhida Stadium, eThekwini. “UMbokazi uyaziwa ukuthi yisitobha sethu esingafuni lutho kodwa futhi ungumdlali webhola ophelele njengoba ekhombisile ngengcwenga yegoli asishayele yona. “Unawo wonke amava adingeka kumdlali ongagqama emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni kodwa kufanele alungise indaba yakhe yokuhluthuka kalula. “Ngiyavuma ukuthi usemncane kodwa kufanele akufunde ngokushesha ukuthi uma izinto zingahambi ngendlela afisa ngayo enkundleni kasikho isidingo sokuhluthuka inhliziyo ngoba lokhu kuvamise ukulandelwa yizinto ezimbi. “Ngijabule ngaye (uMbokazi) nozakwabo adlala nabo emuva kodwa ukuhluthuka kuyena yikhona engikubona kungase kumkhubaze kumbe kume phakathi kwakhe nezinkontileka emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu emhlabeni,” kusho uBroos. UMbokazi unekhadi elibomvu elilodwa kwiBafana alithola ngenxa yakho ukuhluthuka ngesikhathi ibhekene neZimbabwe emdlalweni wokuhlungela iNdebe yoMhlaba.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ngoba besithanda ukumbonela eduze kodwa-ke akukho okungenziwa ngoba isimo yisona esingavumanga. UPetersen ubengagcini ngokuhola iChiefs njengesibani kule midlalo ayidlalile ngaphambi kokuhlinzwa kodwa ubesembangwnei wokunqaba namagoli kwiligi noSipho Chaine we-Orlando Pirates. Lokhu bekumbeka ethubeni lokuwina umklomelo kanozinti ovelele, iBetway Premiership Goalkeeper of The Season, osekhabetheni likaChaine. Ngokujwayelekile unozinti ongenelwa ngamagoli ambalwa kunabo bonke ngesizini nguyena ogoduka nalo mklomelo. UChaine usenqabe namagoli amahlandla angu-15 kule sizini emidlalweni engu-22 futhi nguyena ozihola phambili. UPetersen usewele endaweni yesithathu ngokunqaba namagoli amahlandla angu-11 kwengu-16 yeligi emuva kokweqiwa nguDarren Keet weDurban City osenqabe amahlandla angu-12 kwengu-22. Nakuba isikwati esizodlala kwiNdebe yoMhlaba singakamenyezelwa kodwa okucacayo wukuthi sizophuma kubadlali abazodlala imidlalo yobungani nePanama. UPetersen, okungakaziwa ukuthi uzobuyela nini enkundleni, usalelwe yizinyanga ezimbili zokukhombisa uBruce ukuthi imfanele indawo kusona.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Sipho “DJ Sgqemeza” Mbatha BAMDUDUZE ngezindlela ezihlukene uSipho "Sgqemeza" Mbatha, abalandeli bakhe enkundleni yokuxhumana iFacebook, eveza izindaba zokugcina kwakhe emsakazweni Ukhozi FM. Iningi labantu liveze ukuthi uNkulunkulu ngeke aze amlahle njengoba evelelwe yilezi zindaba. Abanye bathe kukhona amanye amathuba azovuleka, njengoba eselahlekelwe yileli abenalo. UMbongeni Mthwane uthe "Awu madoda Mthiya baningi obakhile ngomsakazo". UNokulunga OkaDlodlo Mabuza:uthe "Okuhle kodwa Shandu uma uNkulunkulu evala umnyango uvula omunye, akayivali iminyango engezukuvula eminye". UNtokozo Page Mbatha:uthe "Eeesh Mthiya ncese wakithi, amagalelo akho siyawazi, bayimoshe ngokuxokiza nathi sazi ukuthi usuyogxila ekubeni umfundisi". UManie Paque uthe:"Siyabonga Mthiya okuhle kodwa kukhona amathuba asazovuleka, ngiyakholelwa ekutheni kukhona indawo ebalulekile ekumele". UThami Mthabela uthe:"Sgqemeza mfethu, ungalokhu uzichaza. Isosha elilimele lizikhotha amanxeba ekusithekeni, phola bese uvuka futhi usunamandla". Abanye abantu bakhale kakhulu ngokuhamba kuka-Ayanda Msweli, naye oveze ukuthi usezokwenza ezemigwaqo bukhona ekhasini lakhe kwiFacebook. Izolo ekuseni ngesikhathi enza lokhu izibalo ziveze ukuthi abantu bayameseka kulolu hambo lwakhe aseluqalile. UKing Sfiso

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Uveze ukuthi ukushona kukaDJ Boonu, kuthinte abaculi abaningi eThekwini, akade besebenza naye, abazwakalise ukukhala kwabo bezwa lezi zindaba. Omunye umthombo uveze ukuthi uDJ Boonu wake watshela abangani bakhe ukuthi udokotela umyalele ukuthi ake anake inhliziyo yakhe njengoba ingashayi ngendlela okuyiyona. Bebelokhu bekhale njalo ozakwabo endimeni kaqedisizungu ngodume lwengozi abagqemeke yona ngokudlula kwakhe emhlabeni. Umrepha uZakwe, uDuncan, uBhar, DJ Twitty, Sparks Bantwana nabanye bazwakalise ukuphatheka kabi kwabo ngokudlula emhlabeni kukaDJ Boonu. Owayengumsakazi weGagasi FM, uVuma Buthelezi uthe: "Kwaze kwabuhlungu ukuzwa ngokudlula kwakho emhlabeni DJ Boonu. Enhliziyweni yami ngiyohlala ngibambe inhlonipho engayithola kuwe kusuka ngosuku lokuqala uzethula kimi kuze kube sengxoxweni yokugcina mina nawe esibe nayo. Ngiyakuhlonipha kakhulu, ubuzithobile kwaze kwaba sekugcineni. Sikhulekisa umndeni wakho ngalesi sikhathi, sengathi uJehova ungawuqinisa". Isolezwe lithole ukuthi uDJ Boonu ubengowokuzalwa KwaB eMlaza, futhi umndeni wakhe maduzane uzomemezela izinhlelo zokumfihla, njengoba inkonzo yomngcwabo wakhe izobanjelwa eNgonyameni.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: neNashville SC. Njengamanje iChicago isendaweni yesibili kwi-log ye-Eastern Conference ngamaphuzu awu-13 emidlaweni eyisikhombisa, ngemuva kweNashville SC esaqhwakele ngawu-16 emidlalweni elinganayo. IChicago izodlala neDetroit City emdlalweni womqhudelwano womkhumulajezi i-US Open Cup ngoLwesithathu, bese ibuyela kweyeligi ngokududulana neCincinati ngeSonto. Lesi sishaqamba sesiqongqwane sasemuva esijoyine iMen in Red ngoJanuwari sisuka kwi-Orlando Pirates, ifomu yaso akubuzwa ukuthi ifana noju kumqeqeshi weqembu lesizwe, iBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, njengoba sikubadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu elivivela ukuyoyibamba koweNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa ezobanjelwa e-USA, Canada naseMexico, kusukela ngoJuni 11 kuya kuJulayi 19. Emdlalweni wakamuva wobungani iBafana ewudlale nePanama ihlulwa ngo 2-1, uMbokazi ushaye ingcwenga yegoli edudula inguzunga yeshodi engaphandle kwebhokisi. UMbokazi wenza kahle kuleli qembu lase-USA nje, uBroos wayeshaya amakhala ngokuyodlala kwakhe kule ligi yase-USA, ayithatha njengeligi engekho emgangathweni ngokwezinga lamaligi ebhola emhlabeni. Nokho, kancane, kancane amathe abuyela kwasifuba kulo mqeqeshi odabuka eBelgium ngayekungabaza ngezinga le-MLS njengoba eqhubeka uMbokazi nokwenza kahle. Kanti muva nje umbizile nomgadli uBongokuhle Hlongwane, naye odlala

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ezixoshiwe ezinye eziphenywayo ngenxa yomsebenzi owenziwe yikomiti engiliholayo. Kungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi kube nosihlalo wekomiti olwa ngale ndlela nenkohlakalo," kusho uShelembe. UShelembe uke waba ngumholi wophiko lwentsha kwiDA KwaZulu-Natal, njengamanje uyingxenye yethimba eleluleka Inkosi yaseNadi, eMgungundlovu, uVusizwe Zondi. UMXHUMANISI weDA neNdlunkulu kaZulu, uMnuz Swelakhe Shelembe

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UDANYA Devs ngomunye wabaculi asebemenyezelwe abazonandisa emcimbini walo nyaka woGu Jazz Festival KULINDELEKE ukuthi kube noxhaxha lwemicimbi oluzobe yandulela umcimbi omkhulu woGu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27, kulo nyaka. Le ndumezulu yomcimbi izoba sezinkundleni zemidlalo Ugu Sports & Leisure Centre, ePort Shepstone. Lo mcimbi obuye ngonyaka odlule ngezinhlelo ezimbalwa, kulo nyaka abahleli bawo bathembisa ukubuya ngegiya eliphezulu kunelejwayelekile ngemuva kweminyaka ungekho. USiya Msomi wenkampani weCoolsounds Trading, okunguye ohlela lo mcimbi ngokubambisana noMasipala Ugu, uveze ukuthi akade sebewuqalile owaziwa ngokuthi i-Offramp Experience, uzoqhubeka ukwenza imicimbi eyandulela Ugu, okukhona kuwo imikhuleko, ukuqwala izintaba, ukubona izindawo zokuvakasha, umcimbi wamahlala neminye. "Umcimbi I-Offramp Experience uzoqala ngedili lo mcimbi oyi-gala dinner enkundleni efanayo ngoJuni 25, bese kulandela eminye. Emcimbini la kuzobe kukhulekwa i-Worship Experience, wona uzoba ngoJuni 26. Kuwona kukhona nabaculi abahlukene esizobamemezela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi. Silindele abantu abangu-3 000 bese kuthi emcimbini we-jazz khona silindele abantu abangu-8 000. Ngayo yonke imicimbi sifisa ukuthi abantu bahlangane ndawonye

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ngayo ezindaweni ezehlukene. "Kuyona kukhona ukujabula komuntu wesifazane ozithembayo kodwa futhi uphinde aveze uhlangothi lwakhe, la izinto zingahambi kahle okuyinto ejwayelekile empilweni. Kodwa isigqi sayo isona esihamba phambili, engithemba ukuthi abantu bazosijabulela," kuchaza yena. UMoonchild uhambe emazwini kaDBN Gogo, wathi ingoma ikhuluma ngokwazi indawo yakho, ukuzigqaja nokungavumeli ukuthi udlale abantu uma nisobudlelwaneni bezothando, ubungani nobunye. “Ngithanda indlela esingafihlanga imizwa yethu kule ngoma, sikuveze konke esikufunayo ngayo ezinhlamvini. Sikhuluma ngokuzethemba, imizwa ehlukene esiba nayo ezimeni esibhekana nazo ebudlelwaneni esiba kubona, ngakho kungijabulisile ukuba yingxenye yayo," kusho yena.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Babhekene nenkinga omasitende abangakatitholi inkokhelo kwabeNsfas BABHEKENE nengwadla omastende abakhala ngokuqonga kwezindleko zamanzi, ugesi kanjalo nezinye izinto kulabo abaqashise izitshudeni ezikhokhelwa yisikhwama esixhasa ngemali yokufunda ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nasemakolishi amakhono amaTVET KwaZulu-Natal, iNational Students' Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS). Labo mastende bakhala ngokuthi selokhu kuqale unyaka, abakaze bakhokhelwe yiNSFAS. Bathe iNSFAS izisabisa okwenyoka izitshudeni, bona ayibashayi ndiva ngoba ziyabhikisha uma imihlomulo yazo ingangenanga. Omunye womastende okhulume neSolezwe, wacela ukungavezwa, uthe sebecabanga ngisho ukukhipha izitshudeni, ngenxa yokuthi abakhokhelwe. "Asazi manje ukuthi kumele senzenjani, ngoba sihambise yonke into ezikhungweni nakwiNSFAS, kodwa kuze kube yimanje asikakhokhelwa. Konke okuthinta imininingwane yezitshudeni, nokusayinwa kwezinkontileka kwahanjiswa kodwa lutho imali." Umastende uveze ukuthi uma sekumele bakhokhelwe, uhlelo olusha olusetshenziswayo luyabakhahlela. "Senza ubuntu ngoba iNSFAS isikhokhela izinyanga ezingu-10 kuphela ngonyaka, kodwa thina siyazamukela izitshudeni kusuka ngoJanuwari ngoba zisuke zingenayo indawo yokufihla ikhanda. Sikwenza lokhu ngoba sisuke singafuni ukuthi zihlupheke, noma zilale endle kodwa thina asicatshangelwa futhi asibongwa ngokwenza lokhu."

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMCULI kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku, uFeza Langa, ugqugquzele ukuqhakanjiswa kwemfundo YINGXENYE yabafundi ebebehambele umcimbi obuseMfolozi TVET College eNkandla, ngoLwesihlanu U-AMAHLE Mchunu ekakwe wuMnuz Mthokozi Mchunu (ngakwesokunele), uMnuz Jerome Zungu noMnuz Vakashela Mahaye UMCULI kamaskandi oqengqeleza phambili ngokudayisa kwengoma yakhe kuma-Official SA Charts (kwi-local Top 10 nakwi-International Top 20), uFeza Langa, ukhuthaze abafundi ngokubaluleka kwesikole. Uthe noma ngabe unaliphi ikhono kodwa kusemqoka ukuba ulishebe nesicucu semfundo. NgoLwesihlanu, uFeza (29) - oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku ngenoni elithi Umaqondana - ubekhuluma nabafundi abaphumelele ngamalengiso izifundo ezisemqoka nabebezenza ngaphansi kohlelo olubizwa ngeSteam (Science,Technology, Engineering and Mathematics) eMfolozi TVET College eNkandla. Lo mculi uthe yena uqale waphothula iziqu zobuthishela kwiFoundation Phase e-University of Free State nyakenye, ngaphambi kokugxila emculweni lapho efike wakhonya khona. "Okunye engicabanga ukuthi kubalulekile ukuba ngabelane ngakho nani ukuthi u-matric ngake ngawufeyila. Kodwa lokho akwenzanga ukuthi ngiyeke. Ngaya koqala phansi kaGrade 11 kwesinye isikole futhi ngagcina ngiwuphase kahle u-matric wami." Unxuse

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya ngonyawo lonwabu, lokhu kusho ukushesha kokutholakala kobulungiswa kubagilwa bokudlwengulwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo,” kusho uJali. Uthe indaba yokwethembela esikhungweni ebesisePitoli, bekubalahlekisela ngethemba abagilwa kanjalo nemindeni yabo. “Umuntu ubefike adlwengule, aboshwe, bathi bayabona abagilwa nemindeni yabo, usededelwe, usezihambela ngokukhululeka emphakathini, kube sengathi ezobulungiswa zibenzela phansi." Uthe uma kwenzeka okufuze lokhu imiphakathi igcina isola amaphoyisa ngokuthi ehlulekile ukwenza umsebenzi wawo ekubeni kungekho asuke angakwenza ukuphuthumisa uhlelo lokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Uqhube wathi abakubhekile manje ukushesha kokuphothulwa kwamacala okudlwengula enkantolo njengoba kungasekho okuzoba yisithiyo ophenyweni oluqondene nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo. Isolezwe likhumbule iziwombe ezimbalwa ezike zenzeka lihambele amanye amacala ezinkantolo ezehlukene eThekwini. Kwesinye isiwombe esenzeka eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, eminyakeni embalwa edlule, kwangena icala lokudlwengulwa kowesifazane lapho imantshi eyayilisingethe yakhombisa okukhulu ukunengeka ngokuhamba kwesikhathi eside ingabuyi imiphumela yolibofuzo. “Leli

text: elikhulu ngo-2023 lapho yayilethe izihlabani zaphesheya kwezilwandle okubalwa kuzo uRichard Bona (USA) noYayoi Ikawa (Japan)." U-Atlas uthe ezinye izihlabani eziyizifundiswa emculweni we-jazz ezizobe zinandisa kulo mcimbi ngoMthobisi Mthalane ofundisa umculo eSacred Heart nodume ngenoni elith Usizi Lomuntu Omnyama, Vincent Mtetwa odume ngengoma ethi Judgement Day naye oyisifundiswa se-jazz esacijwa eTechnikon Natal nase-UKZN futhi wafundisa khona iminyakana ngaphambi kokuwelela phesheya kwezilwandle. "Kuzobe kukhona noSifiso Khanyile waseMgungundlovu kodwa osezinze eGoli. Uzobe ededela amanoni e-albhamu yakhe entsha." Intokazi esanda kuphothula izifundo ze-jazz e-UKZN, uThembalethu Bhengu, ithe kuyigugu kuyo ukushiyelana inkundla enkulu kangaka nabaculi ebahlonipha kakhulu futhi abanye babo ebebengothisha bayo bomculo eNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal. text: UMagwenya uphinde wachitha eyokuthi abantu bakuleli, banenzondo nabantu bokufika kuleli. "UMengameli ube nezingxoxo nomengameli waseMozambique uMnuz Daniel Chapo, wamqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bakuleli banemfudumalo futhi ababazondi abantu bakwamanye amazwe. Into okumele ixoxwe ngukuthi kungani abantu bakwamanye amazwe bashiye emazweni abo baye kwamanye amazwe. Le ngxoxo kumele kube eyabo bonke abantu base-Afrika," usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi abantu bakuleli banezikhalazo ngobugebengu, obunye obenziwa abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Uthe abantu bakuleli banelungelo lokumasha okuyinto eseMthethwenisisekelo wezwe. "UMengameli unxuse abantu bakwamanye amazwe abakuleli ukuthi bahloniphe imithetho yezwe. Nathi siyawuhlonipha umthetho ngakho nabo kumele benze okufanayo." UMagwenya ubuye waveza ukuthi uRamaphosa akanankinga nokuhlangana nowayengumengameli wezwe, uMnuz Jacob Zuma. Kunokukhuluma okusabalele bokuthi uRamaphosa angase ahlangane noZuma, osehola iqembu iMKP. "UZuma noRamaphosa abazona izitha. Banemibono ehlukile yezepolitiki, kodwa abazona izitha. Bayahlangana, bebehlangene muva nje eSwatini, lapho bajabulelana kwaba kuhle," kusho uMagwenya. Uthe uma behlangana kuzobe kungekhona ukuthi kuhlangana izitha. "UZuma wayengumengameli wezwe. Angahlangana noma yinini noRamaphosa ngoba unalo ilungelo

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: esebenza nezinkampani zamazwe angaphandle ukuthola amakhambi amasha okwelapha izifo ezihlukene. Useke wavelela njengomunye wochwepheshe abasebenze ukuhlola ikhambi lokuzivikela kwiHIV eliwumjovo (PreP) osujovwa kabili ngonyaka. Uphinde futhi abe umnikazi wama-salon avelele eBallito, iMthaniya Hair Studio neBrighter Kidz Salon lapho eqashe khona abantu abasha abangu-12, asebeshintshe impilo yabo. Ngaphezu kwalokho uphinde abe ngumnikazi wenkampani engenzi nzuzo, iKaMwandla Foundation, ayisungula ukwenza umehluko entsheni evela ezindaweni zasemakhaya. Uhambela izikole ezihlukene abuye asize abantwana ukukhetha imisebenzi abangayifundela ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme asize nezinkampani ezizimele, okubalwa kuzo iNyala Brand. Uphinde axhase abafundi ngemali yokubhalisa ezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme nangezimpahla zokugqoka ngenxa yokuthi uyalwazi usizi lwezingane ezidabuka emakhaya aqhelelene namadolobha amakhulu. Uphinde futhi abe umhleli wemicimbi ngaphansi kwenkampani yakhe iKaMwandla Eventz, okubalwa umcimbi omkhulu iTshatha Music Festival. *Ukuvotela abaqokiwe kwiNorth Coast Business Woman of the Year, kungenwa ku-www.sabeautymodelling.com/vote-ncbwa. author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ngokuvulela isibhaxu sika 3-0 kwiZambia engelinye lamazwe ahlonishwayo emiqhudelwaneni yabasakhula e-Afrika. Emdlalweni wesibili Amajimbos azidlele amahlanga kwiMadagascar iyilobola ngo 5-1, ngaphambi kokuqeda ngeMalawi kowayizolo. Kubadlali abagqamile eqenjini laseMzansi, kukhona uThandanani "Obama" Mhlongo odlalela AmaZulu, oshaye amagoli amathathu koweMadagascar. author: Sabelo Nsele
text: sibheke izinto ezifana nesimo sezulu nezindlu zangasese." UMncwabe uthe bafuna ukuthi uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi ubavumele ukuthi bazitholele bona indawo yokuhlala. "Udaba lwasoLundi lubucayi kakhulu. Siyaxolisa kubantu basoLundi abangakwazi ukusizakala. Siyazama ngakho konke okusemandleni ethu ukuthola indawo esizosebenza kuyo ngokukhululeka. Isimo sibi impela oLundi." Usotswebhu weNFP eZululand, uMnuz Siphamandla Ntombela, uthe abanye abantu sebelala khona emahhovisi kodwa abanye bagcine bengasizakala khona kunjalo. "Kufanele uvuke ezintathakusa ukuze uzozibeka emathubeni okusizakala. Abantu bahamba amabanga ango-70 km, kunabantu abasuka eMthonjaneni ngoba awekho amahhovisi khona, kufika abantu abasuka koBabanango naKwaCeza. Bagcina bebuyela emuva bengasizakalanga. Abanye bagcina belala ezihlotsheni." UNtombela uthe abantu abahlupheka kakhulu ilabo abafuna omazisi. "Izingane ezifunda u-matric zisenkingeni enkulu. Ezinye ziyalova ezikoleni kodwa futhi zigcine zingasizakalanga." UNtombela unxuse ukuthi uMnyango uzame ukusebenzela ezinkantolo zamakhosi nasemahhovisi omasipala. "Izinkantolo zamakhosi zihlezi zivuliwe, abakhulume namakhosi. Okuhle ukuthi izinkantolo zamakhosi ziseduze nabantu." Okhulumela uMnyango wezeMisebenzi yoMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Steve Bhengu, akazange ayiphendule imibuzo ayithunyelwe.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ubuqhawe bukaPetersen, owakhinyabezwa wukugula ngaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya wangasekupheleni kukaFebhuwari, endleleni yakhe eyayibheke kwiBafana. Emuva komdlalo uPetersen utshele abakwaSuperSport ukuthi yize eyicabanga indaba yeBafana neNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa okusemqoka kuyena wukusiza iChiefs. “Ngifikelwa ngumunyu ukuthi ngiqokwe njengomdlali ovelele namuhla ngoba ngiphuma ebunzimeni kulezi zinyanga ezedlule,” kusho uPetersen. “Ngijabule ngendlela engidlale ngayo kodwa okumnandi nakakhulu wukusiza iChiefs. OkweBafana kuzozenzekela uma ngiqhubeka nokwenza kahle kwiChiefs.” Igoli leChiefs likaMmodi lakhiwe nguWandile Duba kwathi elePirates likaSebelebele lakhiwa nguDeon Hotto. Ukudlala ngokulingana kwePirates kukhulula iSundowns esele ngomdlalo owodwa kuleli qembu laseSoweto.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzovela enkantolo ngoLwesibili obulale i-ex yentombi yakhe. Isithembu somjolo obandakanya izaguga endaweni yaseMthozela, e-Eastern Cape, uphele ngokufa kowesilisa, 78, ngesikhathi eshaywa ebulawa yisoka le-ex yakhe eneminyaka engu-65 ubudala ngoLwesihlanu. Imininingwane emaphoyiseni iveze ukuthi ikhehla elineminyaka engu-78 ubudala belisemzini walo lihleli nowayeyintombi yalo (65) bephuza utshwala, ngesikhathi konakala umcimbi ngokufika kwesoka lalona wesifazane (59). Kuthiwa isoka lifike live nolaka lashaya umufi (78) ngenduku maqede lamgwaza amanxeba amaningi emzimbeni. Umufi kuthiwa useshonile endaweni yesigameko. Umsolwa uboshwe ngemuva kweswhlo, kanti uzovela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseQumbu ngoLwesibili, ngecala lokubulala.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-OLISAH Ndah Image: STELLENBOSCH FACEBOOK UMQEQESHI weStellenbosch FC, uGavin Hunt, uveza ukuthi sekuseduze abonakale enkundleni umdlali wasemuva, u-Olisah Ndah, ongakadlali kuleli qembu alijoyine ngoFebhuwari esuka kwi-Orlando Pirates. UNdah (28) oyibamba maphakathi emuva, uhlukane nePirates abesedlale kuyona amasizini amane. Wafika eMzansi ngesizini ka-2021/2022 kuleli qembu laseSoweto esuka kwi-Akwa United yaseNigeria. KwiStellies, ujoyine uTshegofatso Mabasa obolekiswe ngeZimnyama kuleli qembu laseStellenbosch kuze kuphele isizini. IStellebosch idlale ngokulingana ngo 1-1 neLamontville Golden Arrows emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoLwesithathu eKing Zwelithini Stadium, eMlaza. “Akukho nkinga ngo-Olisah, ukuthi nje ufike kithi esenesikhathi agcina ukudlala. Ngakho ubengakabi qatha ngokwanele. Kodwa usebenza kanzima ukuze naye athole indawo eqenjini njengabadlali abadlala endaweni ayidlalayo uMoloisana (Thabo) noLebusa (Mosa). Maduze uzobonakala, mhlawumbe ngoMgqibelo,” kushaya ngamafuphi uHunt. UNdah ubanga ijezi noMoloisana, Lebusa, Athenkosi Mcaba, Henri Stanic, noSiviwe Nkwali odongeni lwasemuva maphakathi nendawo. author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: KUSINDA kwehlela phakathi koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal nenhlangano ephakela izikole esifundazweni i-National School Nutrition Programme Service Providers, kulandela ukukhishwa ohlwini kwecala ebelifakwe ile nhlangano, mayelana nokumisa uhlelo lwabaphakela izikole. INkantolo eNkulu yaseMgungundlovu ikhiphe icala ohlwini lwamacala aphambi kwayo, ibe isiyalela abale nhlangano ukuthi bakhokhe izindleko zecala. UMnyango usamukele lesi sinqumo ngoba uthi uzoqhubeka nohlelo ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka. Ngakolunye uhlangothi, usihlalo wenhlangano, uMnuz Lindani Matiwane, uthe bazosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo. "Nakanjani sizosiphikisa isinqumo senkantolo ngoba asihambisani naso," usho kanje. UMphathiswa woMnyango, uMnuz Sipho Hlomuka, uthe bazobe belungisa ezinye zezinto ezithinta lolu hlelo, wathi uhlelo luyaqhubeka futhi bazimisele ukuthi lungaphazamiseki. "Sisemkhankasweni wokulungisa nokuqinisa ezinye zezinto okubalwa nokuqinisekisa ukuthi abenza lo msebenzi bakhokhelwa ngesikhathi. Asifuni kube nomfundi ozolamba nsuku zonke," usho kanje. Uthe bazimisele ukulandela yonke imigomo ethinta uhlelo, wathi lusiza ekwesekeni izinhlelo zokufunda nokufundisa. Inhlangano yabaphekela baphakele izikole yaya enkantolo iyokhala ngokungahambi kahle kohlelo ngesikhathi kuqokwa osonkontileka abasha abazophakela abafundi eminyakeni emithathu ezayo. Lolu hlelo

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: watshela abameli bakaSnyman ukuthi isibhamu bazosithola enkantolo. Isibhamu sabuyiselwa kuSnyman ekuseni ngosuku okwaphuma ngalo isinqumo sokuthi akanacala. Lokho kusho ukuthi wabuyiselwa isibhamu ngaphambi kokuthi kuphume isinqumo senkantolo." UMalema uqhuba athi uCesar akanalo igunya lokukhipha umyalelo wokuthi kubuyiselwe uSnyman isibhamu. UMalema uthe yimantshi noma ijaji abanamandla okunquma ukuba kubuyiselwe ubufakazi emuva uma sekuphothulwe icala. "Kusobala ukuthi wephula imigomo yeNPA uCesar ngokukhipha umyalelo angagunyaziwe ukuba awukhiphe." Kusale kancane ukuba uMalema ayolala ezikhindini ngesikhathi inkantolo imgweba iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele ngesonto eledlule. UMalema wasindiswa wukuthi wafaka isicelo sokuphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe. Inkantolo yabe isimdedela ngesexwayiso. Isicelo sikaMalema sokuphonsela inselelo isigwebo sakhe sizolalelwa enkantolo enkulu. Ukugwetshwa kukaMalema iminyaka emihlanu ebhadla ejele kubeka engcupheni isikhundla sakhe sokuba yilungu lePhalamende. Umthetho awumuvumeli umuntu oseke wadonsa isigwebo esingaphezu kwezinyanga ezingu-12 ukuthi abe yilungu lePhalamende.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: bekhona embuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference “Sikhule kanjalo, kwase kuthi ngo-2024 sahlala phansi sibheka ezinye izindlela esingazisebenzisa ukuze abantu abaningi besilisa bazibone futhi bazizwe lezi zimfundiso esikhuluma ngazo ikakhulu izingane zabafana, ezinye zazo ezikhula zingenabazali. “Siqale lapho ukufaka ama-video sizixoxela ngezihloko nangezinto ezithinta impilo yomuntu wesilisa, kwaze kwafika lapho sihambela khona izikole ezahlukene koLundi naseMpangeni, lapho okwanda khona izincomo zothisha nabazali ngomsebenzi wethu,” kulanda uMsweli. UMCULI kamaskandi uThokozani Langa kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Eqhuba, uthe yingakho bebone kumqoka ukuthi baqhube lo mbono wabo ngokwenza lo mbuthano ngenhloso yokuqoqa abantu besilisa beminyaka nezigaba zempilo okwehlukene ukuze kuzobhungwa futhi kuboniswane ngakho konke okubathintayo. Uthe azobe ekhona wonke amalungu eSigungu okukhona kuwona oSomdenger Mthembu, Phistili, umphathi wenhlangano u-Andile Ndabezitha Zulu, Gezani Dludla, nabaculi bakamaskandi oGqizile Khanyile noSaliwa Ndunakazi. UMBHALI wezincwadi uLungisani Mavundla kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Emcimbini bazobe bengahambi bodwa njengoba kukhona izihambeli

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: wakusasa wezindondo uzobe uhambisana nedili elikhulu lomcimbi elizobanjelwa ePeople's Park, iMetro FM Music Awards 2026 Festval kuwo okuzonandisa nakhona abaculi abahlukene okubalwa kubo uYoung Stuna, Big Nuz, Feza, Khuzani, uMafikozolo, Dladla Mshunqis nabanye. Emcimbini wezindondo abaculi abazonandisa khona Isolezwe lithole ukuthi bazoba yimfihlo ngenjongo yokujabulisa izihlwele ezizobe zihambele umcimbi. NgeSonto, umcimbi wokugcina wokuvala uzobe waziwa nge-Love Movement, nozobanjelwa eBerea Rovers, kuwo okuzonandisa abaculi okubalwa kubo uNaima Kay, Mondli ngcobo, Zamajobe, Naledi Aphiwe, Nomfundo Moh, Nontokozo Mkhize, Lwah Ndlunkulu nabasakazi beMetro FM. Emcimbini omkhulu uhlelo luzobe luphethwe uLerato Kganyago noLawrence Maleka kanti uLamiez Holworthy yena uzobe amukela osaziwayo kukhaphethi obomvu. Izolo, abamaMetro baveze izindaba zokuthi amathikithi eVIP asedayise aphela kanti akawonkewonke kusele ayingcosana. Kuleli sonto, Isolezwe libike ukuthi kuyagqoza ukuthemgwa kwamathikithi, nokuyinto ekhathaza abahleli bomcimbi oxhaswe wuMasipala weTheku

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: seChiefs: IChiefs iya emdlalweni wabakhaya bekhululekile ebhentshini uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef ngoba akusebona abadlali abambalwa abaphakamisa isandla uma kukhona okungahambi kahle kepha nalaba abasuka ebhentshini bafika enkundleni kucace. IChiefs izofika kwiPirates isikwazi ukuqalaza ebhentshini lapho kukhona abadlali abahlanganisa u-Asavela Velebayi ojwayele ukungena neminyakazo emihle, noSiphesihle Ndlovu okhombisa izimpawu zokubuyelwa yifomu aziwa ngayo ngisho eqhamuka ebhentshini. Kunzima ukuziba amagalelo abadlali abafana no-Ethan Chislett, othe angalulama ekulimaleni kwacaca ukuthi uzoba wusizo olungakanani kwiChiefs, nabanye abadlali okubalwa kubona uSiphesihle Ndlovu. Leli yithuba elihle likaKaze noBen Youssef lokuzifaka ezinhliziyweni zabalandeli beChiefs namanje abasezwa ubuhlungu ngendlela ebataxe ngayo iPirates emdlalweni wabakhaya odlule.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasophondweni lwesokudla kwiRichards Bay FC, uSanele Barns, otuswa ngumqeqeshi waleli qembu ngomehluko afike nawo kuleli qembu elisemshikashikeni wokuzibekisela indawo kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini ONGUMQEQESHI weRichards Bay FC, uRonnie Gabriel, utusa ubunkunzi bomdlali wasophondweni lwesokudla, uSanele Barns, ngomehluko afike nawo kuleli qembu elisemshikashikeni wokuqeda isizini kwi-Top 8 ekupheleni kwesizini. Igoli likaBarns alishaye ngesiwombe sokuqala yilona elisize iRichards Bay ekubuyeni namaphuzu amathathu ekuhambeni iguqisa i-TS Galaxy ngo 1-0 koweBetway Premiership eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto. UBarns emidlalweni ewu-12 asayidlalile kwiNatal Rich Boys, useshaye amagoli amathathu, waba nesandla kwelilodwa. Ulokhu eqhubeka nokuba ngumdlali omqoka kuleli qembu laKwaZulu-Natal elibalwa nasemshungwini wamaqembu azabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. “USanele Barns ulenzela umsebenzi omuhle iqembu. Amava akhe nomfutho anawo, uyakwedlulisela kubadlali abasebancane eqenjini ngokuba yisibonelo esihle kubona. "Amagoli ambalwa asewashayile enze umehluko ekusizeni iqembu. Kusukela efikile eqenjini ufike nomehluko obonakalayo,” kusho uGabriel oqeqesha ngokubambisana noPapi Zothwane. Ifomu kaBarns nomgqigqo wakamuva weRichards Bay kuza nesivivinyo esimqoka

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ABADLALI nabaqeqeshi be-Orlando Pirates bejabulela igoli likaRelebohile Mofokeng abagcine behlule ngalo iMarumo Gallants kowamanqamu weCarling Knockout ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX KUFEZEKE isifiso somqeqeshi we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, ezakhe siwina indebe yeCarling Knockout ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoMgqibelo ebusuku. Igoli eliweze eZimnyama lishaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng emuva kokuthi isikhathi esijwayelekile somdlalo siphele zibambene ngo 0-0. Lena yindebe yesibili ka-Ouaddou ofike kweZimnyama kunokungabaza mayelana nokuthi uzokwazi ukuvala isikhala sikaJose Riveiro oshiye efake izindebe eziyisihlanu ekhabetheni lePirates. Ekuqaleni kwesizini uwine indebe yeMTN8 okuyiyona eshintshe okuningi ngendlela abalandeli abebembeka ngayo. Ngalokhu u-Ouaddou ufice irekhodi likaRiveiro owawina izindebe naleli qembu ngesizini yakhe yokuqala kwiPirates. Ngemuva kowamanqamu weCarling, u-Ouaddou, uthe ubevele efuna ukuthi banike abalandeli babo isipho sikaKhisimusi ngokuwina le ndebe esibahlule iminyaka. "Lolu wusuku olukhulu eqenjini, kubadlali, kwibhodi, kubaphathi beqembu nakubalandeli. Ngishilo ukuthi ngifuna sibanike isipho sikaKhisimusi futhi ngicabanga ukuthi yisipho sabo esihle. Kufanele ngibabongele abafana bami. Besazi ukuthi wumdlalo wendebe, unzima.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuboshwe amaphoyisa amabili ngokuzama ukungena nezidakamizwa ejele Amaphoyisa amabili angaphansi kweTembisa SAPS, aboshelwe ukutholakala nezidakamizwa eBoksburg Correctional Centre. Lokhu kwenzenge ngoLwesithathu cishe ngabo-09:30 ekuseni, isikhulu sezokuHlunyeleliswa kwezimilo esisejele laseBoksburg, ngesikhathi senza imisebenzi ejwayelekile yokulawula ukungena, senze uphenyo ezimotweni ezingena emagcekeni. Ngesikhathi kuseshwa, lesi sikhulu simise imoto emhlophe ye-SAPS ebinamalungu amabili e-SAPS, oyedwa egqoke umfaniswano wamaphoyisa, omunye egqoke izingubo zabantu. Ngesikhathi lisesha imoto, isikhulu sithole upulasitiki oluhlaza esinamaphilisi e-mandrax angu-82 kanye nensangu, ufihlwe ngaphansi kwesihlalo. Amaphoyisa amabili abe eseboshiwe. Laba bobabili bazovela enkantolo maduze.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI ocula owokholo uJumbo Nyangiwe osenxuse abantu ukuthi bafike ngobuningi babo emcimbini iSilent Worship Experience ezoba seThekwini ngoLwesihlanu UMCULI ocula owokholo uJumbo Nyangiwe noweGqom uSizwe Mdlalose bathembisa lukhulu njengoba bethi ngoLwesihlanu kuyoshintsha impilo yabantu abaningi emcimbini iMayine Silent Worship Experience, ezobanjwa okokuqala eThekwini. Lo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi udonse amehlo abaningi eDCC Jesus Dome, njengoba ubophele abaculi bowokholo okukhona kubo uNtokozo Mbambo, Lisanda Beja, Oncemore Six, Ncebakazi Msomi, Khaya Mthethwa, Mpumi Mtsweni nabanye. Izolo ithimba elihlela lo mcimbi belihambele esikoleni iVelabahleke High, eMlaza liyokhulekela abafundi. USizwe odume endimeni yobumnandi ophinde abe ngumculi, uthe okumjabulisa ngabahleli balo mcimbi wukuthi abaqali ukuhambela izikole uma benomcimbi abawenzayo kodwa lokho bakwenza zikhathi zonke ukuyoqinisa abafundi ngomkhuleko. "Ngiyakuthanda kakhulu ukuhamba nethimba elihlela lo mcimbi ngoba abafundi bayadinga ukuthi izikhathi ngezikhathi bahanjelwe bayokhulekelwa njengoba kukuningi okwenzeka ezikoleni. Ngakho emcimbini ozoba ngoLwesihlanu simema wonke umuntu ukuthi aphumelele," kusho uSizwe. Uthe abazoba khona kulo mcimbi bayophuma bebusisekile njengoba behlele

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: nge-Apple CarPlay iyakutshengisa ukuthi kumele ujike kuphi. Umgibeli nomshayeli bahlala ngokukhululeka ezihlalweni zesikhumba okwazi ukuzifudumeza. Bengingakulindele ukuthi esomshayeli siyakuwotawota. Inendawo yokubeka iziphuzo, ukushaja iselula ngaphandle kwentambo, indawo yokuphumuza ingalo bese kuthi okhakhayini ibe ne-sunroof. Ngemuva nokho isihlalo sincane. Ngemuva kwesihlalo sami ngishayela akekho obengakwazi ukungena ahlale. Nesebhuthi sincane iyakhombisa ukuthi ngeyomuntu ongenamndeni. Kulezi zinsukwana engizichithe nayo ngiyizwe ihamba kahle emgwaqeni. Noma ikhasa phansi ibingazweli kakhulu emigwaqeni ngaphandle uma umgwaqo umubi ngempela. Ukushintsha i-drive mode uyifake kuJohn Cooper Works bekuyilapho wonke amandla ayo ebivele iwakhiphe kalula khona. Amandla lawa angu-170kW ne-torque engu-380Nm enjinini engu-2.0 litre turbo kaphethroli. U-gearbox uyi-7 speed dct. Kule drive mode kuqina isiteringi ne-suspension umgwaqo uwuzwe ubunjalo bawo. Noma unyathela isivinini sinyuka manje kwazise phela ukusuka ku-0 iye ku-100km/h kuyithatha imizuzwana engu-6.1 kanti ijubane ligcina ku-250km/h. Bengithi uma ngishintsha igiya nginyukela kwelesibili ngizwe kukhala ithayi langaphambili izama ukunamathela bese iyanamathela etiyeleni. Nasemakhoneni ibijika kalula ngejubane. Nomculo obukhala ezipikheni

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Image: Sandi Kwon Hoo / DFA Amaphoyisa omgwaqo eLimpopo abambe ibhasi okusolakala ukuthi beligcwele ngokweqile ku-N1 eduze komgwaqo obheke eMashishing, ePolokwane. Leli bhasi, elisuka eMalawi liya eGoli, linelayisensi yokulayisha abagibeli abangu-70 kodwa kuthiwa belithwele abantu abangu-90. Iziphathimandla ziphinde zathola ukuthi uhlu lwabagibeli lukhombisa abagibeli abangu-25 kuphela. Izikhulu zakwa-SAPS kanye nezoMnyango wabokufika babizelwe endaweni yesigameko kanti uphenyo lusaqhubeka. UMnyango wezokuThutha nokuPhepha koMphakathi eLimpopo uxwayise ngokuthi ukugcwala ngokweqile kubeka izimpilo zabantu engozini wathi abomthetho bazoqhubeka nokubhekana nokuphulwa kwemithetho yezokuphepha emgwaqeni.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: kokubhaxabulwa yiHighbury ngo 3-1. Nokho isahlezi endaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-37. author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ekubulaweni kukaGodo, yinto umndeni obuyilindele vele njengoba ubunayo inkolelo yokuthi umufi uzozilwela nalabo abamsoconga. Ithintwa indodana kaGodo, uMnuz Mandla Mthethwa, yale yaphetha ukuphawula, yathi lolu daba lubucayi, akukho umndeni ongakuphawula. Isolezwe lihlulekile ukuthola ukuphawula komndeni kaJuda njengoba isihlobo, sithe kulukhuni ukuthi bangaphawula ngesehlakalo, kwathi ucingo lukankosikazi kamufi, lwakhala lwangaphendulwa. Osekomitini, elilwa nobugebengu obusemngceleni, uMnuz Joseph Ngubane, uthe nakuba ebulewe ungqondongqondo kodwa kusekhona ukukhathazeka emphakathini ngoba basekhona abanye abasele. Uthe bajatshuliswa wukuthi umgilwa odubule umufi ukwazile ukuzivikela, ehlaselwa. “Neyakhe impilo ibisengcupheni, nabo bebedubula bebhekise kuye,” kusho uNgubane. Uthe ithimba eliyisipesheli elasungulwa ukuze libhekane nalolu hlobo lobugebengu, lisawubambe kahle. “Kuke kuthule, ngoba izigebengu ziyalalisa, kodwa bese kubuye kubhoka ke futhi,” usho kanje, enezela ngokuthi njengoba kwenzeke isigameko nje, ikhona imoto eyiveni ethathwe kuzosa kube yizolo eBhambanana. Unxuse umphakathi ukuthi uqhubeke ubambisane namaphoyisa ekulweni nalobu bugebengu, waphinde wawuxwayisa ngokuthi uqaphele ngoba izigebengu zalolu hlobo ziyingozi. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uColonel Robert Netshiunda uthe umufi

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, ejabula nomdlali wasemuva uJabu Mokone emuva kokuwina iligi ngempelasonto edlule Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX 'I-ORLANDO Pirates ingaba nenqanawe yenkulisa uma inganquma ukuyivusa.'
