Lawa ngamazwi omqeqeshi weqembu leZimnyama elingompetha beDStv Diski Challenge, uRoscoe Krieling, oqophe umlando ngokuphakamisa le ndebe okokuqala selokhu le ligi yasungulwa ngo-2014. IPirates yehlule iSundowns ngo 2-0 emdlalweni wokugcina wesizini eDobsonville Stadium, eSoweto, ngempelasonto. Kulindeleke ukuthi leli qembu liyodlala phesheya kwezilwandle okuwuhambo oluhambisana nokuba ngompetha beDiski. EZimnyama zihlale esicongweni se-log amasonto angu-21. Eminyakeni edlule, iPirates ibihlala esicongweni kodwa igcine igudluziwe. IPirates idla umhlanganiso kwiDiski nje, ayisenayo inkulisa kwazise yavalwa eminyakeni edlule kulandela izinsolo zokukokotela iminyaka kwabadlali. Abadlali abayibamba kwiDiski bathungathwa njalo ngaphambi kokuqala kwesizini. IKaizer Chiefs neMamelodi Sundowns ngamanye amaqembu ashaya ngabadlali abakhuliswe ezinkulisa zawo. UKrieling owayeyiphini likaThabo Septhemba ngesikhathi bewina iligi yeDiski ngo-2023, uncome umsebenzi weqembu namalungiselelo esizini aseqophelweni. "Lokhu kuwuphumela wokuhlela izinto okwenziwa ngaphambi kokufika kwami eqenjini. Ngesonto lami lokuqala

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ekhokhwa abasebenzi," kusho uButhelezi. Muva nje, izinyunyana ezehlukene zabasebenzi bahulumeni zimashele i-GEMS zifuna kwehliswe imali. Zifuna nokuthi kwenziwe uphenyo mayelana nezikhulu ze-GEMS kuphinde kuchithwe nesikhulu sayo. Zanika i-GEMS izinsuku eziyisikhombisa ukuthi ziphendule izikhalazo zazo, zathi zisabheka nezinye izindlela ezingazisebenzisa, okubalwa nokuya enkantolo ukuze kuphoqwe i-GEMS ukuthi yehlise imali. Izinyunyana ezingaphansi kweFedusa, zilulele isikhathi i-GEMS ukuthi iphendule kwizikhalazo zayo. Le nyunyana ibhikishe ngoFebhuwari 21, ikhala ngokunyuswa kwemali. Nezinyunyana ezingaphansi kweCosatu zisho ngazwi linye ukuthi zifuna kwehliswe le mali. Zikhale nangokuthi iminyaka ilandelana, inyuswa kakhulu imali ekhokhwa abasebenzi ekubeni isheshe iphele nemali ezabelwa nonyaka ungakapheli. Izinyunyana zasabisa nangokuthi zizobamba ukhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka uma i-GEMS iqhubeka nokuqinisa ikhanda. I-GEMS yaveza ukuthi yanyusa imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko nemali eyikhokhile ngamalungu ayo. Yakhala nangenkohlakalo eyenzekayo njengoba yasola amanye amalungu ngokuthi alalisa izihlobo zawo ezibhedlela ezizimele, ezingekho ngaphansi kwe-GEMS.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ekuhambeni ne-Orbit College FC ngoMeyi 23. “Siyakhuleka kuMdali ukuthi sisike iphethini eqenjini lethu leDDC (DStv Diski Challenge) sisidle nathi lesi sicoco ngoba iminyaka engu-14 yisikhathi eside ukuthi abalandeli bePirates bangabuka abamanye amaqembu bebaklolodela ngokuhlabana kwamaqembu abo,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Sekuseduze kodwa umsebenzi kawukaqedwa ngakho-ke kusemqoka ukuyimisa okwamanje imibhiyozo kuze kube semthethweni ukuthi singompetha. “Okumnandi kakhulu ngalokhu okwenzekayo ngukuthi iPirates iphethwe ngabantu okubafanele ukuthi balandelwe yimpumelelo emihle kumasizini onke njengamanye amaqembu athathwa njengamakhulu. “Abadlali abasemabhukwini ePirates kule sizini bayamangalisa ngoba isimo abakusona nethuba lomlando abami phambi kwalo bakukhombisa ngabakwenza enkundleni ukuthi bayakuqonda. “Siyanuka emakhaleni isicoco kodwa wonke amandla esinawo kufanele siwafake emidlalweni emibili esisalele. “Kumqoka ukuya kule midlalo esele ngomqondo ohluzekile kwazise sibhekene kuyona namaqembu alwela indawo kwi-Top 8 nasesigabeni esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika ngokwahlukana,” kusho u-Ouaddou.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IMBONGI uLuyanda EM izokwenza umcimbi wayo wokuqala wezinkondlo nomculo othi Imiyezane Poetry Experience UMBHALI obuye abe yimbongi yezinkondlo zesiZulu, uLuyanda Mlotshwa, odume ngelikaLuyanda EM kwezobuciko, usethembise ukwelapha imiphefumulo, futhi athobe nezinhliziyo zabantu emcimbini wakhe wokuqala wobuciko. Lo mcimbi awubiza ngokuthi Imiyezane Poetry Experience, uzoba se-The Stable Theatre, eThekwini, ngoMgqibelo ngoMashi 7 kusuka ngo-12 emini kuya ku-5 ntambama. ULuyanda waseMvoti, kodwa osezinze eThekwini, uthe sekuyisikhathi eside eshisekela ukwenza lo mcimbi kepha kungenzeki ngenxa yokuthi bekungakabi yisikhathi esifanele nesihle kuyena ukuziphonsela inselelo enjalo ngobuciko bakhe. IMBONGI uLuyanda EM izokwenza umcimbi wayo wokuqala wezinkondlo nomculo othi Imiyezane Poetry Experience “Yingakho kuthe uma sengibona ukuthi sengikulungele ngokuphelele ukuba nawo, ngaqinisekisa nokuthi ngiqala ngokuthola usizo lokuthi uxhaseke ngendlela efanele, nezokwenza ukuthi kungabi nzima ukuthi ube yilokhu engikufunayo,” kusho yena. IMBONGI uNhlanhla Mhlongo kwabazonandisa emcimbini wedili lezinkondlo nomculo Imiyezane Poetry Experience Eqhuba, uthe lona wumcimbi azobe ededela kuwona ingxenye yezinkondlo aziwa ngazo endimeni, iningi lazo ezikwi-EP

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UZIME wakuleli uZozibini Tunzi ungomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing INTOKAZI yakuleli eyathatha isicoco sikaMiss SA yaphinde yakhala yemuka nesikaMiss Universe, uZozibini Tunzi, ingomunye wabethuli abasha bohlelo iTop Billing, ekhuza ibuya kwiS3 ekupheleni kwale nyanga. Lolu hlelo obeselunyamalele minyaka, lubuya kulesi siteshi nalapho luzokhombisa khona imizi nemicimbi esezingeni eliphezulu. Le ntokazi egqame kwabaningi ithatha lezi zicoco, ayiyona umafikizolo kwezethelevishini njengoba isike yabonakala ilingisa efilimini yaphesheya kwezilwandle eyaqoshwa kuleli iThe Woman King neBad Influencer eyayikhonjiswa kwiNetflix. UZozi uthe kuye leli yithuba eliyingqayizivele ngoba ukuba kulolu hlelo kusho lukhulu - yinto akade ayilindela. "Kuningi okusha okusazovela ngohlelo. Kusekhona okuningi okuzolandela nokuzohluka endleleni uhlelo obelwaziwa ngayo phambilini," kuchaza yena. Kulolu hlelo kubuya izinkakha ezake zalwethula okukhona kuzo uDkt Michael Mol, Basetsana Kumalo, Jonathan Boynton-Lee, Dkt Fez Mkhize noRyle De Morny. Kubethuli abasha abazoqala ukubonakala kulo kubalwa uBryoni Govender, Arno Greeff noSine Mpulu. Ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuphendulwe ihlaya ezinkundleni zokuxhmana ngokuthi kumele baphenyisiswe abazobonakala

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UDKT Bongani Mncwango nomholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa UKWENZA izinto ngokungaphaphi kobuholi be-IFP, kungenye yezinto ezihehele kuleli qembu loyo olaxaze iMKP, uDkt Bongani Mncwango. UMncwango, omenyezelwe ngokusemthethweni njengelungu le-IFP izolo, uveze ukuthi maningi amaqembu abemshela. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba. UMncwango owayengunobhala jikelele weMKP, uveze ukuthi ugcine eqome i-IFP emaqenjini amane abemfunisa okomsebenzi. "Ngikhethe ukunika i-IFP ucu kula masoka abengeshela ngenxa yokubuka umlando wayo. I-IFP ineminyaka engu-51 futhi kunozinzo kuyo. Abaholi bayo bakhulile ngokomqondo. Izinto zakwi-IFP azenziwa ngokuphapha, ucabanga kabili ngaphambi kokuthi wenze into kwi-IFP. Engikuthandayo nge-IFP ukuthi inethuba lokukhula." UMncwango udilizwe esikhundleni sokuba unobhala jiekelele weMKP ngenyanga edlule kanti ubesahlale kulesi sikhundla isikhathi esingaphansi kwezinyanga eziyisikhombisa. Akazange afune ukwanda kakhulu ngokumenze washiya iMKP. Uthe uma umuntu ejoyina iqembu kuyaye kube nombono athenjiswa wona. "Uma abaholi beqembu sekuba yibo abangasawulandeli loyo mbono, kuyaye kufanele ukuthi uthathe isinqumo sokuthi uyahlala noma uyahamba." Bekuqhilika izidlathi kuMncwango ngesikhathi ethulwa, ekhuza neziqubulo ze-IFP. Umholi

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa ABAHOLI be-IFP okuthiwa abezwani, okunguMengameli weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa noSihlalo weqembu KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, bakhulume ngezwi elilodwa, bekhuza uqhekeko iqembu lethula umkhankaso wokubhalisela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. UHlabisa noNtuli baxwayise ngokuthi labo abadala uqhekeko bazophazamisa umkhankaso wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya. Bakusho lokhu ngesikhathi beshiyelana inkundla emcimbini obuseMpangeni. UHlabisa uhlabe wahlikiza labo abathi ngeke bazigqoke izikibha ezinobuso bakhe kanye nalabo abathi ngeke besazigqoka izikibha ezinobuso bomsunguli weqembu, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi. Amalungu e-IFP asanda kunikezwa ilungelo lokuba agqoke izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa kodwa kunamalungu eqembu angafuni ukufaka izikibha ezinobuso bukaHlabisa. Kusanda kusabalala inkulumo yelungu leqembu, uNksz Lindi Ndlovu, lapho lithi ngeke lisigqoke isikibha esinobuso bukaHlabisa ngesikhathi likhuluma nelungu lesiShayamthetho elingusihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal omisiwe, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. UHlabisa uthe ukuba uButhelezi usekhona ubezokuba owokuqala ukugqoka isikibha esinobuso bakhe. Archives UHlabisa uthe uButhelezi wayefuna ukuthi kube nezikibha ezinobuso bakhe ngesikhathi kubhekwe okhethweni lwango-2019. Ngaleso sikhathi uHlabisa wayengakabi umholi weqembu,

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX ISINGENWE ngamanxusa aseMzansi indaba yokuboshwa komqeqeshi wakuleli, uRulani Mokwena, ezimkhalele ngeSonto e-Algeria. UMokwena wehlukane neqembu lase-Algeria. iMC Alger ngempelasonto, kwasabalala izindaba zokuthi useqashwe yi-Al Ittihad yaseLibya edlalelwa nguThembinkosi Lorch ayemqeqesha kwi-Orlando Pirates, Mamelodi Sundowns nakwiWydad Casablanca. Kuvele ukuthi uMokoena uboshiwe esikhumulweni sezindiza sase-Algeria, iHouari Boumediene Airport kulandela ukwephula umthetho owengamele imali yakhona, Kuthiwa ubezama ukuphuma nayo ngaphandle kwezwe. Iziko lezindaba, i-SABC, libike ukuthi uMokwena uthola usizo kwabamele iNingizimu Afrika e-Algeria. Lo mqeqeshi oneminyaka engu-39, oshiye i-Alger emuva ngempelasonto edlule kwezinyanga eziyishiyagalombili eyiqeqesha, kubikwa ukuthi ngokwemali azoyithola kwi-Ittihad, uzobalwa nabaqeqeshi abayikha ngamafosholo e-Afrika. UMokwena ushiye i-Alger esicongweni se-log kodwa ukukhishwa kwiCaf Champions League kubukeka kumdalele amazinyo abushelelezi kubaphathi beqembu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: amaphoyisa. Kufike kuthiwe, asiwalekelele amaphoyisa, uma sesibulawa, bese kukhulunywa kanje,” kusho uJali. Uqhube wathi into ebasukumisa phansi bazibambele mathupha empini yobugebengu eNanda ukuthi uma ebizelwa izigameko zobugebengu amaphoyisa aye akhale ngokuthi awanele, kokunye athi amaveni awekho. Uthe bebengakulindele nhlobo ukuthi uMkhwanazi akhulume kanje emva kwesigameko. “Bekufanele uma ebona ukuthi kukhona esingakwenzi kahle, asondele kithi asinike umhlahlandlela ngoba iqiniso lithi ubugebengu buphumile esandleni eNanda. Uma sekushiwo kanje, sizizwa sengathi siyizimvu zomhlatshelo,” usho kanje. Uthe basalishumayela ivangeli lokuthi ayisukunyelwe phezulu eyobugebengu baseNanda, wathi kufanele kuphungulwe amaphoyisa aseziteshini ezingenabo ubugebengu obuningi, ayotshalwa eNanda, awoMkhandlu weTheku, aqinise izivimbamgwaqo eNanda, ukuvimba izigelekeqe ezicanasa ngezimoto nezibhamu ezizisebenzisa ukwenza ubugebengu, bese kusungulwa uhlelo lwama-wardens olubonakale luba wusizo eGoli. Uthe asengu-34 esewonke amalungu enhlangano yakhe asebulawe yizigebengu emalokishini aseThekwini, kusuka ngo-2022, nathe isigameko esenzeke ngoMgqibelo, sibashiye bekhathazekile ngoba sibadwebele isithombe sokuthi kusaqhubeka ukubulawa kwabo. Obekhona kwenzeka isigameko ocele ukungadalulwa, uthe iziwombe zokugqekezelwa kwabantu endaweni zaqala ngoLwesihlanu ebusuku, babikelwa

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: lokho, basiqeda isomiso sezindebe. Ngakho sibonga kakhulu kumqeqeshi, uPitso Dladla, usihlalo uKadodia (Farook), ithimba labaqeqeshi, nawo wonke umuntu oyingxenye yaleli qembu ofake isandla empumelelweni yalo. Okuqaphelekayo wukuthi yisizini yokuqala le iDurban City ingenile esigabeni esikhulu seBetway Premiership, kodwa isikwi-Top 8 futhi ayisaphumi, yaphinda yathatha indebe. Siyathokoza futhi ukuthi njengamanje kwi-Top 8 AmaZulu akhona, iGolden Arrows ibukeka izoba khona, neRichards Bay iyasondela,” kusho uKhawula. “Lokhu kusinika ithemba lokuthi kungenzeka sibe namaqembu amaningana kwi-MTN8 ngesizini ezayo. Impumelelo yeDurban City kufanele ibe yisikhuthazi nakwamanye amaqembu akulesi sifundazwe engifisa ukuthi kube nokubambisana kuwona, yize edlala ngokuncintisana. Ukubambisana nokwesekana kwawo kungahamba ibanga ekubuyiseni isithunzi nempumelelo ebholeni laKwaZulu-Natal, eyikhaya lebhola. NeMilford FC noma ingakwazanga ukunqoba iligi (yeMotsepe Foundation Championship), nayo sinethemba lokuthi izophumelela kuma-Play-Offs, yandise isibalo samaqembu akulesi sifundazwe kwiPremiership, futhi sizoyeseka.” ICitizens ibe yiqembu lokuqala laseKZN elinqobe isicoco selokhu kwagcina iLamontville Golden Arrows ngo-2009 inqoba indebe ye-MTN8. Usihlalo weCitizens, uKadodia, uzwakalise ukuthobeka ngomcimbi abawenzelwe wuMnyango

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UNGQONGQOSHE womnyango weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi Mzamo Buthelezi BEVILE ku-500 ngosuku abantu abangeniswa ezibhedlela ezizimele kuleli abakhokhelwa yiGovernment Employees Medical Scheme (GEMS). Lokhu kuvezwe nguNgqongqoshe weziSebenzi zikaHulumeni nokuPhatha, Inkosi uMzamo Buthelezi, ephendula imibuzo yelungu le-EFF ePhalamende. UButhelezi uthe ngosuku i-GEMS yamukela amalungu amasha angu-112. Uthe ikhokha cishe u-R182 milllion njalo ngosuku kanti ongoti bodokotela bakhokhelwa ngosuku u-R27 milion. "Ngosuku i-GEMS ikhokhela izibhedlela ezizimele ngezingane ezingu-60, ezizalwa ngosuku. Zizalwa abantu abasuke besikiwe, abanye basuke bezibelethele. Bangu-593 abangeniswa ezibhedlela nsuku zonke," kusho uButhelezi. Ubechaza ngezinselelo ezibhekene ne-GEMS enyuse imali ngenxa yokunyuka kwezindleko. Sisuse umsindo isenzo se-GEMS sokunyusa imali ekuqaleni konyaka, okwenze izinyunyana zabasebenzi zamashela ukwehliswa kwemali. Okwamanje kusaqhubeka izingxoxo zokuzama ukufinyelela esivumelwaneni njengoba i-GEMS ikhale ngokunyuka kwezindleko okuyimbangela yokunyuswa kwemali ekhokhwa amalungu. Okunye i-GEMS ekhale ngakho yinkohlakalo edla lubi, njengoba amanye amalungu elalisa izihlobo zawo ezingeyona ingxenye ye-GEMS, bese kudingeka lesi sikhwama sikhokhe. Izinyunyana zikhale ngokuthi i-GEMS ibuye ingafuni ukukhokha. UButhelezi empendulweni,

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ngesikhathi uZwane esalimele,” kusho uBroos kwaSABC. “UZwane uwuhlobo lomdlali okungelula ukuvala isikhala salo kodwa ngiyamncoma uMbule ngasenzele khona ngesikhathi simdinga kwiBafana. Muva nje, akadlali kwiPirates okuyisizathu sokuthi angabibikho kulesi sikwati kodwa ungomunye wabadlali abayohlale besenhliziyweni yami ngoba iqiniso ngukuthi bonke abanye esizame ngabo ukuvala indawo kaZwane basishiye singenelisekile ngokugcwele.” Esikhundleni sikaChaine, uBroos ubize uRenaldo Leaner weSekhukhune United amchaze njengonozinti ongakaze asuke emehlweni akhe. Kubagadli, lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ongazange aphumele obala ngesizathu sakhe sokushiya uRayners, uqhubeke no-Evidence Makgopa wePirates noLyle Foster weBurnley yase-England. Ngesikhathi uBroos ekhuluma, ubelokhu ekuphinda ukuthi akuhlosile ngale khempu wukuthi bonke abadlali bakuqonde ukuthi akekho kubona ozoya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba ngenxa yegama lakhe kuphela. “Ngosuku lwesibili lwekhempu (ngoLwesibili), ngizoba nomhlangano nabadlali lapho ngizobakhumbuza khona bonke ukuthi ukubabiza kwami kulesi sikwati akusho ukuthi ngizohamba nabo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba,” usho kanje. “Kangiqondile ukuthi abadlali abafana noChaine balehlisile izinga kodwa lona ngumyalezo obheke kubona bonke abadlali ukuthi ngeke bayithole indawo esikwatini seNdebe yoMhlaba

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: yeChampions League, uveze ukuthi okwamanje akukho okumbusa ekhanda njengokusiza iSundowns idle indebe yeCaf. Kulindeleke ukuthi lesi sitobha siphinde sidlale ngeSonto ntambama uma iSundowns isiyodlala owomlenze wesibili eMali. “Ukungabizwa kwiBafana yinto wonke umdlali okufanele ayilindele ngoba umqeqeshi kumele akhethe kubadlali abaningi abamnika okuhlukene,” kusho uKekana. “Kuyisibusiso kuwona wonke umdlali ukumela izwe lakhe, ikakhulukazi kwiNdebe yoMhlaba kodwa ngeke ukuphoqe ukubizwa noma ukushiywa ngaphandle. “Okusemqondweni wami yisikweletu sabalandeli esabaphoxa ekugcineni ngesizini edlule. Iseyisibhobo kimina nozakwethu indlela esihluleke ngayo ukwengeza inkanyezi yesibili ejezini lethu. “Kule sizini kasinawo uphawini wokuzithambisa ngoba ubufakazi balokho bahlala obala emdlalweni wamanqamu ngesizini edlule,” kusho uKekana sakubalisa. ISundowns eyayithwelwe ngeqoma ngesizini edlule ukufaka inkanyezi yesibili, yakhala ngaphansi kowamanqamu kwiPyramids FC yase-Egypt eyayingenamlando otheni kwiChampions League.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: bonke ngokungethemba ngebhande likakaputeni. Ukuhola elinye lamaqembu amakhulu naphezulu ezwenikazi yinto eyohlala iyigugu kimina ngiziqhenya ngayo,"kusho uMaart obengahamba neqembu njengoba lisekhempini eNetherlands. "Kubona bonke abaqeqeshi abangicijile kulona lonke uhambo lwami, ngiyabonga kakhulu. Ulwazi nobuhlakani enikudlulisele kimina kungisizile ekutheni ngikhule ngezindlela eziningi ezingaphezu kwebhola uqobo," Abanye ababongile ngusihlalo weSekhukhune, uSimon Malatjie, adlalela iqembu lakhe ngemuva kokuchithwa yiPirates adlala kuyona kwiDStv Diski Challenge. Nakuba ekade engukaputeni waMakhosi kodwa uMaart ubengomunye wabadlali abebenuka umzondo kubalandeli.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns uLebo Mothiba ongenabo abalandeli abaningi ABAKHOHLWE ukuthi bazophumelela abazama ukunyundela umgadli weMamelodi Sundowns, uLebo Mothiba, kumqeqeshi waleli qembu laseChloorkop, uMiguel Cardoso, ngoba ngeke baphumelele. Lawa ngamazwi kaCardoso awatshele abezindaba ngenhloso yokuvikela uMothiba odlale ngephenathi ngesikhathi benqoba ngengcacamezela ka 1-0 kwiPolokwane City ngoLwesithathu ebusuku eSeshego Stadium, ePolokwane. Bekumqoka ukuthi iSundowns inqobe ngamagoli angaphezulu kwelilodwa njengoba isemjahweni wesicoco seligi oshisa phansi ne-Orlando Pirates. Ngokunqoba kwiPolokwane, leli qembu laseChloorkop libuyele esicongweni se-log. ISundowns inethuba lokulinweba igebe lamaphuzu lihlale kwamahlanu esicongweni njengoba izophinda nePolokwane ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. UMothiba obesanda kungena usize iSundowns ngokuyakhela igoli elishaywe nguMarcelo Allende egcine inqobe ngalo. Emuva kwalokho, wehlulwe wukushaya phakathi iphenathi evinjwe ngonyawo ngunozinti wePolokwane ezama ukuyikha ngendlela esakutayela. Ukuyishaya phakathi kwakhe bekuzokwehlisa isikweletu samagoli abasele ngawo kwiPirates. Kuqale usaqhubeka umdlalo ukugxekwa kukaMothiba ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngendlela athathe ngayo iphenathi. Kusukela uMothiba afika kwiSundowns esuka eFrance ngesizini edlule akukho okutheni asekwenzele leli qembu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ABANYE babelaphi bendabuko ebebeyingxenye yosuku lokuvulwa kwekhemisi eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park KUHLOSWE ukuthi kulungiswe inkinga yokuvunwa kwezihlahla ngokwedlulele kanjalo nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, ngekhemisi labelaphi bendabuko elivulwe yinhlangano yokongiwa kwemvelo esiqiwini iHluhluwe iMfolozi Park (HiP) ngoMgqibelo. Lokhu kushiwe uMphathiswa woMnyango wezokuThuthukiswa koMnotho, ezokuVakasha nezeMvelo KwaZulu-Natal, uMfundisi Musa Zondi, obeyingxenye yalo mcimbi. Kuthiwa bonke abelaphi bendabuko abasemthethweni, sebezothenga izihlahla kanjalo nokunye okufana namathambo, amafutha, izikhumba zezilwane ezithile nokunye kuleli khemisi elethiwe ngokuthi iseMpilweni Warehouse. UZondi uthe ukukhula kokuvunwa kwezihlahla nokuzingelwa kwezilwane okungekho emthethweni, okuholele ekutheni basibone isidingo sokuvula indawo efuze le, ezodayisa lezi zinto ngokusemthethweni. “Ukuvunwa kwazo okungekho emthethweni nokudayiswa kwazo emakethe engavumelekile, kuyingozi kwimvelo kanjalo nakulezo zitshalo nezilwane ezisengcupheni yokushabalala,” kusho uZondi. Uthe ukwakhiwa kwaleli khemisi akwenziwanga njengoba kulula kodwa kwenziwe ngoba kubonakala isidingo. “Besibhekene nenkinga enkulu yokudayiswa nokuthengwa obekungalawuleki, ukuvuna okwedlulele ezindaweni ezivikelekile yize kunezimvume,” usho kanje. Udalule ukuthi lokhu bekugcina kuholela ekutheni kulahleke imali emakethe engakahleleki. Uthe konke okuzodayiswa

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UMLINDO The Vocalist nonina wengane yakhe uTaylor Allison SEKUQUBUKE inkombankombane ngezinsolo zokushayana nokuhlukumezana emoyeni phakathi komculi uMlindo the Vocalist nentombi yakhe okungacaci ukuthi usajola yini nayo, uTaylor Allison. Kusuke umsindo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngoLwesine ebusuku kusabalala imibhalo okuthiwa ifakwe wuTaylor edalula izinsolo zokuthi uMlindo umbeke isandla futhi walimaza ingane yakhe ekhanda ngeselula. Le ntokazi noMlindo wodumo lwengoma ethi AmaBlesser, banengane. "Phambilini ngayishiya le ndoda kodwa yakhala yangincenga ithi angiyibuyise futhi ifuna ukuba 'yindoda yomndeni' kodwa iyisigebengu. Uthanda kakhulu ucansi futhi usengithelele ngezifo izikhawu eziningi athi ziqhamuka ethoyilethi," kubhala uTaylor. Uqhube wathi uMlindo akabenzeli lutho nengane ngoba unezinye izinganeazinakekelayo. Uthe yingakho ngesikhathi ehamba efulethini ababehlala kulo athatha yonke into ngoba kwakuthengwe nguye ngemali yakhe. Esitatimendeni asifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana, uMlindo, ogama lakhe laokuzalwa nguLindokuhle Mgedezi, uziphikile izinsolo zokuthi uyahlukumeza. "Sekuyisikhathi eside ngithule ngoba ngihlonipha ubudlelwano bethu futhi ngethemba ukuthi sizolungisa izinto ngasese. Ngiyabona kodwa manje ukuthi ukuthula kwami kuthatheka ngenye indlela. Ngibona kubalulekile

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: no-2 lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa ngo-7 kusihlwa, bese kuthi ngoMeyi 3 ukhonjiswe ngo-3 ntambama. Amathikithi okuwubuka abiza u-R200 eComputicket, eShoprite naseCheckers - kanti nencwadi yawo izobe itholakala emcimbini ngawo uR200 iyinye. Amagalelo kaThobani ayazikhulumela endimeni yokulingisa njengoba eselingise emidlalweni yethelevishini ehlukene esingabala kuyona iHostela, Isipho: The Gift, i-The Black Door, nalingisa kuwona manje - Isitha: The Enemy.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: akugcini ngokubuyisa ithemba ngendawo iChiefs engaqeda kuyona kwi-log kule sizini kepha nokuzethemba kwabadlali kuzobe kwehlukile kulo mdlalo wangeSonto. Ifomu yePirates iyamangalisa kulezi zinsuku njengoba isifaka umfutho wokugcina wokubhincisela nxanye iSundowns kodwa ukujika kwenhlanhla yeChiefs nakho akuzibeki. Ukushintsha kokucabanga kubonakala ebusweni kubadlali beChiefs: IChiefs yafika kowabakhaya odlule izinga lokuzethemba liphansi ngenxa yokuphikwa yimiphumela kodwa kodwa kulokhu nabadlali bayo bakhombisa izimpawu zokukulambela ukuba yingxenye yeqembu ngoba selenza kahle. Sekusobala okuzanywa yiChiefs enkundleni uma ukuqhathanisa nangaphambi komdlalo wabakhaya odlule lapho kwakubheda cishe konke abebethi bayakwenza. Kungenzeka ukuthi laba abaqeqesha iqembu ngokubambisana, uCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef, kukhona abakushintshile endleleni abalungiselela ngayo imidlalo, nabadlali baphinde bashintsha ukwenza ensimini. UMGADLI weKaizer Chiefs uFlavio Silva ebanga ibhola noThalente Mbatha we-Orlando Pirates kowabakhaya baseSoweto ngoFebhuwari. Amagoli aseyangena nasezitheni hhayi kwiChiefs kuphela: Kunesikhathi eside kule sizini lapho iChiefs ebihluleka khona ukushaya amagoli amabili noma ngaphezulu emdlalweni kodwa muva nje kubukeka sengathi usuvulekile umpompi. IChiefs izofika kwiPirates isikwazi ukuthola

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: "Lolu wusuku olukhulu eqenjini, kubadlali, kwibhodi, kubaphathi beqembu nakubalandeli. Ngishilo ukuthi ngifuna sibanike isipho sikaKhisimusi futhi ngicabanga ukuthi yisipho sabo esihle. Kufanele ngibabongele abafana bami. Besazi ukuthi wumdlalo wendebe, unzima. Udinga umqondo nokudlala ngenhliziyo. Kusifanele ukuwina ngoba uma sibheka umdlalo wonke, esiwombeni sokuqala bekufanele sihambe phambili ngo 2-0. Lokhu wukunqoba okusifanele, kubafanele abadlali. Ngingumqeqeshi ojabule,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSupersport. Lo mdlalo bekungowokugcina kumdlali wasemuva, uMbekezeli "TLB" Mbokazi osesayine kwiChicago Fire edlala kwiMajor League Soccer, e-USA. Umdlali ovelele wosuku kube ngu-Oswin Appollis ovotelwe ngabalandeli abangu-8876, wagoduka nesheke lika-R100 000.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ukukwenza konke ebezibekelwe khona. "Ngenxa yokuthi abuzange bulethwe ubufakazi ebesibufuna, isiphakamiso sokuthi banikwe amabhonasi asizange siphumelele. Siyalele imenenja kamasipala ukuba yenze isiqiniseko sokuthi asikho isiphakamiso esifana nalesi esizolethwa emhlanganweni womkhandlu ngaphandle uma kuwukuthi sizokube sihambisana nobufakazi." UShelembe uthe kunzima ukukhuluma indaba yokunika izikhulu zomkhandlu amabhonasi ekubeni ingqalasizinda yomkhandlu ifadabala. Uthe ukubusa ngokubambisana angeke kubenze ukuthi bavume noma yini ephakanyiswa yiqembu abambisene nalo. "Sikukhombisile lokho namhlanje ngokuthi siphikisane nalesi siphakamiso. Ngesikhathi singena kuhulumeni sazibophezela ekusebenzeni ngobuqotho saphinda futhi sazibophezela ukuthi sizoqinisekisa ukuthi abantu bazithola ngendlela izidingo. Angeke sigudluke kulezi zibophezelo esazenzayo. Ngeke sivumelane nezinqumo ezingeke zibasize ngalutho abantu basebaQulusini. Abantu basebaQulusini kufanele bazi ukuthi imali yabo isebenze kanjani."

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: izakhiwo kule ndawo uqale emjondolo womuntu wokufika kuleli, okuthiwa uvele wacela empunzini emva kwesigameko. Uthe ukuhanjiswa kosizo oludingwa amagilwa kufaka phakathi noMasipala weTheku njengoba besebenzisana nehhovisi leMeya uMnuz Cyril Xaba kanjalo nelikaNksz Thembi Simelane onguNgqongqoshe wezokuHlaliswa kwaBantu ezingeni likazwelonke. Uthe amathimba alekelela kule ndawo azoqhubeka nokuba khona kuyo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi abakhahlamezekile bayakuthola ukusizakala abakudingayo. Uveze nokuthi noMphathiswa wezeMpilo esifundazweni uNksz Nomagugu Simelane kanjalo nowezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uNksz Mbali Shinga nabo bawathumele awabo amathimba ukuzonikezela ngosizo oluqondene neminyango yabo oludingwa abagilwa. Ubonge ezinye izinhlangano, athe zifake isandla ekunikezeleni ngosizo kulesi simo. Phakathi kwazo uthe kukhona iGift of the Givers Foundation esize ngomatrasi nezingubo zokulala, i-Al Imdaad Foundation enikezele ngamaphasela okudla, iRed Cross elekelele ngokudla okufudumele, i-Ikabawo Performing Arts Academy namalungu omphakathi abanikele ngokudla okuvuthiwe.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMENGAMELI wezwe uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa IPHALAMENDE lichithe isicelo se-African Transformation Movement (ATM), sokuba kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa esikhundleni. I-ATM ibifuna ukuthi kuqalwe uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni emva kombiko wophiko olugada ukusebenza kwamaphoyisa, i-Ipid, oluveze ukuthi abaqaphi bakaRamaphosa baphula imigomo ngesikhathi bephenya ngokuntshontshwa kwezindodla zemali epulazi likaRamaphosa. Umbiko we-Ipid osanda kunekelwa izwe, ukhombe ngenjumbane izikhulu ezazigada uRamaphosa ngesikhathi kuntshontshwa imali epulazini lakhe ngo-2021. IPhalamende lake lwaqala uhlelo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni ngo-2022, ngesikhathi kuvela izinsolo okukuqala. Nokho iPhalamende lachitha umbiko wethimba elaliholwa yijaji eselathatha umhlalaphansi, uSandile Ngcobo, okwasho ukuthi uRamaphosa uyaphunyula esiphakamisweni sokuthi akhishwe esikhundleni. I-ATM iyona eyayifake isicelo sokuthi kuqalwe uphenyo lokukhipha uRamaphosa esikhundleni esachithwa. Emva kokudedelwa kombiko we-Ipid, i-ATM, iphinde yabhalela iPhalamende icela ukuthi kuvuswe lolu daba. USomlomo wePhalamende, uNkk Thoko Didiza, uthe iPhalamende livele selaqeda ngalolu daba. Ukusho lokhu empendulweni yencwadi ayithumele i-ATM. "Uzokhumbula ukuthi ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuqala, wawufuna kuphenywe izinsolo ezifanayo. IPhalamende lanquma ukuqoka ithimba

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: ezayo kuzobe kusho ukuthi abadlali okubalwa kubona uNkosingiphile Ngcobo oyintandokazi yabalandeli, Brandon Petersen, Bruce Bvuma (onombandela wokuyivuselela), Sibongiseni Mthethwa noGaston Sirino sebengasayina izinkontileka zesibambiso namanye amaqembu. Abanye abadlali abangakazi ngekusasa labo nguGeorge Matlou onenkontileka ebivuselelwe ngonyaka, Dillan Solomons, Pule Mmodi noTashreeq Morris onyamanambana kubalandeli baMakhosi. Nakuba iChiefs ingajwayele ukuvuselela ngokushesha izinkontileka zabadlali kodwa kuyaziwa ukuthi ukuba nenqwaba yabadlali engazi ngekusasa layo kungalenzela phansi iqembu elinezifiso zokwenza kahle kule sizini. Ngaphandle kwabadlali, abaphathi beChiefs kufanele banqume ngekusasa labaqeqeshi abasabambile okunguCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ngemuva kokuhamba kukaNasreddine Nabi, iChiefs imemezele ukuthi laba baqeqeshi abebengabasizi bakhe bazobamba kuze kuphele isizini ka-2025/2026. Lokhu kuqondana nokuphela kwezinkontilela abazisayina ekuqaleni kwesizini edlule befika noNabi. Uma uKaze noYoussef behluleka ukwenza umsebenzi kwiChiefs, lokho kuyosho ukuthi abaphathi beqembu kufanele bathungathe omunye okungenzeka afike nabasizi bakhe. IChiefs isendaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership lapho ibambene khona ne-Orlando Pirates ngamaphuzu angu-22. NgeSonto, izovakashela i-AL Masry eSuez Stadium e-Egypt, koqala ngo-6 ebusuku.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNGQONGQOSHE wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi, uMnuz Dean Macpherson noKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, besesikhungweni i-Forensic Science Laboratory, evulwe ngoLwesihlanu, eMayville ZIYIFANISE nokunqoba kwesifundazwe empini yobugebengu obubucayi, eyokuvulwa kweForensic Science Laboratory (FSL), eMayville, eThekwini, ngoLwesihlanu. Izinhlaka ezilwa nobugebengu emphakathini, zithe le laboratory enikezelwe nguNgqongqoshe wemiSebenzi yoMphakathi kuzwelonke, uMnuz Dean Mcpherson kwibamba likaNgqongqoshe wamaPhoyisa kuzwelonke, uSolwazi Firoz Cachalia, ibuyisa ithemba empini yokulwa nobugebengu esifundazweni. Phakathi kokunye okuningi okuyamaniswa nophenyo lwamacala, izoba yisikhungo esizohlola amasampula olibofuzo oluqondene namacala okudlwengula enzeka esifundazweni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi phambilini, amasampula alolu hlobo abethunyelwa esikhungweni esenza umsebenzi ofanayo esisePitoli. Lokhu bekuholela ekutheni kube khona izikhalo ngamacala abucayi afana nawokudlwengula njengoba bekuhlale kuvela ukuthi uyaphela nonyaka imiphumela yolibofuzo ingabuyile. Lokhu kuthiwa bekudalwa ukuthi lesi sikhungo senza umsebenzi osuke ulethwe nangezinye izifundazwe. Umsunguli weThekwini Neighbourwood Watch, eqapha ubugebengu emalokishini ehlukene eThekwini, uMnuz Andile Jali, uthe ukuvulwa kwesikhungo kuwukunqoba eyobugebengu esifundazweni. “Lokhu kusho ukuthi uphenyo olumaqondana nokuhlolwa kolibofuzo emacaleni okudlwengula, seluzoyeka ukushaya

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Umsunguli we-IFP, Inkosi Mangosuthu Buthelezi UFA olubonakala kwi-IFP kufanele lubakhathaze abaholi beqembu. Iqembu elinezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo lijwayele ukuba inyoka ezidla yona. Uma abaholi be-IFP bengakukholwa lokho abobuza kwi-ANC. I-ANC ilahlekelwe amandla nje namhlanje kungenxa yemibango yangaphakathi. Ngesikhathi i-ANC iya engqungqutheleni yokukhetha ubuholi yango-2007 kwakunezinhlangothi ezimbili, olweseka uJacob Zuma, nolwalweseka uThabo Mbeki. Sekuwumlando ukuthi kwanqoba uZuma nokwalandela ukuthi ababeseka uMbeki bahlubuke beyoqala inhlangano entsha, iCongress of the People. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwabeseka uMbeki kwaba ukuthi kwehle ukweseka kwe-ANC okhethweni lwango-2009. Ezingqungqutheleni zokukhetha ubuholi be-ANC ezilandele eyango-2007 kuhlezi kunezinhlangothi ezimbili ezibangayo. Abasohlangothini oluhlulwayo bayaye behlubuke beqale amanye amaqembu njengoba i-ANC isizele amaqembu afana ne-EFF ne-MKP. Umphumela wokuhlubuka kwala maqembu uzwakale kakhulu kwi-ANC okhethweni lwango-2024 njengoba yahluleka ukuthola amavoti anele ukubusa ngokuzimela kuzwelonke nasezifundazweni iKwaZulu-Natal neGauteng. Abaholi be-IFP isike yabashaya le nduku Ngesikhathi owayengusihlalo we-IFP, uNkk Zanele kaMagwaza-Msibi, esungula iNFP, i-IFP yalahlekelwa inqwaba yomasipala okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2011. I-IFP yasala nomasipala ababili nje kuphela.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Sikhulu isikhalo ngokwentuleka kwemisebenzi LISHUNYAYELWA emphakathini ehlukene kuleli kubalwa nakubafundi eyokuqedwa kwemikhakha emidala kwezemfundo nengenasidingo njengoba kufuqwa eyemikhakha emisha, edingwa ngumnotho kanjalo nabaqashi. Leli vangeli lifafazwa wuhlaka iSouth African Qualifications Authority, esemkhankasweni wokuhambela izifundazwe ezehlukene kuleli ihlangana nemiphakathi ehlukene ngale mikhakha. UDkt Makhapha Makhafola isikhulu seSAQA, uthe ngalo mkhankaso bafuna ukuqwashisa abantu ikakhulu intsha ngemikhakha emisha ekhona kuleli. Uthe kuphelile ngezinye zeziqu ebezifundwa kwezinye zezikhungo zemfundo okubalwa namakolishi amakhono ama-Technical Vacational Education and Training (TVET). "Sihambela izifundazwe ezehlukene lapho esingagcini nje ngokukhuluma ngemikhakha edingwa abaqashi kanjalo nomnotho, kodwa sixwayisa nangezinye izinto okubalwa iziqu zomgunyathi nomthelela wazo. Sifuna abaqeda ukufunda bangabhuquzi emakhaya bagcine bengazi ukuthi bazokwenzani kodwa benze izinto ezidingekayo kuleli," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika. Usho lokhu nje amaTVET aqede eminye yemikhakha eyayenziwa njengoba esenzisa emisha. Phakathi kwemikhakha emisha kubalwa eyokucwala izinwele, eyokudayisa, ethinta ugesi nokukhanda izimoto, eyokwakha, eyobuchwepheshe bamakhompyutha. Ezikoleni kuqaliwe kufundwa izifundo ezintsha okubalwa neCoding and Robotics ukuze

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: namandla anyusiwe angu-195kW Ngaphakathi inezihlalo eziyisikhumba. Ezangaphambili uyakwazi ukuzishisisa noma uzibandise. Okunye okwazi ukukushisisa yisiteringi osekubuyiswe kuso amabhathini akudala aqinile kwazise amakhasimende ayekhala ngacwebezelayo athinteka kalula. Iphinde ibe ne-digital instrument cluster egqamile nokwazi ukuyishintsha iveze okufunayo. Kugqame ne-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu engu-12.9-inch. Ifika nenkombandlela, uxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, udlala umsakazo, ikuvezela khona ingaphandle uma upaka nokunye. Ezokuphepha nezinsiza zomshayeli abazifakile kubalwa i-adaptive cruise control, iyasho uma uzoshayisa, iyakusiza ukupaka nokunye. Volkswagen Golf GTI- R908 000 Ifika ne-service plan yeminyaka emihlanu noma u-90 000km, i-warranty yeminyaka emithathu noma u-120 000km ne-service plan yeminyaka engu-12.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: wukuthi kuzodunyiswa, futhi naye ubefuna ukudlula abone abantu behlanganyele emcimbini walolu hlobo. Image: Sbonelo Ngcobo "Ngizonibingelela nje, akukho okutheni engizokusho, kuyajabulisa ukubona abantu behlangene ngalolu hlobo, ngakho asiqhubekeni sidumise," kusho uMengameli ngamafuphi. BEBEPHUME ngobuningi abantu bezojabula emcimbini iPre Easter Gospel Music Festival eThekwini Image: Sbonelo Ngcobo Abaculi kulo mcimbi benze into yamehlo njengoba uNozipho Phiri, Ncebakazi, Solly Mahlangu, Ncandweni Christ Ambassadors beshiye izethameli zifuna impinda. UMNUZ Cyril Ramaphosa onguMengameli wakuleli ehambisana nobuholi obuqhamuka emaqenjini ahlukene ezepolitiki nobehambele lo mcimbi ngoMgqibelo Image: Sbonelo Ngcobo

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: I-EFF isikhwele yadilika ehlanganweni iHelen Suzman Foundation, eye enkantolo ifuna kuphoqwe iPhalamende ukuthi licubungule ukuthi ngabe usakulungele yini umholi waleli qembu uMnuz Julius Malema, ukuba yilungu lekomiti lasePhalamende iJudicial Service Commission (JSC). Le nhlangano ikhala ngokuthi uMalema uhlale egxibha izimantshi namajaji kanti futhi usanda kulahlwa yicala. Okhulumela i-EFF uMnuz Sinawo Thambo, usole ipolitiki ngesinyathelo sale nhlangano sokuya enkantolo yaseWestern Cape, ifuna iPhalamende liyibheke kabanzi ekaMalema kuleli komiti eliphonsa imibuzo izimantshi namajaji azoqokelwa ezinkantolo ezehlukene. Uthe ngalokhu izama ukuvala umlomo abagxeka ezobulungiswa kuleli. "Le nhlangano ifuna kususwe abantu abagxeka ukusebenza kwezobulungiswa kuleli okuyinto efana nengcindezelo. Amajaji nezobulungiswa kumele bagxekwe uma kukhona ukungahanjiswa kahle kwezinto," usho kanje. Uthe sikhona isikhathi lapho amajaji kanjalo nezobulungiswa ezihluleka khona ukushushisa osopolitiki. Ubale udaba lwemali eyatholwa epulazini likamengameli Cyril Ramaphosa, iPhala Phala. "Le nhlangano ayikaze ithi vu ngendaba yePhala Phala. Kuyacaca ukuthi kukhethwa iphela emasini uma kuyiwa ezinkantolo," kusho uThambo. Ummeli wale nhlangano, u-Advocate Jason Whyte,

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: uDkt Mmusi Maimane, ukhale ngokushoda kwamaphoyisa, wathi abantu abaphephile ekubeni eqhethe ePhalamende. "Kungani amaphoyisa engayi kovikela abantu kodwa agcwele la ePhalamende?" UMashatile uthe iPhalamende lashiswa ngakho abafuni kuphinde lesi sehlo futhi ngomuso. "Uma kunomengameli wezwe kudingeka kuqiniswe ezokuphepha. Ukhona umnyakazo wokuqasha amaphoyisa ukuze aqaphe ubugebengu kuleli. Sikhathazekile ngobugebengu obunendlakadla kuleli," usho kanje. Uveze ukubaluleka kokubambisana uma kuzoliwa ngempumelelo nobugebengu kuleli. "Phambilini. bekukhona amakomiti okulwa nobugebengu emphakathini. Abesiza kakhulu kule nkinga ngoba umphakathi iwona owazi ukusuka nokuhlala kobugebengu. Ngezinye zezinto okudingeka sizibuyise ukulwa nobugebengu." Uthe nezobulungiswa kumele zibe yingxenye empini yobugebengu ukuze kungaboshwa umuntu manje kusasa useyadedelwa.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: esivakashi kule ndawo. Ubuhle bezintaba namathafa ambethe ingubo eluhlaza yezihlahla notshani ayiphendula iPharadisi lasemhlabeni, nomqondo ujubalale emoyeni wakhona opholile othakwe ngomsindo wezinyoni ezitshiloza zenanelana. Khona lapha enqulwini! Uma uhamba ngemoto ulibangise ezindaweni zokuphumula ezakhiwe kule ndawo, uhamba ukhangwa amadube eduze komgwaqo, agabe ngemibala yawo egqamile. AMANYE amadube agabe ngobuhle eHluhluwe iMfolozi Park Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Izintibane zikhishazela eduze kwezindlela ngoba kuthiwa zikhonze ukudla utshani obusonqenqemeni lomgwaqo ngoba obakhona abubude. Uma usufikile ngaphakathi kunezinhlobonhlobo zezinto izivakashi ezingazenza ukuzijabulisa, nokuthakasela imvelo. Phakathi kwazo kungaba ukuhamba ngemoto yakhona eyakhelwe ukwehla yenyuka emahlathini, ithwele izivakashi ezisuke zimagange ukubona iBig Five kanye nezinye izilwane zasendle. AMABHUBESI aseHluhluwe iMfolozi Park Image: ZIMBILI VILAKAZI Ohambweni lwethu sibe nenhlanhla yokuwabona ngamehlo amabhubesi, esiwabhadame ekhwelana. Obesiphelezela ongungoti walapha, uSamora Xulu, uthe kuyinto eyivelakancane ezivakashini, njengoba uke uphele unyaka kwabona bengayibonanga. Uchaze ukuthi ibhubesi aliyona ingozi kubavakashi abasuke behamba ngezinyawo esiqiwini. Phakathi kwezinto athe akufanele umuntu azenze, uthe ukwethuka, ukubanga

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: OWAYENGUMSAKAZI oKhozini, uNgizwe Mchunu, uphonsele inselelo ubuholi be-ANC eThekwini, ukuba bulalele abantu bakuleli abakhala ngabokufika abangekho emthethweni. UMchunu uthe abaholi kufanele basukumele izikhalazo zabantu abalwa nabokufika abakuleli abangekho emthethweni. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ubuholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku, buzomkhalisa kulandela ukungqongqiswa komuzi wakhe oseMbumbulu. Umuzi kaMchunu uthungelwe ngomlilo ngeSonto, kanti ukushiswa kwawo kusolwa ukuthi kuhlobene nemibhikisho yokulwa nabokufika, njengoba uMchunu engomunye wabantu abaphambili kule mibhikisho. Utshele abaholi be-ANC esifundeni iTheku ukuthi abantu bakuleli sebekhathele abakufika abakuleli ngokungemthetho. "Siyanicela baholi ukuthi nisilalele. Ngiyazi ukuthi izindlebe zenu ziyaphuza ukuzwa kodwa ngiyacela ukuba nisilalele. Le nto esiyenzayo lapha inokuthula. Siyazi ukuthi nonke nina baholi bezepolitiki niyaphuza ukuzwa." Abaholi be-ANC abebeyokhalisa uMchunu bebeholwa ongumdidiyeli we-ANC eThekwini ophinde abe uSomlomo kuMasipala waseThekwini, uMnuz Thabani Nyawose. UMchunu uphonsele uNyawose inselelo ukuba asukumele umonakalo odalwa ngabantu bokufika edolobheni eThekwini. "Baba ngiyazi ukuthi ngelinye ilanga ungase ube yimeya kamasipala njengoba nibekana ngale ndlela enibekana ngayo. Awukwazi ukwenza sengathi awuyiboni le

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: kwenza nzuzo nhlobo ngayo,” kusho uXowla. UPHROJUSA womculo, uXowla, ukhiphe i-albhamu yesitebele sakhe somculo iStalliontainment, esihloko sithi Genesis Chapter 1 Udalule nokuthi lo msebenzi uyindlela yakhe yokukhombisa ukuthi usekhule kangakanani emculweni futhi ubheke kakhulu nokukhombisa ububanzi bobuciko bakhe bokudidiyela umculo ngobunyoninco, yingakho esebenzisane namaciko awu-25 kuyona. Emacikweni asebenze nawo kule albhamu enezingoma eziwu-12 kukhona omfo kaMsezane, Uziyam’ Qhuksa, Mashabeni, Shwi Mantombazane, Dr Buselaphi, Bonakele, Quality Biyela, Umfana WeKhansela, Gatsheni, uKhuthuza, Mehlabomvu, Imfezi Emnyama, Kraizie, Mjolisi, Mlabalaba, Dumakahle, Diary, Pretty Masompisi, imbongi uZamo Cofi, Navigator Gcwensa, Siya Ntuli, Siphiwe Black, Qoqa Q7; nabadlali besiginci oMtuyenziwa, Pheny’ Awufake noMehlabomvu. “Lo msebenzi ufana nendlela yokwendlalela okukhulu engibheke ukukwenza nokukufeza ngobuciko bami futhi angibheke zinto ezinkulu nezibabazekayo ngawo. Ngifisa ukuthi ufinyelele kuwona wonke umuntu ozohambisana naye,” kulanda uXowla. Leli ciko elidabuka eMnambithi, maphakathi neKwaZulu-Natal, igama lalo lokuzalwa wuXolani Shabalala. Laziwa kakhulu ngesandla salo sokuphrojusa izingoma eziningi okubalwa kuzona i-albhamu kaLwah Ndlunkulu yokuqala ethi Imizwa,

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: uthe baqinisa nasekubhaliseni izingane ingakapheli inyanga zizelwe. "Njengoba kuzovotwa, nginxusa abantu ukuthi balande omazisi babo emahhovisi ethu. Kubalulekile ukwenza lokhu ukuze bakwazi ukubamba iqhaza okhethweni," kusho uNzuza. Amanye amalungu ePhalamende akhale ngokuthi uma kubuyiselwa abantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho kugxilwa kwabantu abamnyama ekubeni bekhona nabezinye izinhlanga.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: iCity neMilford kule mpelasonto babhekene nenselelo enkulu yokuqeda leli shobolo njengoba benemidlalo emqoka nebhekwe ngabomvu eyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank. ICity izotholana phezulu neCasric Stars, eChatsworth Stadium, eThekwini, namuhla ngo-3 ntambama. Isithombe ISIPHEKEPHEKE somdlali wasesiswini kwiMilford FC, uMenzi Chili IMilford izodlalela ekuhambeni ne-TS Galaxy, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama. Oyisiqongqwane sasemuva nokaputeni weCity, uSiphamandla Ncanana, uyavuma ukuthi bebengakulindele ukufinyelela kulo mzuliswano womqhudelwano kodwa sezigawulwe zabekwa bayilindele iCasric. “Kusimangazile sonke ukufinyelela kwethu kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano, kodwa sisebenze kanzima ngakho kusifanele ukuba lapha. Wonke umuntu oyingxenye yeqembu uyaziqhenya ngesisakwenzile kuze kube manje,” kusho uNcanana. “Lokhu kusho lukhulu kithina badlali ikakhulukazi kwabaningi bethu abaqalayo ukufinyelela kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano, ngakho siyilambele impumelelo. Siyazi kodwa ukuthi akuzukuba lula ukubhekana neCasric Stars, ezolwa ngayo yonke indlela. Kodwa sikulindele ukubhekana nayo.” Ngakolunye uhlangothi, umqeqeshi nosihlalo weMilford, uXanti Pupuma, akakufihli ukulobizela kwakhe ukufinyelela kowamanqamu abhekane nelinye iqembu laseKZN. “Ngiyazi ukuthi ngike ngasho phambilini ukuthi ngibona iMilford neCasric kowamanqamu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: OBENGUSIGAXAMABHANDE emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku, uMandlenkosi Gumbi ugwetshwe yiNkantolo yesiFunda saseThekwini izolo WEHLULEKILE ukuzibamba, wasikhihla isililo umndeni wowesilisa obengusigaxamabhande kaMasipala weTheku izolo, iNkantolo yesiFunda eThekwini imgixabeza ngeminyaka engu-45 ngecala lokubulala namabili okuzama ukubulala. Owesilisa, uMandlenkosi Gumbi (50), ugwetshwe ngecala lokudubula, abulale uMnuz Sanele Thembani (24) esigamekweni esenzeka emgwaqweni uM4 ngasePick n Pay Hyper, eDurban North ngo-Agasti 2023. Abomndeni kaGumbi bakhale baze bakhishelwa ngaphandle enkantolo. Ngokobufakazi bamaphoyisa, uGumbi wayeyingxenye yamaphoyisa ayenesivimbamgwaqo kule ndawo, kodwa ngokwalaba ababehamba ngemoto umufi athulela kuyo, kwakunengozi yomgwaqo. Kuthiwa umnikazi we-double cab, umufi ayehleli kuyo nabanye esikhenkeni, wanquma ukujika aphindele emuva ebona ezinye izimoto zijika, zibona ingozi. Kuthiwa yilapho uGumbi adubula khona kathathu, ebhekise evenini, inhlamvu yanemba uThembani. Imgweba izolo iMantshi, uNkk Sophie Reddy, ithe imnika iminyaka engu-15 ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala, engu-15 icala ngalinye, kwamabili okuzama ukubulala. Ithe lezi zigwebo uzozidonsa kanyekanye, yathi lokhu kwenza ibe ngu-15 iminyaka uGumbi azoyidonsa ngaphakathi. Inqume nokuthi akumfanele ukuthi aphinde aphathe

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kwiLast 16. Emidlalweni yokuhlunga liqede phezulu emaqoqweni alo kuyona yomibili imizuliswano futhi alihlulwanga nakanye emidlalweni engu-16 eliyidlalile. Umdlali obhekiwe (Son Heung-min) Kuze kube namuhla lo mgadli wodumo kwiTottenham Hotspur yase-England usawaqhulula amagoli njengoba esedlalela iLos Angeles FC yase-USA. Ukuba sendaweni ayijwayele nokuba ngumholi othembekile eqenjini lakhe lesizwe kwenza abalwe kokumele iBafana ibaqaphelisise. UMGADLI weCzechia oyingozi, uPatrik Schick Image: FACEBOOK / CZECHIA FOOTBALL ICzechia isemazweni akhuza ibuya eNdebeni yoMhlaba ngemuva kwesikhathi eside njengoba yagcina ukubonakala kulo mqhudelwano ngo-2006, lapho yaphuma khona esigabeni samaqoqo. Isike yafika kabili kowamanqamu, ngo-1934 nango-1962. Nakuba yahluleka ukuzibekisela indawo emzuliswaneni wokuqala wokuhlunga e-Europe, ikhombise ukuqina kowesibili idlula kwi-Ireland neDenmark. Umdlali obhekiwe (Patrik Schick) USchick ukubagadli abahlonishwayo kwiBundesliga yaseGermany lapho eseshayele khona iBayer Leverkusen amagoli ayisishiyagalolunye emidlalweni yeligi engu-20.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: uMafikizolo – Uzoncengwa unyoko noCiza, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Isaka. Kulo nyaka kuzobhekwa ukuthi iyiphi insizwa ezowina okokuqala emunxeni weBest Maskandi njengoba kuqhathwe Umafikizolo – Uzoncengwa Unyoko, Sminofu and Zee Nxumalo – Sajola Kamnandi, Mzukulu, Intombi yasoLundi – Ubu Ghost Bami, Khuzani – Umanikinikana noSiya Ntuli – Amaphiko. Umculi kamaskandi oshisa izikhotha kulezi zinsuku uNkeshemba, utholene phezulu noShandesh, Khadeair, Kharishma, Goon Flavour. Izintokazi zaseKZN uMawhoo noLwah Ndlunkulu zidudulana noLordkez, Zee Nxumalo noShandesh. UXolly Mncwango waseRichards Bay ubambene noNontokozo Mkhize, Musa Yende, Mmatema noNothando Hlophe. USam Deep ubhekene nenselelo emunxeni weBest Artist of The Year kuMaphorisa, Ciza,Shandesh noZee Nxumalo. UMawhoo angase aphume nesikhuni sivutha kwiBest Collaboration njengoba eqhathwe noSam Deep, Nia Pearl, Boohle and Mano – Shela, Jazzwrld, Mawhoo, Thukuthela and Gl_ceejay – Uzizwa Kanjani, Ladysmith Black Mambazo, Nduduzo Makhathini & Mbuso Khoza – You make me happy, Mawhoo, Gl ceejay, Jazzwrld & Thukuthela – Bengicela noGoon Favour, Master KG& Eemoh

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: UNOBHALA jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathenjwa Mabija I-NATU isizwakalise ukukhathazeka ngokusonga izandla koMnyango wezeMfundo KwaZulu-Natal ekubeni kuqhubeka ukungabi bikho kozinzo esikoleni uMkhumbane Secondary eChesterville, eThekwini. Lokhu kuza emva kokuvalwa kwesango lesikole ngengidi engaziwa, maqede kwabhalwa imiyalezo eyehlukene ezingqwembeni ezinanyathiselwe esangweni ngoLwesithathu. UNobhala jikelele weNatu, uMnuz Mathemba Mabija, ubehambele lesi sikole ngoLwesine, ukuyohlola isimo. Uthe ufike wathola ukuthi isimo asigwinyisi mathe futhi konke okulokhu kwenzeka kunomthelela omubi kubafundi kanjalo nakothisha. Uthe ngokubuka kwabo, umnyango uluyekelele ngamabomu udaba lwalesi sikole. “Kuthikamezeke ukufunda othisha abangu-22 beyeka ukufundisa. Ziphelile manje izinyanga ezintathu uMnyango ungenzi lutho ngalolo daba,” kusho uMabija. Uthe kufanele ngabe uMnyango wenza into eyodwa, ungenelele ngokubuyisa labo othisha noma uqashe ngokugcwele laba abayitoho, abafika bezolekelela idlanzana elingatelekanga ukuthi kuqhubeke ukufundisa. Ugcizelele eyokuthi ukulaxaza kothisha ukufundisa kwakungayamene nodaba lokufakwa kwamakhamera kodwa kwakudlalwa nje ipolitiki. Uphathe eyokumiswa kukathishomkhulu obekhona uMnuz Ntokozo Ngobese ngaphandle kwesizathu esiphathekayo. “Njengoba bethule, bamatasa babheka amacala abazombeka wona njengoba leya ncwadi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024, wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho, walingisa emdlalweni owuchungechunge kaDuma Ndlovu uMuvhango, lapho ayelingisa khona indawo kaMaButhelezi unina kaThandaza (Sindi Dlathu). Ngenxa yeqhaza lakhe emkhakheni wezokulingisa, uCynthia uhlonishwe ngomklomelo we-Lifetime Achievement kuma-South African Film and TV Awards (Saftas) nakuma-Simon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards. Ushiye emhlabeni amadodakazi akhe uSihle nosaziwayo wethelevishini uNonhle Thema namadodana u-Ayanda noBanele Thema nabazukulu nesizukulwane.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kodwa kule midlalo embalwa aseyidlalele iSundowns kwiligi nakwiCaf Champions League kucacele wonke umuntu ukuthi uzoba yinkinga kakhulu uma esengene ngokugcwele egiyeni. “Nsukuzonke sifunda okusha ngoSaleng, nathi simgxisha konke okufanele akwazi ngendlela esifuna ukumsebenzisa ngayo kwiSundowns. Wafika elimele, ngakho-ke kasikabi naso isikhathi esanele sokusebenza naye. Okwamanje sisasebenza ngekhono lakhe aliphiwe nguMdali nokuyinto ebukeka sengathi iyasebenza. “Ngimthandela ukuthi akabuzi uma etshelwa ngokufanele akwenze kepha uhlala phezu kwakho,” kusho uCardoso. UNdamane (22), ofike ngoJanuwari esuka kwi-TS Galaxy lapho ebegqame khona, waze wathatha iso lomqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, owamfaka esikwatini se-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) yaseMorocco ngasekuqaleni konyaka. “Ikhono likaNdamane liyathusa uma ubheka iminyaka yakhe futhi akufihliwe ukuthi ufike wengeza kwebesinakho yingakho sengihlale ngiphethwe yikhanda. “Kunzima ukungambopheli. Lokhu kusho ukuthi kukhona abebejwayele ijezi engakafiki osekushintshile ukulithola kwabo,” kulandisa uCardoso. Ngaphandle kukaSaleng noNdamane, umgadli uBrayan Leon waseColombia ufike kwacaca njengoba eseshayele iSundowns amagoli eligi amane. Lokhu kwenza aqale ebhentshini u-Iqraam Rayners yize ebalwa nabangase

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ebhadla ejele ngecala lokubulala, engu-15 icala ngalinye, kwamabili okuzama ukubulala. Ithe lezi zigwebo uzozidonsa kanyekanye, yathi lokhu kwenza ibe ngu-15 iminyaka uGumbi azoyidonsa ngaphakathi. Inqume nokuthi akumfanele ukuthi aphinde aphathe isibhamu. Ngesikhathi endlalela isigwebo uNkk Reddy, usole uGumbi ngokusebenzisa kabi amandla akhe obuphoyisa, wathi wayengenza kangcono kakhulu ngesipiliyoni sakhe seminyaka engu-30, kunokukhetha ukudubula. “Wena waba yiphoyisa elazizwa lideleleka, lingahlonishwa wumnikazi wemoto, wabe ususebenzisa igunya lakho ngokuthi udubule. Wawungenza kangcono kunokuthi uphoqe umthetho ngendlela engalungile,” kusho uNkk Reddy. UNkk Reddy uwashaye indiva amaphuzu abekwe wummeli kaGumbi, uNksz Ncube, obezama ukuncenga inkantolo ukuthi imnike isigwebo esincane kunaleso esibekelwe abenze amacala afana nelenziwe uGumbi. Phakathi kwamaphuzu akhe uthe uGumbi obehlala eMlaza, ungowesilisa oseneminyaka engu-50, wathi ngesikhathi enza icala wayeneminyaka engu-47. Wathi akanazo izingane, akashadile, kodwa wuye onakelela unina osehola impesheni, aphinde anakekele izingane zikadadewabo ezintathu. Uphinde wabalula nokuthi emaphoyiseni kaMasipala weTheku wajoyina ngo-1997, kanti ubeqala ukwenza icala. UNkk Reddy uthe lezi akuzona izizathu

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kweligi yaseMzansi njengoba kuzoze kucace ngosuku lokugcina ukuthi iyakuphi. “Kuhle ngoba sengikusho kaningi phambilini ukuthi isizini ingase icace ngosuku lokugcina okuwubufakazi bokukhula ngesivinini kweligi yaseNingizimu Afrika. “Kumasizini adlule bekucaca kusasele inqwaba yemidlalo ukuthi siya kuphi isicoco ngakho-ke okwenzeke (kule sizini), kufanele kushayelwe ihlombe ngoba kukhombisa ukukhula kwamaqembu esigaba esikhulu sebhola laseNingizimu Afrika,” kusho u-Ouaddou.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UMCULI, uZakes Bantwini, ovule inhlangano engenzi nzuzo ngenjongo yokusiza intsha nabesifazane emkhakheni wamaciko nezemidlalo KULINDELEKE ukuthi igxile kakhulu emacikweni inhlangano engenzi nzuzo esanda kwethulwa yinkakha endimeni yomculo nesike yahlabana ngendondo iGrammy Award iphinde ibe umculi, uphrojusa, usomabizinisi nokunye. Inhlangano iZakes Bantwini Foundation, kulindeleke ukuthi ibhekane kakhulu nokuthuthukisa imiphakathi ehlukene ezintweni zamasiko, imfundo, umculo, nokuthuthisa amaciko. Ngale nhlangano, uZakes uthe ukholelwa ekutheni abantu abanethalente kumele bafundiswe futhi baqeqeshelwe imikhakha eminingi. Uthe ngayo akuhlose kakhulu ukuthuthukisa abesifazane, intsha futhi iqhakambise amakhono ezindaweni ezihlukene kuleli njengoba izozinikela ekutheni bafundiswe, bathuthukiswe baphinde babasize kukhona konke abakufunayo ukuze bavulekelwe amathuba ahlukene emikhakheni abayifunayo kuleli. "Izwe lethu ligcwele abantu abanamathalente ahlukene. Ngakho ukusungula le nhlangano ngikwenze ngoba ngifuna ukusiza la ngibona khona ukuthi kunesikhala kubantu abanamakhono nothando. Ngakho leli ithuba lokuthi kusizwe abantu abasha ngezinto abazidingayo, ulwazi namathuba esizobanika wona ukuze bathuthuke ezintweni abafisa ukuba yizona kusasa," kusho uZakes. Uthe bazoba nazo nezingqungquthela ezihlukene ngaphansi kwale

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UMQEQESHI waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane (maphakathi) namaphini akhe, uSimo Dladla (kwesokunxele) noSiboniso Vilakazi (kwesokudla). WALE waphetha umqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ukuphawula ngokungabonakali ebhentshini komunye wamaphini akhe, uSimo Dladla, okunezinsolo zokungahoshelani kwakhe naye. UDladla, oyiphini lesibili likaZwane, ubengabonwa nangokhalo ebhentshini Usuthu lubambana ngo 2-2 neSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership ngoMsombuluko, ePrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu. Ebhentshini bekukhona uSiboniso “Nini” Vilakazi, oyiphini lokuqala, noPosnett Omony, ongumqeqeshi wonozinti. Ukungabonakali kukaDladla kulandela isitatimende esikhishwe yileli qembu ngekhefu leFifa, emasontweni amabili edlule, siveza ukuthi inkontileka yakhe ayizukuvuselelwa ekupheleni kwale sizini. Ukungavuselelwa kwenkontileka yalo mqeqeshi kuhambisana nokungavuselelwa kwekaPedro Dias oyi-Director of Football kuleli qembu. Ngemuva kokuvela kwalezi zindaba, kube sekuqubuka izinsolo zokungahoshelani phakathi kwakhe noZwane oyinhloko yabaqeqeshi. “Leli qembu lingaphezulu kunanoma ngubani, ngisho nami uqobo. Lingadlala kusasa ngaphandle kwami, liphinde lidlale ngaphandle kaPostnett. Akekho ongaphezulu kweqembu,” kusho uZwane. “Okubaluleke kakhulu uthando, ugqozi nokuzinikela eqenjini. Iqembu liza kuqala. Okunye kuyalandela. "Ukuba ngumqeqeshi yigama nje lomsebenzi, okubalulekile ukubambisana.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe U-ATHINI Maqokolo osephenduke isethenjwa saMaZulu FC asembhidlangweni wokuqeda isizini ebalwa namaqembu amane aphezulu kwi-log yeBetway Premiership KUBUYE ithemba kumqeqeshi waMaZulu FC, u-Arthur Zwane, ngamathuba ezakhe okuqhubeka nokunombela kwi-log yeBetway Premiership ngenhloso yokuzabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup ngokunenebula iChippa United ngo 5-1 ngoMgqibelo eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. AmaZulu abhaxabula iChippa nje abebuya esibhaxwini sika 3-0 abesithole kwi-Orlando Pirates. Ukuthola umgqigqo kwaMaZulu ngalesi sikhathi sesizini sekusele imidlalo emine isongwe, kuya ngokuya kuwufezekisa umgomo wawo wokuqeda isizini ebalwa namaqemba amane aphezulu kwi-log yePremiership. Njengamanje Usuthu olusendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-42, lwehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amahlanu neKaizer Chiefs esendaweni yesithathu ngawu-47. “Sizele ukuzoncintisana la (kwiPremiership) yize sidlala ngeningi labadlali abasebancane. Sisafunda kwesikwenzayo ngaphandle kokuzifaka ngaphansi kwengcindezi. Sibhekana nomdlalo ngamunye. Uma uNkulunkulu efuna siye e-Afrika (Caf) angiboni kukhona ongasivimba. Nezingelosi zethu zizosiholela endleleni efanele,” kusho uZwane ekhuluma nabezindaba ngemuva komdlalo. ‘ “Ngokomoya siyiqembu eliqinile. Sithandaza ndawonye, sabelana ngezinto eziningi ezisondelene nezinhliziyo zethu nezinselelo esibhekene nazo

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ongasekho. Mina naye sivakashele iTheku namalokishi alakhele kanjalo namapulazi aseMnambithi lapho uJoseph Shabalala no-Albert Mazibuko bekhule bengabasebenzi neziqashi khona,” kusho uSithole. Uthe akasoze amkhohlwa. UNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uThami Ntuli, uthe alisoze lalibaleka iqhaza likaMazibuko ekugcineni nasekuqhakambiseni umculo wesintu emazweni omhlaba. “Sinxusa bonke abantu baKwaZulu-Natal nasezweni jikelele ukuthi babeke umndeni wakwaMazibuko emithandazweni ngalesi sikhathi esinzima nokuhlonipha iqhaza lakhe ngokugubha umculo nesiko akugcinile,” kusho uNtuli. IMeya yeTheku, uMnuz Cyril Xaba, igqugquzele amaciko asakhula ukuthi afunde kuMazibuko ngokuzihlonipha nokuthobeka. “U-Albert Mazibuko ubengaphezu kokuba wumculi, ubewafundisa amaciko eza ngemuva futhi ewumuntu abukela kuye. Ukushona kwakhe akukhona ukulahlekelwa komndeni wakhe neLadysmith Black Mambazo, kodwa okwezwe lonke,” kusho uXaba. Abantu badlulise amazwi enduduzo enkundleni yokuxhumana i-Instagram. UJeremy Loops uthe bazomkhumbula kakhulu. USekgwama Makhosazane uthe: “Awu kodwa alale ngokuthula ubaba impela umsebenzi wakhe mukhulu siyabonga.” “Siyabonga ngomculo baba uMazibuko, lala ngoxolo,” kusho uPearlzzz

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: futhi uyena owayekhongela iMbube ekhweni layo kwaMyeni. UMntwana uThulani uthe ukushona kwabaNtwana ikakhulukazi labo abangoyise beNgonyama, kuphazamisa umsebenzi weMbube. "Siyazi ukuthi abaNtwana njengoba bengoyise beNgonyama yibona ethembele kubo ukuthi njengoba ikhona ihlezi esihlalweni, mayibheka ngapha nangapha ibona ukuthi oyise bakhona, okwenza ukuthi izinze. Kodwa lokhu kufana nokuhlwithwa amaphiko ayo okundiza." Baningi abanye abaNtwana abayizinsika eNdlunkulu kaZulu abaguqe kule minyaka edlule. Phakathi kwabaguqe ngonyaka odlule kubalwa uMntwana uHenrietta Zulu kanye noNdlunkulu Thoko Mantombela Zulu owayegane owayeyibamba bukhosi, uMntwana uMcwayizeni Zulu.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kodwa isikole ngesabazali nomphakathi. “Isikole ngesethu. Okusho ukuthi njengoba bemise uNgobese izinyanga ezintathu, nathi sizode sizoma la kuze kuphele lezo zinyanga, kuze kubuyiswe uNgobese,” usho kanje. Omunye umzali, uNksz Xolile Buhlungu, usabise ngokuthi uma uMnyango uqhubeka nokungabalaleli, bazovala uthelawayeka womgwaqo u-N2. Ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabazali, usihlalo ubatshele ukuthi umhloli ubatshele izinqumo ezintathu, athe ziphuma koyinhloko yoMnyango. Esokuqala esokuthi lungapheli uLwesibili amakhamera engakhishiwe, esesibili esokuthi aphume naye ngesango uthishanhloko omiswayo, bese abazali betshelwa ukuthi abakhiphe ingidi engaziwa abavale ngayo isikole. Ilungu le-SGB elicele ukungadalulwa lithe babona uMnyango usebenzisa udaba lwamakhamera ukujezisa uthishanhloko ngothisha osanda kubuyiswa owayexoshwe eminyakeni emithathu edlule ngenxa yokulibala izinkamba zikaFaro, engawenzi umsebenzi. “Nakuba incwadi yokummisa ibhalwe ukuthi “akaziphathanga kahle” maqede yangachaza, ukhona umoya ovelayo ukuthi usejeziselwa lo thisha kodwa sekucashwa ngolwamakhamera,” lisho kanje. Lithe bahlela ukuluyisa enkantolo lolu daba njengoba sekunento ebhalwe phansi evela koyinhloko yoMnyango. Licacise eyokuthi isinqumo sokufakwa kwamakhamera senziwa ngabazali, hhayi uthishanhloko. “Uma bethi awakhishwe, ubani

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ngokuguqisa iSenegal ngo 2-0 ngoLwesine kodwa ngeSonto aguqiswa yi-Algeria ngo 2-0. “Kusivuse emaqandeni ukuhlulwa kwethu okokuqala kulesi sigaba samaqoqo. Esizitshele khona wukuthi sihlulwa njengeqembu siphinde sinqobe njengeqembu. Sonke siyakuqonda ukuthi sifuna ukuzibekisela indawo kwiNdebe yoMhlaba, engikholwa wukuthi lelo phupho alikashabalali. Sidinga ukunqoba umdlalo wethu wokugcina (wesigaba samaqoqo) neGhana okungumdlalo esaziyo ukuthi awuzukuba lula njengoba nabo befuna ukuya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. Ngakho umdlalo wethu nabo okawafawafa kodwa sinethemba lokuwunqoba,” kusho uKhumalo. Kulo mqhudelwano we-Afcon U-17 odlalelwa ngamaqembu awu-16 ase-Afrika, ayisishiyagalombili azofinyelela kuma-quarterfinal yiwona azothola ingqayizivele yethuba lokuzibekisela indawo emqhudelwaneni weNdebe yoMhlaba yeFifa Under 17 ozobanjelwa eQatar, ngoNovemba 19 kuya kuDisemba 13. Sekungumlando ukuthi Amajimbos afinyelela kuma-quarterfinal e-Afcon U-17 nyakenye, azibekisela indawo koweNdebe yoMhlaba eyayibanjelwe khona eQatar, lapho afinyelele khona ku-Round 32 wesigaba somkhumulajezi. Elakuleli alikaze lisinqobe isicoco se-Afcon U-17 kusukela ngo-2005 liqala ukudlala kulo mqhudelwano, kanti ngo-2015 lafinyelela kowamanqamu laguqiswa yiMali ngo 2-0.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Uboshiwe osolwa ngokusabisa usomabhizinisi wenkampani yonogada UVELE eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseThekwini, owesilisa oneminyaka engu-42, oboshwe ngoLwesihlanu, eCornubia, eVerulam, ngecala lokufuna ngodli imali yokuvikela. Ngokusho kokhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Paul Magwaza, bathathu abantu asebebulewe okuthiwa bebesebenza enkampanini yonogada, lona wesilisa abefuna kuyo ngenkani imali yokuvikela. Elandisa ngodaba uMagwaza, uthe kusolwa ukuthi ngoJanuwari nonyaka, umsolwa wahlaba ucingo walubhekisa kumnikazi wenkampani yonogada, wafuna ngodli isamba semali yokuvikela. Kuthiwa wabe esesabisa ngokuthi onogada benkampani yakhe bazophambana nemvula uma engayikhokhi le mali. “Umnikazi wenkampani waqale wangayingena eyokwenza okwakufunwa umsolwa, wavele wayobika udaba esiteshini samaphoyisa i-Durban Central,” kusho uMagwaza. Uqhube wathi ngenyanga efanayo, kwabe sekubulawa onogada abathathu abaqashwe yile nkampani. Uthe izingcingo ebezisabisa umnikazi wenkampani, nazo bezilokhu ziqhubeke njalo. “Lugcine lugoba uphondo, wayifaka ebhange imali ebifunwa kuye ngodli,” usho kanje. Uveze ukuthi ithimba le-Crime Intelligence libe selihlanganisa ulwazi lokuthi umsolwa ukuphi, lase lilwedlulisela kwi-Provincial Task Team kanjalo ne-Durban Metropolitan Police Tactical Team, ukuba basebenze ngalo. “Ithimba

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: isiqiniseko sokuthi umzimba ukahle. Umzimba udinga ukululama.” Kwi-World Relay, uSimbine neqembu lakhe lika-4x10mm banenselelo yokuvikela isicoco abasinqobe nyakenye eGuangzhou, eChina. KwiSimbine Classic, uPrudence Sekgodiso, udle umhlanganiso kwabesifazane kowamanqamu ka-1500m ngesikhathi sika-4 min, 08.93sec, eshiya uKarabo More kwathi uTshepo Tshite wadla umhlanganiso ku-300m kwabesilisa eshiya uLuan Munnik ngesikhathi sika-7min 54.05sec.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI wama-piano ne-house uZee Nxumalo kwabazonandisa kwi-Kelvin Momo Live Concert ePeople's Park, eThekwini ngeSonto Image: Instagram/@_a_nailspressons UPHROJUSA wama-piano uKelvin Momo uzojabulisa abantu ngomcimbi wakhe wedili lomculo elizoba seThekwini ngempelasonto UPHROJUSA wama-piano ongomunye wabangaconsi phansi kule ndima, uKelvin Momo uzophelezelwa yizilomo zamaciko angaconsi phansi emculweni we-house nama-piano, edilini lakhe lo mculo, i-Kelvin Momo Live Concert ezoba sePeople’s Park, eThekwini ngeSonto. Kuleli dili lomculo elizobe liqala ukwenzeka kulo nyaka eThekwini, elizoqala ngo-4 ntambama, kuzonandisa amaciko okubalwa kuwona uSha Sha, Zee Nxumalo, Sykes, Distruction Boyz, Sphectacular & DJ Naves, Stixx, Benny Maverick, Earful Soul, Tycoon, Sino Msolo, Makhanj, Triple X Da Ghost, DJ Nel, DJ Feel, Man Q, Xola TSM, JNR De Rocka no-TBO. UBenny Maverick we-One Man Concert, ehlela lo mcimbi uthe: “Abantu baseThekwini sebezibonakalise kaningi ukuthi bawuthanda kangakanani umculo, ngakho sibheke ukuthi leli dili libe yindlela yokukhombisa uthando ebantwini ngokuhlale beseka umculo kaKelvin.” UKelvin uthe kumjabulisa kakhulu ukuthi lo mcimbi uzomnika

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMANDLA Masango owayengaconsi phansi kubalandeli beKaizer Chiefs eminyakeni edlule, ukhuza eyokujikela umqeqeshi weBafana Bafana, uHugo Broos, ngenxa yokungabaqoki abadlali baleli qembu. IBafana izobhekana neZambia emdlalweni wobungani eNelson Mandela Bay Stadium, eGqeberha, kusasa ngo-3 ntambama. Lo mdlalo uzoba ngowokugcina weqembu lesizwe ngaphambi kokuqala kwe-Africa Cup of Nations (Afcon) ezoba seMorocco, ngenyanga ezayo. UBroos ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi leli yithuba lokugcina alinika abadlali ukuthi bamkhombise abangakwenzela iBafana. Kule khempu, akekho noyedwa umdlali weChiefs okuyinto ethukuthelisa abalandeli. Bebefuna uBroos aqhubeke noShabalala osefomini kulezi nsuku. "Ngicabanga ukuthi wenza umsebenzi omuhle, ungumdlali osemncane onesibindi. Yilokho okudingayo ukuze uyibambe eqenjini elikhulu njengeChiefs. Kufanele aqhubeke nokusebenza kanzima, angapheli mandla ngoba yonke into ngaphansi komthunzi welanga inesikhathi sayo. Ngijabule ngendlela athuthuka ngayo. Akufanele sifake ingcindezi ngokuthi afakwe eqenjini lesizwe okwamanje, inqobo nje uma ebizwa ezothola leso sipiliyoni. Manje uzothola ithuba lokudlala kwiCaf Confederation Cup. Lokho kuzomsiza njengoba ekhula," kusho uMasango. UMasango ukhuze abalandeli beChiefs "ngenzondo" okubukeka iqhubeka ezinkundleni zokuxhumana

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ngenxa yezikhalazo abasenazo. Wathi akusizi ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile ngoba lokhu kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kwasho uZuma.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Lokho ngikusho kahle. Ngebhadi yindawo okufanele sithuthuke kuyona ngokushesha uma sifuna ukuzuza okuthize. Ngaphandle kwalokho, ngithanda ukubongela abafana ngoba bekungewona umdlalo olula. Kuhlala kunzima ukudlala namaqembu anjena, ayalwa kakhulu. Sidlale nebhola elihle futhi ngicabanga ukuthi abalandeli bethu bajabulile ngalokho,"kusho u-Ouaddou kwiSuperSport. "Kodwa angijabulanga ngemizuzu engu-15 yokugcina. Esikhundleni sokuya phambili sishaye igoli lesithathu, sidlale amaphasi amafishane. Ngiyazi ukuthi abalandeli bayakuthanda lokho, abadlali bayakuthanda lokho kodwa mina angikuthandi lokho. Ngidinga ukushaya amanye amagoli futhi kumele sikwazi ukuwaqedela. Lokho kubalulekile ukwenyusa ukuzithemba ukushaya amagoli." Ngokudlulela kweyandulela owamanqamu, iPirates ijoyine iLamontville Golden Arrows neRichards Bay abaqede umsebenzi ngempelasonto. Iqembu lesine lizophuma phakathi kweMarumo Gallants neStellenbosch abazodlala ngoLwesithathu ngo-7 ebusuku eDr Molemela Stadium, eBloemfontein.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: amaphoyisa nguye othintekayo ekubulawa kwezihlobo, kwazise amaphoyisa abengakabikeli ngalokho. “Abengakasiniki thina umbiko ogcwele wokuthi njengoba ebulewe nje, ingoba ubethinteka ezehlakalweni zokubulawa komndeni wethu. Sisabhekene nokufihla ugogo nomzukulu, cishe uma sekudlulile, yilapho umuntu azozwa kahle emaphoyiseni ukuthi athini,” usho kanje. Uthe akukho okuphathekayo abanakho maqondana nokuthi umndeni wakhe ubulawelweni ngesihluku, wathi ngisho nesigameko sango-2024, bagcina uphenyo lwakhona lungayidalulanga imininingwane ngomsolwa. UNkk Bhengu noZesuliwe bafihlwe ngeSonto. UNetshiunda, esitatimendeni asithumelele abezindaba, uthe abasolwa ababili ebebefunelwa amacala amane okubulala endaweni yaseHillcrest, bafe ngesikhathi bedubulana namaphoyisa. Eqhubeka nokuchaza, uthe phakathi kwamacala okubulala ebebefunelwa wona, kukhona nawokubulala isaguga (84) nentombazane (13) ebebesanda kubabulala. Uthe amaphoyisa athole umkhondo wokuthi abasolwa babhace ekhaya elisemgwaqweni uMkhelekehleli, KwaNgcolosi. “Athe uma egasela kulo muzi onendlu ewulawondi, ebilele abasolwa, bavele badubula bebhekise kuwona. Nawo abuyisele ngayo inhlamvu, badubuleka bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe alikho iphoyisa elilimalile kulokhu kudubulana, waveza ukuthi kuvulwe amacala okuzama ukubulala amaphoyisa, asazophenywa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: sekukhona) uMaKhumalo. Kukhona umehluko, angiseyena loya mfana owayesho noma yini ngoba kuqala ngangisho noma yini, manje sekumele ngiwakhethe amagama ngale kokubhora. Abantu bazothola usomahlaya nombhali. Asikwazi sonke ukuhlekisa. NoSkhinkily uyahlekisa, okusho ukuthi ayikho into ehlukile ngawe uma uwusomahlaya kodwa ukuhluka kusuka endleleni okhetha ngayo amagama. Okhetha ukukusho kuzoba nomthelela ekutheni abantu bayakukhumbula yini uma kuphela ubusuku,” kusho uSimphiwe. Uthe uLizwi ubuka izinto ngenye indlela futhi ukhuluma engasabi ukuthi abantu bazothini. “ULizwi akabuswa yisinkwa kodwa uholwa yilowo myalezo okumele uzwiwe ngalelo langa. Kungenzeka lowo myalezo umqedele isinkwa kodwa umyalezo. Asikwazi ukubamba umyalezo. Umlayezo osuke kufanele uzwiwe umuntu ofikile ngalelo langa.” Emcimbini azobe enandisa kuwo ePort Shepstone uzobe eshiyelana inkundla noSimunye Churchboy noZawadi Yamungu. Izicukuthwane zizozitika ngokudla, umculo, amahlaya zithole nethuba lokwakha ubudlelwano. Lo mcimbi oyingxenye ye-Offramp Experience, wandulela iWorship Experience ngakusasa ebusuku endaweni efanayo. Kuzobe sekuvalwa ngendumezulu Ugu Jazz Festival ngoJuni 27 kuyona le nkundla lapho kuzobe kufakwe khona ubhazabhaza wetende

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ngoMsombuluko odlule. Omunye umngani, uMthunzi Buthelezi, uma ecabanga uthe akasitholi isizathu sokuthi kungani uNkulunkulu ethathe uBoonu. “Yingakho ngithi uNkulunkulu angimazi ukuthi ucabanga kanjani.” Emngcwabeni bekuqhuma umculo womdanso nowokholo. Phakathi kwabebeduduza enkonzweni ebiphethwe uLinda Sibiya, kubalwa uMalusi Mbokazi, Andile KaMajola noJumbo. Izethameli ebezikhona kubalwa umndeni wakwaGcaba, uDJ Boonu abesebenza nawo, owakubo komholi weMK Party, uMnuz Jacob Zuma, njengoba ebesebenza noMnuz Khulubuse Zuma, amaciko ahlukene, osomabhizinisi nabanye. UMnuz Wandile Gcaba uthe uBoonu ulime indima enkulu emndenini wakhe njengoba abafowabo sebeze bangena ngisho emabhizinisini asemkhakheni wokungcebeleka ngenxa yakhe. “UMlazi Picnic ubambisane kakhulu nomfowethu uMfundo nakweminye imisebenzi. Uphinde futhi wabambisana nomfowethu uThembinkosi kwi-Executive Marquee kwiDurban July, uwena futhi obuphambili ukuhlela amaMetro Awards kanjalo neminye imisebenzi,” kusho uWandile.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: ukusebenzisana ndawonye. “Kuqale kancane kuwukuthi siyalekelelana uma kukhona oyedwa phakathi kwethu osuke enomsebenzi omkhulu nodinga izandla eziningi, kwagcina kuba wumkhuba wethu ukuthi njalo siyalekelelana uma kunemisebenzi enjalo - sase sanquma ukuqala le nkampani ngenhloso yokuthi uma kunemisebenzi emikhulu siyenze egameni layo kuphela,” kusho uMagwaza. Eqhuba, uthe ukuqala iKune Studio kubasize kakhulu ukuthola imisebenzi yemicimbi emikhulu yohulumeni neyemicimbi emikhulu yobumnandi ejwayele ukwenzeka eThekwini namaphethelo, okubasiza ukuthi benze inzuzo ngezindlela eziningi futhi ezihlukene. “Lokhu kusisiza nangokuthi uma kwenzeka ukuthi oyedwa wethu athole ikhasimende elidinga ukwenzela umsebenzi odinga abantu abaningi, kuba lula ukuthi alidlulisele kwiKune Studio - bese singena sonke kalula kanjalo, okusisiza kakhulu ukuya phambili,” kusho yena. Uthe wethemba ukuthi ukungenisa kwabo ngale ndlela ehlukile kanjena kuzokhuthaza nabanye abantu abasha abanamakhono ehlukene basemalokishini ukulandela ezinyathelweni zabo ukwenza kahle, nokusebenzisana ukuze baphumelele.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: impilo yami sengiphelelwe yithemba. Ngasenga ezimithiyo ngokubatshela ukuthi kunesivumelwano engisenzile sokuqopha ifilimu, esingangenza ngihlawuliswe u-R5 million uma ngisephula. Bafonela indodakazi yami ukuba izosayina amafomu ukuze nginikezwe ama-antibiotics." Esikhundleni sokunqanyulwa umlenze, uCynthia wathi wagcina enqanyulwe izinzwane onyaweni. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu Afrika ku-Miss World eLondon, ngo-1972. Wathola le ngqayizivele yethuba emuva kokuhlabana ngesicoco sikaMiss Black South Africa ngenxa yokuthi ngezikhathi zobandlululo abantu abamnyama babengavunyelwe ukuqhudelana nezinye izinhlanga. Nakhona ku-Miss World waphuma endaweni yesihlanu, okwenza amantombazane amnyama aba nogqozi nofuqufuqu lokungenela imiqhudelwano yonobuhle kusukela ngo-1992. Akugcinanga lapho, uCynthia uqhubekile nokuvelela endimeni yezokungcebeleka njengoba waba wumlingisi oqavile efilimini yokuqala ende yesiZulu eyayithi uDeliwe, lapho uCynthia ayelingisa khona noSimon Mabhunu Sabela, Ndaba Mhlongo, Sydney Chama, Roland Mqwebu, Patience Africa, Maurel Msimang, June Buthelezi, Joe Mafela nabanye abaningi. Kusukela lapho, akabange esabheka emuva njengoba wadlulela efilimini esihloko sithi Isivumelwano. Wadlala indawo kaMkabayi emdlalweni ozigcawugcawu wethelevishini uShaka Zulu. Emuva kwalokho,

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: AMACIKO akhale "ngokungcwatshwa" ephila yiPlayhouse eThekwini ngesikhathi ebhikisha ngoLwesihlanu Image: Sibonelo Ngcobo BAZODLULISELWA koKlebe nakwiSpecial Investigating unit (SIU) bonke abathinteka ekuphathweni budedengu kuka-R51.8 million owanikwa umfelandawonye wezinyunyana zamaciko, iCreative Industries Federation of South Africa (CCIFSA) wuMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko kuzwelonke phakathi konyaka-mali ka-2014/15 no-2023/24. Lokhu kushiwo wuNgqongqoshe uGayton McKenzie emuva kokuthola komnyango wakhe umbiko wophenyo acela ukuthi alwenziwe yiGobodo Forensic and Investigative Accounting (GFIA) ngokusebenza kwemali. Ngokwesitatimende soMnyango, uphenyo luthole ukuthi ngo-2016 kwenziwa ushintsho enkontilekeni yoMnyango neCCIFSA kwanyuswa imali yoxhaso ngo-R77,884 kokwakuvunyelwene ngayo. U-R5.4 million okwakumele ubuyiselwe emnyangweni ngo-2016/17 ngoba ungasetshenziswanga iCCIFSA yaqhubeka nokwenza ngawo ezinye izinhlelo ngeminyaka okwakungenasivumelwano kuyo. Kuthiwa umbiko weCCIFSA wokuthi imali iyisebenzise kanjani wawudukisa. U-R13 million okwakumele iCCIFSA iwusebenzisele uhlelo lweDowntown Music Hub wahlanganiswa nemali yayo kwi-akhawunti eyodwa nokuyinto okuthiwa kwakungamele yenzeke. Kuvela nokuthi iCCIFSA yahluleka ukuchaza ngokusetshenziswa kuka-R10 million wemiklomelo ebizwa ngokuthi Usiba. Uhlahlomali lwe-CCIFSA lwesicelo soxhaso lwaluveza ukuthi izothatha u-32% wesamba ikhokhele amaholo abasebenzi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: kwiCaf Confederation Cup, kulibuyisile ithemba ngamaqembu aseKZN abelokhu aziwa ngokuhlale evika izembe. Ukuthatha igxathu lokukholelwa kubadlali abasebancane kwamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe okubalwa kuwona AmaZulu, Richards Bay FC, neLamontville Golden Arrows, kugqamile kula masizini ambalwa edlule, kwatuswa nangumqeqeshi we-Arrows, uManqoba Mngqithi izikhawu eziningana. Ngakho ukushaya kwalesi sikhathi sesizini lapho sekusele khona imidlalo emibili isongwe kusenamaqembu amathathu aseKZN asabalwa nakwi-Top 8, kuyawaqinisa amathemba okuthi ngemuva kwamasizini awu-29 kwasungulwa i-PSL kungase kuqopheke umlando ngamaqembu akulesi sifundazwe. Isithombe USIYANDA Ndlovu weGolden Arrows AmaZulu asendaweni yesine kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-44, alwela ukugcina le ndawo kuze kuphele isizini emidlalweni emibili esele. Usuthu luzodlala neKaizer Chiefs namuhla ngo-3 ntambama kowePremiership eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini, bese luvala neDurban City kowabakhaya ngoMgqibelo ozayo kaMeyi 23, eChatsworth Stadium. ICitizens esendaweni yesikhombisa kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-38, izodlala ne-Orlando Pirates namuhla ngo-3 ntambama e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto, bese ivala noSuthu ngoMeyi 23. Abafana Bes’thende abasendaweni yesishiyagalombili ngamaphuzu awu-37, basenethuba lokuqeda kwi-Top 8 njengoba bezodlala neChippa

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMFUNDO Vilakazi osuke ebhentshini washayela iKaizer Chiefs igoli ngesikhathi inqoba kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership Sekhukhune United (0) 0 OMUNYE wabaqeqeshi ababanjiswe umsebenzi kuze kuphele isizini kwiKaizer Chiefs, uKhalil Ben Youssef, ufisa kube kuyagcina ukuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengaleli laseNaturena, lizabalazela ukuzibekisela indawo kwiCaf Confederation Cup. UBen Youssef ukusho lokhu ngaphambi kokuqoqa amaphuzu agcwele kwiSekhukhune United emdlalweni weBetway Premiership izolo ebusuku, ePeter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane. Womabili la maqembu kuqale umdlalo enethuba lokumela iPremier Soccer League (PSL) kwiConfed Cup ngesizini ezayo ngokuqeda endaweni yesithathu kwi-log yePremiership. Kube ngubuqhawe bukaTashreeq Morris obuqinisekise indawo yeChiefs kwiConfed Cup ngegoli alishaye ngomzuzu ka-86. Leli goli lilandelwe yiphenathi kaMfundo Vilakazi naye obesanda kungena. “Kufanele sizihluphe ngokuthi iqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu njengeChiefs lilwela okungaphezulu kweConfed Cup kumasizini ezayo,” kusho uBen Youssef kwaSuperSport. “Siyaqonda ukuthi womabili amaqembu abheke umphumela ofanayo kwazise abanga indawo eyodwa kodwa kukithina ukuthi sikhombise ukuthi iChiefs yiqembu elithathwa njengelikhulu. “Sinethuba lokuqoqa amaphuzu athile uma siyinqoba

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: chatha usuvele ungakuthina sesilinde ukuwusebenzisa." Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi ikhomishini yahlinzekwa ngesabelomali sika-R3.2 billion sezinhlelo zokhetho. Le mali eyokusiza kugaywe amaphepha okuvota, ukukhokhela abasebenzi abengeziwe abazosebenza ngesikhathi sokhetho kanjalo nokwenza ezinye izinhlelo ezithinta ukhetho. UMaimane unxuse ikhomishini ukuthi iqinise imikhankaso yokunxenxa abantu ikakhulu intsha ukubhalisela ukuvota. "Liphansi kakhulu izinga lentsha ezibandakanya nokuvota kuleli. Sinxusa nokuthi igade abantu abasabalalisa izinto okungezona ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ngokhetho." Iphini lesikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini uMnuz Masego Sheburi, lithe ahamba ngohlelo amalungiselelo okhetho. "Sihlabela phambili namalungiselelo njengoba kuzoba nempelasonto yokubhalisela ukuvota." Angaphezu kuka-500 amaqembu abhalisile kuleli kanti angu-20 wawo, abhaliswe kusuka ngo-Okthoba 2025 kuya kuFebhuwari 2026.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: edlule kodwa iSundowns isebenzise umbandela wokuyelula ngonyaka ukuze izothola amangqushana njengoba kunamaqembu amfunayo. Phakathi kwalawo maqembu kukhona i-Al Hilal yaseSudan ehlala idlala kwiCaf Champions League, Esperance yaseTunisia neqembu laseQatar elingakaveli igama lalo. Kuthiwa osekuvimbile yimali efunwa yiSundowns ngalo mgadli odlalela iqembu lesizwe laseNamibia. Ukungabi sezinhlelweni zikaCardoso kukaShalulile kugqame ngempelasonto edlule engabonwa nangokhalo ngesikhathi iSundowns ibhekene neRichards Bay emdlalweni we-quarterfinal eMTN8 abayiwine ngo 4-0 ePitoli. Abanye abadlali abebengekho nguLucas Ribeiro okuthiwa uxoxa namaqembu amfunayo noKhuliso Mudau okuvela ukuthi ufuna ukwenyuselwa umholo. Njengoba sekucaca ukuthi makhulu amathuba okuthi uShalulile angabe esadlala kwiSundowns, uzolahlekelwa yithuba lokwephula irekhodi lamagoli amaningi emlandweni wePSL eliphethwe nguSiyabonga Nomvethe ngawu-129. UShalulile ulandela ngawu-116. Ngaphezu kokuphunyukwa yirekhodi lePSL, uShalulile uzolahlekelwa yithuba lokuphatha elomdlali oshaye amagoli amaningi kwiSundowns eliphethwe yinkakha, uDaniel "Mambush" Mudau, esengukaputeni waleli qembu ngesikhathi liwola izicoco eminyakeni edlule.
