UMudau uhamba phambili kwiSundowns ngamagoli angu-172. Ukuhamba kukaShalulile eMzansi, kuvulela umgadli weSekhukhune United, uBradley Grobler, ithuba lokwephula irekhodi likaNomvethe

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Freedom). UNtuli uphinde abe ngomunye wabasunguli benhlangano yababhali eyaziwa ngokuthi Usiba Writers' Guild. INKAKHA ye-jazz uJonathan Butler Image: Shelley Kjonstad Kwezemidlalo kuzohlonishwa nomqeqeshi wamaBhokobhoko uRassie Erasmus, ngokuhola leli qembu ekutheni liwine indebe yomhlaba ebholeni lombhoxo. URamaphosa uzophinde ahloniphe noSolwazi Khabajane (Khabi) Vivian Mngoma ongasekho, ngeqhaza lakhe ekusunguleni umnyango wezomculo enyuvesi yaseZululand, oNgoye ngo-1975. UMngoma uhlonishwa nangeqhaza lakhe emculweni. Kuzohlonishwa nesishoshovu samalungelo abaphila nokukhubazeka u-Andiswa Gebashe, owaziwa ngokutolikela abangezwa uma kukhuluma uRamaphosa. Bonke laba bazohlonishwa nge-Order of Ikhamanga ngemisebenzi yabo kwezobuciko, umculo, ezemidlalo kanjalo nezokucoshelwa kwezindaba. UShansela wamaNational Orders, onguMqondisi jikelele ehhovisi likamengameli, uNksz Phindile Baleni, uthe inhloso yalo mcimbi ukuhlonipha abantu abenze imisebenzi encomekayo kuleli, abagqugquzela intando yeningi nabaphinde bafukule abantu bakuleli. Uthe kuhlonishwa abantu abahlukene ngezindondo okungeye-Ikhamanga, Baobab, Mapungubwe, neka-OR Tambo. Abanye abazohlonishwa ngendondo iMapungubwe oSolwazi Salim Abdool Karim waseNyuvesi yaKwaZulu-Natal, obambe iqhaza empini yokutholakala kwekhambi lokulapha ingculazi. UKarim wayesethimbeni elalijutshwe nguNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, ukululeka izwe ngesikhathi kuhlasele umbulalazwe

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: BANGASE bavale isifundazwe sonke ngokhukhulelangoqo wesiteleka osonkontileka abakha imigwaqo, abakhala ngokungakhokhelwa wuMnyango wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, kusuka nyakenye. Lokhu bakuveze, esikhangisweni ebesizungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana iFacebook neWhatsApp. Lesi sikhangisi besiphelezelwa yinkulumo eqoshiwe yomunye wabakhahlamezekile, obezwakala ukuthi uthelwe ngezibonkolo. Kule nkulumo, lona wesilisa uzwakala ethi banenkinga noMnyango oholwa nguMphathiswa uSiboniso Duma, ongabakhokheli imali yabo. UMPHATHISWA wezokuThutha KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Siboniso Duma, usolwa ngokukhokhela osonkontileka abathandayo “Ezinye izindawo zokusebenza zimile. UDuma (onguMphathiswa woMnyango) nezikhulu zakhe bakhokhela abangani babo. Sicela yonke iZululand, ukushona phansi koMnambithi, ko-Estcourt, yiTheku, akuvalwe thaqa, ngisho no-N3,” kusho inkulumo. Lona wesilisa uqhubeka athi badlelwa impahla okufaka phakathi amaloli, izimoto nemizi. “Kuyaphela ngathi,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngokukhethwa kwephela emasini, wathi uDuma nezikhulu zakhe bakhetha abantu abambalwa, athe bangabangani bakhe babakhokhele, abanye babashiye kanjalo. “Sicela i-ANC isikhuzele uDuma. Uyasimosha, uyawuqeda uMnyango. Sidlelwa izimoto, amaloli, nakho konke okunye,” kusho lona wesilisa. Uveze ukuthi lokhu kwenzeka kusuka ngonyaka odlule. “UDuma uholela abantu abathandayo, abasenhliziyweni yakhe,” kuqhuba lona

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: KWAKUSEMNANDI kubasunguli beJoyous Celebration, uPastor Mthunzi Namba, uLindelani Mkhize noPastor Hlongwane IZINDABA zokungaboni ngaso linye phakathi kwabasunguli beJoyous Celebration, uLindelani Mkhize, uPastor Mthunzi Namba noPastor Jabu Hlongwane, zikhathaze abantu abaningi, ikakhulukazi abazalwane nabefundisi. Ngenyanga eyedlule kuvele izindaba zokuthi kunokungahoshelani phakathi kukaLindelani nozakwabo uMthunzi noJabu kubangwa imali. Laba ababili kuthiwa bebesola uLindelani ngasemalini yaleli qembu kodwa uLindelani ukhiphe isitatimende athe kuso kungamampunge konke okushiwo ngaye, waveza ukuthi oMthunzi bathatha isinqumo sokushiya kuleli qembu. Omunye wezinceku eziphatheke kabi, wumsakazi weHighway Radio, uDennis "Nzonzonzo" Ntombela. Uthe leli qembu ulihlonipha kakhulu ngamagalelo alo ekukhiqizeni izihlabani zabaculi kuleli, ezinye ezisimele phesheya kwezilwandle njengoXolani Mdlalose. "Abasunguli balo mina ngibazi bengabantu abakhulile kakhulu ngokomqondo nangokomoya abangeke benzise okwezingane sebekhule kangaka. Ngingathi ukuhlukana ngemibono akusiyo inkinga, kanjalo omunye uma esekhethe ukushiya akuyona inkinga, indaba ingaba yimbi uma kukhona osebukela phansi umsebenzi ongaka." Uthe leli qembu linabantu abadlulile ku-70 abaphilisa imindeni yabo ngalo. "Siyohlezi sileseka ngoba liveze amakhono abantu

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: abaneqhaza elibalulekile eqenjini, yize sinesikwati esikhulu. "Badlale kahle kakhulu, futhi ukuncintisana kuhle phakathi kwabadlali eqenjini, wonke umuntu usebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuthola ijezi," kusho uKaze oqeqesha ngokubambisana noKhalil Ben Youssef. Ebuzwa ngokudlalisa uCele esikhundleni sikaNdlovu, uKaze ukubeke kwacaca ukuthi isizathu sokungamdlalisi uNdlovu, obanga ijezi noCele, yingoba ubesabela ukuthi angase athole elinye ikhadi njengoba evele enelinye ikhadi eliphuzi. Uyichithile eyokuthi yingoba esecabanga ngomdlalo wabakhaya nePirates ngoMgqibelo. "Cha, isinqumo sokudlalisa uCele kube wuhlobo lweqembu ebesidlala nalo esibone kufanele sidlalise yena," kuqhuba uKaze othe bazolwa kuze kube sekugcineni kule midlalo eyisithupha ebasalele. "Izinto azihambanga ngendlela ebesihlele ngayo futhi asiwasebenzisanga ngendlela amathuba esiwatholile. "Kodwa sizimisele ukwenza kangcono emidlalweni elandelayo, silwele amaphuzu angu-18 emidlalweni esisalele. Sizolwa kuze kube sekugcineni." Amakhosi azotholana phezulu neZimnyama kowabakhaya baseSoweto obhekwe ngabomvu yiningi labathandi bebhola ngeSonto ngo-3 ntambama, eFNB Stadium, eGoli.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UGERDA Steyn ophethe irekhodi lika-56km kwi-Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon kwabesifazane ungomunye wabagjimi okubhekeke baqophe izikhathi ezintsha kulo mjaho KUBHEKWE amarekhodi amasha emjahweni wanonyaka we-Totalsports Two Oceans Ultra Marathon onemiklomelo econsisa amathe. Lo mjaho waminyaka yonke ohlanganisa ibanga lika-56km nelika-21.1km, nonyaka uxhaswe yinkampani eyakha izimoto ezihamba ngogesi ehlonishwayo, i-BYD, nokuyiyona ezobanika izinyawo ezilula abayingxenye yalo mjaho kusukela kubagijimi kuya kubaqeqeshi nezikhulu. Owebanga lika-56km, nokuyiwona obhekwe kakhulu, uzogijinywa ngoMgqibelo kusukela ngo-5.15 ekuseni, kuthi u-21.1km uqale ngo-6.15 ekuseni ngeSonto Owanonyaka umjaho uxhaswe ngesizumbulu sika-R2.6 million, ohlanganisa imiklomelo yawo womabili amabanga. Ku-56km, ozophuma phambili kwabesilisa nabesifazane uzokhala emuke no-R380 000, isibili kube u-R220 000, isithathu kube u-R100 000. Imali yompetha inyuke ngo-R130 000 uma kuqhathaniswa nonyaka odlule. Ku-21.1km ozodla umhlanganiso uzohlabana ngo-R50 000, isibili kube u-R30 000, isithathu kube u-R18 000. Nyakenye, uKhoarahlane Seutloali waseLesotho, ogijimela iHollywood Athletics Club, udle umhlanganiso kwabesilisa ku-56km ngesikhathi esingu-3:10:47. Isibili kwaba uSiboniso Sikhakhane we-Entsika Athletics Club ngesikhathi esingu-3:11:18,

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Response Team, Provincial Counter Intelligence Unit, Provincial Counter Kidnapping Unit neProvincial Serious Violence Crimes Unit. Uthe uphenyo lwawo luqale lwawaholela KwaHlomendlini, eMandeni, lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona abasolwa ababili ngoLwesithathu. “Oyedwa wabasolwa utholwe neselula yoyedwa wabagilwa. Umkhondo ube usuwakhomba KwaDendethu, eSundumbili, amaphoyisa lapho okufike kwaboshwa khona umsolwa wesithathu,” kusho uNetshiunda. Udalule ukuthi umsolwa wesithathu yena utholwe nesibhamu. Uthe angu-11 amaselula abagilwa, atholwe kubasolwa. Uthe yilapho amaphoyisa ethole khona ukuthi oyedwa wabagilwa ubesebenzela abagilwa. Kwabe sekuvela nokuthi abasolwa ngokubambisana bagqekeze emzini wabagilwa, bababopha ngentambo. “Kuvela ukuthi oyedwa wabo uqale wadlwengula umgilwa oneminyaka engu-20 ngaphambi kokuba babalayishe emotweni yomunye wabo (abagilwa), bayikhomba eMelmoth,” kusho uNetshiunda, othe bahambe ibanga elilinganiselwa ku-200km ukusuka emzini wabagilwa kuyiwa endaweni yesigameko. Uveze ukuthi amaphoyisa athole ukuthi umsolwa obedlwengule umgilwa (20) ekhaya lakhe, uphinde wamdlwengula okwesibili sekufikwe eMelmoth. Uthe emva kokumdlwengula isibili, ube esefuna ngodli imininingwane yabagilwa abathathu yasebhange nezinombolo zakhona eziyimfihlo. “Emva kokuthola le mininingwane, babe sebebadubula bebabulala

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: “Kuyabaphoqa laba abazonikwa isikimu ukuthi babambisane ngoba isipiliyoni sikaKekana kwiChampions League ngeke kuzibeke ukungabibikho kwaso,” kusho uNdamane. “Okuhle ngeSundowns ukuthi ukubambisana yinto yakhona ngakho-ke noma ngabe wubani ozonikwa ijezi uzokwazi okufanele akwenze. “Kwaba yinhlanhla ukuthi ngifike eqenjini elifana neSundowns njengoba ngizibona ngisondelene nokuningi engangiphupha ngakho ngisemncane njengezicoco ezihlanganisa iligi neChampions League. “Siyaqonda ukuthi ubunzima bomdlalo bulele ekutheni i-Esperance iphoqelekile ukuthola igoli ngakho-ke kumele siqaphe macala onke ikakhulukazi kubadlali basemuva. “Ngenxa yalokhu kulambela igoli lokulinganisa kwezitha kunezikhathi lapho zizoklayeka khona emuva nokuyilapho nathi esihlele ukuzingcwaba khona ngoba kuzosikhulula ukulithola kuqala igoli. “Siya kulo mdlalo ngokwethembana nangokuvumelana ngokuthi iSundowns iyona ezodlulela emzuliswaneni wamanqamu emuva kwawo,” kusho lo mdlali sakuphaka impi. Ikhadi likaKekana ngeke limphuthisele ngomdlalo wamanqamu uma iSundowns iphumelela ukuzifaka kuwona.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ngesipho kodwa unxusa abafuna ukumgixabeza ngezipho ukuba baziphathe ngalolu suku. Ubuye waveza ukuthi kulo mcimbi kuzobuye kuqwashiswe umphakathi ngokuhlukunyezwa kwabantu ngokobulili. UBingelela uthe amathikithi asatholakala ezitolo zakwaShoprite, Pick n Pay, Spar, Ticket Pro, Computicket naseWebTickets ngo-R100. Amanye azobe etholakala esangweni ngo-R150. Ubonge kakhulu abaxhasi balo mcimbi okukhona kubo neminyango kahulumeni.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ezimaphakathi nezwe lapho umoya uthanda ukucinana khona ziyasokola kancane emandleni. Inkinga ebenginayo kakhulu ngayo wu-gearbox oyi-4 speed automatic. Uzwakala "uwumhlobo mdi" kwazise izimoto zakamuva zishaya ngabasezingeni eliphezulu. Kokunye ibike idideke ukuthi ifake liphi igiya nobekugcina sekuyenza ibange umsinjwana. Lokhu kungenza abanye balunguze izimbangi ezifana ne-GWM Jolion Pro ebiza imali ecishe ilingane ncimishi nayo kodwa yona enenjini ene-turbo enamandla angaphezulu no-gearbox oyi-dual clutch. Ngale kwalokho, iyimoto ehamba kahle yokuthwala umndeni. Kuphethroli ibidla amalitha angu-7.1 ngo-100km. KwaSuzuki abayincishanga izinto efika nazo ngoba ine-cruise control kanjalo ne-heads up display. Ngangijwayele ukuhleka uma ngibona ukuthi ngemuva yona ine-wiper kodwa iToyota Urban Cruiser esuselwe kuyo, alikho. Kuze kwaba yikamuva lapho asebelifake khona. Ungalithatha kancane kodwa libamba iqhaza elibalulekile yokuthi ubone kahle ngemumva. Uma uhlehla, ingaphandle livela kwi-touchscreen infotainment system ukuze ungashayisi kanti iphinde ibe nama-sensor. Okunye kwezokuphepha abakufakile ngama-airbag ayisithupha, electronic stability control, amabhreki e-ABS ne-emergency brake assist (EBA) futhi ayihlehli uma usuka endaweni enyukelayo.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: Cilliers High, eGlencore, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal, lapho aklonyeliswa khona ngeDux Scholar - umklomelo onikwa umfundi osuke ebashaye bonke emakhanda kulesi sikole. “Ngenkathi ngifika enyuvesi ngaqhubeka lapho engangigcine khona emabangeni aphezulu, ngazitshela ukuthi ukuphasa ngamalengiso kuwukuthi uthole u-80% nangaphezulu esifundweni, okungisize ngokuphasa ngale ndlela okwenzeke ngayo manje,” usho kanje. Leli bhungu aligcini ngokwenza kahle ezifundweni kuphela njengoba kule nyuvesi beliyingxenye yezinhlelo ezihlukene okubalwa kuzona iGolden Key International Honour Society, Campus HIV and AIDS Support Unit ne-Differently Abled Student Association. Kanti kumanje uKhumalo usevele uqhubeka nemfundo yakhe njengoba enza i-honours degree, akwenza ngenhloso yokuthi abe neminyaka ewu-40 eseneziqu zobudokotela, okuzomlekelela kakhulu ukuthi abe yi-clinical psychologist.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ukuqeda. "Ngiyajabula ukuthi ngilana ngikhona namhlanje, ngemuva kwesikhathi eside ngizama ngishiya ukuqeda izifundo zami. Bekungelula ngempela kodwa namhlanje umuntu uphumelele. Bekumele ngizibe konke okwenzeka eduzane kwami ukuze ngibhekane nezifundo zami. Bekumele ngizibekele isikhathi ngiphinde ngihlale ngizikhumbuza ukuthi kungani ngaqala ukufunda ekuqaleni, lokhu bengikwenza ngezinsuku ezinzima kakhulu," kusho uTee. Uthe uyambonga kakhulu unina, uBonisiwe Khanyile, obehlala emkhuthaza ukuthi aqede izifundo zakhe. "Nawo wonke nje umndeni wami ubungesekile njengoba bengihlala ngiwutshela ngobunzima bokufunda engibhekene nakho. Bengazi ukuthi ekugcineni kumele ngizithole iziqu zami ngenxa yokuthi bengiyodliwa unembeza isikhathi eside ukuthi ngike ngakhetha ukungazitholi lezi ziqu. Ukholo lwami lungisizile ukuthi ngibe lana ngikhona namhlanje," kusho yena. U-Amina waveza ukuthi uyena owokuqala ekhaya kubo ukuthi athweswe iziqu. Naye uveze ukuthi kube uhambo obelungelula njengoba abebuye ayeke, nokuyinto angayikholwa ukuthi ugcine eqedile waze wathola iziqu zakhe.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMLANDELI weDurban City uNompumelelo Nene nenkakha yebhola yakuleli eyinxusa leBetway Premiership, uLehlohonolo Majoro. Yini ebanga ukuthi inkomishi yeBetway ilandele i-Orlando iPirates emidlalweni yeligi ekubeni kungeyona ompetha? Ngabe kukhona iPremier Soccer League (PSL) efuna ukusitshela khona esingakwazi? Yonke le mibuzo nokubabaza kusabalele ezinkundleni zokuxhumana lapho abalandeli bezibuza khona beziphendula ngembangela yokubonakala kwenkomishi yeligi emidlalweni yePirates kodwa hhayi kweyompetha iMamelodi Sundowns. Iningi likhale ngokuthi laqala ukuyibona emdlalweni wePirates neRichards Bay FC owaphela ngo 2-2 eMhlathuze Sports Complex ngo-Ephreli 10, njengoba iphinde yavela nasemdlalweni wabakhaya neKaizer Chiefs ngeSonto eFNB Stadium, eNasrec. Eqinisweni le ndebe yayikhona eChatsworth Stadium ngesikhathi iqembu eliyivikelayo, iSundowns, libhekene neDurban City emdlalweni elawunqoba ngo 1-0 ngo-Ephreli 7. Njengoba le ndebe isithe ukwehluka phezulu uma iqhathaniswa nale eyaqukulwa amaBrazilians ekupheleni kwesizini, kungenzeka ukuthi abaxhasi basebenzise umdlalo omkhulu njengowabakhaya baseSoweto ukuthi baphinde bakhangise ngayo. INDEBE yeBetway Premiership eyaqukulwa yiMamelodi Sundowns ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2024/25 (kwesokunxele) nendebe yeBetway Premiership ethe ukwehluka ezophakanyiswa yiqembu elizoba

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IPHINI lomqeqeshi weKaizer Chiefs kwiDStv Diski Challenge, uDillon Sheppard, okufanele liqhamuke namaqhinga okuvimba i-Orlando Pirates abazobhekana nayo eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, eKaNyamazane, ngeSonto I-KAIZER Chiefs izothwala amathemba amaqembu asezithendeni ze-Orlando Pirates emjahweni weligi yeDStv Diski Challenge uma lezi zinkunzi seziqhuthana eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KaNyamazane, ngeSonto. Lo mdlalo ungomunye wedili lemidlalo emine ezodlalelwa eMpumalanga, ngoMgqibelo nangeSonto. IChiefs engompetha bangesizini edlule beDiski, idonsa kanzima njengoba okwamanje ingabalwa namaqembu asethubeni lokuwina isicoco. Isendaweni yesithupha kwi-log ngamaphuzu angu-14 emidlalweni engu-10. Isele ngawu-11 kwiPirates esesicongweni ngawu-25 emidlalweni engu-10. IMamelodi Sundowns esendaweni yesibili ngamaphuzu angu-20 neStellenbosch ekweyesithathu ngawu-19, yiwona amaqembu ajaha iPirates ebukeka ishosholoza ngaphansi kobuholi bomqeqeshi uRoscoe Krieling. Ukuqhubeka nokucosha amaphuzu kweZimnyama kuzibeka ethubeni lokuwina isicoco seligi, iqede ishobolo leminyaka kwazise azikaze ziyiwine selokhu yasungulwa iDiski ngo-2014. Akubuzwa ukuthi iSundowns neStellies bazothembela kwiChiefs ukuthi ivimbe iPirates ingalinwebi igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni ukuze bezosala benalo ithuba lokuyibamba. IPirates isahlulwe yiPolokwane City kuphela kule sizini, yadlala ngokulingana neDurban City

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UBONGOKUHLE Hlongwane ongabanga nomdlalo omuhle kwiBafana Bafana BALISEBENZISE ngezindlela ezahlukene ithuba abadlali ababili beBafana Bafana abagagule ngamagama umqeqeshi waleli qembu lesizwe uHugo Broos ngesikhathi ekhuluma ngaphambi komdlalo wobungani nePanama ngoLwesibili ebusuku e-DHL Stadium, eKapa. Kulo mdlalo obekungokokuqala emlandweni ukuthi uBroos ashayelwe ekhaya, amagoli okuwine ngawo iPanama ashaywe ngoJose Cordoba noGiovanni Ramos, obecisha elikaMbekezeli Mbokazi. UBongokuhle Hlongwane owagcina ukushayela iBafana igoli ngo-2022 akabanga nomdlalo omuhle kwazise uthole ithuba elilula esiwombeni sokuqala lamehlula ngaphambi kokukhishwa kwesesibili. UJayden Adams naye osanda kubuya kuleli qembu lesizwe kulandela ingxabano yakhe noBroos ukhombise izimpawu zokukulungela ukuvala isikhala sikaSiphephelo Sithole uma uBroos emdinga. Bobabili laba badlali ubasho ngamagama uBroos ukuthi ubheke lukhulu kubona ngoba kufanele athathe isinqumo ngabo neqembu eliya kwiNdebe yoMhlaba. “Bobabili ngibabuyisele ukubabonela eduze ngakho-ke kukubona ukuthi bayalisebenzisa ithuba noma cha,” kusho uBroos ngoHlongwane no-Adams kwaSuperSport. Nakuba kuyiwe ekhefini zibambene ngo 0-0 kodwa obekusobala ngukuthi iPanama ibikhombisa izimpawu zokuba ngcono kuneqembu lasekhaya. Ngokubona ingozi uBroos

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: we-MK Party ePhalamende, uColleen Makhubele, ucasuke kakhulu ngenxa yengoma ebiculwa emashini ebiKuGompo, e-Eastern Cape. Ngubani loPhakel'umthakathi osedume kangaka? Le nsizwa, edabuka KwaMandlakazi ngaphansi kweNkosi uBhekintinta Zulu, ikhule isheba imfundo nokungcweka ngenduku. Iyazwakala olimini ukuthi yafunda yaze yafika esikhungweni semfundo ephakeme. Nakwezepolitiki unamava njengoba ancela embeleni ogwansile womsunguli weIFP, uMntwana wakwaPhindangene. Izinkomba zokuthi abantu baKwaNongoma bayakholelwa ebuholini bakhe zibonakale ngokuthi bamenze ikhansela labo eminyakeni eyedlule. Uqale ukwaziwa eNingizimu Afrika esevela ezinkundleni zokuxhumana njengomshayi wenduku. Umsakazi woKhozi FM, uKhathide "Tshatha" Ngobe, waveza ukuthi uPhakel'umthakathi ungumkhaya wakhe. Ubuye wazakhela udumo exabana noNgizwe ngesikhathi kutshalwa uMntwana waKwaPhindangene, lapho ayeqimbe khona futhi emzimbeni ebhale ukuthi Shenge 95. Ukuduma kwakhe kumenze wagcina eselingisa emidlalweni yethelevishini okuyiShaka Ilembe neSmoke and Mirrors. Uthe okumenza angabi mningi ekulingiseni wukungahambisani nokudlala izindawo ezizomenza alingise ukuya ocansini.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: uthulwe ngumengameli wezwe. I-DA ikwamukele ukufika kwawo, yathi uzosiza kakhulu empini yeHIV kuleli. Ithe abangakahaqeki bazovikeleka ekutheni bangasuleleki ngaleli gciwane. "Elakuleli linesibalo esiphezulu sabantu abane-HIV emhlabeni jikelele. Babalelwa ku-8 million abaphila ne-HIV kuleli. Babalelwa ku-6 million abadla imishanguzo ama-ARV. Lo mjovo uzoshintsha izinto kuleli." Leli qembu lithe lifuna uMnyango uvele ePhalamende ukuze uzothula uhlelo lokusabalalisa lo mjovo emphakathini ngokushesha.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: emhlabeni jikelele. Useqalile ukuxoxa neminyango ehlukene yaseMelika kanjalo nezikhulu zakhona." UMeyer ungena esikhundleni esashiywa nguMnuz Ebrahim Rasool, owaxoshwa eMelika ngenxa yokugxeka uMengameli wakhona uMnuz Donald Trump. Elakuleli linyambanambana kuTrump, olisola ngokuthi kunodlame olubhekiswe kubalimi abamhlophe abaphucwa nomhlaba wabo. Yize esetshelwe izikhawu eziningi ukuthi lokhu kungamampunge, kodwa uTrump akezwa mshini. URamaphosa uthe akangabazi ukuthi uMeyer uzowenza ngempumelelelo lo msebenzi wakhe. "Sethemba ukuthi uzokwamukelwa nguTrump. Nathi sisanda kwamukela inxusa laseMelika, uMnuz Brent Bozell." Ekhuluma ngezithinta umnotho, uthe umkhakha wezamanzi kuleli kuhambisa ngelonwabu ukutshalwa kwemali kuleli. "Ingqalasizinda endala, ukungaphathwa ngendlela komasipala kunqinda izinguquko ngokushesha kuleli. Ukungahlinzekwa ngendlela kwamanzi kubantu, kwenza nokutshalwa kwemali kuhambe ngelonwabu." Uthe umsebenzi omkhulu nokutshalwa kwemali kwenzeka komasipala wathi kudingeka bavuke emaqandeni. Udalule nokuthi abantu abaningi baqashwe osomabhizinisi abazimele kuleli, ngakho kudingeka athuthukiswe ukuze sande isibalo sabantu abasebenzayo kuleli. URamaphosa uthe abantu bakuleli baziwa ngokuphanta. "Noma ikuphi la ngihamba khona ikakhulu emalokishini, uthi uyadlula ubone kukhona ibhizinisi elithile. Yinto eyayivele

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: lesi sinyathelo." Uthe akukwazi ukulokhu kukhalwa ngemali ekubeni kuhlonyuliswa osopolitiki kuphela. "Incane imali ekhona ezweni ngakho osopolitiki abafunde ukuphila ngalokhu abanakho. Abahambe ngezimoto zohlobo olufanayo ziphinde zakhiwe kuleli." Uthe uhulumeni unezinto ezibaluleke kakhulu okumele uzenze hhayi ukugxila ezintweni ezingathi shu. "Abakhokhi bentela balindele okungcono kuhulumeni hhayi ukuxhashazwa kwemali. Ayichithwe eyokunyuswa kwemali yezimoto zosopolitiki kanti sifuna ukubakhumbuza ukuthi luyeza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya maduzane." Umholi weBOSA uDkt Mmusi Maimane, usigxekile isinyathelo sikahulumeni sokunyusa imali yezimoto wathi siveza ukuthi uhulumeni uqhelile kubantu. Uthe lesi sinyathelo sivuna ngisho amaphini ongqongqoshe kanjalo nondunankulu bezifundazwe. "Lesi sinyathelo sizocasula abantu, ikakhulu abangasebenzi nababhuqwa yindlala. Imali yomphakathi kumele yenze izidingo ezibalulekile, hhayi ubukhazikhazi." Uthe bazolokhu beqhubekile nokuphenya ibheshu njengoba uNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Enoch Godongwana, edalule eyokunyuka kwemali empendulweni yombuzo obubuzwe yileli qembu ePhalamende.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: uSamke owafunda ezikoleni zaseThekwini, okuyiseSherwood Primary naseMowat Park Girls, lapho aphothula khona u-matric. Uthe wabe eseyokwenza izifundo zomthetho e-University of Western Cape kodwa wazishiya eseyokwenza unyaka wesithathu ngenxa yamathuba avuleka okuba umbhali oyithwasa enkampanini iDaydream Films. "Ngabambisana nabanye ekubhaleni ifilimu ethi Inkanyezi nethi Ukukhula. Ngabuye ngaqhamuka futhi ngabhala ifilimu ethi Imfihlo." Uthe waqala kule ndima yokulingisa njengomxhumanisi wabalingisi nombhali wemidlalo namafilimu akhonjiswa kwiLokshin Bioskop (DStv Channel 164) ngaphambi kokungena emkhakheni wokulingisa. Eminye imidlalo abonakale kuyo yi-1802: Love Defies Time neChampions. Lesi simomondiya esibuye sibe wumkhangisi wengqephu ezikhangisweni zethelevishini nezamaphephandaba ne-voice over artist kanti silama izinsizwa ezintathu bese sona silanywa wudadewabo omncane. USamke ukhulele ekhaya lamaKrestu njengoba uyise ayengumshumayeli wevangeli nombhidisi wekhwaya ekubeni unina enguthisha kasontosikole owawusegcekeni kubo. "Engikuthanda kakhulu kulo mkhakha wukucija abalingisi abasafufusa. Yikho okungenze ngagcina sengisungula inhlangano iPerfomers' Hub. Yinkundla ezonikeza abalingisi abasafufusa ithuba lokuveza amakhono abo ukuze abonwe ngabahlwayela imidlalo ikhono kubalingisi, abadidiyeli nezinkampani ezihlonza ikhono. Ngibasize

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: ukugijimela ukuba nolunye ukhetho ekubeni singakaphumi isinqumo ecaleni abalifakile kuzokwenza ukuthi abantu bangayithembi imiphumela yokhetho. "Kufanele sibatshele ukuthi sifuna ukwazi ukuthi ashonaphi amavoti ethu antshontshwa okhethweni olwedlule. Asibatshele ukuthi asifuni ukuthi kube khona olunye ukhetho ngoba kunezinkinga abangakazixazululi," kusho uZuma.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: Uthe kusukela lapho bagcina sebengabangani beqiniso futhi waqala ukugitshezwa ibhanoyi wuKansas ngoba wayefuna amvakashele emzini wakhe eThekwini. "Wangihlalisa ehhotela lomntakabani i-5 Star," kusho uNkosi. Uthe wanqaba uKansas esefuna abe amumise eshadelwa ngo-1988. "Ngagcina ngivume ukuba wumphathi wohlelo emshadweni wakhe owawuseCamperdown," kusho yena. Uthe ngaphambi kokuba uKansas adlule emhlabeni, wahlala phansi naye wamxoxela konke ngempilo yakhe futhi wamnikeza nesithombe sakhe ayesisayinile. "Kwaba yilolo suku engagcina ngalo ukumbona ephila." UWilson B akagcinanga ngokusakaza kuphela kodwa ubuye wethula izinhlelo zethelevishini okubalwa kuzo iSidlalela Intsha/Ulusha ngo-1987, enoNomawethu Dingiswayo. Wadlulela kwiJam Alley enoVinolia Mashego noLeon Mazibuko ngo-1992 kanye neStudio Mix. Uthe okuningi abantu bazokubona okokuqala kwiqophamlando ekhuluma ngempilo yakhe. UWILSON B Nkosi ekakwe wu-Unathi Msengana, Melanie Bala, noGlen Lewis beyibambe kwiMetro FM UWILSON B Nkosi eqeda kuhlonishwa ngendondo yeLifetime Achievement UWILSON B Nkosi ephethe umklomelo weLifetime Achievement kumaSouth African Voice Awards UWILSON B Nkosi enezinye izingqalabutho ayeyibambe nazo kwiMetro FM, kuseyiRadio Metro UWILSON B Nkosi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UNKK Halalisiwe Mncwango weHala Lisa, odle umhlanganiso kumaBambelela Business Awards Image: SIBONELO NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS KUBUYE ithemba lokulunga kwezinto kusomabhizinisi odle umhlanganiso emncintiswaneni wokuxhasa osomabhizinisi baKwaZulu-Natal, amaBambelela Business Awards - okuhlonishwe kuwona osomabhizinisi abawu-20 abenze kahle kuwona, bahlukaniselana isamba semali engaphezu kuka-R1 million wokubasiza ukufukula amabhizinisi abo. Lowo uNkk Halalisiswe Mncwango, webhizinisi lendawo yokudlela iHala Lisa yasePort Shepstone, ogwini oluseningizimu yeKwaZulu-Natal, ohlabane ngesamba sika-R145 000 wokumsiza eibhizinisini lakhe. Lokhu kwenzeke emcimbini wokuklomelisa osomabhizinisi, obuhlelwe yiHollywood Foundation eHollywoodbets Greyville Convention Centre, eThekwini ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. UNkk Mncwango uthe lo mklomelo ufike ngesikhathi esihle impela njengoba kuqondane nokuthi ibhizinisi lakhe linezinkinga eziningi, futhi lintengantenga kakhulu okwenza ukuthi inzuzo ingangeni ngendlela ejwayelekile. KUBE yinjabulo yodwa kosomabhizinisi abaphume phambili emncintiswaneni wokuxhasa osomabhizinisi amaBambelela Business Awards Image: SIBONELO NGCOBO/INDEPENDENT NEWSPAPERS “Ngiyakhumbula nokuthi ngike ngacabanga nokuhoxa kulo mncintiswano ngoba sengibona sengathi kungenzeka ukuthi kungahambi kahle, kukuningi nje okwenzekayo ngesikhathi esisodwa. Lokhu kuzongikhuthaza kakhulu ukuqhubeka nebhizinisi lami,” usho kanje.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: INYUNYANA yothisha iSadtu isiphakamise ukuthi ifuna ukuthi kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando wase-Afrika esifundweni i-History ezikoleni zakuleli. Le nyunyana isamile ekutheni ifuna lesi sifundo sibe yimpoqo kubona bonke abafundi. ISadtu isho lokhu nje, uMnyango weMfundo eyisiSekelo, ukhiphele umphakathi ukuthi uphawule ngemigomo ethinta lesi sifundo somlando ezikoleni. UMnyango ukwenze lokhu ukuze uqinise ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo, kusuka kaGrade 4 kuya kaGrade 12. UNobhala Jikelele weSadtu, uDkt Mugwena Maluleke, uthe bebelokhu besho ukuthi bafuna kugxilwe ekufundiseni ngomlando othinta izwekazi i-Afrika, hhayi amazwe aphesheya. "Sifuna kugxilwe ekufundisweni ngezinto ezithinta i-Afrika, kungagxilwa kakhulu ezintweni ezithinta amazwe ase-Europe. Sethemba ukuthi le migomo ekhishelwe umphakathi, nathi esizophawula ngayo nge-History, izobalula eyokuthi sibe yimpoqo lesi sifundo." Uthe uma isifundo siyimpoqo, sizokwenza ukuthi abafundi bazi la besuka khona nokuthi kwenzakalani ezweni labo. UMnuz Terence Khala oyibamba lomkhulumeli woMnyango, uthe bese kunesikhathi bebheka izindlela zokubuyekeza ukufundiswa kwalesi sifundo ezikoleni. Uthe kwaqokwa nethimba elalibheka ukubuyekezwa kwalesi sifundo eMnyangweni. "Leli thimba lalibheka indaba yokuthi

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX I-MILFORD FC neCape Town City bazibekisele indawo kumaPSL Promotion Play-Offs ngokuthola amaphuzu amqoka abebewadinga emidlalweni yokusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship edlalwe izolo, ezinkundleni ezahlukene. IMilford ibambane ngo 0-0 neHungry Lions eMxolisi Dicky Jacobs Stadium, e-Upington, ngenkathi iCity ibhaxabula iLeceisterford City ngo 4-2 eDobsonville Sadium, eSoweto. IMilford ibidinga iphuzu kulo mdlalo wayo neLions ukuqinisekisa indawo yayo kumaPlay-Offs. Iqede isizini isendaweni yesithathu ngamaphuzu awu-54 okuyisibalo esifanayo neseCity eqede endaweni yesibili ngenxa yomehluko wamagoli. ICasric Stars nayo ebingelinye lamaqembu abesembangweni wokuzibekisela indawo kumaPlay-Offs, akuyisebenzelanga ukunqoba kwayo ngo 3-1 kwiGomora United eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. IKruger United edlale ngokulingana ibambana ngo 2-2 ne-The Bees, KaNyamazane Stadium, eNelspruit, inikwe ngokusemthethweni indebe yayo nezindondo ngokuba ngompetha baka-2025/26 beMotsepe Championship. Ngesizini ezayo isiyogijima kwiBetway Premiership ICity neMilford sebelinde iqembu lePremiership abazodlala nalo kumaPlay-Offs azoqala ngoMeyi 26, asongwe ngoJuni 13. Leli qembu kulindeleke ukuthi liphume emaqenjini amane emuva kwemidlalo yokusonga isizini yePremiership ngoMgqibelo, okuyi okuyiMagesi

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: efakwe iCoffee Operating System KwaGWM bathi uma uyishaje yagcwala kanjalo nasethangini likaphethroli kuntanta isele, ungahamba amakhilomitha angaphezulu kuka-1 000. Ngogesi wodwa uhamba u-106km. Ibhethri layo lingu-19.09kWh, nokulithatha amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu ukulishaja ligcwale nge-AC charger engu-7kW. Ngiyithandile indlela ehamba ngayo ngokuthi yize inamandla kodwa iwanyusa kahle, akuthi uma unyathela ivele igxume njengakwezinye. Okunye engikuthandile wushintsho abalwenze kwi-touchscreen infotainment system njengoba befake iCoffee Operating System. Bathi izolandela kwezinye izimoto zabo. Igqame kahle futhi kulula ukuyisebenzisa ngoba izinto eziningi zisobala ngisho nendawo lapho umgibeli ekwazi ukunyusa nokwehlisa khona umsindo. Uxhuma iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto nokunye. I-H6 PHEV ifike kusanda kutheleka iH6 ethuthukisiwe okwenze kwa-GWM bangasibona isidingo sokushintsha indlela ebukeka ngayo. Isuselwe kwi-Ultra Luxury ngakho bayigqishile kwenakho futhi inkulu. Kubalwa amalambu angama-LED, amarimu angu-19 inch, panoramic sunroof, izihlalo zangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza noma uziqandise, ibhuthi engu-550 litres nenqwaba yezokuphepha. Ifike neyakwabo iH7 Black Edition. I-Haval H7 Black Edition eshunwe ngokuba mnyama ezindaweni ezithile emzimbeni Uzokhumbula

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Umndeni ka-Albert Mazibuko izolo obuhambele inkonzo yesikhumbuzo sakhe eCFCI eThekwini IZOQALA ngokungcwatshwa kuqala ngo-8 ekuseni, bese kulandela inkonzo yomngcwabo wayo ingwazi engasekho yeLadysmith Black Mambazo, uMdletshe Albert Mazibuko (77), eshone ngeledlule esibhedlela, ngemuva kokugula isikhashana. Lokhu kuvezwe umfowabo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo ebiseCFCI eBerea eThekwini izolo. U-Abednigo Mazibuko, oke wacula kwiMambazo ngaphambi kokuthatha umhlalaphansi, uthe umfowabo wazisholo yena ukuthi ufuna ukufihlwa kubo eNtabamhlophe, e-Estcourt. INDODANA ka-Albert Mazibuko uNhlanhla ogqoke isudi emnyama icula neqembu iLadysmith Black Mambazo enkonzweni yesikhumbuzo izolo Uthe ngenxa yemithetho yakule ndawo okuzofihlwa kuyo, bahlele ukuthi ekuseni kuqale umngcwabo afihlwe bese kuthi ngo-9 kube nenkonzo ezoba sesikoleni iMtshezi High, e-Estcourt ngoMgqibelo ekuseni. "Indawo azofihlwa kuyo inemithetho kakhulu, ngakho sizoqala ngokumfihla ekuseni bese kulandela inkonzo ezobe ihambisana nezikhulumi ezihlukene," kusho uMazibuko. Uthe umfowabo ubengumuntu onothando, nobexhasana kakhulu ezintweni abantu abazenzayo. "Ubenothando umfowethu, enomusa elungile futhi kakhulu. Ubengumuntu owesekanayo kunoma yini oyenzayo futhi ekwenza konke ngomoya owodwa. Wamxhasa uMshengu enza konke ayekusho

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: lokulwa nokubulawa kobhejane. “Abaningi baphuma phambili kulolu hlelo, kwathi abambalwa abafeyila, basuswa eziqiwini ezinobhejane,” kusho uMkhize, othe kwaba nomdonsiswano omkhulu ngalokhu. “Yonke le mizamo, yalekelela kakhulu ekutheni kuliwe nenkinga yokuzingelwa kobhejane,” usho kanje. Uthe kwabasiza kakhulu futhi nokusebenzisana nemiphakathi, okubandakanya amakhosi angu-10 akhele iziqiwi eziseHluhluwe namaphethelo, amalungu ebhodi, nokuyilapho kwavunyelwana khona ngezinye izinto ezibandakanya ukuthi imiphakathi kufanele ihlomule nayo ngesiqiwi. “Eminye yemisebenzi, engadingi amakhono atheni, savumelana ngokuthi sizoya emphakathini, siqashe labo bantu,” kusho uMkhize. Uthe baphinde bavula ithuba lokuthi eminye imikhiqizo bayithenge emiphakathini eseduze, wabalula izinto ezifana namaqanda nokunye. Uthe baphinde babafundisa ukuthi baba kanjani osomabhizinisi abakwazi ukuhlinzeka ngemikhiqizo esuke idingeka ngaphandle kwezinkinga. Phakathi kobuchwepheshe obulethwe eHiP, yisikhungo i-Nerve Centre ebhekele ukugadwa kwabangena esiqiwini ngendlela engafanele. Ukukha phezulu, lesi sikhungo sibheka ukusebenza koxhaxha lwamakhamera athukuswe ezindaweni ezehlukene esiqiwini. Njengonyazi, la makhamera akwazi ukuthwebula izithombe eziningana zabantu abasuke bedlula ngakuwo, aphinde athathe ne-video. Ngokuphazima kweso abe esekuthumela kulesi sikhungo, kuhanjiiswa umyalezo

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: lokhu kuke kwabhekelelwa kuleli cala, wathi ngenxa yalokho, ubona umthetho ubenzela phansi abagilwa bokudlwengulwa. “Njengamanje umsolwa uyazitshakadulela, konke kumnandi. Mina ngapha kufanele nginakekele ingane esihlala ithukile, eshintsha ebusweni uma ike yambona umsolwa edlula ngaphandle komuzi,” kusho uyise kamgilwa. Uthe sebeshintshe ngisho nendlela ingane edlala ngayo, wathi isikhathi esiningi isihlale idlala endlini. "Uma sizoba nohambo, oluphoqa ukuthi siyishiye, sesiyicelela emzini osebangeni elingamakhilomitha angu-400 ngoba sesiyasaba ukuyishiya komakhelwane abaseduze." Uveze nokuthi indodakazi yakhe ibiyingane eziphaphele kodwa manje isihlale indwazile nje, kokunye ivele ikhale. “Iyona mpilo le ezomthetho ezifuna iphilwe abagilwa bokudlwengulwa nemindeni yabo? Kungani sibone sengathi umthetho ubeka phambili amalungelo abasolwa, bese awabagilwa uwashovela emuva?” usho kanje. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal uColonel Robert Netshiunda, uthe abaphenyi bophiko lweFamily Violence Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) eChatsworth, baavula icala lokudlwengula kulandela isigameko lapho okusolwa ukuthi intombazane (3) yadlwengulwa ngoSepthemba 4 nyakenye eZwelibomvu. “Icala lahoxiswa enkantolo,” kusho uNetshiunda.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IToyota Legend 55 eyokuvalelisa iHilux njengoba ngoJuni kulindeleke ukuthi kwethulwe entsha IMOTO: TOYOTA LEGEND 55 NGASO sonke isikhathi uma ngigudla ngaseningizimu yeTheku amehlo ami sengiwavula kakhulu uma sengingaseProspecton. Phela yilapho ifemu yakwaToyota South Africa Motors (Tsam) izinze khona. Yilapho futhi kukhiqizwa khona intandokazi yemoto eNingizimu Afrika, iHilux. Ngisho ngamabomu ukuthi yimoto hhayi iveni ngoba iHilux yodwa edayisa kakhulu okudlula zonke izimoto kuleli, hhayi kuphela amaveni. Ukuvula kwami amehlo mawala yingoba ngisuke ngithembe ukuthi kungenzeka ngizithele phezu kweHilux entsha osekubalwa izinyanga ukuthi iqale ukudayisa emagaraji. Ngempelasonto inhlanhla iwele ngakimi ngiyibona elolini kuN3 ngibuya emngcwabeni eMtshezi. Nokho ngiyibone kancane kwazise iloli belihamba ngangakwazi ukuba nesikhathi, ngabe ngikuchazela kangcono. Ngingakucebisa ukuthi ungalinge uyeke ukufunda le ngosi kwiSolezwe Ngempelasonto ngoba nakanjani ngoJuni uma seyethulwa sizobe sikhona bese sibuya nombiko ogcwele ngayo. Ngesikhathi isalindiwe, kwaToyota benze okuvame ukwenziwa ngamakholwa, okuwukulinda uMfundisi ngeculo. Iculo kulokhu yiLegend 55 okuyiyona ndlela kwaToyota abavalelisa ngayo iHilux eqale ukudayisa kuleli

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ka-1 Julayi njengenhlalayenza,” kusho uZondi. UMengameli wezwe, uMnuz Cyril Ramaphosa ethula inkulumo yokuvala ingqungquthela ye-ANC eLimpopo ngempelasonto, uxwayise ngobunzima obuzayo ngenxa yokunyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Uthe useyalele ongqongqoshe ukuthi babhekane nezingqinamba ezizodalwa ukwenyuka kukaphethroli nodizili. Ukunyuka kakhulu kukaphethroli kudalwe yizinxushunxushu eziqhubekayo eMiddle East, eziholele ekutheni kunyuke intengo kawoyela, kwase kudala ingcindezi emandleni erandi lakuleli. Uwoyela ongahluziwe unyuke usuka ku-$69 waya ngaphezuku kuka-$115, kanti amandla erandi lehle esuka kuR15,85 aya kuR17,00 uma liqhathaniswa neDollar laseMelika.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: bebanga iQuantum. Sekungumlando ukuthi lelo tekisi lagcina liwelele eNkandla, emuva kokunqotshwa wuLimit. Yize kwavela ukuthi uLimit wavotelwa kakhulu yizintokazi zaseLadies House (ikhasi elikwiFacebook) emuva kokuba uMenzi esolwe ngokweseka izinkulumo zikaTamara, kodwa uMenzi wathi ngamampunge lawo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, nango-2024 akubanga kuhle nakubalandeli bomculi waseMzimkhulu, uSolwazi, emuva kokuba iQuantum liwinwe wumculi wasoPhongolo, uGatsheni.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMCULI weGqom uSparks Wezinto ukhuza ubudlabha ebumnandini ngengoma yakhe ethi Idosha, ephuma ngenyanga ezayo UMA kusebumnandini, abantu bezijabulisa ngokudla nangeziphuzo - kugcina kuba khona abanye abeqiwa yinjabulo baze babe budlabha futhi benze nezinto ezithile ngendlela ekhomba ubunuku nokungazithandi. Wukuqaphela lokho ngempilo yasebumnandini okwenze umculi weGqom, uSparks Wezinto, wapheka ingoma yakhe ethi Idosha, apike kuyona u-Anele - nahlose ngayo ukwedlulisa umyalezo wokukhuza izenzo ezikhomba ukungazithandi kwabasuke bezijabulisa ezindaweni zobumnandi. Engxoxweni neSolezwe ngale ngoma ephuma ngoLwesibili lwangoMashi 3, nephrojuswe wuMagayise noZalo Beats, uSparks Wezinto uthe nakuba kuyingoma yomdanso futhi ezojuxuzisa abantu, kepha iqukethe umyalezo osemqoka abazowuthola kuyona. UMCULI weGqom uSparks Wezinto ukhuza ubudlabha ebumnandini ngengoma yakhe ethi Idosha, ephuma ngenyanga ezayo “Ngikhuza ngayo imikhuba emibi engivame ukuyibona yenziwa ngabantu ezindaweni zobumnandi, okuthi abantu behleli bezijabulela, umuntu usekhipha idosha elinoketshezi oluthile, akufake ngaphansi kolimi, abuye azoqhubeka azodla nathi khona lapho,” kusho uSparks Wezinto. Uthe ngalokhu akahlose kulwa nakugxeka muntu, kepha kuyindlela aqwashisa abantu

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: UMDLALI weBanyana Banyana, uJermaine Seoposenwe, ubhobonke ngokumenze waqoka ukuyeka ukudlalela leli qembu lesizwe. UJane umemezele ngaphambi kokuqala komqhudelwano weCaf Women's African Cup of Nations (Wafcon) ukuthi uzohoxa ekudlaleleni iBanyana emuva kawo. Kwenzeka lokhu nje, leli qembu eliqeqeshwa nguDesiree Ellis, lidlale iWafcon ngaphandle kwesinye sezithenjwa, uThembi Kgatlana, esicele ukuhoxa ngenxa yezizathu ezithinta sona. Ngaphambi kokuqala komqhudelwano, abadlali beBanyana batelekile bekhala ngokukweletwa imali yinhlangano eyengamele ibhola eMzansi, iSouth African Football Asscociation (Safa). Lokhu kuholele ekutheni umqhudelwano uqale sekumuncu nakubalandeli bebhola eMzansi. Abaningi bagxeka umengameli wayo, uDanny Jordan, ngokubhimba kwezinto kulo soseshini. USeoposenwe usibhale ekhasini lakhe le-Instagram isizathu esimenze waqoka ukushiya iqembu lesizwe. "Usoseshini, ukuqeqeshwa nesiko yikhona okwenza ngiphanyeke amakhokho emgibeni. Uma thina siyisizwe sithi siyalithanda ibhola ngendlela esisho ngayo, sinomthwalo wokuletha ushintsho. Ithemba lami wukuthi ukuhoxa kwami kuzoqala ingxoxo osekuneminyaka siyishaya indiva. Kodwa uma ingenzeki, sengikwenzile okungangami. Futhi ngizolwela ushintsho noma ngayiphi indlela ngoba isizukulwane esilandelayo kusifanele lokho. Njengoba abantu abangaphambi kwami

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ISITHENJWA seBafana Bafana uMbekezeli 'TLB' Mbokazi esikhuzwe ngumqeqeshi uHugo Broos ngomkhuba okufanele siwuyeke KUKHUZWE isilomo somdlali weBafana Bafana neChicago Fire FC yase-United States of America (USA), uMbekezeli “TLB” Mbokazi, ngomkhuba okuyiwona wodwa onamandla okuma phakathi kwaso nekusasa eliqhakazile emaligini athathwa njengamakhulu ebholeni lomhlaba. Lesi sexwayiso sikhishwe yinhloko yabaqeqeshi kwiBafana, uHugo Broos, ngesikhathi ikhuluma nabezindaba kulandela ukushayelwa kwayo ekhaya okokuqala kusukela yathatha lo msebenzi ngo-2021. IBafana ikhale ngaphansi ngo 2-1 kwiPanama e-DHL Stadium, eKapa, kodwa uMbokazi uyishayele elinye lamagoli amahle emlandweni waleli qembu lesizwe elilungiselela iNdebe yoMhlaba ezoqala ezinsukwini ezingaphansi kwezingu-75 eMexico, Canada nase-United States of America (USA). Nakuba uBroos ebephoxekile emuva kokuguqiswa yiPanama ngoLwesibili ebusuku, kodwa uveze okuningi akuchaze njegokumjabulisile njengendlela uMbokazi adlale ngayo. “Kukhona engingakuthandanga ngomdlalo kodwa okuningi kungiphendule imibuzo eminingi ebenginayo ekhanda,” kusho uBroos esithangamini nabezindaba. Lo mqeqeshi waseBelgium ubuzwe ngegoli likaMbokazi nendlela adlale ngayo kwazise wayemshiye ngaphandle kowokuqala owadlalelwa eMoses Mbhida Stadium, eThekwini. “UMbokazi uyaziwa ukuthi yisitobha

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: komhlaba nezinye izinhlelo ukuze bathole amanzi." Ezinye zalezi zindawo uthe ziseKZN wathi bakha ama-borehole angu-28, e-Eastern Cape bakha angu-14 kanjalo nakwezinye izindawo. Uveze ukuthi i-United Nations, iqoke elakuleli neFrance ukuthi ilungiselele ukubambisana kwesikasihlalo ngezithinta ukutshalwa kwemali kwingqalasizinda yamanzi engqungqutheleni ezoba ngoDisemba nonyaka. Ingqungquthela izobanjwa ngokubambisana i-United Arab Emirates neSenegal.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Yena-ke akazange athole namkhondo. Naye wabika emaphoyiseni kodwa icala laphelela emoyeni,” kubeka uCele. Uthe uma ekhumbula kahle, lesi yisigameko sesithathu esikhathini esingangezinyanga eziyisishiyagalombili. “Zibulawelwa endaweni eyodwa, nokwenza sicabange ukuthi amasela asicekela phansi abantu ababodwa,” kusho uCele, othe indlela okwenzeka ngayo babuye babe nakho ukusola ukuthi amasela kungenzeka kube abantu bendawo abasebenzisana nabokuhamba. Uthe lokhu bakusho ngoba abanazo izimpendulo zokuthi umuntu wokuhamba angaluthathaphi ulwazi lokuthi amadlelo endawo angakuphi. Unxuse amaphoyisa ukuthi alusukumele lolu daba ngoba nakuba omunye umuntu engayibuka incane into yokwebiwa kwemfuyo kodwa isuke iwudume lwengozi kubanikazi. Wenze umfanekiso ngaye, wathi lezi zinkomo ezebiwe zingabiza u-R120 000 uma zidayiswa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uCaptain Ntathu Ndlovu, uthe amaphoyisa aseMehlomnyama aphenya icala lokwebiwa kwemfuyo kulandela ukuthi kwebiwe izinkomo eziyisikhombisa eMawuleni. “Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa nomphakathi luholele eNdundumeni lapho okutholakale khona ukuthi izinkomo zihlinziwe, kwasala izimpondo namanqina kuphela,” kusho uCapt Ndlovu, othe akukabi bikho muntu oseboshiwe.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: madoda! Nesalukazi siyagiya lapho sikhona,'' kuphawula uVusi Leeuw. Abanye abakhombise ukujabula kubalwa kubo uDBN Gogo, DJ Tira, Benny Maverick, Malumz on Decks nabanye. Bobabili uDemor noShoba batshele leli phephandaba ukuthi abafuni ukuyikhulumela eziko okwamanje. Bathe konke kuzohlala obala ngesikhathi esifanele. IShana yahlangana ngesikhathi besafunda ndawonye eNatal Technikon esiyaziwa ngeDurban University of Technology (DUT). Basebenze nabaculi abaningi okubalwa kubo uBusi Mhlongo noLebo Mathosa abangasekho, Oskido, Christos. Kusuka iqembu lakhetha ukusebenza ngokuhlukana kwamalungu, uBlack Coffee udlondlobale wakhonya emazweni omhlaba. UShoba ukhiphe ama-albhamu ashise izikhotha njengoba manje esengenise nasemculweni we-Afro house ehambela amazwe omhlaba. UDemor naye ukhiphe ngokuzimela wavundulula nabaculi abaningi okubalwa kubo uSun El Musician nabanye.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: sizobika uma isifika. Enye engase itheleke yi-J8 SHS plug-in hybrid. Iyi-SUV enkulu alayisha abagibeli abayisikhombisa abahlala ezihlalweni eziyisikhumba. Esomshayeli isihlalo ngisizwe sintofontofo futhi besingiwotawota. Ngemuva nokho besithanda ukuqina mbijana. Kulesi sikhashana engizithole ngikuyo ibizwakala intofontofo kakhulu. Ine-sunroof, i-touchscreen infotainment system enkulu, ama-airbag angu-10 nezinsiza zomshayeli. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo esebenza nezikagesi ezintathu njengoba amandla ziwafaka kuwo wonke amasondo. Amandla lawa angu-395kW ne-torque engu-650Nm. Bathi uma ithangi likaphethroli elingu-70 litres nebhethri elingu-34.46kWh ligcwele ungahamba 1 400km.

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: So far, so good Umqeqeshi weKaizer Chiefs uNasreddine Nabi I-KAIZER Chiefs izoqala isizini yeBetway Premiership inengcindezi yokukhombisa abalandeli ukuthi ibhodwe ebeliphekwa ngesizini edlule, lesekwa ngezaba, selivuthiwe. Amakhosi aqoke ukuyolungiselela isizini entsha eNetherlands lapho edlale khona imidlalo yobungani eyisihlanu namaqembu ahlukene. Lokhu kusize leli qembu lahlanganisa abadlali abasha nabadala okulindeleke ukuthi bakhiphe inqanawe ezojabulisa izigidi zabalandeli beChiefs ngesizini entsha. Emasontweni adlule, abalandeli bathole ithuba lokubuka iqembu okokuqala ngesikhathi libhekene ne-Asante Kotoko yaseGhana emdlalweni weToyota Cup elihlulwe kuwona kumaphenathi eMoses Mabhida Stadium, eThekwini. Njengoba imidlalo yePremiership izoqala ngempelasonto, akubuzwa ukuthi abalandeli beChiefs babheke lukhulu kumqeqeshi, uNasreddine Nabi, okunomuzwa wokuthi bakulungele ukumnika elinye ithuba. Nokho kungenzeka futhi ukuthi umusa wabo uphele emuva kwemidlalo eyisihlanu ezoyidlala yonke kule nyanga okukhona kuyona ezowudlala neMamelodi Sundowns ngo-Agasti 27. Emidlalweni eyisihlanu yeligi yokuqala, Amakhosi azobhekana neStellenbosch (Agasti 10), Polokwane City (Agasti 13), Richards Bay (Agasti 19), Sundowns (Agasti 27) neLamontville Golden Arrows (Agasti 30). Le midlalo kungenzeka

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: USOMATEKISI uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni nasolwa nabo uMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza besenkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein “MINA ngiyinceku kaNkulukulu”, kusho uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni etshela abezindaba ukuthi umsulwa ngesikhathi evele enkantolo yeMantshi eKwaggafontein, eMpumalanga. USibanyoni uvele nabanye abasolwa okunguMvimbi Daniel Masilela noPhilemon Msiza ngamacala okuqola namabili okushushumbisa imali. Icala elibhekene nosomatekisi uJoe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni livele lashuba ngemuva kokuthi ummeli wakhe uShaun Abrahams SC owayeyisikhulu seNPA, esole uMbuso ngokungazimiseli ngesikhathi ufaka isicelo sokuhlehlisa inqubo yesicelo sebheyili. Abashushisi batshele inkantolo ukuthi uphenyo lusaqhubeka futhi kusadingeka isikhathi sokuqoqa ubufakazi. UMbuso uphinde waveza ukuthi isicelo sebheyili singase singaqhubeki ngoba imantshi obekulindeleke ukuthi ilalele lolu daba ibingakatholakali. U-Abrahams ukuphikisile lokhu wathi uMbuso uhlulekile ukuzilungiselela ngendlela yize uphenyo seludonse isikhathi eside. U-Abrahams uphinde waqondisa abashushisi enkantolo, wathi lolu daba lungaphansi kwesigaba 5 hhayi u-6 we-Criminal Procedure Act. UMbuso uphinde wagxekwa ngokungabanikezi abameli babasolwa uhlu lwamacala Imantshi u-J.T. Erasmus ibuze abashushisi ukuthi ngabe uhlu lwamacala ludluliselwe yini ku-Abrahams. UMbuso uvumile

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: u-Andile Ndabezitha Zulu, Gezani Dludla, nabaculi bakamaskandi oGqizile Khanyile noSaliwa Ndunakazi. UMBHALI wezincwadi uLungisani Mavundla kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Emcimbini bazobe bengahambi bodwa njengoba kukhona izihambeli eziyokwethula izeluleko ezethamelini okukhona kuzona umbhali wezincwadi uLungisani Mavundla, Nkosikhona “Phakel’ Umthakathi” Ndabandaba, umsakazi woKhozi FM uKhathide “Tshathugodo” Ngobe nabaculi bakamaskandi oGadla Nxumalo noThokozani Langa. “Sizonika amadoda ithuba lokuthi abhoboke ngakho konke okuwahluphayo bese sibonisana futhi ngokuthi yikuphi okumele ukuthi kwenziwe ukuze kunqotshwe konke okwenza ukuthi abe negama elibi emphakathini ngenxa yokubandakanyeka ezintweni ezingezinhle. Sizogcizelela nobumqoka bemfundo ekugwemeni okungalungile,” kusho yena. UPHAKEL' UMTHAKATHI kwabazobe bekhona embuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference Udalule nokuthi kulo mcimbi balindele izethameli eziphakathi kuka-150 kuya ku-200, nokuthi bameme abaNtwana baseNdlunkulu kaZulu ukuthi bezozizwela mathupha izinto ezikhalisa amadoda ngenhloso yokuthi zizwakale bese kubonakala ukuthi zingasonjululwa kanjani. UMCULI kamaskandi uGadla Nxumalo kwabazobe besembuthanweni wabesilisa Isigungu Samadoda Live Men's Conference

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: umgilwa (20) ekhaya lakhe, uphinde wamdlwengula okwesibili sekufikwe eMelmoth. Uthe emva kokumdlwengula isibili, ube esefuna ngodli imininingwane yabagilwa abathathu yasebhange nezinombolo zakhona eziyimfihlo. “Emva kokuthola le mininingwane, babe sebebadubula bebabulala bobathathu. Laba abanye abagilwa abane, bona bagwazwe, baze bafa,” kusho uNetshiunda. Uthe uphenyo lwamaphoyisa luveze ukuthi ngoLwesibili ebusuku kanjalo nangoLwesithathu ekuseni, kube nemali ekhishwe emabhange abagilwa izikhawu eziningi. UKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Mkhwanazi, uwashayele ihlombe amaphoyisa ngokusheshe ababophe abasolwa. Ube eseyalela abaphenyi ukuthi baqinisekise ukuthi ubulungiswa buyenzeka ukuze izihlobo zabagilwa zizothobeka amanxeba. Uthe kuyakhathaza ukuzwa ukuthi omunye wabasolwa ubeqashwe abagilwa. “Siyabanxusa abaqashi ukuthi abazikhathaze ngokuthola ulwazi ngomuntu abamqashayo, baphinde bayihlole indlela yabo yokuziphatha esolisayo,” kusho uMkhwanazi. Uthe imvamisa, ezindaweni ezingamapulazi noma ezithe qekelele, amacala enziwa ngabantu ngabagilwa ababaziyo noma abasondelene nabo.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kuthunjwe osanda kuthola ekaRAF Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal ahlenge owesifazane owayethunjwe kanye nabanye abayisikhombisa ekhaya labo eChappies Section, eMandeville, eSundumbili, ngamadoda angaziwa ezintatha zangoLwesihlanu, 15 Meyi 2026. Izisulu eziyisikhombisa kubikwa ukuthi zidedelwe KwaDabeka ngemuva kwesikhashana, nokho owesifazane, osanda kuthola imali yakhe ye-Road Accident Fund (RAF), uyiswe endaweni engaziwa. Ithimba leProvincial Tracking Team lisebenze ngokuzikhandla lathola imoto eyodwa kwezimbili ezasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kuthunjwa, abopha abasolwa abathathu. Uphenyo luholele amaphoyisa ePhoenix lapho isisulu, esiseminyakeni yo-30 ubudala, sitholakale singenamyocu. Amaphoyisa anxusa abahlomuli be-RAF ukuthi bangazidaluli izinkokhelo zabo noma baziqhayise ngale mali. Abasolwa bazamile ukukhipha imali kaningi kodwa kwanhlanga zimuka nomoya, kodwa bakwazile ukuthenga ngemali elinganiselwa ku-R30 000. Abasolwa ababoshiwe bazovela enkantolo maduze. Kusathungathwa abanye abasolwa.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ICHANGAN Uni-S yiSUV yemindeni engase ehehe abaningi ngendlela ebukeka ngayo INKAMPANI yaseChina, iChangan Motors, izethule ngokusemthethweni eNingizimu Afrika ekupheleni kuka-2025 ngezimoto ezine esizilamanise ngentsha i-Uni-S abanethemba elikhulu ngayo. Izimoto zakwaChangan zilethwa kuleli yiJameel Motors South Africa. Isikhulu seJameel, uMarinus Venter, sithe njengoba sebefikile emakethe yakuleli sekuyisikhathi sokudlondlobala. Uthe isibalo samagaraji adayisa izimoto zabo angu-20 kuzophela unyaka sesidlule kancane kuka-40. Ukukhula kwabo bazimisele ukuthi kuholwe phambili yi Uni-S abayibona njengemoto ebalulekile ezobadobela amakhasimende amasha. I-Uni-S yiSUV abathi izoba yimbangi enkulu yeHaval Jolion. Babala ne-VW Tiguan, Chery Tiggo 7 Pro nezinye. Abathanda imoto ebukekayo baningi abazothatheka ngoba yinhle ngaphandle. Le SUV ifika ihlukene ngezinhlobo ezintathu okuyiCS, CL neCE. Kuya ngenhlobo yakho kodwa amarimu aphakathi kuka-18 inch no-19 inch. Konke kwenziwa kwi-touchscreen infotainment system kwiChangan Uni-S njengoba ingenawo amabhathini Ngaphambili alambu angamaLED futhi kuneligudla kwi-grille ephicwe kahle liwahlanganise. Yinto efanayo nangemuva lapho kunelambu elikhanya lize liyoshaya kolunye uhlangothi kuze kukhanye nophawu lwayo. Ngaphakathi

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMQEQESHI wamaBhokobhoko esifazane uSwys de Bruin ozwakalise injabulo enkulu ngokuziklaya phakathi izikwati KUXUTSHWE abadlali abanesipiliyoni nabasafika ezingeni lomhlaba esikwatini samaBhokobhoko esifazane esimelwe yijoka lokuvikela isicoco se-Rugby Africa Woman’s Cup emqhudelwaneni ozobanjelwa ekomkhulu laseKenya, iNairobi, kusukela ngoMgqibelo kuya kuMeyi 31. Kulo mqhudelwano amaBhokobhoko esifazane ahamba noLaurian Johannes-Haupt noFranzel September abangamaphini enhloko yabaqeqeshi uSwys de Bruin. Leli qembu laseMzansi kulokhu liqhathwe neMadagascar, Uganda nosokhaya iKenya. Lizoqala ngeMadagascar (ngoMgqibelo), Uganda (Meyi 27) bese livala ngosokhaya (Meyi 31). Yonke le midlalo izogijinyelwa e-RFUEA Grounds ekuNgong Road, eNairobi. Ngonyaka odlule kuwona lo mqhudelwano eMadagascar, iNingizimu Afrika ikhale yemuka naso isicoco okuyinto elindelekile nakulokhu. Iqembu lakuleli lizoholwa ngu-Anathi Qolo ongukaputeni. UQolo ungomunye wabadlali abaningi abakulesi sikwati ababekhona kwiNdebe yoMhlaba yombhoxo yabesifazane ebise-England ngonyaka odlule. Lo kaputeni udlale kahle kule sizini ehola amaBlue Bulls Daisies ngesikhathi edla isicoco sePick N Pay Woman’s Super League okwehlandla lesine amasizini elandelana. Kulesi sikwati kuxutshwe nabadlali abake badlala kumaBhokobhoko esifazane phambilini

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YIZE amaMetro FM Music Awards abese-ICC Arena eThekwini ngoMgqibelo owedlule kodwa nanamhlanje asesematheni. Kunamaciko ahlulwe maqede adubela kwamanye anqobile. Omunye wawo, umculi we-Afro pop uNaledi Aphiwe, obhodlele kwiLadysmith Black Mambazo emuva kokuhlulwa kwiBest African Pop. Ubhuqe aMambazo ngokuthi uyawahalalisela ngokuvotelwa yizalukazi esezalala emathuneni maqede wabuza ukuthi ayini aMambazo. Ugxekwe kakhulu uNaledi ngokudelela izingwazi ezinezindondo zamaGrammy ezinhlanu futhi eziwuzungezile umhlaba. Yize kunjalo, uNhlamulo "Nota" Baloyi, onamagalelo namava emculweni wakuleli, uthe uyazwelana noNaledi Aphiwe ngoba usebenze ngokuzikhandla, ekhankasa ezindaweni eziningi kodwa wagcina engalibonanga elidlalayo. Nomculi wamapiano ne-3 Step, uZee Nxumalo, ukhale kakhulu ngokuhlulwa eminxeni eyisikhombisa. Ekhuluma kwiPodcast and Chill with MacG, uZee uthe uphethwe yikhanda ngenxa yokuhlulwa kuma-awards. Abantu bazwelane noZee bethi bekumfanele ukumuka nendondo yeBest Artist of the Year, okuwunklomelo othathwe uzakwabo uCiza. Umculi wamapiano futhi obengumsakazi weKaya FM ne-YFM, uSol Phenduka, uthe bekungafanele kuwine uCiza ngenxa yokuthi ubedume ngengoma eyodwa ethi Isaka. NoMacGyver "MacG" Mukwevho unuke uCiza ngokuthi uyithengile le

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: lihlehliselwe uLwesine. UMkhwanazi watholwa nezinhlamvu zesibhamu ngesikhathi eboshwa. UMkhwanazi usolwa ngokusondelana nosomabhizinisi obhekene noxhaxha lwamacala, uMnuz Vusumuzi 'Cat' Matlala. Khonamanjalo: Iphoyisa elisolwa ngokusondelana noMatlala, uSergeant Fannie Nkosi, liqhubekile nokufaka isicelo sebheyili, izolo. UNkosi uboshelwe icala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho nokuphula imigomo yokugcinwa kwezibhamu. Isinqumo esicelweni sakhe sebheyili sizokhishwa kusasa.Naye uMatlala uvele kafushane enkantolo izolo, lapho kunqunywe khona ukuthi asuswe ejele eliKwaZulu-Natal, iBongweni, ayogcinwa eKgosi Mampuru.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhetho oMnuz Mosotho Moepya noGlen Mashinini zineSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini oPhogolo ngoLwesibili IZIKHULU zeKhomishini yezoKhethozihambele esigodlweni saseMashobeni, oPhongolo ngoLwesibili, ziyohlangana neSilo uMisuzulu kaZwelithini ISILO samaZulu uMisuzulu Sinqobile kaZwelithini, sigqugquzele abantu ikakhulu intsha ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota okhethweni oluzayo. IMbube ithe yeseka umsebenzi weKhomishini yoKhetho kuleli, esemkhankasweni wokukhuthaza abantu ukuthi babhalisele ukuvota okhethweni lohulumeni basekhaya. Sikusho lokhu emuva kokuhlangana nezikhulu zekhomishini, esigodlweni eMashobeni, oPhongolo ngoLwesibili. Okhulumela ihhovisi leSilo, uMntwana Thulani Zulu, uthe iMbube iweseka ngokugcwele umsebenzi wekhomishini njengoba kuza ukhetho. "IMbube igqugquzele abantu ikakhulu intsha ukuthi ibhalise ukuze ivote. Inxuse intsha ukuthi ikwenze lokhu ngokuthula," kusho uMntwana Thulani. Uthe izikhulu zekhomishini zisemkhankasweni wokuhambela izinhlaka zobuholi bomdabu njengoba kuzoba nokhetho. "Ithimba labekhomishini lenabe ngezinhlelo zokhetho okubalwa namalungiselelo alo. Likhulume nangomkhankaso wokufundisa abantu ngokuvota." Uthe kubhungwe nangombiko wakamuva oveze ukuthi abantu baKwaZulu-Natal, bamanqika ukuthi bavote ngoba sebelahle ithemba kuhulumeni. Kuzokhumbuleka ukuthi lo mbiko waveza ukuthi abantu bakulesi sifundazwe sebelahle ithemba kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: kwengane? Livele lakhomba umelaphi oyinyanga futhi onesonto,” kusho umakhosi. Uqhube wathi emva kokuba ligonyuluke ngokuthi layithatha ingane layihambisa kuye emva kokuthi eliyalele ukuthi liyilethe, ube esethathwa ngamaphoyisa ahamba naye. “Abuye amdedela, ethi abukho ubufakazi obuphathekayo ngokuthi uyazana nokulahleka kwengane. Yilapho-ke umphakathi ovele washisa imizi yakhe emine ezindaweni ezehlukene. Umphakarthi odiniwe ubuye washisa eminye imizi yabanye abelaphi, uthi awusabadingi endaweni ngoba bangababulali,” usho kanje. Utshele Isolezwe ukuthi ilokhu iqhubeke njalo imibhikisho yomphakathi lapho ucula khona amaculo athi: “Phansi ngabelaphi bendabuko phansi!” “Sihleli lubhojozi. Asazi nokuthi senzenjani ngoba uma sicela umasipala ukuthi usilekelele sibe nomhlangano nabo bonke abelaphi kanjalo nomphakathi, usishaya indiva. Ngapha namaphoyisa awavumi ukusivulela amacala okuthi siyasatshiswa futhi sishiselwa nemizi,” kuchaza umakhosi. Usole amaphoyisa adedele umelaphi obese ekhonjwe yiphara, wathi bekufanele aqhubeke nokumhloma ngemibuzo kuze kuvele iqiniso. “Kunokuthi bamgcine, bavele bamdedela. Bangagcina lapho, baphinde bamlekelela ukuthi abaleke njengoba bemphelezele waya endaweni esingayazi, lapho okuthiwa uzophepha khona,” kusho umakhosi okhale ngokuthi

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: noma wayengaphansi kwengcindezi,” kusho uLongwe. Ngo-Okthoba 2023, iJaji uRatha Mokgoatlheng lanquma ukuthi inkulumo eqoshiwe, ngeke yamukelwe njengobufakazi obuphathekayo enkantolo yomthetho. ULongwe uthe okuqukethwe kule nkulumo, yikho kanye okufanele kulalelwe uNkk Meyiwa, wathi kubalulekile ukuthi athole ubulungiswa ngokubulawa kwendodana yakhe. Ubuye wasola kakhulu umfowabo kaSenzo, uMnuz Sfiso Meyiwa kanjalo nabanye ngokuthi uma uNkk Meyiwa ezoqhubeka abalalele, akahlukene nomuntu ovimbela ubulungiswa ngomufi. Uthe ngesikhathi ijaji linquma ukuthi le nkulumo eqoshiwe ayingalalelwa enkantolo, uSfiso omunye wabantu abakhombisa ukukuthakasela lokho. “Zibuze umbuzo wokuthi uma labo abakukakile, okukhona kubo nendodana yakho, bethi balwela ubulungiswa, kungani bajabula uma ijaji linquma ukuthi ubufakazi obubalulekile kangaka bungamukelwa enkantolo? Kungani abantu abathi balwela ubulungiswa bebhiyozela ukufihlwa kobufakazi?” kusho uLongwe. Ethintwa uSfiso, uthe ubengakaze ayibone noma ezwe ngencwadi. Elinye ilungu lomndeni okuthiwa lihlala nonina kaMeyiwa kodwa elithintwe lingekho ekhaya, lithe nabo bebengakezwa lutho ngale ncwadi.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMONNAPULE Saleng ongomunye wabadlali beMamelodi Sundowns abalokhu beqhubeka nokuzifaka enhliziyweni yomqeqeshi uMiguel Cardoso UKUFIKA kuzwakale kwiMamelodi Sundowns kwabadlali ababili abasayine kuyona ngoJanuwari, uMonnapule Saleng noKhulumani Ndamane, kumphathisa ngekhanda umqeqeshi wayo, uMiguel Cardoso, kwazise usebhekene nesimo esimphoqa ukuba athathe izinqumo ezishiya abanye abadlali bakhe bedangele. ISundowns ibuyele esicongweni seBetway Premiership ngokunqoba kwiMarumo Gallants phakathi nesonto. AmaBrazilians asewine imidlalo eyisishiyagalombili yeligi ilandelana. Ngenxa yefomu yakamuva yeSundowns, kunabalandeli abakholelwa ekutheni kalisekho iqembu elizoyivimba ekutheni isidle ihlandla lesishiyagalolunye kulandelana isicoco seligi. Kule midlalo eyiwine ilandelana, ishaye amagoli angu-17, yangenelwa ngamane kuphela. NgokukaCardoso, uSaleng noNdamane abafike kwiSundowns ngoJanuwari, sebephenduke izinsika okuyinto eholele ekutheni ahluleke ukubashiya ngaphandle esikimini njengoba besembangweni wesicoco seligi oshisa phansi ne-Orlando Pirates. Nakuba uSaleng, obebolekiswe yiPirates kwi-Orbit College, engakafiki efomini aziwa ngayo kodwa kule midlalo embalwa aseyidlalele iSundowns kwiligi nakwiCaf Champions League kucacele wonke umuntu ukuthi uzoba yinkinga kakhulu uma esengene ngokugcwele egiyeni. “Nsukuzonke sifunda okusha ngoSaleng, nathi simgxisha konke okufanele akwazi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: mcimbi kuzobe kutholakala nencwadi yawo lo mdlalo, esikwenzele ukuthi kube lula ukuqonda indikimba yawo ebantiwni abakhonze ukulandela imisebenzi yokubuciko ngokufunda izincwadi,” usho kanje. AMAZWIBELA okunye okuzokwenzeka emdlalweni weshashalazi kaThobani Nzuza osihloko sithi, Boy Ntulikazi, akhuza ngawo ibuya nazolingisa kuwo ngakubo eThekwini ngenyanga ezayo Eqhuba uthe lo mdlalo uqukethe indikimba ngokwenza ukuthi abantu abasha bangene ebugebengwini nokwenza ukuthi bakhulelwe besebancane. “Kukhona futhi uhlangothi lwendaba oluveza ukuthi ukucwasa ngokwebala kuba nomthelela omubi kangakanani emuntwini, okuwuhlangothi oluvezwe kakhulu wuKagiso ngoba yena ukhulele eKimberly, eNorthern Cape, ngakho izimo zokucwasana ngokwebala uzibone eduze, mina ngigqamisa engikubone elokishini ngoba ngikhulele eMlaza,” kusho uThobani. Udalule nokuthi uzolingisa izindawo zabalingisi abawu-11 bomdlalo eyedwa, bese elekelelwa wumculi uHloniphani Art, ozobe ecula futhi edlala nesiginci kube kuqhubeka umdlalo. NgoMeyi 1 no-2 lo mdlalo uzokhonjiswa ngo-7 kusihlwa, bese kuthi ngoMeyi 3 ukhonjiswe ngo-3 ntambama. Amathikithi okuwubuka abiza u-R200 eComputicket, eShoprite naseCheckers - kanti nencwadi yawo izobe itholakala emcimbini ngawo uR200 iyinye.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano lwe-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi SEKUYISIKHATHI eside i-University of KwaZulu-Natal (UKZN) ilokhu ingesinye sezikhungo ezihlale zenza imicimbi yokuthweswa izitshudeni iziqu, okuwuphawu lokuzihlonipha nokuzibongela ngenxa yomsebenzi wazo omuhle wemfundo emikhakheni eyehlukene. Omunye walabo abahlale beseqhulwini futhi bezikhandlela ukuqinisekisa ukuthi konke kuhamba ngohlelo kuleyo micimbi wuDkt Normah Zondo, uMqondisi jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN osebenzisana nehhovisi lomphathi wenyuvesi ukwenza lokho. Nokho wenze okuhlukile kulokhu, njengoba kuthe kuklonyeliswa izitshudeni nezifundiswa emikhakheni eyehlukene naye wabizwa kwizifundiswa ezithweswe iziqu zobodokotela, athi kukhuthazwe yigebe alibone phakathi kwabasebenzi benyuvesi nezitshudeni. UDkt Zondo uthe ucwaningo lwakhe belubheka ukungena nokuphuma kwezitshudeni emanyuvesi, kusuka ngenkathi zifika zizokwenza unyaka wokuqala kuze kufike esiphethweni sohambo lwemfundo yazo ngokwehlukana kwemikhakha yazo. UMQONDISI jikelele woPhiko lwezobuDlelwano kwezeBhizinisi e-UKZN), uDkt Normah Zondo, ethweswa iziqu zobudokotela aziphothule kuyo le nyuvesi “Ngaphambi kokuthi zihambe, izitshudeni zincika kwabenyuvesi ukubhekena nezifundo zazo. Nokho uma sezingasekho emanyuvesi, zibhekana nenkinga yengcindezi

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: ukuthi lo thisha ufundisa kabuhlungu ngoba uyamsaba lo mfundi, okuthiwa usevele wamila izimpiko kakhulu njengoba elekelelwe yileli qembu ukuthi abuye ngenkani esikoleni,” usho kanje. Uthe kwesasePhoenix, abathole kuso umfundi ephethe ummese, bathe uma bembuza, wathi ubezowusebenzisa ukuzivikela njengoba exabane nomunye umfundi waseNanda, omsabise ngokuthi uzobiza igenge yakhe izomfundisa isifundo. Uveze ukuthi bayakholelwa ukuthi njengoba benza le mikhankaso nje, izothela izithelo ezinhle ekuncishisweni kobugebengu njengoba iTheku linenkinga yezingane ezijoyina amaqembu emigulukudu zincane, bese zenza ubugebengu obunyantisa igazi. “Uma bazi ukuthi laba omalume bavele bafike esikoleni kungazelelwe, baseshe izikhwama, bazoba novalo lokuphatha izikhali nezidakamizwa esikoleni. Uma impi yobugebengu siyilwa nasezikoleni, umphumela wakhona uzobonakala nasemphakathini,” usho kanje. Uthe baye bakhethe izikole okuthiwa zinabafundi abangezwa, baye kuzo, wathi nokho emva kokuqala kwabo umkhankaso ngoJanuwari, bayazithola izicelo nakothishanhloko bezikole, ukuthi abeze ngoba sikhulu isidingo. Ubalule ukuthi njengoba besahambele inyakatho yeTheku kuphela okwamanje, basezinhlelweni zokusabalala nakwamanye amalokishi abangakafiki kuwona.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UWILSON B Nkosi oqeda iminyaka ewu-40 esakaza NJENGOBA iMetro FM igubha iminyaka ewu-40 yasungulwa, i-SABC izochoma uphaphe lwegwalagwala oyingqalabutho kulo msakazo uWilson Bafana Nkosi. Nale ngwazi, esakaza uhlelo lwangeSonto iSounds And Stuff Like That phakathi kuka-9 ekuseni no-12 emini, iqeda iminyaka ewu-40 iyibambile insimbi ishisa ekusakazeni kusukela ngoSepthemba 1, 1986. UWilson B (58), owazalelwa ePiet Retief, eMpumalanga kodwa wakhulela eSwatini. Uzohlonishwa ngokuthi kusakazwe umlando ngempilo yakhe. Uthe lelo qophamlando lizobe liveza okuningi obekungaziwa ngaye. "Abantu abaningi bebehlale befuna ukwazi ngami njengokuthi ngabe nginazo yini izingane, unkosikazi nabazali." UWilson B uthe waqala ukuba nothando lokusakaza esemncane kangangoba waqala ukufaka isicelo somsebenzi kwiSABC eseneminyaka ewu-17. Uthe ngo-1985 esefunda uGrade 12 wabuye wafaka isicelo kwiSABC efuna ukusebenzela umsakazo osuwavalwa iRadio Springbok. Uthe owayeyimenenja Jikelele yakwa-SABC ngaleso sikhathi, uTess Louwe, wathi bayasizwa isicelo sakhe kodwa akathi ukulinda ngoba kunomsakazo abazowuvula iRadio Metro. Nebala ngonyaka olandelayo wabizelwa kwinhlolokhono. Sekungumlando ukuthi uWilson B wabe eseqashwa ukuba

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe INSEPHE ye-long jump, uLuvo Manyonga, obuye ngomfutho kwi-long jump ngemuva kokumiswa iminyaka emine ngenxa yokusebenzisa izidakamizwa, udle umhlanganiso kwi-long jump kwi-ASA Track and Field National Championship, eStellenbosch USELUBALUBELA ukuyoyibamba kuma-Commonwealth Games, uLuvo Manyonga, kulandela ukuhlabana ngesicoco sikazwelonke kwi-long jump emqhudelwaneni we-Athletics South Africa (ASA) Senior Track and Field National Championships ngempelasonto, eStellenboch. UManyonga (35) uwine isicoco kuma-ASA Championships ngo-8.04 metres leap kwi-long jump, obekungokokuqala kusukela ngo-2019, egcina ukuthola impumelelo yalolu hlobo kwi-long jump. Ukuphumelela ngale ndlela kwale nsempe edabuka eMbekweni, eWestern Cape, kuyinkomba yokukhuza kwayo ibuya sekungatshazwa, kwazise ibuya esigwebeni seminyaka emine sokumiswa ekubambeni iqhaza kwezokugijima ngenxa yokusebenzisa izidakamizwa. Ngemuva kokuphela kwesigwebo sakhe ngo-2024, ubonakale okokuqala emqhudelwaneni wamazwe ngamazwe i-World Athletics Indoor Championships ebisePoland, ngoMashi. Waba ngumpetha womhlaba kwi-long jump ngo-2010, edla umhlanganiso kwi-World Junior Championships, eCanada. Wenza esifanayo nango-2011, edla umhlanganiso kwi-All Africa Games eMozambique, walandela ngokuba yingqwele kwi-World Championships ngo-2017, e-England. Waphinda wahlabana kuma-Commonwealth Games, e-Australia, ngo-2018.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Imoto okutholakale kuyo umsolwa edindilizile Utholakale edindilizilw emotweni umsolwa ozilimaze ehlomisa iziqhumane ngesikhathi kugetshengwa imali enkabeni yedolobha laseKranskop ngoMsombuluko, 13 Ephreli 2026. Lo mlisa utholakale eshonile emotweni ebisetshenziswa ebugebengwini emgwaqeni owubhuqu ngaseTugela River, obheke eNkandla ngoLwesibili, 14 Ephreli 2026. Imoto yemali ibanjwe ntambama kwathathwa imali engadalulwanga kanti onogada abathathu kubikwa ukuthi baphucwe izibhamu. Kubikwa ukuthi kuphinde kwadunwa izimoto ezine ezisetshenziswe abasolwa ukubalekela. Abasolwa baphinde badubula bebhekise esiteshini samaphoyisa ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi, nokho alikho iphoyisa noma ilungu elilimale. Umkhankaso wokuthungatha abanye abasolwa, okukholakala ukuthi okungenani bangu-12, uyaqhubeka.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weKaizer Chiefs u-Etiosa Ighodaro eziqeqesha naleli qembu kule sizini UKUVELA kwezindaba zokuthi useluleme ngokugcwele umgadli weKaizer Chiefs, u-Etiosa Ighodaro, akugcini ngokuqinisa leli qembu lapho lintenga khona kepha kumnika ithuba lokugwema umlando wokuba nesizini embi kunawo wonke kusukela aqala ukudlala kwiPremier Soccer League (PSL). Ngesikhathi iChiefs isayinisa lo mgadli waseNigeria oneminyaka engu-24 ubudala ngo-Agasti nyakenye, belilikhulu isasasa kubalandeli kwazise bekubhekwe ukuthi axazulule inkinga yokushaywa kwamagoli kuMakhosi esinekhathi iwakhubaza. Akuzange kuhambe ngendlela okwakuhlelwe ngayo nokho ngoba u-Ighodaro ulimale esanda efika kuMakhosi, wahlala ngaphandle izinyanga ezimbili zokuqala zesizini. Lo mgadli ubonakale okokuqala edlubhe umfaniswano weChiefs ngasekupheleni kuka-Okthoba nyakenye emdlalweni weBetway Premiership bebhekene neSiwelele FC. Ushaye igoli lakhe lokuqala kwiChiefs ngesikhathi inqoba ngo 3-1 kwi-AS Simba yaseDemocratic of Congo (DRC) emdlalweni weCaf Confederation Cup. Kuvele izindaba zokuthi u-Ighodaro ubonakele eziqeqesha ngokugcwele nozakwabo kuleli sonto. Lokhu kusho ukuthi sekuseduzane abuyele enkundleni. Lo mgadli, owafika eMzansi ezodlalela iMamelodi Sundowns, usalelwe yimidlalo engu-11 ukuba agweme irekhodi

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: IZIKHULU zeKaizer Chiefs zibambe umoya ngokulunga kwamaphepha omdlali omusha, uSiphesihle Ndlovu, okuvela ukuthi uzanyelwa ukuthi ajoyine leli qembu eNetherlands, lapho lizicijela khona ukuqala kwesizini entsha yeBetway Premiership. UNdlovu oyibamba enkabeni yenkundla, umenyezelwe yiChiefs njengomdlali wayo omusha ngempelasonto edlule. Uphelelwe yinkontileka kwiSuperSport United esidayisiwe. Lo mdlali wazakhela igama esayibamba kwiMaritzburg United (esiyiDurban City), ngaphambi kokudlulela kwi-Orlando Pirates emshovele kuMatsatsantsa. UNdlovu uvumelene neChiefs seziqedwe zonke izinhlelo zohambo lwaphesheya kwezilwandle, usalile waziqeqesha nabanye abadlali eNaturena okubalwa kubona ukaputeni uYusuf Maart ofunwa yiqembu lase-Austria, iSV Reid. Abanye ngo-Edison Castilo okusabalele ukuthi uzochithwa, Tebogo Potsane, Rushwin Dortley, Paseka Mako nabanye. Baziqeqesha ngaphansi kweso elibukhali labaqeqeshi okukhona kubona uDillon Sheppard owine isicoco seligi neqembu leDStv Diski Challenge ngesizini edlule. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi nakuba ikhempu isiphakathi kodwa iChiefs izama ngakho konke ukuthi iphele esefikile uNdlovu. Amakhosi kulindeleke ukuthi abuye eMzansi ngoJulayi 19, esedlale imidlalo eyisihlanu yokuziqeqesha namaqembu ahlukene. Kowokuqala ahlulwe yiVitesse ngo 2-1. Namuhla azobhekana ne-Utrecht FC

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: naye uSathane, sengidavuza kwenye indawo kodwa uNkulunkulu wanginikeza ithuba lesibili," kusho uBuyile othe uthando lukaNkulunkulu lwehlela kumkakhe owamxolela emaphutheni akhe. Eqhuba uBuyile uthe ukwamukela uJesu njengoMsindisi kwamsiza nasekukhuzeni ibuya emkhakheni wokulingisa ayesewudubile. "Konke osekwenzeka empilweni yami, akukhona ukuhlakanipha kwami kodwa kungumusa kaNkulunkulu." Uthe ukube uJesu akekho empilweni yakhe mhlawumbe ngabe ubhukuda esonweni. UBuyile uthe kwamsiza ukwethula uhlelo lwezenkolo kwi-SABC 1 i-Spirit Sundae ngamaSonto, ngoba wagcina eseqonda zonke izinkolo ezikhona kuleli. Mayelana nomsindo wakamuva nomthetho ohlongozwayo wokulawula amabandla ezenkolo, uthe yena uyahambisana nokulawulwa kwamabandla wuhulumeni ngoba kusho ukuthi asekhokha intela futhi kube nokuhleleka. Le nsizwa edabuka eMnambithi, ilingisa indawo kaphrojusa womculo wokholo oyisikhohlakali, ohamba ebhabhabala nabaculi bakhe kangangoba ugcine esebhangqe izingane zandawonye. UGigaba ubuye wadayisa lezi zingane ukuba zilale nosomabhizinisi ukuze yena azuze umnotho. Ngaphandle kwe-Genesis, uBuyile uke walingisa kwi-Hardcopy, Izingane Zobaba nakuMuvhango. Nasekwethuleni izinhlelo ngeke wamthinta njengoba esebuya kwi-Electric Workshop, Live Lotto Draw ne-Quizmaster of the Sports Soccer Challenge. *I-Genesis

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: u-R2 ukuthi ayozithengela ama-chips esitolo, yena waqhubeka nenye indlela. Kuthiwa umgilwa wacingwa yonke indawo, engatholakali, kwaze kwabikelwa amaphoyisa. Kuvela ukuthi watholwa esesesibhedlela iVictoria Mxenge (King Edward), enenkebenkebe yengozi ebusweni. Kwavela ukuthi uSduduzo, owayekade esiza ngesikhathi kucingwa umgilwa nawo wonke umuntu, wuye owayemyengele ehlathini, lapho afika khona wamlimaza ngesikhali esithize, wamshiya ezitshela ukuthi ufile. Kuthiwa umgilwa waphaphama sekuhwalele, wagaqa, waze wayofika emgwaqweni okuyilapho athathwa khona abantu angabazi, bamphuthumisa esibhedlela. Zabe sezimkhalela ummangalelwa, umgilwa etshela amaphoyisa nezihlobo ukuthi uSduduzo omlimazile, ngelithi ufuna ukufundisa uyise isifundo. Emva kokugwetshwa kukaSduduzo, uyise kamgilwa utshele Isolezwe ukuthi umfowabo wayethi uzwisa yena ubuhlungu ngokuzama ukubulala indodana yakhe kwazise wayemkweleta imali. Uveze ukuthi yayila ku-R32 000 imali ayemkweleta yona umfowabo emalini eyayinguR61 000 ayemboleke yona ngasekuqaleni kuka-2022. “Wayephunyelwe yimali yesibili, kulandela ukushona kukanina ngo-2014. Sakhuluma, savumelana ngokuthi angiboleke uR50 000, engangizogcwalisela phezu kwawo ngithenge imoto yokwenza umsebenzi we-Uber. Wagcina engiboleka uR61 000, okwathi emva kokungifakela ebhange, washintsha, watshela

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ukuthi ngeke ngiphinde ngizibandakanye nokulingisa. Angiphathekanga kahle esiqeshini socansi." ULondie London uthe wabona ngalolo suku ukuthi kungani abanye abalingisi begcina sebethandana. Uthe nakuba agcina esemthanda umfana ngoba wayebaba kodwa wanqandwa wukuthi wayenguBen 10. "Yena wayebaba, sasingaqhubeka sijole ukuba wayengeyona ingane. Kimi uma umfana ngimdlula ngeminyaka emibili nemithathu, usuke eyingane. Yize kunjalo kodwa umfana wayeyenza into yakhe." ULondie London ungumculi owazakhela udumo ngamanoni athi You Were Mine neNomakanjani. Unabalandeli abangaphezu kuka-2 million ku-Instagram. Ngaphambi kokuduma wayefunda e-University of Johannesburg. Wabe esengenela inhlolokhono yemiqhudelwano eminingi ngaphambi kokusayinwa yi- Ambitiouz Entertainment ngo-2017. Ungumsiki wobucwebe abuye abe nenkampani yakhe iFly Clothing Store. Unezingane ezimbili azithola emshadweni wakhe nosomabhizinisi. ULONDIE London udalule okwamxosha ekulingiseni ULONDIE London udalule okwamxosha ekulingiseni

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: emndenini ukuthi babazana noMzobe. “Ngikhathazwa nawukuthi kungani bengezanga bazochaza ukuthi waphelelaphi njengoba kuyibo ababegcine ukubonakala naye,” usho kanje. Ukhale ngendlela amaphoyisa asingethe ngayo udaba, ethi wagcina kunezinhlelo zokuthi amaphoyisa azohloma imibuzo isinqandamathe kanjalo nabo abangani, okwagcina kungenzekanga. Uphinde wakhala ngokungalukhombisi uzwelo ephoyiseni elajutshwa ukuthi liphenye udaba. “Sagcina sesingasaboni ngaso linye, selingisola ngokuthi ngilifundisa umsebenzi walo uma nginemibuzo ngophenyo. Lokhu kwangizwisa ubuhlungu ngoba alibukhombisanga ubuntu, futhi alizange libe nesihe kimina ngingowesifazane ophithanelwe yikhanda ngokulahlekelwa yindodana ngendlela engaqondakali,” kusho uNkk Mhlongo. Uthe nangesikhathi sekushintshe uhlelo lokuthi ngeke abahlanu besaphoswa imibuzo, yena akaze aziswe ngalolo guquko. Uthe bekusinda kwehlela nangesikhathi kufanele kuyiwe emakhazeni kahulumeni ezindaweni ezehlukene, ukuyocinga ukuthi isidumbu sikaMzobe asikho yini kulezo ezisuke zilethiwe kuthiwa ezabangaziwal. Ubuye wathi umphenyi ubevele angabi khona, akhale ngokuba matasatasa ngamanye amacala abalulekile, yena agcine ezihambela yedwa. “Abasemakhazeni bebeze bangitshele ukuthi akuvumelekile ukuthi ngize ngedwa, kufanele ngiphelezelwe umseshi. Ngangisemakhazeni asePhoenix ngesikhathi umseshi efonelwa osebenza khona, wamtshela ukuthi

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: IZOBA ngeSonto enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu inkonzo yomngcwabo kaLady Apostle Nonhlanhla Gama webandla lamaZayoni i-Trust in Christ Ministries IZOKWENZELWA enkundleni yezemidlalo iPrincess Magogo Stadium, KwaMashu, kusuka ngo-5 ekuseni inkonzo yokugcina ka-Lady Apostle Nonhlanhla Patricia Gama webandla lamaZayoni elidume iNingizimu Afrika yonke i-Trust in Christ Ministries. Ngaphambi kwenkonzo yokugcina kaLady Apostle Gama (43), oshone entathakusa ngoMsombuluko, kuzoba nenkonzo yomlindelo ezoba KwaMashu Indoor Sports Centre namhlanje ngo-10 ebusuku. Kuthintwa uMfu Vusi Gama, ongumholi waleli bandla nomyeni kamufi, uthe umkakhe bazomkhumbula kakhulu ngokuthi ubewumholi omqoka kakhulu ebandleni futhi kuwuyena obhekele ukuhola ibandla ikakhulu ohlangothini lomama bebandla nentsha yesifazane. author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: wayingqongqisa ngomlilo, ngelithi awusafune belaphi bendabuko endaweni. UNtuli uqale ngokuhambela isiteshi samaphoyisa iKokstad ukuyothola umbiko ogcwele ngokulahleka kukamgilwa kanjalo nokwenziwa amaphoyisa ngesehlakalo. Ube esedlulela emndenini kamgilwa ukuyowumisa idolo, kwayima eyokwengamela umcimbi wokugujwa koSuku lwamaLungelo Abantu enkundleni yezemidlalo eRiverview, eKokstad. UNtuli uthe bakhathazeke kakhulu njengohulumeni ngokuqhubeka kwezigameko eziyamaniswa nokuhlukunyezwa kwabesifazane nezingane kule ndawo nasesifundazweni sonkana. Uthe lena akuyona nje inkinga eyamaniswa nobugebengu kuphela kodwa ithinta nokuhlukunyezwa kwamalungelo abantu. Uthe ukukhathazeka kwakhe kuqhamuke ngesikhathi ethola umbiko ngokulahleka kwezingane kule ndawo. “Kungikhathazile okwenzeke ngoFebhuwari, ingane (7) okuthiwa ibidlala ibuye ize ekhaya, izodla, iphinde iphume, yagcina ingabuyanga. Kuze kube yinamuhla ayikaze iphinde itholakale,” kusho uNtuli. Uthe umthokozisile umbiko awuthole emaphoyiseni wokuthi enza konke okusemandleni ukuthungatha umgilwa, okufaka phakathi ukucinga kusetshenziswa kobuchwepheshe besimanje. “Ngithe emaphoyiseni ngilindele ukuzwa isiphetho esiyosithokozisa sonke ngoba ngifisa siyithole iphila, siyithole noma ingasaphili,” usho kanje. Uthe uthole nangodaba lokugqunywa esitokisini kwabazali bengane (3) okuthiwa yezwakala ikhala ekameleni eyayihleli kulo nosingababa ngoDisemba

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: ngenxa yokuthi wacelelwa khona. Lo saziwayo, osebizwa ngomholi wamabhinca, waqala ukuzakhela udumo ngokulingisa emidlalweni yeshashalazi, wasakaza oKhozini futhi wethula uhlelo lomculo wesintu kuSABC 1, iRoots. UMike Mvelase owayenguKhaphela kwiGenerations uwe evuka naleli bandla lakwaShembe. Omunye usaziwayo osanda kuphumela obala ukuthi uyindodakazi yaseKuphakameni futhi ukhonza kuleli bandla uDawn Thandeka King, odume kakhulu enguMaNgcobo kuZalo. Eminyakeni eyedlule uSiyabonga Twala, obenguMpiyakhe Zungu kwiSibaya, ubengaphuthi emikhosini yaleli bandla ngaphambi kokuzalwa kabusha aphendukele kumaKristu. Owayeyinkosi ye-reggae kuleli, uLucky Dube, ubedume umhlaba wonke kodwa ubengakhohlwa wukuthi uyiNazaretha kangangoba waze waqamba ingoma etusa amagalelo aleli bandla, esihloko sithi Shembe Is The Way. Uphrojusa wezinhlelo oKhozini uThembeka Cele ungomunye wosaziwayo abakhuliswe ngobuNazaretha. Umsunguli nomgqugquzeli weMpucuzeko Maskandi Festival neNgoma Kazwelonke, uXolani Mcineka, naye uyiNazaretha. Owayengumsakazi weGagasi FM nomlingisi woZalo, uKini Shandu, ukhonza kwaShembe.Owayeyisihlabani emculweni kamaskandi, uMgqumeni "Idlamanzi" Khumalo, wayekhonza kwaShembe futhi waze waqamba ingoma ethi Inkonzoni. UMgqumeni wazakhela ugazi ngokusungula ushuni osadlisa namanje nokuyiwo ofudunyezwe ngabaculi abaningi. UMengameli weNkatha
