author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: Uma unganakile ungazitshela ukuthi ifakwe amarimu emasondweni angu-16 inch kanti amakhava ayenza ibe yinhle nokho. Ngemuva nakhona kunophawu olusha kanjalo namalambu angamaLED amise okuka-C. Okhakhayini inama-roof rails angagcini ngokuyenza ibukeke kahle kodwa akwazi ukuthwala isisindo esingu-50kg. Ukushiya kwayo igabade ngo-205mm kuphelelisa ukubukeka kwayo njenge-SUV. Ngaphakathi okokuqala okungifikele wukuthi kumele ube wumuntu ohlanzekile ngoba izihlalo zinendwangu e-cream. Imesha ne-dashboard. Kuhle khona kodwa kuyashesha ukuzwela ukungcola. Ngaphambili kune-touchscreen infotainment system engu-8 inch oxhuma khona iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto. Ukuze kube lula ukuphendula iselula, bafake amabhathini esiteringini. Bekungaba kuhle ukuba izimbobo zokushaja okungenani zimbili ngaphambili ngoba iyodwa futhi akuyona eye-USB Type-C. Amathuba okushayisa uma uhlehla mancane kwazise kwi-screen kuphinde kuvele khona ingemuva futhi kunama-sensor abanga umsindo uma ususondele kakhulu entweni. Engikuthanda ngengaphakathi wukuthi livulekile futhi kunezindawo eziningi zokubeka izinto njengeselula, iziphuzo nokunye. Ebhuthini isikhala singu-405 litres. Emgwaqweni ihamba ngenjini engu-1.0 litre engenayo i-turbo. Inamandla angu-52kW ne-torque engu-96Nm njengakwiTriber. Nokho ngiyizwe ikhombisa ukuba nempilo

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMNUZ uMfundiseni Mpanza onguMfundisi Jikelele webandla noMfu uKenneth Mngwengwe bephahle uMbhishophi uScelo Mpungose enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika yebandla lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula Kwama Krestu Church of God in Zion ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule IBANDLA lamaZayoni, Isiqalo Sokuthula KwamaKrestu Church of God in Zion, lisebenzise umbuthano wokukhumbula iNkosi uJesu Kristu - uMkhosi wePhasika, ukuqinisa izinhlaka zobuholi baleli bandla - obekuhlangene nokugubha iminyaka ewu-20 lasungulwa. Lokho kwenzeke ngenkathi leli bandla, okumanje linamagatsha amabili - lihlangene kule nkonzo yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal ngempelasonto edlule. Kulo mbuthano kukhushulwe uMfu uMfundiseni Mpanza obewuMfundisi webandla nowakwakhe uNkk Smangele Mpanza, banikwa izikhundla zokuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi jikelele bebandla - okusho ukuthi yibona asebebhekele wonke amagatsha ebandla, inhlalakahle yawo, wukukhula nokubambisana kwabazalwane bawo. UNKSZ uThandi Nxumalo nowakwakhe uMnuz uLeonard Mpungose, abagcotshelwe ukuba wuMfundisi noMfundisikazi bebandla, bephahle indodana yabo uSiphesihle Mpungose, enkonzweni yoMkhosi wePhasika ebiseSikhonyane Primary School, eNdulinde, eMandeni ngempelasonto edlule UMnuz uLeonard Mpungose

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: kwemidlalo engu-21. Emuva kwayo kwakuhlezi iStellenbosch FC ngawu-39 emuva kwemidlalo engu-22. Lokhu kwakusho ukuthi idinga amaphuzu angu-11 emidlalweni eyisishiyagalombili ukuwina iligi. Nokho kule sizini itshe ligaya ngomunye umhlathi kwiSundowns njengoba isembangweni oshisa phansi nePirates. Umqeqeshi weZimnyama u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, uthe kuhle ebholeni laseMzansi ukuthi alikho iqembu elivule igebe lamaphuzu esicongweni se-log. "I-PSL iyiligi eqinile, ikakhulukazi kule sizini. Sikubonile lokho, wumjaho webanga elide. Emjahweni awuwehlisi umgqigqo wokuwina ngakho emidlalweni esisalele sizokwenza konke okusemandleni, sibone okwenzekayo," kusho u-Ouaddou. "Siyabona ukuthi lithakaselwa kakhulu ibhola. Kuhle lokho ebholeni nakubalandeli. Uma iqembu lihamba phambili ngamaphuzu angu-15 phakathi nesizini, yini engakwenza uthande ukubuka imidlalo? Ngicabanga ukuthi yilokhu okufunwa ngabalandeli. Ngamaqembu amabili adlala kahle alwayo. Lokhu kuhle ebholeni laseNingizimu Afrika." NogLwesibili kungenzeka kulalwe iSundowns isivule igebe lamaphuzu amathathu njengoba izobhekana ne-Orbit Collenge e-Olympia Park, eRustenburg, ngo-7.30 ebusuku. IPirates izothola ithuba lokulinganisa uma isigijimisana neRichards Bay FC e-Orlando Amstel Arena ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Njengoba amaBrazilians eseyoqhubeka nemidlalo yeCaf Champions League,

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: THABO Mathonsi Chonco KUBE ubutatata inkabi eboshwe nenkosi uSimpiwe Erick Zuma ivukwa yisifo sokuwa enkantolo . UThabo Mathonsi Chonco uvukwe isifo sokuwa ngaphambi kokuthi kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala lokubulawa kowayeyikhansela le-DA kuMasipala waseMngeni, uMnuz Nhlalayenza Ndlovu. UChonco ubevele eNkantolo yesifunda eMgungundlovu. Bekulindeleke ukuthi uzolivuma icala izolo kodwa kwangabe kusenzeka lokho njengoba kuphoqe ukuthi aphuthunyiswe esibhedlela emva kokugula. Uphume enkantolo eqhutshwa ngesihlalo esinamasondo, eyethile. Isifo simvuke kungazelele muntu ngesikhathi ehlezi emabhentshini, elinde ukuba kuqale ukuqulwa kwecala. Bake babukana bodwa abebesenkantolo, kwasweleka ozomlekelela. Isimo siholele ekutheni iMantshi, uBemal Jaynarayan, ithethise ojele abebelethe uChonco. UJaynarayan uthe ojele kufanele babe nohlelo lokulekelela iziboshwa uma zivukwa wukugula. Ummeli kaChonco, uMnuz Zipho Khanyile, utshele inkantolo ukuthi uChonco unesifo sokuwa. "Ngiyazi ukuthi udla amaphilisi esifo sokuwa." UKhanyile unxuse inkantolo ukuba ikhiphe umyalelo wokuba uChonco anikezwe amaphilisi njengoba esejele. UKhanyile uthe bafuna nokuthi uChonco angavalelwa yedwa ejele ukuze kube khona umuntu ozosheshe ambone uma evukwa yisifo sokuwa. Uthe wesaba

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Isidumbu sikhishwa emfuleni ithimba labatshuzi Kubulawe ngesihluku isalukazi esineminyaka engu-75 engcobo, e-Eastern Cape, sisolwa ngokuthakatha. Ngokwemibiko evelayo, kuthiwa amalungu omndeni wakhe amthathile amyisa emfudlaneni oseduze, amshaya ngepulangwe, amminza. Isidumbu sakhe esinqunu satholwe eduze nomfudlana sinemihuzuko ekhanda nasebusweni kanye nezibazi zokuklinywa entanyeni. Abasolwa babaleke endaweni yesigameko kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu njengoba amaphoyisa ephenya icala lokubulala. I-video ezungeza ezinkundleni zokuxhumana yalesi sigameko esiphazamisayo isiqubule ulaka emphakathini. Umphathiswa inwezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi uBukiwe Fanta ukugxeke kakhulu ukubulawa kwabantu. Uthi lesi sibhicongo siyingxenye yezinkinga ezikhulayo e-Alfred Nzo Region, lapho sekubulawe abesifazane abane ngoMeyi kuphela.kanti bekungakaboshwa muntu ngesikhathi kubikwa.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTHWALOFU Khoza ephahlwe wuSgwebo Sentambo no-Ayanda Msweli emzini wakhe okwesaKwaBiyela, oBuka, eMpangeni INKOSI yomculo kamaskandi, uSipho "Thwalofu" Khoza, izohlonishwa isadla anhlamvana kwiBenefit Gala Dinner eBon Hotel Conference Hall, eMpangeni namhlanje kusukela ngo-3 ntambama. Umgqugquzeli walo mcimbi futhi ongumsakazi woKhozi FM, u-Ayanda Msweli, uqale ngokubonga kakhulu uMnyango wezeMidlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko ngokuphonsa itshe esivivaneni ukuze lo mcimbi wenzeke. Uthe waya kulo Mnyango oholwa wuMphathiswa uMnuz Mntomuhle Khawula eyozikhalela ukuze kusizakale le ngqalabutho. "Ngafike ngabika isimo engisibone emzini kaThwalofu ngesikhathi ngivakashele khona." UMsweli uthe wathola ukuthi nakuba ehola isibonelelo sikahulumeni sabadala, kodwa asanele ukubhekana nezindleko abhekana nazo usuku nosuku. Uthe uThwalofu usehlala ngokungaphili okwenza ukuthi aphume engena kodokotela. "Ukwehla enyuka nakho kudinga imali. Kufanele uma ezodla amaphilisi, abe nento azoyifaka esiswini." UMsweli uthe inzuzo ezotholakala kulo mcimbi izolekelela kakhulu uThwalofu empilweni. UMsweli utuse kakhulu amandla ebhakede lakhe ahlale eqongelela ngalo iminikelo futhi eselakhele imindeni engaphezu kwemihlanu imizi, langcwaba abantu futhi lafundisa intsha ezikhungweni

text: inch, panoramic sunroof, izihlalo zangaphambili okwazi ukuzifudumeza noma uziqandise, ibhuthi engu-550 litres nenqwaba yezokuphepha. Ifike neyakwabo iH7 Black Edition. author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: UMSAKAZI we-702 uRelebogile Mabotja wethule ngokusemthethweni icwecwe lakhe elishaya ngesigqi sowokholo elithi Still Me - Live UMSAKAZI wesiteshi esizimele i-702 futhi owumculi ne-podcaster, uRelebogile Mabotja, useziphosele inselelo entsha emculweni ethula ngokusemthethweni icwecwe lakhe lokuqala aselenze kabusha elisihloko sithi Still Me - Live, eliqale ukutholakala ezitolo ngoLwesihlanu. URelebogile (40) wasePitoli, kodwa osezinze eGoli wethule icwecwe lakhe eligabe ngezingoma ezine zesigqi sowokholo nese-soul emcimbini eSandton, khona kwaNdongaziyaduma, lapho abememe khona abangani, ozakwabo basemsebenzini, izihlobo nasondelene nabo kuphela. Usebenzise lo mcimbi futhi ukugubha uhambo lwakhe lobuciko obehlukene njengoba sekukuningi akwenzile, wabe esezwisa izethameli izingoma ezikulona bukhoma ezithi You’re The Only One, i-I Feel Nothing, iMmamogaoi’s Prayer ne-Stil Me. UMSAKAZI we-702 uRelebogile Mabotja esemcimbini wokwethula icwecwe lakhe elithi Still In Me - Live, eSandton, eGoli ngoLwesine ebusuku Elandisa ngalo msebenzi wakhe wobuciko, uRelebogile uthe ngenkathi ewenza wayefuna ukuvezela abantu uhlangothi lwempilo yakhe oluveza ukuthi naye kuyenzeka ukuthi kube nezinto nezimo ezithiya impilo yakhe. “Bengingalindele

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: IPHOYISA elabulawa eNanda, uSergeant Sanele Dlamini LIHLEHLELE uLwesihlanu, ukuze afake isicelo sebheyili owesilisa osolwa ngecala lokudubula, abulale iphoyisa lophiko lwePresidential Protection Unit eNewtown A, eNanda, ngo-Ephreli nyakenye. Umufi, uSergeant Sanele Dlamini (37), wakuyo le ndawo, wadutshulwa, wabulawa abasolwa abangaziwa ngo-Ephreli 2025. Ngokusho kokhulumela oKlebe KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant Colonel Simphiwe Mhlongo, umsolwa wakamumva, uMnuz Kwanele Khatheni (27) uboshwe ngoLwesithathu, wavela eNkantolo yeMantshi yaseNtuzuma ngoLwesihlanu. Ngosuku lwesigameko, kuthiwa uDlamini owayengekho emsebenzini, ehamba ngemoto yakhe emgwaqweni uMafukuzela eNewtown A, wama eduze negaraji waya esitolo esingaphesheya. “Ngesikhathi elinde ukuthenga, wahlaselwa abasolwa. Wakwazi ukukhipha isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi, wadubula ephindelela kubasolwa, oyedwa wabo naye wamdubula uDlamini, waphumelela ukumphuca isibhamu sakhe somsebenzi,” kusho uMhlongo. Uthe wabe esephuthunyiswa esibhedlela ngemoto yakhe kodwa kwatholwa ukuthi useshonile ngesikhathi efika. Uthe kwavulwa icala lokubulala esiteshini samaphoyisa saseNanda, ithimba loKlebe kwaba yilo eliya endaweni yesigameko. “Kwavela ulwazi lokuthi oyedwa wabasolwa uyiswe emtholampilo wendawo, amaphoyisa ase enikela khona, nokuyilapho afike amfaka ngaphansi kweso lamaphoyisa,

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ebithelelwa amanzi ilo mshayeli, ibingazange iwathenge amanzi kumasipala. UZuma uthe abashayeli abadayisa amanzi benza ukuthi abantu bagcine bengawatholi amanzi ngenxa yokuthi abashayeli bawayisa kulabo abasuke bewathengile. "Kunabantu abangawatholi amanzi. Ngesikhathi ngikhuluma nabantu, kukhona abathe kunamasonto amabili bengathelelwa amanzi. Nina ninemizi yenu eniyithelela amanzi. Abantu uma bebona imoto yamanzi, baphuma nezigubhu namabhakede, nina niyabadlula ngoba kunemizi eniyithelela amanzi. Umphakathi wonke awunawo amanzi, le mizi ethandwa inina ithola amanzi." UZuma uthe isenzo salo msebenzi senza ukuthi umasipala ulahlekelwe imali. "Usuqhuba ibhizinisi lakho. Ithina esithwala izindleko zebhizinisi lakho. Thina sikhokha imali wena uziqhubela ibhizinisi lakho. Sikhokhela ukuthi umphakathi uthole amanzi, nina nihambisa amanzi lapho enazi khona ukuthi nithola imali." UZuma uthe lo mshayeli uzodala ukuthi abantu abangawatholi amanzi badinelwe umasipala. "Ulindiwe eRichmond kodwa wena usuzakhele uhlelo lwakho ukuthi uzosebenza kanjani. Sizothukwa abantu eRichmond, ulindiwe eRichmond. Wena uyashushuluza yonke le ndlela. Le moto ohamba ngayo ine-tracker. Umqashi wakho uzofuna ukuthi simkhokhele imali eningi uma

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: NGAPHAMBI kokuba ingqalabutho yomlingisi, uCynthia Shange, idlule emhlabeni yakuveza ngo-2024, ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuyo ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba yaze yanqanyulwa izinzwane. UCynthia (76), oshonele kwesinye sezibhedlela zaseKZN, ngezintathakusa zangoMsombuluko, emuva kokugula, wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024. Wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. "Bengizokwamukela lo mklomelo ngiqhutshwa ngenqola kodwa ngibonga umusa kaNkulunkulu," esho ngo-2024. Wathi waze wasizwa ukuqambela odokotela amanga ukuze anganqanyulwa umlenze. "Ngo-2018, ngesikhathi ngisuka eGoli ngiya eThekwini, ngaba nokugula okwangenza ngalaliswa esibhedlela izinyanga ezintathu. Kwakunzima ngiphakathi kokuphila nokufa. Ngibonga uShembe ngokusindisa impilo yami sengiphelelwe yithemba. Ngasenga ezimithiyo ngokubatshela ukuthi kunesivumelwano engisenzile sokuqopha ifilimu, esingangenza ngihlawuliswe u-R5 million uma ngisephula. Bafonela indodakazi yami ukuba izosayina amafomu ukuze nginikezwe ama-antibiotics." Esikhundleni sokunqanyulwa umlenze,

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: ULebohang ukhiphe incwadi yesixoliso ngokudlala ngesibhamu budedengu ULebogang Maji (23) owaziwa ngelika-"stockosamcd" noHosiame Chaane (22) bakhiphe izitatimende bexolisa ngokuziphatha kwabo budedengu, njengoba kuvezwe kwi-video esakazwa kuzo zonke izinkundla zokuxhumana bebhiyoza ngezulu lezandla okugcine kutholakala ukuthi azikho emthethweni. Bobabili baphinde bazibophezela ukubambisana ngokugcwele neziphathimandla zomthetho futhi bazithobe kuzo zonke izinqubo zomthetho ezisebenzayo. Abalisa ababili okuyibona ababanikeza izibhamu basagcinwe esitokisini ngamacala ahlobene nokuphambana nomthetho iFirearms Control Act, okuhlanganisa ukutholakala nezibhamu ezingekho emthethweni nezinhlamvu, kanye nokutholakala nemoto ebiduniwe. Uphenyo lwamaphoyisa lusaqhubeka. Isitatimende sikaLebohang UHosiame Chaane (22) ukhiphe incwadi exolisa emndenini nakubo bonke abantu ababone i-video yakhe nomngani wakhe bedlala budu ngezibhamu Isitatimende sikaHosiame Chaane (22)

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: umsolwa oshintshe ummeli." UChithi uxwayise abasolwa ngokuthi kufanele bagawule babheke. "Kuzofika isikhathi lapho khona singeke sikubekezelele ukubambezeleka kokuqulwa kwecala. Lapho-ke icala lizoqhubeka liqulwe noma ngabe kukhona umsolwa ongenaye ummeli. Kuzobe kungaqali njengoba sekuke kwenzeka phambilini. Lile cala libhekwe abantu abaningi. Abantu bafuna ukubona isiphetho. Umndeni nawo ufuna izimpendulo." Umfowabo kaMagaqa, uMnuz Lwazi Magaqa, uthe kubajabulisile ukuzwa uChithi enqumela abasolwa ugwayi katiki. "Umsolwa ulokhu eshintsha abameli. Nanamhlanje ufike washintsha abameli. Okuhle ke wukuthi ijaji lithe akabuyele lapha ngoJuni 3,"kusho uLwazi. Icala lihlehliselwe uJuni 3.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMENGAMELI weSafa Ethekwini, uMazwi Mkhize, ongomunye wabahlonishwe ngezindondo ze-Lifetime Achievement muva nje, kuma-KZN Sports Awards ngeqhaza abalibambile ekuthuthukisweni kwebhola UMENGAMELI weSouth African Foootball Association (Safa) Ethekwini, uMazwi Mkhize, uveza ukuthi uyokwendela koyisemkhulu ekhululekile mhla ibhola labuyelwa wusikompilo kwathuthukiswa nangendlela efanele izinhlaka zabadlali abasakhuliswa KwaZulu-Natal naseNingizimu Afrika yonkana. UMkhize uphakathi kwezingwevu ebuholini bezemidlalo, okubalwa kuzo uJeremiah “Ace” Mdlalose noDkt Kevin Subban, ezihlonishwe ngezindondo ze-Lifetime Achievement emcimbini wama-KZN Sports Awards obungempelasonto, eNkosi Albert Luthuli Convention Centre, eThekwini. Ubuyele ngo-elethu kwesokwengamela iSafa Ethekwini okhethweni obelungoJanuwari. Ngaphansi kobuholi bakhe lesi sifunda sesihlomule ngabaxhasi abaningi abaxhase imiqhudelwano edlalwa ngamaqembu ososeshini abangaphansi kwaso. “Kubalulekile ukuthi umuntu ahlonishwe esaphila. Kodwa ngikholwa wukuthi kufanele ngabe kudala ngahlonishwa uma ubheka ibanga esengilihambile ekuphatheni ibhola, okuyiminyaka engu-47, kusukela ngo-1979," kusho uMkhize. "Baningi kakhulu abadlule ezandleni zami, ngingababala kushone ilanga. Abanye bebelokhu bebuza bethi ‘uKhabazela kanti uyohlonishwa nini?’ Kodwa-ke bengibatshela ukuthi ngeke ngisine ngiphinde ngizishayele ihlombe. "Akusizi kodwa ukuthi sihlonishwe

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UDECLAN Rice ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kwi-Arsenal esethubeni lokuqeda ishobolo lamasizini awu-21 esicoco se-English Premier League YIZE besekubukeka i-Arsenal FC isiphunyukwe yisicoco se-English Premier League ibhinciselwe nxanye yizimbangi iManchester City, kodwa ukulahla amaphuzu kweCity ibambana ne-Everton ngeledlule kuphinde kwanika leli qembu laseLondon elinye ithuba. Njengoba womabili la maqembu ehlukaniswe ngamaphuzu amabili, i-Arsenal iqhwakele ngawu-79, iCity isendaweni yesibili ngawu-77. Imidlalo emibili esele yiyona esizocacisa ukuthi isicoco siya eLondon noma eManchester. Kusukela iguqiswe yizimbangi, iMan City ngo 2-1 ngo-Ephreli 19, i-Arsenal ivuke yazithatha njengoba isiyinqobe yomithathu ilandelana imidlalo eyidlalile okubalwa noweWest Ham ewunqobe ngo 1-0 ngeSonto eledlule. Isalelwe yimidlalo emibili ezoyidlala neBurnley, edlalelwa ngumgadli weBafana Bafana uLyle Foster, neCrystal Palace. Izodlala neBurnley ngoMsombuluko ngo-9 ebusuku e-Emirates Stadium, eLondon. Isonge nePalace ngoMeyi 24 eSelhurst Park. ICity ezodlala owamanqamu weFA Cup namuhla ngo-4 ntambama eWembley Stadium, eLondon, isalelwe yimidlalo yePremier League ezoyidlala neBournemouth ne-Aston Villa. Izodlala neBournemouth ngoLwesibili ngo-8.30 ebusuku. Ukuhlala amaphuzu kwe-The Gunners

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ULUYANDA Zuma ngomunye wabalingisi abasha abazobonakala emdlalweni Isitha:The Enemy kwi-e.tv KULINDELEKE ukuthi kushube izinto emdlaweni Isitha: The Enemy, kwi-e.tv ngo-8.30 phakathi nezinsuku, njengoba lesi siteshi simemezele ukuqala kokubonakala kwabalingisi abasha izolo, kwisizini entsha yalo mdlalo. Umdlalo Isitha ukwesinde ezembeni elifakwe yilesi siteshi liqeda imidlalo emidala okukhona kuyo iScandal! neminye. Isizini yesithathu yalo mdlalo iphele ngoLwesihlanu futhi bekungacaci ukuthi lithini ikusasa lalo mdlalo njengoba bekungekho okuvelayo ngawo. Abakwa-e.tv baveze ukuthi bebefihle induku emqubeni ngesizini entsha njengoba iza nezinguquko ezinkulu kulokhu obekubonakala. "Umlingisi ngamunye kulaba abazayo, uza nokwakhe okuzokwenza ababukeli bomdlalo basale bebambe ongezansi. Sijabule ngokwethula isizini entsha, sithemba ukuthi izoqhubeka nokunika ababukeli lokhu abakufunayo ngalo mdlalo. Sizibophezele ekuqhubekeni sethule imidlalo ekhuluma nabantu bakithi ngqo, iphinde ibavezele izinto abazibona ngisho emiphakathini abahlala kuyo," kusho isitatimende. Bathe bakubheke ngabomvu ukuqhubeka bekhiqiza imidlalo emisha njengalona osanda kuqala othi Emzini, nabathi ufike ngegiya eliphezulu njengoba ukhombisa ukuthakaselwa abaningi emasontweni amathathu manje uqalile. Kubalingisi abasha abazobonakala

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: Uthishanhloko waseSizanani Primary School eDube, eSoweto, uGugu Mdlalose ozimisele kakhulu ekufundiseni izingane ngokutshala imifino njengoba simbona lapha nezingane zesikole. Image: Dumisani Sibeko KUHLATSHWE ikhwelo lokuthi kubikwe izehlakalo zokuhlukunyezwa kwezingane emakhaya kanjalo nasezikoleni njengoba kwanda ukukhulelwa kwazo zisencane. Leli khwelo lenziwe yizinhlaka ezehlukene izolo, ngesikhathi kwethulwa umkhankaso wokuvikelwa kwezingane enkundleni yemidlalo iMangosuthu eDumbe, enyakatho yaKwaZulu-Natal. UNksz Neliswa Cekiso ongumqondisi wophiko lokuvikelwa kwezingane eMnyangweni wokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi, uthe izibalo ziveza ukuthi angaphezu kuka-3 000 amacala okuhlukunyezwa kwezingane kusuka ekoteni yokuqala kuya kweyesithathu onyakenimali u-2025/2026. "Sikhathazekile ngokudlwengulwa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16 ezigilwa abantu abadala. Sikhathazeke kakhulu nangezingane ezilalana zodwa, ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-16. Yingakho kubalulekile ukuthi sibambisane ekulweni nalesi sihlava," usho kanje ekhuluma neNewzroom Afrika izolo, kwethulwa lo mkhankaso. Uthe bakhathazekile ngokukhulelwa kwezingane zisencane kuleli kanjalo nasesifundeni iZululand. Ngokwezibalo zeNational Child Protection Register, zekota yokuqala yonyakamali u-2025/2026 kuya kweyesithathu, angu-8 984 amacala abikwa okuhlukunyezwa kwezingame. UNksz Cekiso uthe banezinhlelo zokufundisa abazali ukuze baqaphe ngelokhozi izingane

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kushaqeke abaingi kuzwakala izindaba zokuhlaselwa kukaThato Mosolankwe, ngokusa kwangoLwesithathu USATHUTHUMELA umphakathi waseLomanyaneng, eMahikeng, kulandela ukuhlaselwa kwesishoshovu somphakathi esingumelaphi wendabuko uThato Molosankwe. Imibiko yokuqala iveza ukuthi uMolosankwe uhlaselwa abasolwa abangaziwa ekhaya lakhe ngokusa kwangoLwesithathu, bemdubula ngentululwane yezinhlamvu. Lesi sishoshovu sibulawa nje, besisanga kukhipha isimemo ezinkundleni zokuxhumana simema umphakathi ukuba uhlangane esitolo sengawo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukubhunga ngezinto ezithinta ukubuyisa umnotho womphakathi ezandleni zawo umphakathi. Okukhulumela amaphoyisa aseNorth West uCaptain Majang Skalkie usiqinisekisile isehlo. Leli cala selidluliselwe ophikweni oluphenya amacala okubulala nobugebengu esifundazweni. Amaphoyisa anxuse amalungu omphakathi angaba nolwazi ngabasolwa ukuba asondele ngaphambili.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: isandla ngokugcwele athe sisabambekile. Lo mculi wahlaselwa yisifo sohlangothi esesiteji emcimbini owawuseNdwedwe ngoDisemba 2022. "Ngisebenzile hhayi ukuthi ngiyacela nje." Udalule ukuthi uzimisele ngokuhambela izindawo ezihlukene eyonandisa kuzo. "Ngifuna ukukujwayela kabusha okwenzeka ezindaweni zobumnandi ngoba bese siside isikhathi umuntu ezivalele engaphumi. Ngingakujabulela ukuvakashela izifundazwe ezihlukene ngoba angesekwa kwesisodwa kuphela."

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: lamaphuzu amabili esicongweni se-log. UYoussef, oqeqesha iChiefs ngokubambisana noCedric Kaze, uthe ukwehlulwa ngamagoli yikhona okwenze bagcina bephuma nephuzu kungafanele kwiChippa esemsileni we-log. "Siyayibongela iChippa, ibinohlaka oluhle futhi ibilwela wonke amabhola. Ngasohlangothini lwethu, akukho esingakhala ngakho. Uma uthola amathuba amaningi okubhekana nonozinti kodwa ungawasebenzisi (akulungi), ibhola linjalo. Kufanele siqhubeke nokusebenza sizame ukulungisa inkinga eyodwa esinayo. Siyafika phambili kodwa siyahluleka ukushaya amagoli. Yileyo inkinga esinayo kodwa kufanele siqhubeke sisebenze,"usho kanje kwiSupersport. Nokho iChiefs isenalo ithuba lokulungisa isimo njengoba izobhekana neTS Galaxy emdlalweni wePremiership wokugcina wonyaka eMbombela Stadium, eNelspruit, ngeSonto ngo-3.30 ntambama.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT INTOKAZI eyathweswa isicoco sika-Miss DUT wango-2016, uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, isiphonsele inselelo onobuhle abasebasha nabeza emva kwayo ukuba bangathembeli ebuhleni kuphela ukuze bafike empumelelwei, kepha bakhuthale baqinise kakhulu olwazini lwemfundo. UDkt Ngcobo usho njalo emva kokuthweswa iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management emcimbini wokwethweswa iziqu izitshudeni zemikhakha ehlukene eDurban University of Technology (DUT), obukuleli sonto eMgungundlovu, KwaZulu-Natal. Lo zime kumanje ufundisa khona e-DUT lapho eqeqesha abafundi kwezezimali nezamabhizinisi ophikweni lwayo oluseMidlands. Uthe ubheke ukuqhubeka azihlomise ngolwazi lwezemfundo ukuze akhuthaze abanye onobuhle ebe ezisiza naye ngalolo lwazi empilweni yakhe. “Ukuthola lezi ziqu zobudokotela kungaphezu kokuphumelela ngemfundo kimina. Ngikufanisa nokufeza isithembiso seminyaka engasenza kimina uqobo ngo-2016 ngenkathi ngithola iziqu zami zokuqala ze-Diploma in Management, lapho engazitshela khona ukuthi akusekho lutho okungase kuphazamise uhambo lwami lwezemfundo,” kusho uDkt Ngcobo. INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: Siyafisa ke ukuthi nalapha emakhaya kube khona umnotho osalayo ozokwenza ukuthi abantu abaqashisa ngezindawo zokulala bakwazi ukuziphilisa kuze kube kuphinde kufika esikhathi lapho kwanda abantu abaqasha izindawo zokulala." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi kube nemibukiso ezokuba khona uma kunomkhosi. "Sifuna ukuba nombukiso lapho sizobambisana noMnyango wezoLimo. Sifuna ukubona ukuthi abantu bengasizakala kwelimo. Inkampani yezimoto enkulu yezimoto, iToyota, nayo izokwenza umbukiso. Izimoto zabo zithengwa kakhulu endaweni. Banesibopho sokubuyisela emphakathini. Sizobheka ukuthi yini abangayenzela umphakathi." Inkosi ithe ifuna ukuthi baphinde balekelele abantu abadayisa imikhiqizo ukuthi bakwazi ukudayisela amazwe angaphandle. Inkosi ithe ifuna nokuthi baqinise nasemnothweni wasolwandle ikakhulukazi ukudoba. "Kusenomnotho ongathintiwe lapha kwezokuvakasha, umnotho wasolwandle. Lento isakhulunywa nje, isebenzela kakhulu iWestern Cape lapho kudotshwa kakhulu ofishi. Lo mnotho unamandla kakhulu. Nathi siyafisa ukusondeza ochwepheshe." Inkosi inamava kwezokuvakasha kanye nezokuthuthukiswa komnotho njengoba isike yaba usihlalo wamabhodi ezinhlangano zezokuvakasha. Inkosi ike yaba usihlalo webhodi leSimangaliso Wetland Park, ike yaba iphini likasihlalo webhodi, futhi ike yaba ilungu

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: abezindaba ukuthi lizobuyela ekhaya uma selibhekene neChippa United ngo-Agasti 26 (kusasa). Nokho lo mdlalo usuzodlalelwa ePrincess Magogo Stadium KwaMashu, ngo-7.30 ebusuku, ngenxa yokuthi inkundla ayikabi sesimweni esifanele. Ukungalungi kwenkudla kuphazamise neMilford FC eyibamba kwiMotsepe Foundation Championship egcine idlale neLeruma Lions eChatsworth Stadium. Ngokwencwadi ethunyelelwe amaqembu emasontweni adlule ngemuva kwePremier's Cup, isikhulu sePSL uRonnie Schloss, sikubeke ngokusobala ukuthi inkundla isekude ukulunga. Ngaleso sikhathi uSchloss ukhombe amasonto amathathu. "Kusemqoka ukukhumbula ukuthi cishe sisenezinye izinyanga eziyishumi zokudlala ibhola ngaphambi kwethu futhi kubalulekile ukuthi sizivikele zonke izinkundla zethu ukuqinisekisa ukuthi zimelana nesizini yonke," kusho uSchloss encwadini. "Amasoyi otshani atshaliwe ezindaweni ezigebhukile, kusamele zifake izimpande phansi ukuze sibe nenkundla okudlalekayo kuyona. Ukudlala enkundleni ikulesi simo kuyingozi kubadlali okuyinto okumele siyicabange. Ngalokho, insimu ngiyithola njengekungadlaleki kuyona, inkundla ivalile kuze kuba niyaziswa ngokunye." Ngokoluhla lwemidlalo yeBay, leli qembu liyoze lidlale ekhaya uma selibhekene neTS Galaxy ngoSepthemba 17. Imizamo yokuthola uBiyela ayiphumelelanga kwazise ucingo lwakhe ubengalubambi.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: IHaval 6 PHEV ehamba ngenjini kaphethroli nekagesi webhethri elishajwayo I-HAVAL H6 ingenye yezimoto eziyinsika ebalulekile kwa-GWM njengoba cishe u-50% wazo zonke abazidayisa emhlabeni jikelele kuyiyona. Le ntandokazi yeSUV yakhiwa emazweni ahlukene ukuze isatshalaliswe kwangaphezu kuka-170. KwaGWM bazimiselle ngokuthi iqhubeke nokwenza kahle ngokwandisa umndeni ngeyi plug-in hybrd (PHEV). Esikhathini lapho kusenezingqinamba ngezimoto ezihamba ngogesi kuphela ngenxa yokungabi ningi kwezindawo zokushaja novalo lokuphelelwa amandla endleleni besayishayela abahamba ngayo, kanjalo nokunyuka ngendlela ebabazekayo kukaphethroli okuthiwa kuzokwenzeka, iH6 PHEV ibukeka ifike ngesikhathi esikahle. Inenjini kaphethroli engu-1.5 litre turbo nezimbili zikagesi konke okufaka amandla kuwo wonke amasondo. Lobu buchwepheshe babubiza ngeGWM Hi-4 drivetrain. Amandla angu-268kW ne-torque engu-760Nm. Edonsa ngamasondo amabili yona inamandla angu-240kW ne-torque engu-540Nm. U-gearbox ungumshini ozishintshayo. Ngaphakathi iHaval H6 ifika ne-touchscreen infotainment system efakwe iCoffee Operating System KwaGWM bathi uma uyishaje yagcwala kanjalo nasethangini likaphethroli kuntanta isele, ungahamba amakhilomitha angaphezulu kuka-1 000. Ngogesi wodwa uhamba u-106km. Ibhethri layo lingu-19.09kWh, nokulithatha amahora alinganiselwa kwamathathu

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: INKULUMO yomqeqeshi weMamelodi Sundowns, uMiguel Cardoso, mayelana nokuphungula isikwati kuleli qembu kungenzeka yehle kahle kwamanye amaqembu acuthele ukucosha abadilizwe eChloorkop. ISundowns enqobe isicoco seBetway Premiership ihlandla lesishiyagalombili ngesizini edlule, isamemezele kuphela uFawaaz Basadien osuka kwiStellenbosch njengomdlali omusha nakuba bekhona nabanye abamataniswa nayo. Kunalokho, ichithe abaningi okubalwa kubona abebebolekisiwe okunguSifiso Ngobeni osesayine kwiCape Town City. Abanye abakhululwe yiSundowns nguRivaldo Coetzee obelizwa ngendaba ijezi, Thabang Sibanyoni obephila ngokubolekiswa, Lebohang Maboe obebolekiswe kwiSuperSport United, noSipho Mbule ocoshwe yi-Orlando Pirates. Awakapheli amahlebezi ngokuthi iSundowns izodlala isizini ka-2025/2026 ngaphandle kukaPeter Shalulile okubukeka engekho ezinhlelweni zikaCardoso, Lucas Ribeiro abafunwa ngamanye amaqembu noKhuliso Mudau okuthiwa ufuna ukwenyuselwa iholo. "Mayelana nabazoshiya iqembu, asibone ekugcineni ukuthi ubani ozohamba, ubani ozongena. IMamelodi Sundowns iyiqembu elihlelekile, konke kwenziwa ngomqondo, siyasicabanga sonke isimo futhi sifaka amandla ukusilungisa sibeka phambili iqembu. Ngaleyo ndlela bakhona abazojoyina iqembu nabaphumayo ngoba sicabanga ukuthi kuyinto ekhethekile futhi kunomsebenzi omkhulu ukuba ngumdlali weMamelodi Sundowns, umdlali, umqeqeshi, isisebenzi, ibhodi,

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Intokazi yaseThekwini enguDJ uDBN Gogo ekhiphe ingoma ethi The Boy Is Mine ngokuhlanganyela noMoonchild INTOKAZI yaseThekwini uDBN Gogo, isiveze ukuthi ibuyisa ithemba ngengoma yayo esanda kuyidedela, ethi The Boy Is Mine. Le ngoma apike kuyo uMoonchild, uthe ngayo ufuna abesifazane bazethembe kuyona yonke into abayifunayo empilweni. "Ngipike uMoonchild ngoba ungomunye wabesifazane uma becula izinhlamvu zezingoma abakuzona, baveze imizwa yabo kanjalo nendlela abazizwa ngayo ngaleso sikhathi. Ungumuntu ohlale ejabule futhi ukusebenza naye kulethe omunye umuzwa ngesikhathi sihlangene. Kube lula ukuhlanganisa ingoma yalolu hlobo. Ngakho kube into enkulu kimi ukuthi ngisebenze naye." Uthe le ngoma iqhakambisa imizwa ehlukene yokuthi umuntu wesifazane azethembe. "Sithemba ukuthi umyalezo wayo uzofinyelela kude yize sisebenzisa ingoma," kusho uDBN Gogo. Uthe akangabazi ukuthi abantu le ngoma bazoyijabulela, bajabule ngayo ezindaweni ezehlukene. "Kuyona kukhona ukujabula komuntu wesifazane ozithembayo kodwa futhi uphinde aveze uhlangothi lwakhe, la izinto zingahambi kahle okuyinto ejwayelekile empilweni. Kodwa isigqi sayo isona esihamba phambili, engithemba ukuthi

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: engingajabule ngayo," kusho uSipho. Uthe akazimisele ukuveza ukuthi kwenzakaleni njengoba ewuhlonipha umsakazo Ukhozi kanjalo ne-SABC. "Kuyihlazo elikhulu abakwenzile ukuthi baze bafike kulesi sinqumo kodwa ke ngizokhetha ukuthula yingakho ngingakukhulumi. Ngakho kuthe sesikhuluma siya phambili ngomsebenzi, ngagcina nginikwa olunye uhlelo, okuthe mina nomndeni wami uma sicubungula ngalo, sagcina sithathe isinqumo sokuthi ngishiye phansi. Angiyekanga ngoba ngifuna ukugxila emsebenzini wobufundisi, lokhu akulona iqiniso njengoba kuvela sengathi mina ngizicelele ukuhamba ukuze ngiyobhekana nalo msebenzi. Ngiyohlala ngiyihlonipha i-SABC noKhozi kodwa inkinga yami inabanye ezikhulwini ezikhona ezingaluphathanga kahle udaba lokuhamba kwami," kuchaza yena. Ube esebonga wonke umuntu omesekile kulo mkhakha wezokusakaza wathi, usavulelekile ukuthatha wonke amathuba azoqhamuka okusebenza. Kulo msakazo uSipho akuchithwanga yena kuphela njengoba kuhambe nabanye ozakwabo okukhona kubo uZeal Dladla, Ayanda Msweli, Sphongo Dladla, uMfundisi Lungisani Simelane, King Sfiso nabo abakhiphe izitatimende bebonga abalaleli balesi siteshi ngokubeseka.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: samalungu ethimba. Phambilini, uMbalula wakhala ngokuthi ithimba ebelikhona liyahluleka ukwenza umsebenzi walo waze walifanisa nemoto i-Tazz. Kepha izolo, uMbalula akazange afune ukubeka amabala ithimba ebeliphethe. "Isikhathi sabo bese siphelile. Senze izinguquko ngenxa yokuthi sifuna ukuthi iqembu lisebenze kangcono esifundazweni. Angifuni ukugxila kakhulu ezintweni ezedlule. Sibheke kabanzi isimo esifundazweni futhi siyazi ukuthi yini okufanele siyenze. Sizojuba amalungu esigungu esiphezulu ukuthi ayolekelela ithimba. Amalungu esigungu esiphezulu azojutshwa kuzo zonke izifunda." UMbalula ubonge abebeyingxenye yethimba. Uthe uRadebe unikezwe omunye umsebenzi eqenjini. "Sizomemezela maduze ukuthi unikezwe muphi umsebenzi." UMbalula uphinde waveza ukuthi bazoba nemihlangano kuzo zonke izifunda lapho bezokwazisa khona amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithinta ubudlelwano babo nedlelandawonye elizongenela ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya ngokuzimela, i-SACP. "Sizokwazisa onke amalungu enhlangano ngesinqumo esithathwe emhlanganweni wesigungu esiphezulu okhethekile obungesonto eledlule. Sesiqalile vele ukwazisa amadlelandawonye ngesinqumo sesigungu esiphezulu. Sizoxoxa namakadebona kwi-ANC, uphiko lwabesifazane kanye nophiko lwentsha."

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ekhuluma nabezindaba ekomkhulu laleli qembu eWinnie Madikizela-Mandela House. UMHOLI we-EFF, uMnuz Julius Malema, ufuna iqembu lakhe linikezwe isikhundla soMphathiswa kuhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal. UMalema uthe noma kanjani bazosithola isikhundla asifunayo uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe KwaZulu-Natal. Ukusho lokhu ngesikhathi ekhuluma nabezindaba izolo. I-EFF yeseka imizamo yeMKP yokuchitha uhulumeni wokubambisana ophethe isifundazwe. Isiphakamiso seMKP sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, sachithwa ngonyaka odlule. UMalema uthe bazogcina bewuchithile uhulumeni waKwaZulu-Natal, wathi nabo bazoba yingxenye yokuphathwa kwesifundazwe uma sekuchithwe uhulumeni oholwa yi-IFP. "Sizoba nabaphathiswa KwaZulu-Natal kuhulumeni weMKP. Ungajahi, ijubane liyabulala. Siyasebenza lapha KwaZulu-Natal futhi kukhona okuzokwenzeka maduze. Uyazi ukuthi ngamahora amabili kuningi okungashintsha kwipolitiki." UMalema uthe bafuna ukuthi i-ANC ibambisane nabo neMKP. "Ilawa maqembu azophatha izwe ngomuso." UMalema uphinde wachaza kabanzi ngobudlelwano bakhe nabantu okuvela amagama abo kwikhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi. UMalema uvumile ukuthi uyazana nosomabhizinisi uMnuz Ze Nxumalo nosomatekisi osashona owayesatshiswa okwenyoka,

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ngoba abanye bazohamba bengaphinde bebuye embonini yezokuthutha. Uveze ukuthi kunezindlela zokunciphisa umonakalo abale kuzo ukunciphisa izikhathi zokusebenza, ukwehlisa isikhashana amaholo nokusiza abasebenzi abathintekayo ngemali. “Isifundo wukuthi ukuxoxa kusenesikhathi kuyasebenza. Uma abasebenzi, izinkampani nabasembonini bebambisana, kungenzeka ukuthi kunciphe umonakalo, kugcineke amakhono futhi imboni isimame.”

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Uzobhekana nesigwebo esinzima uRosemary Ndlovu olahlwe elokwakha itulo lokubulala Owayeyiphoyisa uSergeant Rosemary Ndlovu kanye nalowo asolwa naye, uNomsa Mudau, bavele eNkantolo yeMantshi, eKempton Park ukuzozwa isinqumo senkantolo ngecala labo lokwakha itulo lokuzama ukubulala. Nakanjani, inkantolo isikhiphile isinqumo, bobabili batholwa benecala ngetulo lango-2018 lokubulala umyeni kaMudau. Inkantolo izwe ukuthi uNdlovu wathintana nezigebengu ukuze zisize uMudau ekubulaleni umyeni wakhe. Uphenyo oluholwa nguCaptain Kheswa Mabunda luveze ukuthi uNdlovu watshela izigebengu ukuthi uMudau uzoxhumana nabo ngqo mayelana netulo lokubulala. Kwaba khona ukuxhumana ngocingo kanye nemihlangano eminingi phakathi kwabo noMudau, eTembisa, eKurhuleni. Kule mihlangano kuthiwa uMudau wacela amadoda ukuthi abulale umyeni wakhe, ethi uyamhlukumeza futhi uyajola. Inkantolo iphinde yezwa ukuthi uMudau watshela izinkabi ukuthi uzozikhokhela ngemuva kokufaka isicelo sokushona komyeni wakhe enkampanini yomshwalense. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi, izinkabi zashaya ungqimphothwe, zabikela umyeni, uJustice Mudau, ukuthi umkakhe ufuna ukumsoconga. Umyeni wavula icala lobugebengu emaphoyiseni aseNingizimu Afrika. Lokhu kuholele ekuboshweni kwabammangalelwa bobabili. Umshushisi wombuso u-Advocate Riana Williams uveze ubufakazi

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: UMGADLI weMamelodi Sundowns waseColombia, uBrayan Leon, okubhekwe lukhulu kuyena emidlalweni yeBetway Premiership ebasalele ABADLALI beMamelodi Sundowns ngeke babenawo uphawini wokuzithambisa ngenxa yenjabulo yokuzifaka kwaleli qembu laseChloorkop emdlalweni wamanqamu weCaf Champions League uma sebebhekene neStellenbosch FC kwiBetway Premiership kusasa ngo-7.30 ebusuku, eLoftus Versfeld Stadium, ePitoli. Iwini yeSudowns kulo mdlalo izogudluza esicongweni i-Orlando Pirates okuyiyona eqhwakele kwi-log kepha iphambili ngokwemidlalo. ISundowns ihamba ize iqholoshe kulezi zinsuku kulandela ukuzifaka kwayo emdlalweni wamanqamu weChampions League ngokunqoba kwi-Esperance Sportive de Tunis yaseTunisia, ngo 2-0 sekuhlangene yomibili imiphumela yemilenze. Nakuba uCardoso ekugqamisa ukuthi ukufaka kwakhe iSundowns kowamanqamu weCaf ngenye yezinto ezinkulu esezike zenzeka empilweni yakhe kodwa isicoco seligi kuyena simqoka ngendlela efanayo nezinye. Leli qembu laseChloorkop seliyikhonye amasizini ayisishiyagalombili kulandelana iligi enkulu yebhola laseNingizimu Afrika. Yize isobala imizamo yePirates kule sizini kodwa leli qembu likaCardoso yilona elikhombisa izimpawu zokuqina okufakazelwa ngamaphuzu eseliwaqoqile ekubeni lisele ngemidlalo emibili kwiBucs ebashiya ngamaphuzu amabili. “Kuhle ukujabulela esikwenzile kwiChampions League ngoba

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: UKHULISO Mudau eshikilisana noThulani Gumede emdlalweni weBetway Premiershp eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa Mamelodi Sundowns (0) 0 IRICHARDS Bay FC iqhubekile nokubophela inja nogodo ngamaphuzu enkundleni yayo yasekhaya ivimba iMamelodi Sundowns ekubuyeleni esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership zishayana zize zibukana eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay, ngoMgqibelo kusihlwa. ISundowns engompetha abavikela isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership ilahle ithuba lokugudluza izimbangi zayo embangweni weligi, i-Orlando Pirates, ivovwa inkani yiRichards Bay esikwenze kwaba yinjwayelo ukuthwalisa kanzima amaqembu ayizihambi enkundleni yayo yaseMhlathuze. IRichards Bay yenze okufanayo kule nkundla iguqisa iKaizer Chiefs ngo 1-0, yalandela ngokubambana ngo 2-2 nePirates. Ukudlala ngokulingana ngo 1-1 kwePirates neChiefs kowabakhaya baseSoweto ngoMgqibelo ntambama eFNB Stadium, eGoli, kunike iSundowns ithuba lokulwela ukuthola amaphuzu amathathu agcwele kwiRichards Bay obekuyiwona abezoyenza ibuyele esicongweni se-log yePremiership, kodwa iBay yala ukhasha. EZimnyama yizona ezisaqhwakele kwi-log ngamaphuzu awu-59, amaSandawana asendaweni yesibili ngawu-58, lokho okusho ukuthi leli qembu lasePitoli lidinga ukunqoba kumnyama kubomvu emdlalweni walo wangoLwesithathu

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasemuva kwiMilford FC, uKonke Khwanya, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka kuleli qembu elihambe ibanga kwiNedank Cup nelisembangweni wesicoco seligi yeMotsepe Foundation Championship YIZE ezakhe ziphume emzuliswaneni weyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank Cup kodwa umqeqeshi weMilford FC, uXanti Pupuma, ukuthatha njengesikhuthazi ukufinyelela kulesi sigaba somqhudelwano futhi ubona sezikulungele ukuncintisana namanye amaqembu adlala kwiBetway Premiership. IMilford, edlala esigabeni seMotsepe Foundation Championship, kwale kancane ifinyelele kowamanqamu eNedbank iguqiswa yi-TS Galaxy ngo 4-3 sekukhahlelwa amaphenathi kweyandulela owamanqamu alo mqhudelwano ngeSonto, eSolomon Mahlangu Stadium, KwaMhlanga. Kuma-quarterfinal eNedbank iMilford iguqise iSekhukhune United ngo 3-2 kumaphenathi, ngaphambi kokushikilisa elinye iqembu elidlala kwiPremiership, iGalaxy kowandulela owamanqamu. Ibe yiqembu lesibili elidlala kwiMotsepe Championship ukuwashiswa ijezi ngempelasonto kweyandulela owamanqamu eNedbank njengoba kube ngesifanayo nakwiCasric Stars nayo iguqiswa yiDurban City ngo 1-0 ngoMgqibelo. Ukuphuma kweMilford kwiNedbank sekusho ukugxila kwayo ngokuphelele emshikashikeni wokulwela ukunqoba isicoco seligi yeMotsepe Championship. “Yingxenye yomdlalo (ukwehlulwa). Akuyona inhlekelele ukwehlulwa kwethu, ngakho angikhathazekile ngakho. Sizothatha okuhle esikwenze kulo mdlalo esihlulwe

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: kwasani olubekwa phambi kwayo uma isiyibona intambo yesicoco. Ingaphansi kwengu-10 imidlalo esele ngaphambi kokusongwa kwesizini uma kubalwa nalona wabakhaya. Amathikithi awo adayise aphela yize bekunemibiko eminingi ngobuhixihixi. Kubikwe inqwaba yezinkinga ngohlelo lokuthenga amathikithi nemishini yakhona kodwa ngoLwesibili ekuseni iqalile ukusabalala imibiko ebiqinisekisa ukuthi sekwenzekile obekulindelekile (asedayiswe aphela). Asiside isikhathi iChiefs nePirates benqwamene kwiligi (ngoFebhuwari) osekungumlando ukuthi ezika-Aabdeslam Ouaddou zatitinya leli qembu eliphekwa nguCedric Kaze noKhalil Ben Youssef ngembudlu ka 3-0 wamagoli kaTsepang Moremi, Oswin Appollis no-Evidence Makgopa. Lesi sibhaxu esaba yisilonda bekubhekwe ukuthi sidlale indima ngokuthi kube nabalandeli beChiefs abebengeke bayingene indaba yokuyoyeseka kulo mdlalo. Emasontweni adlule enye ingxenye yabalandeli beChiefs beyinxenxa abanye ngokuduba iqembu bangayihambeli imidlalo yalo kuze kube abaphathi balo basukumela indaba yokuqasha umqeqeshi ngokugcwele. Lokhu bekulandela imiphumela emibi etholwe yiChiefs kulandelana nokuyilapho iqale khona imvunge ngamaqhinga asetshenziswa nguKaze noBen Youssef.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe URELEBOHILE Mofokeng we-Orlando Pirates oxinwe uSanele Barns weRichards Bay FC, ungomunye wabadlali abamqoka leli qembu laseSoweto, elithembele kubona emshikashikenei wokulwela isicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership UMQEQESHI we-Orlando Pirates, u-Abdeslam Ouaddou, unethemba lokuthi iRichards Bay FC izokwazi ukubenzela “ufefe” ngokubabambela iMamelodi Sundowns ukuze ingavuli kakhulu igebe esicongweni se-log yeBetway Premiership. IPirates iphinde yalahla amaphuzu idlala ngokulingana ngo 2-2 neRichards Bay ngoLwesihlanu, eMhlathuze Sports Complex, eRichards Bay. Ukulahla kwayo amaphuzu sekunike iSundowns ithuba lokuvula igebe esicongweni se-log yePremiership kwazise njengamanje la maqembu okuyiwona asembangweni wesicoco seligi asehlukaniswe yiphuzu elilodwa. ISundowns isaqhwakele ngamaphuzu awu-56 emidlalweni ewu-23, iPirates isendaweni yesibili ngawu-55 emidlalweni ewu-24, okunika iSundowns ithuba lokuvula igebe njengoba isasalele emuva ngomdlalo. AmaSandawane asayibambe kwiCaf Champions League, azobuyela kweyePremiership ngomdlalo wasekhaya neStellenbosch FC ngo-Ephreli 22, alandele ngowasekuhambeni neRichards Bay ngo-Ephreli 25, eMhlathuze. Kanti eZimnyama esezisalelwe yimidlalo eyisithupha ukusonga isizini, zizobuyela ensimini ngomdlalo wasekhaya naMaZulu FC ngoMgqibelo, e-Orlando Amstel Arena, eSoweto. “Nginethemba lokuthi iRichards Bay

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: nempilo yemindeni eminingi ngenxa yentsha ephila impilo efana nse neyalona wesilisa," kusho uThomas. Kulo mdlalo kuvele ukuthi omunye umlingisi ozogqama uDuduzile Ngcobo ozobe elingisa indawo kaMaGumede, ongunina kaMsebenzi. UMaGumede kuvela ukuthi into emkhathaza kakhulu wukuthi uwuthwele umndeni wakhe, futhi ukhathazekile ngendodana yakhe engazixaki ngokufuna umsebenzi. "Uhlala eyibelesele indodana yakhe ethi ayihambe iyofuna umsebenzi, kodwa yona ingakwenzi lokhu bese kugcina ngokuthi unina ayifunele yena umsebenzi. Kuzobonakala okuningi abazali ababhekana nakho. Ngakho ngikhuthaza kakhulu abafowethu nodadewethu ukuthi bawubuke lo mdlalo ngoba, bazozibona kuwo futhi bazofunda ukusukuma bazimele," kuchaza yena. Abanye abalingisi abazobonakala kulo mdlalo uNthabiseng Gwinya ozobe elingisa indawo kaMaMthimkhulu, Mondli Nkomo (baba uMthimkhulu), Kedibone Mulaudzi, Bongani Dube nabanye.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UTOYA Delazy ukhala ngokukhishwa inyumbazane kuleli UMZUKULU woMntwana wakwaPhindangene, uNontokozo "Toya Delazy" Buthelezi, usole umsakazo owenza inzuzo wase-KZN, iGagasi FM, ngokushaya umculo wakhe ngesithende. UToya Delazy (36), wodumo lwengoma ethi Pump It Up, uveze lokhu ngesikhathi edalula okumenza abhungukele e-UK. Uthe okwenze inkukhu yawusola umgqakazo ngokuthi unesigcwagcwa kwiGagasi wukuchithwa kwengoma apikwe kuyo kaMfumfana Kagogo. "Ngiqophe ingoma yokuqala yegqom' noMfumfana Kagogo. Umsakazi wacela uMfu ukuba ayithumele ukuze idlale engosini yegqom' kwiGagasi. Leli culo lingena khaxa kulolu hlobo lomculo kodwa kwathi uma bebona kunegama lami, yachithwa." UToya Delazy uthe isizathu esashiwo yizikhulu zomsakazo wukuthi ayihambisani nomculo odlalwa kulesi siteshi. "Ukushaywa ngesithende okuthule." Isolezwe Ngempelasonto liyizwile le ngoma esihloko sithi Khumbuza, inekhorasi eshaywe njengengoma kaBhizer ethi Gobis'iqolo. Okhulumela iGagasi FM, uKhulekani Shandu, uphike walala ngomhlane ukuthi bakhetha iphela emasini kulesi siteshi esisakazela eCornubia Mall, eThekwini. "Zonke izingoma ezithunyelwa kwiGagasi FM zidlula ekomitini eliqondene nomculo ukuze lizicubungule. Lolu hlelo lwenziwa kuzo zonke izingoma ezithunyelwayo,

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Image: Isithombe:BACKPAGEPIX UMQEQESHI wePolokwane City, uPhuti Mohafe, uyayingabaza i-Orlando Pirates embangweni wesicoco seligi yeBetway Premiership. UMohafe ubekhuluma emuva kokuthi ezakhe zikhale ngaphansi ngo 2-1 kweZimnyama e-Old Peter Mokaba Stadium, ePolokwane, ngoLwesithathu ebusuku. Amagoli ePirates ashaywe nguRelebohile Mofokeng noPatrick Maswanganyi. EleRise and Shine libekwe enethini nguBonginkosi Dlamini. IPirates isesicongweni se-log ngamaphuzu angu-44 lapho ibambene khona neMamelodi Sundowns esele ngegoli kuleli qembu laseSoweto. Ukuhlala embangweni kwePirates kwenyuse ithemba kubalandeli bayo abakholwa wukuthi izoyiketula iSundowns esiwine iligi amahlandla ayisishiyagalombili elandelana. Nokho uMohafe uyihlabile indlela ezidlala ngayo eZimnyama, wathi kungenzeka ziphinde ziyikhombe iligi. "Angiyiboni iPirates iba ngompetha beligi yePremiership. Angibaboni bewina iligi uma bedlala ngendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla,"kusho uMohafe. "Anginaso isiqiniseko, mhlawumbe iqhinga lethu lisebenzile, mhlawumbe sibahlelele kahle. Bathwale kanzima kithina. Kodwa ngokwendlela abadlale ngayo namuhla, angibaboni beba ngompetha." UMohafe ukhuluma kanjena nje, iPirates ihlulwe yinqwaba yamagoli abengenza ihlale ngokunethezeka esicongweni.

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: ebesihlele ngayo, ikakhulukazi esiwombebi sokuqala. Sizamile kwesesibili kodwa kuthe kungaphuma ikhadi elibomvu (Aubrey Modiba) kwanyomfeka konke ebese siqalile sikuzama njengokuthola igoli ebelizosikhulula. “Siwinile kodwa kufanele sibhukule esigabeni esilandelayo ngoba namaqembu esesizobhekana nawo ngeke asinike ithuba lokuphaphama uma esithole silele njengoba kwenzeke eMali." Kowandulela owamanqamu, iSundowns izobhekana ne-Esperance yaseTunisia edlule kwi-Al Ahly yase-Egypt ngo 4-2. Kuzobe kungokwesine amasizini elandelana ukuthi iSundowns idlala kowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League kusukela ngesizini ka-2022/2023. Kuwona wonke la masizini, iSundowns eshaywe yiPyramids FC yase-Egypt kowamanqamu ngesizini edlule, kayikaze isiqukule isicoco. Yasigcina ngo-2016, isaqeqeshwa nguPitso Mosimane. Ukugula kuyafana nakuCardoso owakhipha iSundowns kowandulela owamanqamu weChampions League ngo-2023/2024. Nakuba uCardoso oseke wasebenza eFrance, Portugal naseGreece ayikhipha iSundowns ngaleyo sizini kodwa wahluleka ukudla isicoco ehlulwa yi-Al Ahly yase-Egypt kowamanqamu. Ngesizini edlule, uCardoso uphinde wafika kowamanqamu esepheka iSundowns kodwa nakhona waguqa emdlalweni wamanqamu kwiPyramids FC yase-Egypt.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ABALINGISI bomdlalo iHomecoming okhonjiswa kuMzansi Wethu osekuvele ukuthi usuzokhonjiswa kahlanu ngesonto hhayi kathathu njengoba bekwenzeka UMBHALI womdlalo iHomecoming, uPhathu Makhwarela, uthe bayaziqhenya ngokusebenza nesiteshi esibeka phambili ukuthuthukisa amakhono entsha. Ukusho lokhu njengoba iMultichoice okuyinkampani engaphansi kweCanal + imemezele izindaba zokuthi usuzokhonjiswa izinsuku ezinhlanu phakathi nesonto umdlalo iHomecoming. Lo mdlalo ukhonjiswa kuMzansi Wethu (163), ngoMsombuluko kuya kuLwesithathu. Kodwa kusuka ngoMsombuluko ozayo usuzokhonjiswa zonke izinsuku phakathi nesonto. UPhathu wenkampani eqopha lo mdlalo iTshedza Pictures, uthe ukunikwa ezinye izinsuku ukuthi bakhombise umdlalo walolu hlobo osagcwele abalingisi abasazakhela igama kule ndima, kusho ukuqhubeka kokuvuleka kwamathuba omsebenzi. "Kuzovula amathuba amaningi nahlukene ukuthi umdlalo walolu hlobo unikwe ezinye izinsuku. Angikhulumi nje ngabalingisi kuphela kodwa ngisho labo abasebenza eminyangweni ehlukene kuwona umdlalo. Sisendimeni lapho amathuba engemaningi khona ngakho uma kuqhamuka ithuba elifana naleli kumele silisebenzise ukuze sixoxe izindaba esihlala sizibona emphakathini. Ngakho sifuna ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amakhono esinawo kuleli anayo indawo yokuveza lokho abagabe ngakho futhi bayakhula kulokhu

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UPhakelumthakathi Ndabandaba noXolani Khumalo KUKHALWE ngokushoda kobuholi kuhulumeni wakuleli ngokubhukula kwabantu bemasha bekhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu bakwamanye amazwe, abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Lokhu kugqame ngesikhathi kunempikiswano esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal, ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Amalungu esiShayamthetho abeshintshana, aveze ukuthi lolu daba luyaphuthuma njengoba abantu sebediniwe ukusonga izandla kukahulumeni, abamsola ngokungenzi lutho ngalolu daba. Phezu kokuba uhulumeni eveza ukuthi kukhona akwenzayo ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho njengoba kunenqwaba ephindiselwa emazweni abo kodwa abahola la mamashi bathathwe njengamaqhawe asukumele izwe lawo. Izishoshovu zamasiko okunguNgizwe Mchunu, noPhakelumthakathi bahola amamashi aqale esifundazweni, adlulela kuGompo City, ePitoli naseGoli, ukuzwakalisa ukungenami ngabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. UNksz Nompumelelo Gasa weqembu iMKP, uthe abantu bakuleli bazosolwa ngokuba nenzondo kubantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho ngenxa yokusukuma balungise izwe labo. Uthe kodwa akunjalo, ababuswa yinzondo kodwa balungisa isimo abasibona siphuma esandleni. "Bangamaqhawe abantu ababhukulile, bahola amamashi okukhala ngesihlava sokwanda kwabantu abakuleli ngokungemthetho. Batshengise ukuthanda nokukhathalela izwe labo ngokusukumela inkinga abayibona ikhula," usho kanje. Ukhale ngokuthi abantu bakuleli balinda amahora amade

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isthombe USIBONISO Sikhakhane we-Entsika Athletics Club ozimisele ngokubuyisa izinduku embangini yakhe emdlisele ogageni kwi-Two Oceans Marathon nyakenye njengoba ebuyela kulo mjaho ngo-Ephreli 11 UMGIJIMI wamabanga amade waKwaZulu-Natal, uSiboniso Sikhakhane, ubona sesifikile isikhathi sokudla umhlanganiso kwi-Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon osekube ngamahlandla amabili ekhala ngaphansi kuyona. USikhakhane (35) ogijimela i-Entsika Athletics Club, ungomunye wabagijimi ababhekiwe kwi-Two Oceans yanonyaka yebanga lika-56km ezogijinywa ngoMgqibelo, eKapa. Lo mgijimi odabuka eMadadeni, eNewcastle, uza kulo mjaho elubalubela ukukhipha amanye amangwevu ekwehluleni imbangi yakhe evikela isicoco, uKhoarahlane Seutloali waseLesotho omgabisele ngezithende nyakenye edla umhlanganiso kulo mjaho. USikhakhane ulale isibili kulo mjaho ngesikhathi esiwu-3:11:18, esala ngemizuzwana engu-31 kuSeutloali weHollywood Athletics Club oshaye intambo ngo-3:10:47. I-Two Oceans yanonyaka exhaswe nayinkampani yezimoto, i-BYD, inemiklomelo econsisa amathe njengoba igabe ngesizumbulu sika-R2.6 million. Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kwabesilisa nabesifazane uzokhala emuke no-R380 000, isibili kube u-R220 000, isithathu kube u-R100 000. “Namanje ngisasho, kwakufanele ngiyiwine i-Two Oceans ngonyaka odlule. Ngangineqhinga elihle lokuthi ngizowuqala ngiwuphethe

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: kweCity akubuzwa ukuthi kufaka ingcindezi emaqenjini aphezulu kwi-log okubalwa kuwona iMilford esesicongweni, ekhale ngaphansi kwi-University of Pretoria ngo 3-2 ekuhambeni ngoMgqibelo. I-The Citizens isendaweni yesine ngamaphuzu angu-25 emidlalweni engu-15. Isele ngamabili kwiMilford ezihola phambili ngawu-27 emidlalweni engu-15. IKruger United esendaweni yesithathu, iphunyukwe yithuba lokuhlala esicongweni se-log yeChampionship ibanjwa yiBaroka ngo 1-1 ekhaya. IKruger ibambene neCasric Stars ngamaphuzu angu-26 iqembu ngalinye. Uma iCity iphumelela ukuwina iligi ekupheleni kwesizini ka-2025/2026, izolandela ezinyathelweni zamaqembu agawulwa yizembe kwiPremiership kodwa ashesha ukubuya. Kulawo maqembu kubalwa iLamontville Golden Arrows eyadliwa yizembe ngesizini ka-2014/2015 kodwa yabuya ngelandelayo neChippa United eyehlela kwiChampionship ngesizini ka-2012/2013, yabuya ngesizini ka-2013/2014. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeMotsepe Foundation Championship: Highbury 1-2 Lerumo Lions; Gomora United 1-2 Cape Town City; Kruger United 1-1 Baroka; University of Pretoria 3-2 Milford; Venda 1-0 Upington City; Leicesterford City v The Bees; Hungry Lions v Black Leopards

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Ubucwebe obutholwe kubasolwa ababoshiwe Amaphoyisa KwaZulu-Natal abophe abasolwa abahlanu abaneminyaka ephakathi kuka-20 no-44 ubudala eMlazi kulandela ukugetshengwa kwesitolo sobucwebe enxanxatheleni yezitolo eMhlanga ngeSonto, 12 Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi beboshwa kutholakale ezinye zezinto okusolakala ukuthi zebiwe ngesikhathi kubanjwa inkunzi. Ngesikhathi amaphoyisa elungisa indawo yesigameko enxanxatheleni yezitolo, athole imininingwane emqoka yokuthi abasolwa esigamekweni sokugebenga bebefuna ozothenga izimpahla ezebiwe eMlaza. Amaphoyisa ophiko lweProvincial Murder and Robbery kanye neThekwini District Task Team asukumele ngokushesha abhekisa amabombo eMlaza athungatha abasolwa. Ngokulandela umkhondo ngolwazi olutholakelela, amaphoyisa abophe abasolwa abahlanu (5) ezintatha zangoMsombuluko, Ephreli 2026. Ngesikhathi kuqhubeka lo mkhankaso, kutholwe ubucwebe obulinganiselwa ezigidini ezintathu zamarandi kanye nezimpahla zokugqoka, amakhadi asebhange kanye nama-router. Abasolwa ababoshiwe babekwe amacala okugebenga amabhizinisi kanjalo nokuzama ukubulala. Bazovela eNkantolo yeMantshi eThekwini ngoLwesithathu, 15 Ephreli 2026.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: UDJ Zinzi Kahnish obuyele kuleli ngosizo lukahulumeni kulandela ukuvaleleka e-Israel Image: Instagram/Zinzi Kahnish UVALO belumi ngenhla kuDJ wakuleli obesengcupheni yokuthelwa amachaphazelo njengoba ibambene ngezihluthu phakathi kwe-Israel, United States of America (USA) ne-Iran. Le mpi esisesontweni layo lesibili isuswe wukugadla kwe-Israel ibambisene ne-USA e-Iran. I-Iran iziphindiselele ngeyayo imbubhiso yamabhomu e-Israel nasemazweni anamakhempu amasosha ase-USA. UDJ Zinzi Kahnish uzithole egaxele ngenxa yokuthi impi isuke ese-Israel lapho ebemenywe ukuthi eyodlala khona. “Ngijwayele ukuphuma ezweni ngiyodijeya. Bengingaqali ukuyodlala e-Israel. Bekungokwesibili futhi bengiqashwe emicimbini emithathu ehlukene,” kuchaza uZinzi kwi-video ayifake ezinkundleni zokuxhumana kulandela ukubuyela kwakhe ekhaya kuthangi. Uthe wahamba ngoFebhuwari 26 wafika ngakusasa lapho umcimbi wakhe wokuqala ubukhona njengoba ebeqashwe kwemithathu. Emibili ibiseTel Aviv nomunye eHaifa. Uthe konke kuhambe kahle efika ngoba wadlala ngaleso sikhathi. “Ngosuku olulandelayo savuswa wukukhala kwamacilongo satshelwa ukuthi sekuqale impi. Eqinisweni bengithuke kakhulu ngoba bengingazi ukuthi yini okumele ngiyenze. Yize benginamathikithi okubuya asekhokheliwe kodwa lokho bekungasathi shu ngoba umkhathi bese uvaliwe,”

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: Ngizokwenza konke okusemandleni ukusebenzela iqembu. Uma sizozama ukuwina iNdebe yoMhlaba futhi, ngizozama ngayo yonke indlela,"kufunga uMlaba ekhuluma ne-SABC. Ngaphandle kukaMlaba, ukaputeni weProtes yabesilisa kwi-ODI nakwi-Test, uTemba Bavuma, uvune izithelo zokushaya u-200 ekhaya ngesikhathi bebhekene neSri Lanka ngoDisemba nangesikhathi bedlala nePakistan eKapa bezibekisela indawo kowamanqamu we-World Test Championship abagcine beyiwinile. UBavuma ugoduke nomklomelo we-Test Player of The Year nowe-SA Fans' Player of The Year. Umklomelo womdlali ovelele kwabesilisa, utholwe nguKeshav Maharaj weProteas neHollywoodbets Dolphins. UMaharaj uthathe amawikhethi angu-40 phakathi kuka-Agasti 2024 noJanuwari 2025. Uqede engowesithathu kwabaphezulu ngokuthatha amawikhethi kwi-T20 World Cup kwabaMzansi. Isikhulu esiphezulu seKZN Cricket Union, uHeinrich Strydom, sithe:" Siyaziqhenya kakhulu ngabawinile abaphuma emndenini weHollywoodbets Dolphins. Konke ukusebenza kanzima nokuzinikela kuthele izithelo futhi konke kunifanele ukuwina. Kumnandi ukubona abadlali bethu bebonwa njengabahamba phambili ezweni futhi lokhu uyasigqugquzela umfutho wabo. Sithemba ukuthi sizoqhubeka nalokhu ngesizini entsha." Isiyonke imiklomelo yeCSA ihambe kanje: International Men's Newcomer of the Year: Ottneil Baartman Men's T20I

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: uqobo ngo-2016 ngenkathi ngithola iziqu zami zokuqala ze-Diploma in Management, lapho engazitshela khona ukuthi akusekho lutho okungase kuphazamise uhambo lwami lwezemfundo,” kusho uDkt Ngcobo. INTOKAZI ewunobuhle uDkt Lungile Ngcobo, ithweswe iziqu ze-Doctor of Philosophy in Business and Information Management e-DUT Lesi singqazu siqale ukufunda e-DUT ngo-2012 emkhakheni we-National Diploma in Management, okuthe ngo-2017 saqhubekela kwi-Bachelor of Technology in Management, kwase kuthi ngo-2021 senza iMaster of Management Sciences in Administration and Information Management. “Emva kokuphothula iMaster’s yami ngo-2023, ngashiya konke engangikwenza eNorth West ngaleso sikhathi, ngabuyela eMgungundlovu ngiyofunda, okwaba yisinqumo esingelula neze ngoba ngashiya phansi umsebenzi wami owawungiphethe kahle ngenzela ukufeza iphupho lami lokufunda ngigogode,” sisho kanje. Elandisa ngocwaningo lwezifundo zakhe, uDkt Ngcobo uthe ubegxile kakhulu ekubhekeni ukuthi ukunikezela ngolwazi oluseqophelweni eliphezulu kwabezikhungo zemfundo ephakeme kungazisiza kanjani futhi kangakanani izitshudeni ukuze zicijeke emqondweni futhi zikwazi ukuthatha izinqumo eziphusile ngempilo yazo. UDkt Ngcobo ubonge kakhulu abeHlomisa Skills Academy ngethuba abamnike lona lomfundaze

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: okutheni engingakusho noma ngikuqinisekise okwamanje ngesimo sami sezothando, kuphela nje ngithembisa ukuthi uma kunomuzwa engiwuzwayo ngezothando ngizowukhombisa ngengoma yami emnandi.” Khonamanjalo, omunye umculi kamaskandi ongaconsi phansi kubalandeli, uKhuzani “Indlamlenze” Mpungose, naye uqophe umlando enqoba indondo ye-Best Maskandi, obekungokokuqala kulo nyaka ukuthi kube khona lo mkhakha. Ekhuluma emva kokuklonyeliswa lo mklomelo, uKhuzani uthe ukunqoba le ndondo ufisa ukuthi kuvulele amaciko akule ndima amathuba ikakhulu ngoba abelokhu evaleleke kakhulu kule minyaka edlule. “Sekukaningi silwa singamaciko kamaskandi ukuthi umaskandi uhlonishwe ezingeni eliphezulu ngakho ukufika kulesi sigaba engikusona manje ngethemba ukuthi kuzovulela amanye amaciko iminyango kwenzeke okuhle kubeke nomculo wethu ebalazweni,” usho kanje.

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo ngababili ababulawa eNgwelezane, enyakatho yeKwaZulu-Natal SEKUVELE izinsolo ezishaqisayo zokuthi owesifazane waseSigisi, eNgwelezane, osanda kubulawa nendodana ngesihluku babulawa ngesinqindi. Lokhu kuza emva kokuthi umndeni wabafi uthole ubuhlalu okuthiwa babuhlobise isinqindi emva kwefriji ngempelasonto, njengoba bebefihlwa ngoMgqibelo. UNkk Thuli Khumalo nendodana yakhe, uMbuso Khumalo, kuthiwa bagwazwa bafa "yisigebengu" esahlasela ekhaya labo ngoLwesine olwedlule. Ngokusho komthombo, kuvele ngesikhathi kulungiselelwa umngcwabo ukuthi ummese, okuthiwa uNkk Khumalo wayesina ngawo ngesikhathi egcagca nyakenye awubonwa. “Izihlobo kuthiwa zigcine ziligqekeza ibhokisi lomshado likaNkk Khumalo, kulandela ukuthi isihlobo esisondelene nabafi, sale saphetha ukuthi livulwe,” kusho umthombo. Uqhube wathi izihlobo zigcine ziphoqa ukuthi ligqekezwe nokuyilapho okubonakale khona ukuthi ummese awukho. “Kuthiwa isihlobo kuthe uma sesibuzwa ukuthi uphi ummese, sathi siyabona ukuthi uthathwe yisigebengu,” kusho umthombo. Udalule nokuthi ngesikhathi kupeqululwa endlini, kube sekutholakala ubuhlalu obabuhlobise wona ummese, bulahlwe emva kwefriji. Ngesonto eledlule Isolezwe libike udaba ngokuthi izihlobo zabafi zishaya amakhala "ngesigebengu" okuthiwa sagasela kulo muzi, senzakalisa abafi. Zazikhala

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMNUZ Brown Mogotsi ophikwe yizinto evele eNkantolo yeMantshi eJohannesburg izolo Image: Itumeleng English KUSHIYANE ukwenza kubantu amagama abo avela kwiKhomishini ephenya izinsolo ezenziwa uKhomishana wamaPhoyisa KwaZulu-Natal, uLieutenant General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, njengoba abanye bephume behleka kwabanye kwaba nokukhala nokugedla kwamazinyo. Usomabhizinisi othi usebenza nophiko lwezinhloli, uMnuz Brown Mogotsi, uphikwe yizinto njengoba icala lakhe lihlehliselwe uMsombuluko. UMogotsi ubevele eNkantolo yeMantshi eJohannesburg lapho ebhekene khona necala lokuphazamisa ukusebenza kwengalo yomthetho. UMogotsi uboshwe emva kwezinsolo zokuthi waqamba amanga wathi kukhona abantu abebezama ukumsoconga. Imoto kaMogotsi yadutshulwa, amaphoyisa athi uMogotsi unesandla ekudutshulweni kwayo. Lokhu kwenzeka ngesikhathi uMogotsi kwakufanele ayovela kwiKhomishini yeJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga. Okhulumela amaphoyisa, uBrigadier Athlenda Mathe, uthe isibhamu esasetshenziswa ngesikhathi kudutshulwa imoto kaMogotsi sithinteka emacaleni okukhona kuwo nawokubulala. "Asikasitholi isibhamu kodwa siyaqhubeka nokusifuna." UBrigadier Mathe uthe kungenzeka ukuthi kuboshwe abanye abasiza uMogotsi ngesikhathi epheka itulo lokuqamba amanga. "Sifuna ukuthi achaze ukuthi kungani aqamba amanga athi kukhona abantu abebezama ukumsoconga. Ubufakazi obutholwe amaphoyisa aphenya

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: IQEMBU elicula owokholo iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors elizonandisa ngehora lokukhumbula u-Irvin Sihlophe, emcimbini Uvukile Gospel Music Festival IQEMBU laseSwatini, iNcandweni Christ Ambassadors, lizohlonipha amagalelo ka-Irvin Sihlophe, ongasekho kodwa owayengomunye wabasunguli bomcimbi uVukile Gospel Festival, ozobanjelwa enkundleni yezemidlalo Ugu Sports and Leisure, ePort Shepstone, ngeSonto. Lokhu kuvezwe omunye wabahleli balo mcimbi uMjosty. Uthe konke sekumi ngomumo ngakubona ngalo mcimbi, abakulindele wukuthi kufike abazowuhambela njengoba kukhombisa ukuthi unesasasa. UPHINDIi P okubaculi abazonandisa "INcandweni kulo nyaka izonandisa ehoreni esilithatha njengeliyisipesheli, lokuqhubeka sihlonipha futhi sikhumbula uSihlophe njengomunye wabantu esasungula naye umcimbi, ngakho sithi nje abantu abafike bezojabula nathi. Konke sekumi ngomumo namathikithi asekhona," kusho uMjosty. Uveze ukuthi ngemuva kweminyaka engu-12 umcimbi bawuqala, bakhethe ukuthi ubuyele enkundleni owaqala kuyona. "Bese kuyiminyaka umcimbi siwubambela ngaphakathi ehholo elikhona kule ndawo kodwa manje ngemuva kokuthi sihlale phansi sabonisana nethimba elihlela umcimbi, sibone ukuthi asibuyele lapho wethulwa khona. Abanye abantu bebekuveza ukuthi bawuthanda usenkundleni, ngakho sikhethe ukuthi siwubuyisele khona futhi

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: izidumbu zabane zitholakale njengoba kusaqhubeka ukubhekwa kwabagilwa ngohlelo lwamathimba ezinhlekelele esifundazweni. “NgoLwesihlanu amathimba abecinga abagilwa, athole izidumbu ezimbili zabesifazane. Esokuqala sitholwe emfuleni iNadi, eMsinga kwathi esesibili satholakala emfuleni uThukela, eNkandla,” kusho uButhelezi. Uveze ukuthi oyedwa wabo ubekhulelwe, waqhuba wathi, ukucingwa kwabaminzile kuphinde kwaqhubeka nangoMgqibelo, kwaholela ekutholakaleni kwezinye izidumbu ezimbili. “Izidumbu ezimbili zitholwe emfuleni uThukela. Esowesifazane sitholwe endaweni engaphansi kukaMasipala waseMsinga kwathi esowesilisa satholakala eMakhabeleni, ngaphansi kukaMasipala waseMvoti,” usho kanje. Uqinisekise eyokuthi abagilwa abatholakele baneminyala ephakathi kuka-25 kuya ku-40. Ube esedlulisa amazwi enduduzo emindenini elahlekelwe, wancoma amathimba ngomsebenzi oncomekayo wokucisha abaminzile ukuze imindeni ithole ithambo labathandiweyo bayo. “Abesilisa ababili abakatholwa kanti amathimba asaqhubeka nokwenza konke okusemandleni ukubathungatha. UMnyango ngokubambisana noMasipala waseMsinga, ulokhu uxhumane njalo nemindeni ethintekile ukuyeseka ngalesi sikhathi esinzima,” usho kanje.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: wenza isibonelo ngomculi owine kwiBest Styled Artist. Nakuba kunjalo wabuye wazisola ngale nkulumo emuva kokugxekwa. Usomahlaya uMpho Pops uthe Zee ubulawe abalandeli ebebemvotela. Uthe kunabanye ebebemeseka ngezinhliziyo kodwa bengamvoteli ngoba bezitshela ukuthi bakhona abazomvotela. "Ngisho eyintandokazi yami, angizovota ngoba ngithemba ukuthi abanye bazomvotela. Sonke isikhathi sihlale sizitshela ukuthi umculi othize uzowina ngenxa yokuthandwa kodwa kuvele kungenzeki," kusho uMpho kwiPeople Need Comedy. ULondie London wodumo kwiReal Housewives of Durban uthe uZee walinyazwa wukuqokwa eminxeni eminingi ngoba amavoti akhe acazeka. "Ukube wayeqokwe eminxeni emithathu kwakungenzeka awine," kusho uLondie London kwiRead The Room Podcast. Imizamo yokuthola ukuphawula kokhulumela iSABC, uMmoni Ngubane, ayiphumelelanga kwaze kwashaya isikhathi sokushicilela.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: khona isibili ngesikhathi esingu-2:30:25, ngemuva kukaSicelo Mkhwanazi odle umhlanganiso ngo-2:28:43. Nyakenye, udle umhlanganiso kwi-Best of the Best Marathon yebanga lika-42km, walala endaweni ka-13 kwiPrince Mangosuthu Ultra Marathon yebanga lika-52km. “Ngizobe ngiwugijima okokuqala lo mjaho, angiwazi umzila. Nokho lo mjaho ngizulungiselela ngawo ukuyogijima iComrades Marathon. “Abagijimi abaningi engixoxe nabo bangitshele ukuthi lo mjaho (we-ZDM) uyisivivinyo esihle ekuzilungiseleleni iComrades, ikakhulukazi njengoba eyokulo nyaka izogijinywa kukhushukwa (kusukwa eThekwini kuyiwa eMgungundlovu). Ngakho ngizodinga zonke izikhalo ukulungela umjaho weComrades,” kusho uMafuleka owenza isikhathi esingu-5:39:55 ngo-2023 ephuma endaweni ka-21. “Kulo nyaka ngizamile ukubona ukuthi yikuphi okuzongisebenzela. Kuthatha isikhathi ukuthola ifomu ekahle, kudinga isikhathi esiningi nokubekezela. Okubalulekile wukuthi ngigweme ukulimala. Kodwa nginesiqiniseko sokuthi ngizokwazi ukungena nabayishumi bokuqala kulo mjaho weZululand Marathon. "Abagijimi abaningi bazobe belwela umkomelo omkhulu ngakho akuzukuba ngumjaho olula. Kodwa ngizimisele ukwenza kahle.” Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kulo mjaho we-ZDM uzokhala emuke no-R100 000, isibili kube wu-R50 000, isithathu kube wu-R25 000. Izinombolo zizolandwa ngoMgqibelo, ePrince

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: umdlalo. Lokhu kunanelwe yinkulumo kaPietersen kwabezindaba lapho ekhale khona ngamaphutha nokulimala kukaHooker. “Nakulokhu siphinde sazenzela phansi emdlalweni obungekho lukhuni kangako ukuthi besingashaywa kuwona,” kusho uPietersen. “Okubuhlungu kakhulu ngukulinyalelwa nguHooker olinyazwe ngendlela engavumelekile ngokwemithetho yombhoxo kodwa abebephethe umdlalo bangasibona isidingo sokumvikela. “Okuningi ebesikuhlelile bekuncike kuHooker okuthe angalimala ihlombe zaqala nezinkinga zethu. Ngeke sikubalekele ukuthi sizenzele thina phansi ngokuyeka amathuba esiwathole esiwombeni sesibili. “Umkhuba wethu wokungazicindezeli izitha noma sesizithole lapho sizifuna khona uphinde waqhubeka. “Siyazama ukuwagwema la maphutha kodwa asaqhubeka nokuvela emidlalweni yethu yakamuva. “Akukho esisengakwenza ngaphandle kokubuyela ejimini siyobona ukuthi singawalungisa kanjani amaphutha ngenhloso yokujika imiphumela emidlalweni ezayo,” kusho uPietersen. UHooker ulimala nje, wengeza ku-Eben Etzebeth, Aphelele Fassie, Bongi Mbonambi, Grant Williams noJordan Hendrikse bonke abangeke besabonakala kule sizini ngenxa yesizathu esifanayo.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ekwesekeni izinguquko ezizokwenza ukuthi kuzuze abantu abahlala ezindaweni zamakhosi." Kuxabene ubendle kwiNgonyama Trust njengoba iSilo singahoshelani namalungu ebhodi esiwasola ngokuthi awafuni ukusamukela njengosihlalo webhodi. Imizamo kaNgqongqoshe wezoMhlaba, uMnuz Mzwanele Nyhontso, yokuchitha amalungu ebhodi yahluleka. UNyhontso waqale wabhalela amalungu ebhodi incwadi ewabuza ukuthi kungani kufanele angamiswa. Amalungu ebhodi atshela uNyhontso ukuthi akanawo amandla okuwamisa emsebenzini. Muva nje, uNyhontso uzame ukuhlakaza ibhodi kodwa isinqumo sakhe sachithwa yiNkantolo eNkulu eMgungundlovu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: esisha. "Iningi labantu abazoqokelwa esigungwini esiphezulu abantu ababe yingxenye yobuholi bokuqala ngesikhathi sikhankasela ukunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2024. Abanye abazoqokwa sizobheka ebuholini bezifundazwe nakomakadebona ukuze sizokwenza isiqiniseko sokuthi iqembu limeleleke kahle yonke indawo." Uhlaka olusha lithweswe ijoka lokuqinisekisa ukukhulula abahlwempu emaketangeni enhlupheko kanye nokulwa nokungalingani uZuma athe kudla lubi ngaphansi kukahulumeni wokubambisana. UZuma uthe angeke bavume ukuthi iqembu liphazanyiswe osomathuba abafuna izikhundla. "Umbiko uthole ukuthi iqembu lisengcupheni ngenxa yosomathuba abafuna izikhundla, izimpi zangaphakathi nokungena kwabantu abahlose ukuzophazamisa ukusebenza kweqembu. Angeke sivume ukuthi abantu abathanda izikhundla bathikameze umkhankaso wokukhulula abantu." UZuma uthe basemkhankasweni wokunqoba ngamalengiso ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwangoNovemba, nokhetho lukazwelonke lwango-2029. UZuma unxuse onke amaqembu amancane ukuba ahlangane kwakhiwe inhlangano eyodwa. "Imiphumela yocwaningo ikubeka ngokusobala ukuthi abantu bakhathele amaqembu ezepolitiki. Inkohlakalo yenze ukuthi abantu bengabe besawathemba amaqembu ezepolitiki. Yonke indawo abantu baphelelwe ithemba ngenxa yokwehluleka kwezinhlelo zikahulumeni ukushintsha impilo yabantu. Senze izinguquko ebuholini beMKP ngoba nakhu sifuna ukuthi iqembu likwazi

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: "Ngisola ukuthi le nto ihlangene nombango oqhubekayo ngendaba yesitolo. Kukhona umuntu owayenesitolo ngaphambi kokuthi ngisivule nami kodwa wasiyeka. Emuva kwesikhathi, wabuya wasivula futhi kodwa abantu bangayingena indaba yakhe, baqhubeka nokuthenga kwesami. NgeSonto ebusuku bengibilisa amaqanda amathathu. Esebilile ngesehlisile isitofu. Emuva kwalokho, ngizwe iqanda liqhumisa okwesibhamu, amanzi angithela esandleni nasesiswini. Inyama yakulezi zindawo ibizihambela. Bangishaye ngovutha," kusho uMsimang. "Namuhla (izolo) udokotela ungibuzile ukuthi ngifuna kanganani ukuyolwa le mpi, ngamtshela ukuthi ngizimisele kakhulu. Uthe uzonginika kusuka namuhla kuze kube ngoLwesithathu, abone ukuthi isimo sami sinjani. Emuva kwalokho, uzobe esekhipha incwandi eqinisekisa ukuthi ngeke ngikwazi ukulwa uma isimo singesihle. Ungiyale ngokuthi ngingangcweki nabanye abashayisibhakela okwamanje kuze kube kuyaphola kahle esandleni." Kulezi zimpi, umpetha we-SA Featherweight uLindelani "TWT" Sibisi uzovikela ibhande kuBongani Fule wase-Eastern Cape. Kwenye impi ebhekwe ngabomvu, uNhlakanipho "GTI" Kunene uzobanga ibhande le-IBO Minimumweight noNhlanhla "Kilimanjalo" Tyirha wase-Eastern Cape.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: NJENGOBA selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho oluzayo lohulumeni basekhaya kuleli, iKhomishini yezoKhetho isigqugquzele abavoti ukuthi bazibheke lapho bebhalise khona. Ikhomishini ithe lokhu kuzosiza ekutheni umvoti uzozazi lapho ezobe ekhona ngosuku lokhetho okunguNovemba 4, 2026. Izitshudeni ezihlala kude namakhaya, ezizobe zisezikhungweni zemfundo ephakeme ngosuku lokhetho, ziyalelwe ukuthi zibhalise lapho zizobe zikhona ukuze zikwazi ukuvota. UMnuz Sy Mamabolo, isikhulu esiphezulu sekhomishini, uthe njengoba selumenyezelwe usuku lokhetho, bahlabela phambili namalungiselelo alolu suku olukhulu. Uthe bazimisele ukubamba ukhetho olungenazihibe futhi lingaphazamiseki. "Kubalulekile ukuthi abantu bazazi ukuthi bazobe bekuphi ngosuku lokhetho. Umuntu uvota lapho ebhalise khona kuphela ngakho kumele bazi ukuthi ngosuku lokhetho bazobe bekuphi." Ikhomishini izovula ithuba ngoJuni 20 no-21, ukuthi abantu babhalisele ukuvota. Kuhlelwe nokuthi elinye ithuba liphinde livulwe ngo-Agasti. Njengoba uMengameli Cyril Ramaphosa ememezele usuku lokhetho, osekusele ngukuthi uNgqongqoshe wezokuBusa ngokuBambisana neziNdaba zoMdabu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, afake lolu suku ngokusemthethweni emqulwini kahulumeni, i-Government Gazette. Ngelanga ayofaka lolu suku ngaphansi kwalo mqulu, lokho kuyosho ukuvalwa

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ngabo oMdonso, King Sfiso, Lee Hlophe, nalezi zintokazi eziwine emncintiswaneni kamama uMahlangu," kuphetha umthombo. Isolezwe izolo libike ngokungavuselelwa kwenkontileka kaZeal Dladla, okuthe ekuseni khona izolo waziqinisekisa lezi zindaba. UZeal ubonge bonke abamesekile endimeni yokusakaza, ezinhlelweni abekuzona kulo msakazo. Uthe okwamanje akukho angakusho ngokuthi ikusasa lakhe libhekephi, kodwa uzoveza kubalandeli bakhe ukuthi uya kuphi. Omunye okucacele nengane encane wukuthi ngempela uyahamba uSphongo Dladla obhale kuFacebook ukuthi sekusele izinsuku ezimbalwa agcine ohlelweni abenguphrojusa walo. Kulesi siteshi kuvela ukuthi bangu-11 abaphelelwe wumsebenzi. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi ngoMsombuluko, iSABC izomemezela izinguquko, ezizozwakala kulo msakazo kusuka ngo-Ephreli 1. Nasemsakazweni Igagasi FM, kulindeleke ukuthi izinguquko zakhona zimenyezelwe ngempelasonto.

IMBONGI uNhlanhla Mhlongo kwabazonandisa emcimbini wedili lezinkondlo nomculo Imiyezane Poetry Experience Eqhuba, uthe lona wumcimbi azobe ededela kuwona ingxenye yezinkondlo aziwa ngazo endimeni, iningi lazo ezikwi-EP yakhe yango-2023 esihloko sithi Imiyezane, nokuyiyona futhi adla ngayo umhlanganiso ewina emunxeni we-Best Poet kuma-SATMA Awards ngo-2024. UMCULI uMandisa Cebekhulu kwabazonandisa emcimbini wedili lezinkondlo nomculo Imiyezane Poetry Experience “Inhloso enkulu wukuveza umsebenzi wami wobuciko unjengoba unjalo kusukela ezinkondlweni zami ezindala kuya kwezintsha ukukhombisa ukuthi sengikhule kangakanani ngobuciko bami ngibe futhi ngelapha imiphefumulo yabazobe bethamele umcimbi,” usho kanje.
