author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: ngayo ngosuku lwesehlo, yohlobo lweSuzuku ngeyentombi kaSotheni, kanti yayishayelwa uWiandre Pretorius. “Ngokophenyo lwethu, umdubuli owadubula uFakazi D wamdubula esemotweni futhi lokho kungenzeka kuphela uma unoshayasibhamu oqeqeshwe kakhulu ukuba enze kanjalo. Wadubula kabili kwathi uFakazi D wabulawa ngenhlamvu eyodwa. Uphenyo lwethu lusitshela nokuthi uWiandre Pretorius wayengumshayeli wemoto,” kusho yena. UPretorius,wathatha impilo yakhe ngomhla ka7 Febhruwari enentombi yakhe egaraji likaphethiloli eBrakpan, eGauteng. Lokhu kwenzeka ngemuva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa esinde esigamekweni okusolakala eyongena kwakhe eBoksburg.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: ngezindlela ezehlukene izindaba esinazo kuleli ngakho siyajabula. Sizoqhubeka ukuveza obekujwayeleke kulo kodwa ngendlela entsha, ejwayelekile ezokwazi ukuthi ijatshulelwe ababukeli balo manje, abanye abangakaze balubone phambilini," kusho uPatience. UDichaba Phalatse wakwaSABC uthe ukubuya kwalolu hlelo kuyindlela efana nesiko yokukhombisa izinhlelo ezinomlando zakuleli. Uthe kuningi abantu abazokubona, okuzobafundisa, kubavule amehlo, okuyisinqumo abangazisoli ngaso ukubuyisa uhlelo olufana nalolu.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: inkululeko okubalwa kuwo loyo owaba umengameli wokuqala wakuleli ngaphansi kombuso wentando yeningi, uMnuz Nelson Mandela, akubona abe-ANC. "Akuyena umuntu we-ANC. Ithina esamqeqesha sase simthumela ukuthi ayolwa nobandlululo. SiwuMkhonto, naye wayewuMkhonto. Akekho umuntu ozositshela ukuthi akusiyena owethu. Abantu abangazange benze lutho bese kuba ibona abathi umuntu wethu lona. Akunjalo. Asikwazi ukuba nombango uma sekufanele sikhumbule isosha lethu. "Lokhu esikwenzayo sikwenza ngezifiso zomndeni. Asisho ukuthi abanye abangakwenzi. Nabo bazokwenza ngesikhathi sabo. Akekho umuntu ozosiphuca oMandela. UMkhonto wakhiwa oMandela. Akekho umuntu ozosiphuca la makhehla."

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: ULEBO M obopha usomahlaya ngokuhlekisa ngengoma yakhe UCELA usizo lokuxhaswa ngemali usomahlaya okuthiwa akakhokhe u-$20 million (imali elinganiselwa ku-R334 million) ofunwa wuphrojusa womculo weThe Lion King, uLebo M, ngokwenza ihlaya ngengoma yakhe yalo mdlalo. ULebo M ubopha, uLearnmore Mwaanyenyeka odume ngelikaLearnmore Jonasi, ngokwenza kwakhe ihlanya ngengoma iCircle of Life/Nants’Ingonyama. ULearnmore, oke wawina indondo yePan African Comic of the Year kumaSavanna Comics’ Choice Awards kuleli, uhumushe ingoma ngokuthi ithi, “Buka, nali ibhubesi. Nkosi Yami!” Isenzo salo somahlaya odabuka eZimbabwe kodwa osebenzela kakhulu e-United States of America, asehlanga kahle kuLebo M oveze ukuthi uzame ukuxhumana nanye ngaphambi kokumbopha. Umbophela e-United States District Court for the Central Ditrict of California. ULearnmore usebhale ekhasini lakhe le-Instagram, ukuthi okuqale kuyihlaya sekundlondlobale kwaba yimpi yezomthetho. “Ngiwumkhiqizi ongakaze ahlose umonakalo kodwa manje ngibhekene nezindleko ezinkulu zomthetho ukuze ngivikele ilungelo lami lokukhuluma nokuxoxa amahlaya. Izindleko zokuzivikela zingaphezu kwamandla ami ngakho ngidinga usizo lwenu,” kubhala uLearnmore. Uthe noma ngabe

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: YILO iqembu labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC KUVELE okushaqisayo ngokwaholela ekubhidlikeni kweqembu lebhola labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC. Ngaphambi kokuba leli qembu libe yinhlakanhlaka kukhona abanukwa ngokuthwala nangokuthwebula izinhlanhla zabanye, abanye babizwa ngaphansi kweziketi zonina, abanye bacishe babambana ngezandla, kwakhona ukufelana ngamathe futhi kwakhonjwana nangezibhamu. Akugcinanga lapho, kukhona osolwa ngokuzitika ngocansi nomfazi womunye wabaculi beMaskandi FC. Kukhona ababuye basola ukudliwa bume kwemali yeqembu yiziphathimanda zalo. Isolezwe lithole ukuthi umfantu waqala ngengxabano eyayishisa phansi egunjini lokugqokela emuva kwemidlalo iJammin To Soccer Tournament ezinkundleni eTsakane Stadium eGauteng, ngoJulayi 2024. Yingesikhathi umculi wokholo uMdumiseni "Dumi Mkokstad" Nzimande weGospel FC ecishe ebambana ngamawashingi nozakwabo we-hip hop, uSiyabonga "Big Zulu" Nene. YILO iqembu labaculi bakamaskandi, iMaskandi FC Ngokusho komculi kamaskandi owaqala ukuduma kuma-DVD kaMgqumeni, uKhwezi "Smomoza" Mkhize, ingxabano yashisa phansi kubaculi bakamaskandi sebesegunjini lokugqokela kule nkundla kangangoba kwacishe kwabanjwana ngezandla. USmomoza ubegonyuluka lezi zindaba ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook. Uze waveza ukuthi kwaze kwakhona abanuka abanye ngokufuna ukuthwebula izinhlanhla

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Umgijimi ozodla umhlanganiso kwabesilisa nabesifazane uzokhala emuke no-R380 000, isibili kube u-R220 000, isithathu kube u-R100 000. “Namanje ngisasho, kwakufanele ngiyiwine i-Two Oceans ngonyaka odlule. Ngangineqhinga elihle lokuthi ngizowuqala ngiwuphethe kanjani umjaho. Konke kwahamba ngendlela engangihlele ngayo, kodwa ngenza iphutha elikhulu ngenkathi ngilanda isigubhu samanzi okuphuza endaweni engafanele, nokuyilapho enganika khona uKhoarahlane ithuba lokuvula igebe kwase kuba nzima ukumfica,” kusho uSikhakhane, olale isithathu kwiPrince Mangosuthu Ultra Marathon 52km nyakenye. USikhakhane ulala isibili nyakenye nje, ngo-2022 walala isithathu ewugijima okokuqala lo mjaho we-Two Oceans, nokho wangawugijima ngo-2023 nango-2024. Lo mgijimi oqeqeshwa yinkakha yezokugijima eMzansi, uHendrick Ramaala, nakulo nyaka usebenzise umjaho waseBotswana, i-FNB Kazungula Bridge Marathon yebanga lika-42.2km, ebisekuqaleni kukaMashi, ukuzicijela i-Two Oceans. Ulale isibili kulo mjaho ngesikhathi sika-2:19:17, ngemuva kuka-Isaac Mpofu waseZimbabwe odle umhlanganiso ngo-2:14:18. “Njengoba ngikwaze ukwenza isikhathi esingaphansi kwalesi ebengizibekele sona esingu-2:20, kwi-FNB Kazungula Marathon, lokho kusho ukuthi isabambe ngakho ngamalungiselelo ami e-Two Oceans. Inhloso yami wukwenza isikhathi esingcono

author: Zimbili Vilakazi
text: Image: Oupa Mokoena/African News Agency(ANA) ULONGWE Twala, usephumele obala wanxusa ukuthi kungenelele uLieutenant-General Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi, kanjalo neJaji uMbuyiseli Madlanga, ukuze kuvele iqiniso ngokubulawa kukaSenzo Meyiwa. Usho kanje encwadini ebonwe yiSolezwe, elithole ngemithombo yalo ukuthi usanda kuyibhalela unina kaSenzo, uNkk Ntombifuthi Meyiwa. Kule ncwadi uLongwe ugcizelela eyokuthi yena akanasandla ekubulaweni kukaSenzo, nakuba kunukwa yena, ikakhulukazi ezinkundleni zokuxhumana. ULongwe uthe uNkk Meyiwa akazame ukuthola usizo kuMkhwanazi nakuMadlanga ngoba bayahlonishwa ngomsebenzi wabo. “Nginxusa ukuba ucindezele ukuthi ijaji, abameli, amaphoyisa kanjalo noMbuso, bakuvumele ukuthi ulalele inkulumo ephelele eqoshiwe lapho uBongani Ntanzi, egonyuluka khona phambi kweMantshi uVivienne Cronje,” kusho uLongwe. Uqhube wathi uNkk Meyiwa uma eselalela le nkulumo eqoshiwe, kufanele acele ukungayilaleli yedwa kodwa ayilalele noMkhwanazi noMadlanga. “Wena njengonina kaSenzo, kufanele uzizwele ukuthi wayekhuluma ngenkululeko noma wayengaphansi kwengcindezi,” kusho uLongwe. Ngo-Okthoba 2023, iJaji uRatha Mokgoatlheng lanquma ukuthi inkulumo eqoshiwe, ngeke yamukelwe njengobufakazi obuphathekayo enkantolo yomthetho. ULongwe uthe okuqukethwe kule nkulumo, yikho kanye okufanele kulalelwe uNkk

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: KUZOCACA kuleli sonto ngekusasa likaMphathiswa wezokuThuthukiswa koMphakathi KwaZulu-Natal, uNksz Mbali Shinga, olahlwe yicala lokushaya indiva umyalelo weqembu. I-NFP izokhipha isigwebo esizonikwa uNksz Shinga ngoLwesithathu. Lokhu kuvezwe uNobhala Jikelele weNFP obambile, uMnuz Sunset Xaba, encwadini ayibhekise ezinhlakeni zeqembu. UNksz Shinga ubekade ebhekene nekomiti lokuqondiswa ubugwegwe, emva kokuba ashaya indiva umyalelo weqembu wokuba aseke isiphakamiso sokungabethembi ubuholi bukaNdunankulu waKwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Thami Ntuli, esasifakwe yiMKP. I-NFP iyona engababeki benkosi esiShayamthetho saKwaZulu-Natal. UXaba uthe embikweni wesikhashana, ulahlwe yiwo wonke amacala abhekene nawo. "Isinqumo sekomiti siveza obala ubucayi bamacala awenzile. Isinqumo siyisifundo kulabo abangafuni ukulandela umthetho. Onke amalungu kufanele ahloniphe umthetho weqembu, akukhathaleki ukuthi uphethe siphi isikhundla." UXaba uthe ikomiti kulindeleke ukuthi likhiphe isigwebo ngoLwesithathu. "Amalungu ekomiti elibhekelele ukusebenza kwansuku zonke kwiNFP, ayanxuswa ukuba alungiselele ukukhishwa kwesigwebo. Ayanxuswa ukuba aqhubeke nokuhola iqembu ngokucophelela." Umthombo ongaphakathi uthe kulindeleke ukuthi iNFP imxoshe uNksz Shinga ekubeni yilungu leqembu, okuzomlahlekisela ngesikhundla sokuba uMphathiswa. Uqhuba umthombo, uthe iNFP ihlela ukufaka

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: UMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa I-IFP isijube uphenyo emva kokusabalala kwenkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi ngeyelungu lesiShayamthetho elizwakala ligququzela ukuthi kushaywe ozakwabo eqenjini ngesikhathi linengxoxo nowesifazane ozwakala ethi angeke asigqoke isikibha esinobuso bomholi weqembu, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa. I-IFP isiqale uphenyo lwangaphakathi emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe okukholakala ukuthi eyelungu lesiShayamthetho eliphinde libe uSihlalo wophiko lwentsha kwi-IFP KwaZulu-Natal, uMnuz Mncedisi Maphisa. Kule ngxoxo lona okukholakala ukuthi uMaphisa uzwakala ekhuluma nowesifazane okhala ngokuthi kukhona ababanjwa ngophondo emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko e-IFP. Ozwakala njengoMaphisa uthi ugqugquzela ukuba kushaywe labo abayizimbangi zabo eqenjini. Okhulumela i-IFP, uMnuz Mkhuleko Hlengwa, uthe bayalele uMaphisa ukuba alethe incazelo ngalolu daba. "Le nkulumo eqoshiwe ingahumusheka ngokuthi igqugquzela udlame emihlanganweni yokugcotshwa kwamaziko. Lolu daba lubucayi ngakho ke ubuholi be-IFP buzolusukumela. I-IFP inxusa amalungu eqembu ukuba ehlise amaphaphu, agweme ukukhuluma ngalolu daba esidlangalaleni." Akukhona okokuqala uMaphisa efakwa obishini inkulumo eqoshiwe. Ngesikhathi esayimeya kaMasipala waseBaQulusini wadilizwa emva kokuba kusabalale inkulumo eqoshiwe enamagama alumelayo. UMaphisa kuthiwa wenza

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: U-CYNTHIA Shange umndeni wakhe osuveze ukuthi uzofihlwa eKZN Image: Image: Instagram UZOFIHLWA ngeSonto, KwaZulu-Natal, umlingisi owazakhela igama ngeminyaka yama70s, uCynthia Shange (76), oshone ngezintatha zangoMsombuluko, kwesinye sezibhedlela eThekwini. Okhulumela umndeni, uLolo Morapeli, uthe angakuqinisekisa okwamanje ukuthi inkonzo kaCynthia izobe ibanjwe amaNazaretha, aseKuphakameni, njengoba uCynthia ebeyingxenye yaleli bandla. "Okwamanje kusabhekwa indawo la kuzobanjwa khona inkonzo, yiyona esasibambile nesenza singakwazi ukumemezela into eqondile. Umndeni usahlanganisa amakhanda ukuphuma nesixazululo kodwa ngingasho ukuthi izoba ngeSonto, KwaZulu-Natal," kusho uLolo. UCynthia udlula emhlabeni nje, ngo-2024 waveza ukuthi kwake kwambulwa kwembeswa kuye ngenxa yesifo sikashukela kangangoba waze wanqanyulwa izinzwane. Wazisholo yena ukuthi wasizwa uShembe lesi sifo sifuna ukumjuqa ngalowo nyaka. Umufi wadalula ukuthi uphethwe yisifo sikashukela ngesikhathi ehlonishwa ngendondo ye-Lifetime Achievement kumaSimon Mabhunu Sabela TV and Film Awards eThekwini, ngoJulayi 2024, wathi lesi sifo saqala ukumxina ngo-2018, kangangoba wagcina esegqigqa esibhedlela futhi nodokotela baze bafuna nokumnqamula umlenze. UCynthia odabuka eLamontville, waba ngunobuhle wokuqala omnyama kuleli ukumela iNingizimu

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: siyibone into enje lapha eNingizimu Afrika. Ngazitshela ukuthi uZuma uqhamuke nento entsha kodwa konke kushabalele. UZuma wayekhona ngesikhathi kwenziwa isimemezelo. Bekufuneka umuntu okuzosulelwa ngaye icala. Kusobala ukuthi icala lisulelwe ngaye uNdhlela." UNkk Zuma-Sambudla yena ubhale ezinkundleni zokuxhumana ukuthi uNdhlela ube yimvu yomhlatshelo. "Ngelinye ilanga iqiniso liyovela." UNdhlela ubesebambe lesi sikhundla kusukela kusungulwa iMKP ngo-2023. I-MKP iqoke uqweqwe lwentatheli, uMnuz Sifiso Mahlangu, ukuba kube yilona olukhulumela iqembu.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: UMFUNDISI Makitaza webhantshi eliwolintshi emukela umklomelo wakhe ISIZULU sithi umuntu ubongwa esefile kodwa uMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu uphume eceleni njengojosaka ngokuhlonipha izingwazi zawo zisadla anhlamvana. La maqhawe abeke induku ebandla emikhakheni ehlukahlukene athulelwe isigqoko emcimbini obusePietermaritzburg City Hall ngoLwesine. Kwabachonywe uphaphe lwegwalagwala kuMgungundlovu District Legends Music Experience Awards kubalwa umakadebona emculweni we-jazz uThemba Mokoena, inkakha emculweni wokholo uSam "Mfundisi Makitaza" Zondi, usonkondlo uBotsotso "Ibhubesi LaseMgungundlovu" Mahlaba, owayengumsakazi weRadio Maritzburg ne-P4 Radio uBrian Zuma, umlingisi woZalo uZama Magubane-Ngcobo onguMaDongwe, owayedlalela iMamelodi Sundowns uSandile "AK47" Ndlovu, umsunguli wenhlangano egqugquzela ukuhlolwa kwezintombi kuleli uDkt Nomagugu Ngobese nabanye. Lo mcimbi wezindondo bewenziwe ngokubambisana wuMkhandlu waseMgungundlovu, uMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko, CCIFSA, KwaZulu-Natal Sports Confederation, ABASA ne-MKP Protection Services. Phakathi kwezicukuthwane ebezizimazise le ndumezulu bekukhona iMeya yalo Mkhandlu, uMzi Zuma, iMeya yaseRichmond uMelikhaya Ngcongo neyaseMpofana uMaureen Magubane, iNhloko yoMnyango wezemiDlalo, ubuCiko namaSiko KwaZulu-Natal uDkt uNtokozo Sifunda namakhosi asezindaweni ezakhele lo mkhandlu. Kulo mcimbi akuhlonishwanga kuphela izingwazi ezibeke induku

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: mbiko walolu daba kuzophoqa ukuthi ubuyiselwe ePhalamende ukuthi kuzophenywa kabusha ngawo ukuze kutholakale ukuthi akubanga nagcobho yini malungana nalolu daba, futhi kubhekwe ukuthi asizukuba bikho yini isidingo sokuthi kushushiswe uRamaphosa malungana nalokhu. Isinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo siphikisa isinqumo esaphuma ngoDisemba 2022, esakhishwa yiKomiti elalilawulwa ngamalungu e-African National Congress, abanquma ukuthi ukuthi kungalandelelwa umbiko wekomiti elizimele - owawuveze ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wephula umthetho ngokugcina le mali ngokungemthetho epulazini lakhe ngoFebhuwari wango-2020, okuvela ukuthi yayilinganiselwa ku-580 000 wamaDola aseMelika, okungaba ngaphezudlwana kuka-R9.4 million. Njengoba sekuphume lesi sinqumo seNkantolo yoMthethosisekelo, amalungu ePhalamende kuzomele ukuthi abuyele kulesi sigatshana somthetho u-Section 89, abheke nalowo mbiko - bese kuphenywa kabusha ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukuthi konke kulandeleka ngokusemthethweni. Leli komidi elizimele, eliholwa yiNhloko yamaJaji uSandile Ngcobo, yathola ngoNovemba wango-2022 ukuthi kwakunobufakazi bokuthi uRamaphosa wasebenzisa kabi amandla negunya analo ukuthi agcine le mali yakwelinye izwe epulazini lakhe, futhi wagunyaza nokuthi isetshenziswe ngasese ngale komngcele waleli zwe. Kanti manje izinto

author: Zakhele Xaba
text: uma ubanika isikhathi nesikhala ikakhulukazi eduze nebhokisi, bazokwazi ukuxhumana bashaye igoli. Ngakho bekufanele sikuvale lokho, sibazume uma bekade behlasela. Esiwombeni sokuqala kusebenzile kodwa besizenzela phansi," kusho uZwane. Ukufuna kukaZwane ukuwina lo mdlalo kubonakale emuva kokuthi abafana bakhe beshaye igoli lesibili lokulinganisa. Ubonakale ebahebeza besajabula, efuna beyoqhubeka nomdlalo. "Bengihlala ngisho ukuthi lo mdlalo sizowuwina, noma ngabe sekusele isikhathi esingakanani, sizolithola igoli lokuwina. Umphumela omubi ebesingawuthola namuhla bekungaba wukucazelana ngamaphuzu kodwa bengingeke nganele ngalokho. Kufanele ngincome abadlali bonke, nakuba singenelwe ngamagoli alula. Iyona kuphela indlela esingafunda ngayo. Kungokokuqala kule sizini siwina umdlalo sikade silandela ngemuva. Lokhu kuzokwengeza ukuzethemba eqenjini futhi ngiyathemba ukuthi lokhu kuzosisa phambili,'' usho kanje uZwane. Emdlalweni olandelayo wePremiership, AmaZulu azovakashela iMarumo Gallants eDr Molemela Stadium, eBloemfontein, ngoMgqibelo ntambama. Imiphumela yemidlalo yeBetway Premiership Orbit College 0-1 Chippa United; Sekhukhune United 0-0 Orlando Pirates; Richards Bay 1-1 Siwelele; AmaZulu 3-2 TS Galaxy; Durban City v Polokwane City

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: sizoyinqoba impi yalesi sifo. Yisibalo esikhulu esake saba naso ngonyaka sabantu abahlolwa iTB kuleli." Uthe abantu asebeke bahlangana nomuntu one-TB kumele bayohlolwa ukuze kutholakale ukuthi abathelelekanga ngaso. UNgqongqoshe wezeMpilo kuleli, uDkt Aaron Motsoaledi, uthe umkhankaso owathulwa nyakenye owokuhlola abantu abangu-5 million ngonyaka kulesi sifo. Uthe abantu bacabanga ukuthi lesi sifo sihambisana nesifuba kuphela kanti akunjalo. "Sihlala noma yikuphi emzimbeni. Singahlala esibelethweni sowesifazane, nakwezinye izindawo emzimbeni," usho kanje.

author: Charles Khuzwayo
text: akuleli azobe eshiyelana inkundla nguye uThandiswa, uMcCoy Mrubata, Khaya Mahlangu noNdabo Zulu. KwiDinaledi Stage kuzobe kunandisa o-Ibrahim Maalouf, Judith Sephuma no-Ola Onabule kanti kwiDiphala Stage kuzobe kushiyelana inkundla oNubya Garcia noLorraine Klaasen. KwiConga Stage kuzobe kunandisa oTank, The Bengas, Reza Khota, Madala Kunene noSibusile Xaba. KwiMbira Stage kuzobe kunandisa uNomfusi, Anais Rosso, Floetry, Buhlebendalo Mda, Zawadi YaMungu noXolisa Dlamini. Umdidiyeli walo mcimbi, uMantwa Chinoamadi, uthe iStandard Bank Joy of Jazz yakulo nyaka izokhumbuza abantu ngeminyaka eyadlula bese kubhekwa nekusasa lomculo we-jazz kuleli. Uthe umcimbi walo nyaka uqondaniswe nesikhumbuzo sokuphela kweminyaka engu-50 kwenzeka isibhicongo sabafundi baseSoweto ngoJuni 16, 1976 nesemashi yabantu besifazane ngo-Agasti 9, 1956. Kulindeleke izethameli ezibalelwa ku-25 000.

author: Mhlengi Shangase
text: UMHOLI weRISE Mzansi, uMnuz Songezo Zibi AZONGENELA ukhetho ngokuzimela amaqembu amathathu, ayememezele ukuthi azobumbana, angenele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. La maqembu okuyiGOOD Party, RISE Mzansi neBosa, izolo akhiphe isitatimende esiveze ukuthi asezongenela ukhetho ngawodwana. Athe ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change ngoba kunezinto okusadingeke ukuthi kubhungwe kabanzi ngazo. "Phezu kokuba lilikhulu ibanga eselihanjiwe ekutheni kuhlanganiswe la maqembu ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokubambisana kodwa kunesidingo sokuthi kuqale kulungiswe ezinye zezinto. Lezi zinto ngeke zikwazi ukuphothulwa ngokushesha, njengoba ukhetho luseMome. Yingakho kunesidingo sokuthi amaqembu, aqhubeke nokuzimela okhethweni," kusho isitatimende salawa maqembu. Sithe la maqembu azobakhona ephepheni lokuvota, lapho ezobe ezimele geqe. "Ngeke esangenela ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change. Izwe lisenkingeni ngakho lidinga abaholi abanamava." Phambilini, la maqembu ayethe azobhalisa kwikhomishini eyengamele ukhetho ngaphansi kwe-Unite for Change, ukuze angenele ukhetho ngokuhlanganyela. author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: KUSUKELA kwesokunxele uNksz Ntombenhle Dlamini, uMnuz Mandla Ndlovu, uMnuz Muntomuhle Mcambi, uDkt Nakanjani Sibiya, uNksz Nompumelelo Khumalo, uSolwazi Themba Qwabe noMnuz Zwelihle Mkhize benhlangano yababhali Usiba Writer’s Guild. IGCAGCELE esokeni kubabhali bezincwadi abasafisa ukuchuma kulandela isimemezelo senhlangano yababhali, uSiba Writer's Guild, sokuvukuza amakhono amasha kulo mkhakha. USiba, kuleli viki, lwethule isigungu esisha esesizosingatha zonke izinhlelo, nokuyisona esizwakalise ukuthi sifisa ukuthi kube nezithelo ezibonakalayo ukusebenzisana namaciko asafufusa. Umbhali osemnkantshubomvu uDkt Nakanjani Sibiya uqokwe njengoSihlalo woSiba, kwathi iPhini likaSihlalo kwaba uMnuz Muntomuhle Mcambi, uMgcinimafa uDkt Themba Qwabe, kwesikaNobhala kwaba uNksz Nompumelelo Khumalo, yena osekelwa uNksz Ntombenhle Dlamini. Amalungu okwengeza kube ngoMnuz Zwelihle Mkhize noMnuz Mandla Ndlovu. Engxoxweni neSolezwe Ngempelasonto, uSihlalo woSiba, uDkt Sibiya wodumo lwencwadi esihloko sithi Bengithi Lizokuna, udalule ukuthi bekungahlali kahle emoyeni wabo ukuthi le nhlangano isize yafika eminyakeni ewu-40 yaba khona kodwa kusalokhu kunzima ukuthi ifinyelele kubantu ngendlela abafisa ngayo. “Ngenkathi kuqala le nhlangano ngo-1985 inhloso enkulu kwakuwukuthi ibambe

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: Kube ongaphansi nongaphezulu isiboshwa sivimbezela amaphoyisa esiteshini saseNtuzuma Luqale kabi usuku emaphoyiseni asesiteshini saseNtuzuma ejikelwa yisiboshwa esineminyaka engu-22 ubudala kungazelele muntu ngoMsombuluko ekuseni. Ngokusho kukaColonel Robert Netshiunda, umsolwa waboshwa ngoMgqibelo ngecala lokuzama ukubulala owomndeni ekhaya. ngemuva kokuthi isiboshwa okuthiwa sihlule iphoyisa ngamandla salibamba isibhamu sashiya inqwaba yamaphoyisa evaleleke ngaphakathi ebhilidini. Ngokusho kwabeReaction Unit South Africa (RUSA), isiboshwa sihlule iphoyisa ebelingaphakathi ezitokisini esiteshini samaphoyisa eNtuzuma ebelizomthatha limubeke icala ngokusemthethweni kwasukathuthuva. “Kubikwe ukuthi isiboshwa sihlule iphoyisa ebelingaphakathi ezitokisini ngamandla saphuca iphoyisa izikhiye zasesitokisini,kusho Prem Balram okhulumela iRUSA. Okhulumela amaphoyisa uthi kufike amanye amaphoyisa ukuzohlola isimo ngemuva kokuzwa umsindo, isiboshwa lesi sagxuma sahlala sithathela iphoyisa isibhamu savulela ngenhlamvu khona lapho. Alikho iphoyisa elidubulekile ngesikhathi kwenzeka lokhu, kuze kwafika amanye amaphoyisa asinqoba ngenhlamvu isiboshwa. Ngokusho kukaGarrith Jamieson we-ALS Paramedics, umsolwa ubulawe ngesikhathi kudutshulwana namaphoyisa. Okhulumela amaphoyisa uRobert Nethsuinda uthe amaphoyisa amabili alimale kancane ngesikhathi kuqubuka ingxabano, kodwa awadubulekanga. Ubuye waveza ukuthi yize umsebenzi uqhubeka

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: engahambi yedwa, njengoba kuzoba khona ozakwabo kule ndima okubalwa kubona imbongi uSindiswa Zulu, uLuleka Mhlanzi naye obhala futhi ahaye izinkondlo, kube wuDemima Nokusa Buthelezi ozobe enzisa futhi ecebisa izethameli izindlela zokukhulula nokusabalalisa umqondo, kube wumeluleki wezengqondo uTholinhlanhla Dlamini-Ngcoya, imbongi uMthuthu Ndebele nomculi uMandisa Cebekhulu. UDEMISA Nokusa Buthelezi ngesinye sezikhulumi ezizobe zikhona embuthaneni Leli ciko lidalule nokuthi okunye okuhlabahlosile okuzokwenzeka kulo mbuthano wukuthi lizokwethula ngokusemthethweni incwadi yalo yokuqala yezinkondlo zesiZulu esihloko sithi Ikhefu: Awulidingi Yini Ikhefu? - nayo equkethe umyalezo ohambisana nokuzobe kudingidwa. Lithe lilindele izithameli eziphakathi kwa-50 kuya ku-80 kulo mcimbi kanti abafisa ukuba khona bengathenga amathikithi eQuicket ngo-R300 lilinye no-R500 elihambisana nencwadi. Ngale kweKhefu, uMbali usezifake ezinhlizweni zabaningi abakhonze ubuciko ngomcimbi wakhe waminyaka wezinkondlo nomculo othi Poetry on The Lawn. Ngale kwalokho, waziwa nangenkondlo yakhe ethi Isibeletho futhi usesebenze namaciko ehlukene okubalwa kuwona uGubhela, Mzukulu, Nkosazana Daughter uNontokozo Mkhize neMalumz on Decks.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: okukhomba ukuthi indlela engicula ngayo ayifani nhlobo nabajwayele ukukulalela emculweni,” usho kanje. UMCULI we-house nama-piano uDe Rose ufike kwezwakala emculweni Eqhuba, uDe Rose uthe okunye akuqikelelayo wukuthi noma ngabe ucula ingoma enomyalezo ongaqondene nye ngqo, kepha kumele umyalezo wayo uqine futhi ube nesisindo - okuthola indawo ekhethekile endlebeni nasemqondweni womlaleli. “Kufana nakule ngoma ethi Lutho, equkethe umyalezo ongangithinti kangako, kepha ngoba ngangazi ukuthi kukhona umuntu ozomthinta - ngavumela ukuthi ngibe sesimweni salowo myalezo ewuqukethe ukuze ngizokwenza ubulungiswa kuyona,” kulanda yena. Uthe uzimisele ukuqhubeka akhele kulokhu asekuzuzile manje ngomculo wakhe ukusiza ukucaba indlela yokufeza okunye okukhulu, nokuzomsiza ukukhula nokuchuma endimeni. UDe Rose igama lakhe lokuzalwa wuThandeka Cele, kanti kumanje usematheni ngengoma yakhe entsha eshaya ngesigqi seHip-Hop ethi Easy, apike kuyona oBlue Pappi noLowfeye. Usesebenze nenqwaba yamaciko okubalwa kuwona oFrank Mabeat, uTycoon, uBabalwa M, uSino Msolo, uKelvin Momo, uNomfundo Moh, uTyler ICU, iMurumba Pitch, uSoa Mattrix, uCnethemba Gonelo, uStixx, uSam Deep no-Omit

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: ngokushesha emhlabeni jikelele neNingizimu Afika iyingxenye yalowo mshungu. "Sifuna abadlali besifazane bazibone benendawo eqenjini leKaizer Chiefs,” kusho uJessica. “Siyabonga kwiSafa ngokuqhubeka kwayo nokweseka ibhola labesifazane, noxhaso esilutholile njengeqembu kwiBrima Logistics. Abaxhasi badingeka kakhulu ekuthuthukiseni nasekukhuliseni ibhola labesifazane ezweni lethu,” kuqhuba uJessica oyiphini likamengameli weCaf African Clubs Association (ACA). Ngaphandle kokuhamba emiyalelweni yeCaf yokuba neqembu labesifazane, Amakhosi andisa isibalo samaqembu abesifazane angaphansi kwamaqembu eBetway Premiership, okuyiMamelodi Sundowns Ladies ne-TS Galaxy Queens abadlala kwiHollywoodbets Super League.

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: ngendlela. Abantu abahlwempu bayazithola izidingo lapho kuphethe khona i-DA. Ezifundazweni esiphethe kuzo nakhona senza umsebenzi oncomekayo. Ongqongqoshe beDA abakuhulumeni kazwelonke nabo benza kahle kakhulu. Abanye bazi ukukhuluma nje, bazi ukugxekana nathi, thina siyasebenza." Uthe okubasalele ukuba bangenise lapho bengavotelwa khona. "Abantu abaningi sebebonile ukuthi i-DA iyakwazi ukuhambisa izidingo. Okusele ukuthi thina sisondele eduze kwabantu. Lokho akusho ukuthi sekufanele silaxaze labo abasivotele." UHill-Lewis uthe bazoqhubeka nokuzibamba ziqine kuhulumeni wokubambisana. "Kufanele siqhubeke nokuphikisana nemigomo evimba ukukhula komnotho kuhulumeni wokubambisana." Phakathi kwabaholi abaqokelwe ezikhundleni, kubalwa umholi we-DA eGauteng, uMnuz Solly Msimanga, oqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo weFederal, uNgqongqoshe wezeMfundo eyisiSekelo, uNksz Siviwe Gwarube, oqokelwe kwesePhini lokuqala likaSihlalo kwathi uNgqongqoshe wezokuXhumana, uMnuz Solly Malatsi, waqokelwa kwesePhini lesithathu likaSihlalo. IPhini likaNgqongqoshe wezeziMali, uMnuz Ashor Sarupen, liqokelwe kwesikaSihlalo womkhandlu we-DA.

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: UKABZA De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeScorpion Kings ababonga uxhaso lwabalandeli babo kudayiswa ephela amathikithi omcimbi wabo ozoba ngoSepthemba IZINSIZWA esezizakhele igama endimeni yomculo ngisho emazweni omhlaba uKabza De Small noDJ Maphorisa abaziwa ngeThe Scorpion Kings, sezibonge abantu bakuleli ngokuzixhasa bathenga aphela amathikithi omcimbi wazo. Lokhu bakuveze izolo nala bethe uxhaso abaluthole kubantu yize kuqale kwaba nomsindo, luyamangalisa. Ekuqaleni kwale nyanga laba bamemezela izindaba zokuthi umcimbi iScorpion King Live uzoba ngoSepthemba 26, enkundleni yezemidlalo iFNB. Abantu abaningi bakhala ngokubiza kwamathikithi alo mcimbi, bathi lezi zinsizwa zinyuse kakhulu intengo yawo, akusafani naseminyakeni edlule. Lo mcimbi kulindeleke ukuthi ekuhambeni kwesikhathi ube ngomunye wemikhulu kuleli njengoba engu-70 000 amathikithi adayisiwe. UDJ Maphorisa uveze ukuthi bayabonga kakhulu ngothando abaluthole kubantu manje basezinhlelweni zokuthi bavule amathikithi akhethekile ngoMeyi 22. "Uthando abalandeli bethu abasikhombise lona lukwelinye izinga ngempela, ukubabona ngendlela ababe nesasasa ngayo simemezela umcimbi nokuvulwa kwamathikithi kusho lukhulu kithi futhi asikuthathi kancane lokho ngoba siba

author: Nokubongwa Phenyane
text: Abalimi bakamoba nabasebenzi abebefuna izincazelo izolo ngekusasa labo kanjalo nelemisebenzi yabanye babasebenzi njengoba bethi kunzima ukusebenza muva nje nemiholo yabo seyehlile ngenxa yokungathengwa komoba wabo ABALIMI bakamoba sebephumele obala bathi bafuna ukwazi ngekusasa labo enkampanini kashukela, iTongaat Hullets. Lokhu bakusho izolo njengoba bebenesiteleka ngaphandle kwamasango ale nkampani, nabanye babasebenzi abaqashwe abasebenza ezimobeni. Bathe manje sesifikile isikhathi sokuthi batshelwe ngekusasa labo njengoba konke kumile, kungekho inqubekela phambili ngokuthengwa kwemikhiqizo yabo, okwenza bangakhiphi isivuno sikamoba, futhi kungangeni mali nabasebenzi bangaholi. Omunye wabatshali bakamoba uMnuz Derrick Mkhize, othe uqashe abantu abangu-70 enkampanini yakhe, uthe okubuhlungu wukuthi selokhu kwavela izindaba zokuthi inkampani kashukela kungenzeka ivalwe, abasebenzi bakhe sekuyizinyanga ezimbili bengatholi amaholo aphelele njengoba ingekho imali engenayo. “Lesi simo asithinti thina kuphela singabalimi bakamoba, kodwa miningi imindeni ethintekayo ngaso njengoba ithembele kithina kodwa nathi lokhu okwenzekayo sekungaphezu kwamandla ethu. Abasebenzi asazi ngempela ukuthi yini esizobatshela yona ngalesi simo ngoba nathi akukho okubambekayo esikuzwayo. South Africa.

author: Simangaliso Ntshangase
text: zokuthi uMalema wathola imalii ewu-R60 million kubantu bokufika baseNigeria abashushumbisa izidakamizwa kuleli zwe. Wadalula nokuthi uMalema angenza noma yini ukusiza ukuvikela abantu bokufika abakuleli zwe ngokungemthetho ngoba kukhona abamfumbathisa khona. Isinqumo ngaleli cala kube wukuthi uNgizwe angaphinde akhulume noma abhale, aze ashicilele noma yini engaba yinkulumo ewukuhlambalaza ngoMalema. Ube eseyalelwa nokuthi akhokhe zonke izindleko zabameli bakaMalema kuleli cala, futhi wabekelwa nomnqamlajuqu wokuvela eNkantolo ngoLwesibili oluzayo ukuzoveza ukuthi kungani kumele kuqhutshekwe ngalezi zinqumo ezikhishwe kuleli cala. Kuphinde kwazamazama izinkundla zokuxhumana ngoLwesithathu ntambama ngenkathi intandokazi yomculi kamaskandi uKhuzani ‘Indlamlenze’ Mpungose, ebhala ekhasini lakhe likaFacebook ukuthi ufuna ukuthi kungaphinde kukhulunywe lutho ngegama lakhe kulolu hlelo lukaNgizwe iBhinca Nation. Indlamlenze ithe isikhathele wukuthi kulokhu kuhlanjalazwa igama lalo kulolu hlelo, yase yesabisa ngokuthi uma ekucelayo kungenzeki, izoluvala thaqa lolu hlelo.

author: Sibusiso Mdlalose
text: Isithombe UMDLALI wasesiswini kwiKruger United, uTercious Malepe, ongomunye wabadlali abamqoka nabanamava kuleli qembu eselizibeke ethubeni elihle lokudla isicoco seMotsepe Foundation Championship YIZE eseyibona indlela ebheke kwiBetway Premiership umqeqeshi weKruger United, u-Abram Mongoya, uyavuma ukuthi ayizukuba lula imidlalo ebasalele ukusonga isizini ka-2025/26 yeMotsepe Foundation Championship. UMongoya ukusho lokhu ngemuva kokuba ezakhe ziqhubekile nokuzisondeza ekunqobeni isicoco seligi yeMotsepe Championship ngokuguqisa iCape Town City ngo 2-1 ngoLwesithathu, KaNyamazane Stadium, KaNyamazane. Ukunqoba kweKruger kwiCity esabalwa namaqembu asembangweni weligi, kuyenze yaqhubeka nokuvula igebe lamaphuzu amahlanu esicongweni se-log yeChampionship, njengoba isiqhwakele ngawu-52. Emidlalweni emine esalele iKruger ukusonga isizini, idinga ukunqoba emithathu ukuba ngompetha beMotsepe Championship ikhushulelwe esigabeni sePremiership. Ilandelwa yiHungry Lions endaweni yesibili ngawu-47, kulandele iCity neMilford ngawu-44 endaweni yesithathu neyesine ngokwehlukana. “Yonke imidlalo esisalele manje inzima. Ngibatshelile abafana ukuthi umdlalo nomdlalo esizowudlala uzoba nzima ngoba sesiphenduke iqembu wonke umuntu afuna ukulishaya uma ehlangana nalo,” kusho uMongoya. “Kubaluleke kakhulu kulesi sikhathi ukuthi abadlali bethu bagweme ukushesha

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: amandla iwenyusa ngokushesha. Noma ngingenankinga ngeKiger engena-turbo ikakhulukazi eThekwini okuyindawo egudle ulwandle kodwa uma usezindaweni ezimaphakathi nesifundazwe noma ungumuntu onokuhambela izindawo ene-turbo ungabheka ngakuyo. Akudingi ucabangisise ngaphambi kokudlula ezinye izimoto ngoba amandla iyawafaka. Umehluko omkhulu bawenze endleleni ebukeka ngayo ngaphandle nangaphakathi, uma uyiqhathanisa neKiger endala. Ngaphandle inama-LED headlights, iqoshwe u-turbo kwifenda ngaphambili, amarimu angu-16 inch, inama-roof rails athwala isisindo esingu-50kg ne-spoiler ngemuva. Uma uthanda ukwazi ukuyothola ngenombala omnyama okhakhayini ongafani nowomzimba. Ngaphakathi eseqophelweni eliphezulu inezihlalo zesikhumba okwazi ukuziqandisa ngaphambili, inendawo yokushaja iselula ngaphandle kwnentambo ne-digital instrument cluster engu-7 inch. Iphinde ibe ne-touchscreen infotainment system engu-8 inch okwazi ukuxhuma kuyo iselula nge-Apple CarPlay/Android Auto ngaphandle kwentambo. Iphinde iveze ikhamera ngemuva esiza ukuthi ungashayisi uma upaka. Lokhu kungezinye zezinto zokuphepha. Okunye enakho ngamabhreki i-ABS, EBD, iyasho uma umoya wehla emathayini, ama-airbag ayisithupha nokunye. Ukufika kweKiger turbo kwenza ikwazi ukuncintisana kahle nezimbangi okubalwa kuzo iNissan Magnite, Mahindra 3XO, Chery Tiggo 4 Pro, Hyundai

author: Sabelo Nsele
text: kube nombono athenjiswa wona. "Uma abaholi beqembu sekuba yibo abangasawulandeli loyo mbono, kuyaye kufanele ukuthi uthathe isinqumo sokuthi uyahlala noma uyahamba." Bekuqhilika izidlathi kuMncwango ngesikhathi ethulwa, ekhuza neziqubulo ze-IFP. Umholi we-IFP, uMnuz Velenkosini Hlabisa, uthe babambe ufishi omkhulu. "Namhlanje usuku olukhethekile. Egameni le-IFP simemukela ngezandla ezivulekile nangezinhliziyo ezimhlophe. Sithobeka kakhulu ukujoyinwa nguMncwango onolwazi olunzulu njengoba eke waba yisikhulu esiphezulu ezinkampani ezizimele nezisebenza ukuvikela umphakathi. Kwezokuphatha unolwazi olunzulu. Siyazi ukuthi baningi abazokulandela, abakholelwa kuwena. I-IFP ikhaya labo bonke abantu. Ingakho sihlezi siwavulile amasango." UHlabisa uthe asikho isikhundla athenjiswe sona uMncwango. UHlabisa uthe amava kaMncwango azosiza ekukhuliseni iqembu kanjalo nasemkhankasweni wokhetho lohulumeni basekhaya oluzayo, wathi bafuna ukunqoba omasipala abaningi okhethweni oluzayo. "Ngesikhathi kuza ukhetho lohulumeni basekhaya lwango-2021, sathi sifuna ukunqoba inqwaba yomasipala. Abantu bathi siyazikhohlisa. Namanje kunenqwaba yomasipala esifuna ukubanqoba. Kunomasipala abaphethwe ngokubambisana esifuna ukubanqoba futhi sifuna ukuqhubeka nokunqoba komasipala esiphethe kubo. Umgqigqo wethu muhle kakhulu njengoba sinqobe amawadi amaningi okhethweni lokuchibiyela

author: Mthokozisi Mncuseni
text: nawu-54 ePirates emuva kwesibalo semidlalo esifanayo (23). Ngokusho kwakhe, bobabili uNduli noXoki babuya ekulimaleni okubucayi kodwa sebeqalile ukusebenzela enkundleni nokuhlale kuyizinkomba zokuthi sekuseduze phambili. “Iphutha esingakaze silenze ngelokuqhela kuNduli noXoki ngoba belimele kwazise bangabadlali abamqoka kithina nabangabaholi,” kusho u-Ouaddou. “Kuyasijabulisa ukubabona begijima etshanini abadlali abayizinsika abese behlale isikhathi eside besebenzela ngaphakathi (ejimini). “Konke kuyethembisa ngabo bobabili kodwa inkinga ukuthi kanginayo incazelo eqondile ngokuthi bazobuya nini enkundleni ngoba lokho kuphethwe ngodokotela beqembu. “Ngiyazi ukuthi amava abo nobuholi babo ngiyabudinga kodwa ngeke ngiphoqe ukuthi basheshe babuye enkundleni ngoba bamqoka kakhulu kwiPirates. “Ngisho ngabe kuthiwa bayoze babonakale enkundleni ngesizini ezayo, ngeke ngibe nankinga yinqobo nje uma bezobuya bewumqemane ngokugcwele ngoba ukulimala kwabo ngiyakwazi ukuthi bekubucayi kangakanani,” kusho u-Ouaddou. Yize lezi zindaba zingemnandi kwabalandela iPirates kodwa kufanele ukuba kubathoba inhliziyo ukwazi ukuthi esiswini ukhombisa izimpawu zokukhula uMasindi Nemtajela ekubeni kusekhona noMakhehleni Makhaula olindile ebhentshini. Ukungabibikho kukaXoki nakho akunakeki kwazise uNkosinathi Sibisi noLebone Seema sebenqabe

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: nje, bakhiphe i-albhamu ngokuhlanganyela neMambazo, kubalwa noMbuso Khoza ethi One Voice – One World. “Abantu abanjengobaba uMazibuko babe negalelo nanokuthi babe nendlela yokuthi yini abafuna ukuyishiya siyikhumbula ngabo lokho okuyifudumezayo inhliziyo ngesikhathi sokukhala. Basishiye nolwazi oluningi, basishiye namathuba amaningi futhi sizohlala sibakhumbula ngamagalelo abo. Kuye kuthiwa umuntu onjengobaba uMazibuko akahambi usekhona, uphila kumculo nezimfundiso nakho konke akwenzile emhlabeni.”

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: nguLindokuhle Mgedezi, uziphikile izinsolo zokuthi uyahlukumeza. "Sekuyisikhathi eside ngithule ngoba ngihlonipha ubudlelwano bethu futhi ngethemba ukuthi sizolungisa izinto ngasese. Ngiyabona kodwa manje ukuthi ukuthula kwami kuthatheka ngenye indlela. Ngibona kubalulekile ukuthi ngiveze ukuthi nami ngike ngahlukumezeka emoyeni nasemzimbeni ngabhekana nezinye izingqinamba ebudlelwaneni engikhethe ukuthi ngingazivezi emphakathini," kusho uMlindo. Uthe okusatshalaliswa emphakathini kungcolisa igama lakhe. UMlindo uthe ucela ukunikwa isikhathi sokubhekana nezinto zakhe futhi unethemba lokuthi iqiniso lizovela ngokuhamba kwesikhathi.

author: Nonkululeko Nhlapo
text: ezinye izinto. UMvangeli Nzuza naye ungena ohlelweni olukhulu lwantambama njengomethuli wezemigwaqo . Umfundi wezindaba, u-Paulette Neo Kayise uzoshintshela ezindabeni zangempelasonto. “Njengoba iMetro FM ihlanganisa iminyaka engu-40, inhloso yethu akukhona ukushintsha osekusebenzayo, kodwa wukubungaza uhambo lomkhiqizo ngethalente eselisize ekuwulolongeni eminyakeni edlule, sibe senezela ngamasu aqinisa umkhankaso wethu,” kusho uMphathi weBhizinisi weMetro FM, uKina Nhlengethwa. “La mazwi amasha ahlanganyela neqembu elivele liqinile futhi aseka ukuqhubeka komsakazo ukuxhumana nabalaleli bawo,” kuphetha uNhlengethwa. Izinguquko nezinhlelo eziqhubekayo zeMetro FM Azikho izinguquko ezinkulu ezenzeke kulo msakazo ngale kokuthaka okwaziwayo nokusondeza ithalente elisha.

author: Fanelesibonge Bengu
text: wachaza nangegama lokuqala likaMazibuko, okunguMdletshe. "Empeleni igama lakhe wuMudliwetshe kodwa kwathi uma eya eMnyangweni wezaseKhaya kwathiwa ayikho into enjalo, unguMdletshe." Uphethe ngokubonga imiyalezo yenduduzo elokhu ingena ilakanyana. "Iyasiduduza kakhulu imiyalezo. Kade ngibuka nje imiyalezo engenayo futhi baningi abantu abakhombisa ukuzwelana kakhulu nomndeni. Ngisho abezindaba basemazweni omhlaba bayabika," kusho uMajozi.
